messages.title: Sign of Jonah
messages.verse: Jesus said, " For just as Jonah became a sign of the people of Nin-e-veh, so the Son of Man will be to this generation."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him. Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

She will bear a son, and you are to name him Jesus, for he will save his people from their sins."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus cried out in the temple area as he was teaching and said, "You know me and also know where I am from. Yet I did not come on my own, but the one who sent me, whom you do not know, is true. I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me."

messages.verse: Jesus said, " Woe to you, scholars of the law! You have taken away the key of knowledge. You yourselves did not enter and you stopped those trying to enter."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Denounces Pharisees and Lawyers ) Jesus said, " Woe to you, scholars of the law! You have taken away the key of knowledge. You yourselves did not enter and you stopped those trying to enter." LK(11:52) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus sends out the Apostles
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, "The harvest is rich but the labourers are few, so ask the Lord of the harvest to send labourers to do his harvesting."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus sends out the Apostles) Jesus said to them, "The harvest is rich but the labourers are few, so ask the Lord of the harvest to send labourers to do his harvesting." LK(10:2) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Widow and the Unjust Judge
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " And will not God grant justice to his chosen ones who cry to him day and night? Will he delay long in helping them?"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Widow and the Unjust Judge) Jesus said to them, " And will not God grant justice to his chosen ones who cry to him day and night? Will he delay long in helping them?" LK(18:7) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Settling with Your Opponent
messages.verse: Jesus said, " If you are to go with your opponent before a magistrate, on the way  make an effort to settle the matter; or you may be dragged before the judge, and the judge will hand you over to the officer, and the officer throw you in prison."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Settling with Your Opponent ) Jesus said, " If you are to go with your opponent before a magistrate, on the way  make an effort to settle the matter; or you may be dragged before the judge, and the judge will hand you over to the officer, and the officer throw you in prison." LK(12:58) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Pharisee and the Tax Collector
messages.verse: Jesus said, "But the tax collector, standing far off, would not even look up to heaven, but was beating his breast and saying,  'God be merciful to me, a sinner!' For all who exalt themselves will be humbled, but all who humble themselves will be exalted. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

For all who exalt themselves will be humbled, but all who humble themselves will be exalted. " LK(18:13-14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Narrow Door
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Once the master of the house has got up and locked the door, you may find yourself standing outside knocking on the door, saying, "Lord, open to us," but he will answer, "I do not know where you come from."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(13:25) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus and Zacchaeus
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and Zacchaeus) But Zacchaeus stood there and said to the Lord, "Behold, half of my possessions, Lord, I shall give to the poor, and if I have cheated  anything from anyone I shall repay it four times over." And Jesus said to him, "Today salvation has come to this house because this man too is a descendant of Abraham. Lk(19:8-9) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Who to Feast With
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Who to Feast With) Jesus said, " But when you have a party, invite the poor, the crippled, the lame, the blind; 'and then you will be blessed, for they have no means to repay you and so you will be repaid at the resurrection of the just.'" Lk(14:13-14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Lk(14:13-14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Dine in the Kingdom of God
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Dine in the Kingdom of God) Jesus said, " The master then ordered the servant, 'Go out to the highways and country roads and make people come in that my home may be filled. For, I tell you, none of those men who were invited will taste my dinner.'" Lk(14:23-24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Lost Sheep and Coin
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Lost Sheep and Coin) Jesus said, " In just the same way, I tell you, there will be rejoicing among the angels of God over one sinner who repents." Lk(15:10) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Will Destroy this Temple and Raise it in Three Days
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Take these out of here, and stop making my Father's house a marketplace." His disciples recalled the words of scripture, "Zeal for your house will consume me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Question about the Resurrection
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Now he is God not of the dead, but of the living; for to him all of them are living."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Unprofitable Servant
messages.verse: Jesus said, " So with you: when you have done all you have been told to do, say, "We are useless servants: we have done no more than our duty."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals the Ten Lepers
messages.verse: Jesus said in reply, "Ten were cleansed, were they not? Where are the other nine? Has none but this foreigner returned to give thanks to God?"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Coming of the Kingdom of God
messages.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, "A time will come when you will long to see one of the days of the Son of man and will not see it."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Coming of the Kingdom of God  ) Jesus said to his disciples, "A time will come when you will long to see one of the days of the Son of man and will not see it."  LK(17:22) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Coming of the Kingdom of God
messages.verse: Jesus said to his disciples,  " Those who try to make their life secure will lose it, but those who lose their life will keep it.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Unjust Judge
messages.verse: Jesus said to his disciples," Will not God then secure the rights of his chosen ones who call out to him day and night? Will he be slow to answer them?"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Signs and Persecutions
messages.verse: Jesus said," Beware that you are not led astray, for many will come in my name and say, 'I am he!' and, 'The time is near!' Do not go after them."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals a Blind Beggar
messages.verse: Jesus asked him, "What do you want me to do for you?" He said, " Lord, let me see again." Jesus said to him," Receive your sight; your faith has saved you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Weeps over Jerusalem
messages.verse: As he came near and saw the city, hevwept over it, saying, "If you, even you, had only recognized on this day the things that make for peace! But now they are hidden from your eyes."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus drives the merchants out of the temple.
messages.verse: Then Jesus entered the temple and began driving out those who were busy trading , saying, "According to scripture, my house shall be a house of prayer, but you have turned it into a bandit's den."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus speaks to the two criminals.
messages.verse: Then turning to Jesus, the thief said," Just remember me,when you come into your kingdom." Jesus replied, "In truth I tell you, today, you will be with me today in paradise"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Widow's Offering.
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Truly, I tell you, this poor widow put in more than all of them. For all of them gave an offering from their plenty; but she, out of her poverty, gave all she had to live on."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

For all of them gave an offering from their plenty; but she, out of her poverty, gave all she had to live on." LK(21:3-4) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus speaks at the temple.
messages.verse: Jesus said,"Take care not to be deceived, for many will come in my name, saying, 'I am he; the time is near at hand!' Do not follow them. When you hear of wars and troubled times, dont be frightened; for all these things must happen first, even though the end is not so soon."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Witness for Jesus
messages.verse: You will be hated by all because of my name, but not a hair on your head will be destroyed. By your perseverance you will save your souls."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Lessons of the Fig Tree
messages.verse: Jesus told his disciples a parable. “Consider the fig tree and all the other trees. When their buds burst open, you see for yourselves and know that summer is now near; in the same way, when you see these things happening, know that the kingdom of God is near.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Calls Four Fishermen
messages.verse: Jesus said to them "Come with me, and I will teach you to catch men." At once they left their nets and went with him.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals a Centurion's Servant
messages.verse: The centurion answered,  " Lord, I am not worthy to have you come under my roof; but only speak the word, and my servant will be healed."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Feeds Four Thousand Men
messages.verse: Then Jesus took the seven  loaves and the fish,gave thanks to God , broke them , and gave them to the disciples ; and the disciples gave it to the people. They all ate and had enough. Then the disciples took up seven baskets full of pieces left over . The number of men that ate were four thousand not counting the women and children .
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Hearers and Doers
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Not everyone who says to me, 'Lord, Lord,' will enter the Kingdom of heaven, but only the one who does the will of my Father in heaven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Harvest is Great, the Labourers Few
messages.verse: Jesus then said to his disciples, " The harvest is plentiful, but the labourers are few; therefore ask the Lord of the harvest to send out laborers into his harvest. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Proclamation of John the Baptist
messages.verse: Jhon the Baptist proclaimed, "Repent, for the Kingdom of heaven has come near." " I baptize you with water for repentance, but one who is more powerful than I is coming after me; I am not worthy to carry his sandals. He will baptize you with the Holy Spirit and fire."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Birth of Jesus Foretold
messages.verse: Feast of Immaculate Conception of The Blessed Virgin Mary ( Birth of Jesus Foretold) The angel said to her, " The Holy Spirit will come upon you, and the power of the Most High will overshadow you; therefore the child to be born will be holy; he will be called Son of God."
messages.closing: Happy Feast to all of you and your family!!!

LK(1:35) Happy Feast to all of you and your family!!!

messages.title: Angel Appeared to Mary
messages.verse: Mary said, "Behold, I am the handmaid of the Lord. May it be done to me according to your word." Then the angel departed from her.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus and John the Baptist
messages.verse: Jesus said, "The Son of man came, eating and drinking, and they say, "Look, a glutton and a drunkard, a friend of tax collectors and sinners." Yet wisdom is justified by her deeds."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Coming of Elijah - John the Baptist
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But Ibtell you that Elijah has already come, and they did not recognize him, but they did to him whatever they pleased. So also the Son of Man is about to suffer at their hands."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus praises John the Baptist
messages.verse: Jesus said, " This is  the one about whom it is written, ' See, I am sending my messenger ahead of you, who will preper your way before you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Dream of Joseph
messages.verse: The angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, "Joseph, son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary your wife into your home. For it is through the holy Spirit that this child has been conceived in her."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Birth of Jesus the Messiah
messages.verse: All this took place to fulfill what the Lord had said through the prophet: " Look, the virgin shall conceive and bear a son, and they shall name him Emmanuel, which means "God is with us."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Birth of Jesus
messages.verse: The angel said to them, "Do not be afraid; for behold, I proclaim to you good news of great joy that will be for all the people. For today in the city of David a savior has been born for you who is Messiah and Lord."
messages.closing: May our Saviour bless all of you abundantly!!! Merry Christmas wishes to you and your family! from Agnel and Family

messages.verse: When the Magi had departed, behold, the angel of the Lord appeared to Joseph in a dream and said, "Rise, take the child and his mother, flee to Egypt, and stay there until I tell you. Herod is going to search for the child to destroy him."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus is Named
messages.verse: Mary Mother of God Solemnity ( Jesus is Named ) Then the shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all they had heard and seen, just as it had been told to them. When eight days were completed for his circumcision, he was named Jesus, the name given him by the angel before he was conceived in the womb.
messages.closing: Happy New year wishes to each one of you and your families, stay blessed during this year!! From Agnel and Family.

messages.title: Spirit Resting on Jesus
messages.verse: John said, "I did not know him, but the one who sent me to baptize with water told me, 'On whomever you see the Spirit come down and remain, he is the one who will baptize with the holy Spirit.'"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH(1:33) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus The Lamb of God
messages.verse: He first found his own brother Simon and told him, "We have found the Messiah" (which is translated Christ). Then he brought him to Jesus. Jesus looked at him and said, "You are Simon the son of John; you will be called Kephas"  (which is translated Peter)
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Then he brought him to Jesus. Jesus looked at him and said, "You are Simon the son of John; you will be called Kephas"  (which is translated Peter)  JH(1:41-42) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Preaching Tour in Galilee
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Preaching Tour in Galilee ) Jesus answered, "Let us go onto the neighbouring towns, so that I may proclaim the  message there also; for that is what I came out to do."  Mk(1:23-24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: John's Testimony
messages.verse: John the Baptist saw Jesus coming toward him and said, "Behold, the Lamb of God, who takes away the sin of the world."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Question about Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot fast while the bridegroom is with them, can they? As long as they have the bridegroom with them, they cannot fast."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Question about Fasting) Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot fast while the bridegroom is with them, can they? As long as they have the bridegroom with them, they cannot fast." MK(2:19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Question about Sabbath
messages.verse: Jesus said to them,  "The sabbath was made for man, not man for the sabbath. That is why the Son of Man is lord even of the sabbath."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals a Man on Sabbath
messages.verse: Looking around at them with anger and grieved at their hardness of heart, he said to the man, "Stretch out your hand." He stretched it out and his hand was restored."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals a Man on Sabbath) Looking around at them with anger and grieved at their hardness of heart, he said to the man, "Stretch out your hand." He stretched it out and his hand was restored." MK(3:5) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals Many Men and Women
messages.verse: He had cured many and, as a result, those who had diseases were pressing upon him to touch him. And whenever unclean spirits saw him they would fall down before him and shout, "You are the Son of God."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus is Questioned
messages.verse: Jesus said, " In truth I tell you, all human sins will be forgiven, and all the blasphemies ever uttered; but anyone who blasphemes against the Holy Spirit will never be forgiven, but is guilty of an eternal sin."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MK(3:28-29) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Calls the Sea
messages.verse: They woke him and said to him, "Teacher, do you not care that we are perishing?" He woke up, rebuked the wind, and said to the sea, "Quiet! Be still!" The wind ceased and there was great calm. Then he asked them, "Why are you terrified? Do you not yet have faith?"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus is Presented in the Temple
messages.verse: Simeon blessed them and said to Mary his mother, "Behold, this child is destined for the fall and rise of many in Israel, and to be a sign that will be contradicted, and you yourself a sword will pierce so that the thoughts of many hearts may be revealed."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Cleanses a Man with Unclean Spirits
messages.verse: crying out in a loud voice, "What have you to do with me, Jesus, Son of the Most High God? I adjure you by God, do not torment me!" He had been saying to him, "Unclean spirit, come out of the man!."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus is Rejected at Nazareth
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, " Prophets are not without honor, except in their hometown, and among their own relatives, and in their own house." And he was amazed at their unbelief.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Pharisees and Jesus
messages.verse: He answered, 'How rightly Isaiah prophesied about you hypocrites in the passage of scripture: This people honours me only with lip-service, while their hearts are far from me.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Syrophoenician Women's Faith
messages.verse: She replied and said to him, "Lord, even the dogs under the table eat the children's scraps." Then he said to her, "For saying this, you may go. The demon has gone out of your daughter."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Commandment of Lord
messages.verse: Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven." MT(5:19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Questions the Disciples
messages.verse: When he became aware of this he said to them, "Why do you conclude that it is because you have no bread? Do you not yet understand or comprehend? Are your hearts hardened? Do you have eyes and not see, ears and not hear? And do you not remember?
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MK(8:17-18) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Take up your cross and follow Me
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " For whoever wishes to save his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life for my sake and that of the gospel will save it." What profit is there for one to gain the whole world and forfeit his life?
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Teachings Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you, love your enemies, and pray for those who persecute you, that you may be children of your heavenly Father, for he makes his sun rise on the bad and the good, and causes rain to fall on the just and the unjust."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Healing of a Boy with a Spirit
messages.verse: Jesus said to him, " But I say to you, love your enemies, If you are able! --All things can be done for the one who believes." Immediately the Father of the child cried out, "I believe; help my unbelief!"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Cost of Discipleship
messages.verse: Jesus said to them all, " If any want to  become my followers, let them deny themselves and take up their cross and follow me."
messages.closing: This is our call and our mission.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Cost of Discipleship) Jesus said to them all, " If any want to  become my followers, let them deny themselves and take up their cross and follow me." LK(9:23) This is our call and our mission.

messages.title: Question about Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot  mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast."
messages.closing: Try and fast from anger, hate and pride that stop us from spreading love and care.

messages.title: Jesus Calls Levi the Tax Collector
messages.verse: Jesus answered, " Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick. I have come to call not the righteous but sinners to repentance."
messages.closing: Let's pray asking God to give us the strength to repent.

I have come to call not the righteous but sinners to repentance." LK(5:31-32) Let's pray asking God to give us the strength to repent.

messages.title: Temptation of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus answered him, "It is written, 'One does not live by bread alone.'" Jesus answered, " It is written, 'Worship the Lord your God, and serve only him.' " Jesus answered, " It is said, 'Do not put the Lord your God to test.' "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord,  spread the living word of God.

"  LK(4:4,8,12) Jesus is Lord,  spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Judgement of the Nation
messages.verse: And the king will answer them, " Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of my family, you did it to me. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord,  spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Our Father Prayer
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Pray in this way: Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name, your kingdom come, your will be done, on earth as in heaven. Give us today our daily bread; and forgive us our debts, as we forgive our debtors. And do not bring us to the test, but deliver us from the evil one."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MT(6:9-13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Ask and You Shall Receive
messages.verse: Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him. Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets."
messages.closing: Pray persistently and receive the Grace of God.

messages.title: In order to Enter Kingdom of Heavens
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Leave your offering there before the altar, go and be reconciled with your brother first, and then come back and present your offering."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: While Peter was still speaking, suddenly a bright cloud overshadowed them, and from the cloud a voice said, " This is my Son, my Beloved; listen to him!"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Request from the Mother of James and John
messages.verse: Jesus said, " And whoever wishes to be first among you must be your slave; just as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransom for many."
messages.closing: Pray asking the Lord for strength, to make us humble.

messages.title: Rich Man and Lazarus
messages.verse: He said, " 'No, father Abraham; but if someone goes to them from the dead, they will repent.' He said to him, " If they do not listen to Moses and the prophets, neither will they be convinced even if someone rises from the dead.' "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Prodigal Son
messages.verse: Father said to him, "My son, you are here with me always; everything I have is yours. But now we must celebrate and rejoice, because your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Living Water
messages.verse: Jesus said to her, " Everyone who drinks of this water will be thirsty again, but those who drink of the water that I will give them will never be thirsty. The water that I will give them will become in them a spring of water gushing up to eternal life. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Forgive and you will be Forgiven
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Then in anger his master handed him over to the torturers until he should pay back the whole debt. So will my heavenly Father do to you, unless each of you forgives your brother and sister from your heart."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Prayer of Repentance
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Raises Lazarus to Life
messages.verse: When Jesus had said this, he cried with a loud voice, " Laz' a-rus, come out!" The dead man came out, his hands and feat bound with strips if cloth, and his face wrapped in a cloth. Jesus said to them, " Unbind him, and let him go."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus The Son of God
messages.verse: Jesus answered, "If I glorify myself, my glory is worth nothing; but it is my Father who glorifies me, of whom you say, 'He is our God."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus is Condemned To Death
messages.verse: Jesus said to him, "You have said so. But I tell you, From now on you will see the Son of Man seated at the right hand of Power and coming on the clouds of heaven."
messages.closing: Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a Cross.

messages.title: Mary Anoints Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Leave her alone, She brought it so that she might keep it for the day of my burial. You always have the poor with you,but you do not always have me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Appears to Mary Magdalena
messages.verse: Jesus said to her, 'Do not cling to me, because I have not yet ascended to the Father. But go to my brothers, and tell them: I am ascending to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God.' "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

But go to my brothers, and tell them: I am ascending to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God.' " JH(20:17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Eternal Life
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The Father loves the Son and has placed all things in his hands. Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life; whoever disobeys the Son will not see life, but must endure God's wrath."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Eternal Life ) Jesus said, " The Father loves the Son and has placed all things in his hands. Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life; whoever disobeys the Son will not see life, but must endure God's wrath." JH(3:35-36) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the True Food and Drink
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Those who eat my flesh and drink my blood abide in me, and I in them. This is the bread that came down from heaven, not like which your ancestors ate, and they died. But the one who eats this bread will live forever."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!!

messages.title: Jesus the Good Shepherd
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The thief comes only to steal and kill and destroy. I came that they may have life, and have it abundantly."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the Good Shepherd
messages.verse: Jesus said, " I am the good shepherd. I know my own and my own know me, just as the Father knows me and I know the Father. And I lay down my life for the sheep."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus's Teaching
messages.verse: Jesus said, " I have come as light into the world, so that everyone who believes in me should not remain in the darkness."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus's Teaching ) Jesus said, " I have come as light into the world, so that everyone who believes in me should not remain in the darkness."JH(12:46) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Father and the Son
messages.verse: Jesus said, " And whatever you ask in my name, I will do, so that the Father may be glorified in the Son. If in my name you ask me for anything, I will do it."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the Way to the Father
messages.verse: Jesus said, " I am the Way; the Truth and the Life. No one can come to the Father except through me. Very truly, I tell you, the one who believes in me will also do the works that I do and, in fact, will do greater works than these because I am going to the Father."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Words of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus answered and said to him, "Whoever loves me will keep my word, and my Father will love him, and we will come to him and make our dwelling with him."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. messages.verse: Jesus said, " You did not choose me but I chose you. And I appointed you to go and bear fruit that will last, so that the Father will give you whatever you ask him in my name."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said, " If you love me, you will keep my commandments. And I will ask the Father, and he will give you another Advocate to be with you forever."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Commissioning of the Disciples
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the So and of the Holy Spirit, and teaching them to obey everything that O have commanded you. And remember, I am with you always, to the end of the age."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Prays to Father for the Disciples
messages.verse: Lifting up his eyes to heaven, Jesus prayed saying, " I pray not only for them, but also for those who will believe in me through their word, so that they may all be one, as you, Father, are in me and I in you, that they also may be in us, that the world may believe that you sent me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said to them, "Pay Caesar what belongs to Caesar; and God what belongs to God." And they were amazed at him.

messages.verse: Jesus called his disciples and to them, "Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven. Blessed are those  who mourn, for they will be comforted. Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Why were you searching for me? Did you not know that I must be in my Father's house?" Then he went down with them and came to Nazareth, and Was obedient to them. His mother treasured all these things in her heart.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Whom to Fear
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Do not fear those who kill the body but cannot kill the soul; rather fear him who can destroy both soul and body in hell. And even the hairs of your head are all counted. So do not be afraid; you are of more value than many sparrows.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Reward
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Whoever finds his life will lose it, and whoever loses his life for my sake will find it. Whoever receives you receives me, and whoever receives me receives the one who sent me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Kingdom of Heaven
messages.verse: Jesus said to the disciples, “The Kingdom of heaven is like a net thrown into the sea, which collects fish of every kind. When it is full they haul it ashore and sit down to put what is good into buckets. What is bad they throw away."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.l

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: The Son of Man will send his angels, and they will collect out of his kingdom all who cause others to sin and all evildoers. They will throw them into the  fiery furnace, where there will be wailing and grinding of teeth. Then the righteous will shine like the sun in the kingdom of their Father. Whoever has ears ought to hear

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: True Greatness and The Parable of the Lost Sheep
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Whoever becomes humble like this child is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven. Whoever welcomes one such child in my name welcomes me. So it is not the will of your Father in heaven that one of these little ones should be lost."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Canaanite Woman's Faith
messages.verse: She said, " Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters' table." Then  Jesus answered her, "Women, great is your faith! Let it be done for you as you wish." And her daughter was healed instantly."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Rich Man and Kingdom of God
messages.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, " Truly I tell you, it will be hard for a rich person to enter the kingdom of heaven. Again I tell you, it is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for someone who is rich to enter the kingdom of God."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Simon Peter said in reply, "You are the Messiah, the Son of the living God." Jesus said to him, " Blessed are you, Simon son of Jonah. For flesh and blood has not revealed this to you, but my heavenly Father."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Followers of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said, "For whoever wishes to save his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life for my sake will find it. What profit would there be for one to gain the whole world and forfeit his life? Or what can one give in exchange for his life?
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Assurance of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Again, I say to you, if two of you agree on earth about anything for which they are to pray, it shall be granted to them by my heavenly Father. For where two or three are gathered together in my name, there am I in the midst of them."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Love for Enemies
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you that listen, Love your enemies, do good to those who hate you, bless those who curse you, pray for those who abuse you. Do to others as you would have them do to you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Do not Judge
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Why do you see the speck in your neighbour's  eye, but do not notice the log in your own eye?"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said, " Forgive, and you will be forgiven; give, and it will be given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over, will be put into your lap; for the measure you give will be the measure you get back. Why do you see the speck in your neighbour's  eye, but do not notice the log in your own eye?"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Forgiveness
messages.verse: Jesus said to him, " Not seven times, but, I tell you, seventy-seven times. Then his Lord summoned him and said to him, ' You wicked slave! I forgave you all that debt because you pleaded with me. Should you not have had mercy on your fellow slave, as I had mercy on you?' "

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Mary and Disciples
messages.verse: Jesus said, " When Jesus saw his mother and the disciple there whom he loved, he said to his mother, "Woman, behold, your son." Then he said to the disciple, "Behold, your mother." And from that hour the disciple took her into his home."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Compares the people of this Generation
messages.verse: Jesus said,  " The Son of Man has come eating and drinking, and you say , 'Look, a glutton and a drunkard, a friend of tax collectors and sinners!' Nevertheless, wisdom is vindicated by all her children."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.,

Then he said to her, "Your sins are forgiven." And Jesus said to thewomen, " Your faith has saved you; go in peace. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Memorial of Guardian Angel
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, unless you change and become like children, you will never enter the kingdom of heaven.  See that you do not despise one of these little ones, for I say to you that their angels in heaven always look upon the face of my heavenly Father."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Turning to the disciples in private he said, "Blessed are the eyes that see what you see. For I say to you, many prophets and kings desired to see what you see, but did not see it, and to hear what you hear, but did not hear it."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

If you then, who are evil, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will the heavenly Father give the Holy Spirit to those who ask him!"

messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, " Whose head is this, and whose title?" They answered, "The emperor's." Then he said to them, " Give therefore to the emperor the things that are the emperor's and to God the things that are God's."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Fortunate are you when people insult you and persecute you and speak all kinds of evil against you because you are my follower. Be glad and joyful for a great reward is kept for you in God.

messages.title: Parable of the Ten Bridesmaids
messages.verse: Later the other bridesmaids came also, saying, 'Lord, lord, open to us.' But he replied, 'Truly I tell you, I do not know you.' Keep awake therefore, for you know neither the day nor the hour. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals Ten Lepers .
messages.verse: "And when Jesus saw them, he said, "Go show yourselves to the priests." As they were going they were cleansed.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals Ten Lepers .)  "And when Jesus saw them, he said, "Go show yourselves to the priests." As they were going they were cleansed.  LK(17:14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Dishonest Judge and Persistent Widow
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Pay attention to what the dishonest judge says. Will not God then do justice  for his chosen ones who call out to him day and night? Will he be slow to answer them?  "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Will not God then do justice  for his chosen ones who call out to him day and night? Will he be slow to answer them?  " LK(18:7) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Talent
messages.verse: " So take the talent from him, and give it to the one with ten talents. For to all those who have, more will be given, and they will have an abundance, but from those who have nothing, even what they have will be taken  away. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus and Zacchaeus
messages.verse: When they all saw this, they began to grumble, saying, "He has gone to stay at the house of a sinner." Jesus said, " For the Son of Man has come to seek and to save what was lost."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: The King said, " But as for these enemies of mine who did not want me to be king over thembring them here and slaughter them in my presence."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus speaks to the Sadduces
messages.verse: Jesus replied 'Those who are judged worthy of a place in the other world and in the resurrection from the dead do not marry because they can no longer die, for they are the same as the angels, and being children of the resurrection they are children of God.'
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Signs and Persecutions
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Signs and Persecutions ) Jesus then said to them, " Nations will rise against nations and kingdom against kingdom; there will be powerful earthquakes, and in various places famines and plagues; and there will be dreadful portents and great signs from heaven." LK (21:10-11) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Coming Of The Son Of Man
messages.verse: Jesus said, "People will faint from fear and foreboding of what is coming upon the world, for the powers of the heaven will be shaken. Then they will see 'the Son Of Man coming in a cloud' with power and great glory. Now when these things begin to take place, stand up and raise your heads, because your redemption is drawing near"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Now when these things begin to take place, stand up and raise your heads, because your redemption is drawing near" LK(21:26-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Necessity for Watchfulness
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Beware, keep alert; for you do not know when the time will come."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Rejoices
messages.verse: Then turning to the disciples, Jesus said to them privately, " Blessed are the eyes that see what you see! For I tell you that many prophets and kings desired to see what you see, but did not see it, and to hear what you hear, but did not hear it."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(10:23-24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Cures Many People
messages.verse: Great crowds came to him, bringing with them the lame, the maimed, the blind, the mute, and many others. They put them at his feet, and he cured them, do that the crowd was amazed when they saw the mute speaking, the maimed whole, the lame walking, and the blind seeing. And they praised the God of Israel.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

And they praised the God of Israel. MT(15:30-31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Wise and Foolish Builder
messages.verse: Jesus said to his disciples: "Not everyone who says to me, 'Lord, Lord,' will enter the kingdom of heaven, but only the one who does the will of my Father in heaven. Everyone who listens to these words of mine and acts on them will be like a wise man who built his house on rock."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Everyone who listens to these words of mine and acts on them will be like a wise man who built his house on rock." MT(7:21&24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Proclamation of John the Baptist
messages.verse: 2nd Advent Sunday-Gospel ( Proclamation of John the Baptist) John proclaimed, " The one who is more powerful than I is coming after me, I am not worthy to stoop down and untie the thong of his sandals. I have baptized you with water, but he will baptize you with the Holy Spirit."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Yoke of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said to the crowds, “Come to me, all you who labor and are burdened, and I will give you rest."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: So they said to Jesus in reply, "We do not know." Jesus said to them, "Neither shall I tell you by what authority I do these things."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Messengers from John the Baptist
messages.verse: Jesus answered the messengers, "Go and tell John what you have seen and heard: the blind receive their sight, the lame walk, the lepers are cleansed, the deaf hear, the dead are raised, the poor have good news brought to them. And blessed is anyone who takes no offense at me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

And blessed is anyone who takes no offense at me." MT(7:22-23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Angel Appeared to Mary
messages.verse: Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him Jesus."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the Word
messages.verse: "And the Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us, and we have seen his glory, the glory as of the Father's only Son, full of grace and truth."
messages.closing: May this Christmas bring Joy, Peace, Good Health and Happiness to all of you and your families!! From Asher, Chris, Celine & Agnel.

JH(1:14) May this Christmas bring Joy, Peace, Good Health and Happiness to all of you and your families!! From Asher, Chris, Celine & Agnel.

messages.title: Jesus is Presented in the Temple
messages.verse: Then Simeon blessed them and said to his mother Mary, " This child is destined for the falling and the rising of many in Israel, and to be a sign that will be opposed so that the inner thoughts of many will be revealed and a sword will pierce your own soul too."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: And coming forward at that very time, she gave thanks to God and spoke about the child to all who were awaiting the redemption of Jerusalem.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus is Named
messages.verse: Mary Mother of God Solemnity ( Jesus is Named ) Then the shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all they had heard and seen, just as it had been told to them. When eight days were completed for his circumcision, he was named Jesus, the name given to him by the angel before he was conceived in the womb.
messages.closing: Happy New year 2021 wishes to each one of you and your families!! May the Almighty bless and keep you'll safe during this year!! From Agnel and Family.

messages.title: Jesus Reads The Scroll of Isaiah
messages.verse: Jesus read, "The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he has anointed me to bring glad tidings to the poor. He has sent me to proclaim liberty to captives and recovery of sight to the blind, to let the oppressed go free, and to proclaim a year acceptable to the Lord."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: And Jesus cured many who were sick with various diseases, and cast out many demons, and he would not permit the demons to speak,  because they knew him.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Pronouncement of the Sabbath
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " The sabbath was made for  humankind, and not humankind for the sabbath, so the Son of Man is lord even of the sabbath."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals Multitude at the Seaside
messages.verse: He had cured many and, as a result, those who had diseases were pressing upon him to touch him. And whenever unclean spirits saw him they would fall down before him and shout, "You are the Son of God." But he sternlyordered them not to make him known.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Appoints the Twelve Apostles
messages.verse: Jesus went up the mountain and summoned those whom he wanted  and they came to him. He appointed twelve (whom he also named apostles) that they might be with him and he might send them forth to preach"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Calls the First Disciple
messages.verse: As Jesus passes along the Sea of Galilee, he saw Simon and his brother Andrew casting a net into the sea - for they were fishermen. And Jesus said to them, "Follow me and I will make you fish for people."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Instructs the Apostles
messages.verse: Jesus said to the eleven: "Go into the whole world and proclaim the Gospel to every creature. Whoever believes and is baptized will be saved; whoever does not believe will be condemned."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Mission of the Seventy
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Mission of the Seventy) Jesus said to them, " Whenever you enter a town and its people welcome you, eat what is set before you; cure the sick who are there, and say to them, 'The kingdom of God  has come near to you.' " LK (10:8-9) Happy Republic Day!

messages.title: Measure you Give You Get Back
messages.verse: Jesus said to the crowds, "This is how it is with the Kingdom of God; it is as if a man were to scatter seed on the land and would sleep and rise night and day and the seed would sprout and grow, he knows not how."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals on the Sabbath at the Synagogue
messages.verse: 4th Ordinary Sunday  Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals on the Sabbath at the Synagogue ) Just then there was in their synagogue was a man with an unclean spirit, and he cried out, "What have you to do with us, Jesus of Nazareth? Have you come to destroy us? I know who you are, the Holy One of God!" Mk(1:23-24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Rejection of Jesus at Nazareth
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "Prophets are not without honor, except in their hometown, and among their own kin, and in their own house." And he was amazed at their unbelief.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Disciples  Proclaimed it's Time to Repent
messages.verse: Jesus summoned the Twelve and began to send them out two by two and gave them authority over unclean spirits. He instructed them to take nothing for the journey but a walking stick--no food, no sack, no money in their belts.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Mission of the Twelve
messages.verse: Then Jesus called the twelve and began to send them out two by two, and gave them authority over the unclean spirits. So they went out and proclaimed that all should repent.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Death of John the Baptist
messages.verse: King Herod heard about Jesus, for his fame had become widespread, and people were saying, "John the Baptist has been raised from the dead; That is why mighty powers are at work in him." Others were saying, "He is Elijah"; still others, "He is a prophet like any of the prophets." But when Herod learned of it, he said, "It is John whom I beheaded. He has been raised up.""
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Healing the Sick in Gennesaret
messages.verse: And wherever he went, into villages or cities or farms, they laid the Sick in the marketplace, and bagged him that they might touch even the fringe of his cloaks; and all who touched it were healed.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Cleanses a Leper
messages.verse: 6th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cleanses a Leper ) A leper came to him begging him, and kneeling he said to him, "If you choose, you can make me clean." Moved with pity, Jesus stretched out his hand and touched him, and said to him, "I do choose. Be made clean!"  Mk(1:40-41) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."
messages.closing: Stay blessed during this beautiful time of lent!!
messages.fullText: Ash Wednesday Gospel msg ( Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting ) Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."  MT(6:3,6,17-18) Stay blessed during this beautiful time of lent!!

messages.title: Cost of Discipleship
messages.verse: Jesus said to them all, " If any want to  become my followers, let them deny themselves and take up their cross and follow me."
messages.closing: Jesus his calling us to be a part of his mission.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Cost of Discipleship) Jesus said to them all, " If any want to  become my followers, let them deny themselves and take up their cross and follow me." LK(9:23) Jesus his calling us to be a part of his mission.

messages.title: Cost of Discipleship
messages.verse: Jesus said to them all, " If anyone wants to  become my followers, let them deny themselves and take up their cross and follow me."
messages.closing: Jesus is calling us to be disciples.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Cost of Discipleship) Jesus said to them all, " If anyone wants to  become my followers, let them deny themselves and take up their cross and follow me." LK(9:23) Jesus is calling us to be disciples.

messages.title: Question about Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot  mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast."
messages.closing: Let's fast from anger, hate and pride that stop us from spreading the love of Jesus.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Question about Fasting) Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot  mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast." MT(9:15) Let's fast from anger, hate and pride that stop us from spreading the love of Jesus.

messages.title: Jesus Calls Levi the Tax Collector
messages.verse: Jesus answered, " Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick. I have come to call not the righteous but sinners to repentance."
messages.closing: Repentance marks the joy of living.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Calls Levi the Tax Collector) Jesus answered, " Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick. I have come to call not the righteous but sinners to repentance." LK(5:31-32) Repentance marks the joy of living.

messages.title: Jesus Began Preaching
messages.verse: Now after John was arrested, Jesus came to Galilee, proclaiming the good news of God, and saying, "The time is fulfilled, and the kingdom of God has come near; repent, and believe in the good news. "
messages.closing: Jesus forgives everyone who repents!
messages.fullText: 1st Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Jesus Began Preaching ) Now after John was arrested, Jesus came to Galilee, proclaiming the good news of God, and saying, "The time is fulfilled, and the kingdom of God has come near; repent, and believe in the good news. " MK(1:14-15) Jesus forgives everyone who repents!

messages.title: Our Father Prayer
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Pray in this way: Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name, your kingdom come, your will be done, on earth as in heaven. Give us today our daily bread; and forgive us our debts, as we forgive our debtors. And do not bring us to the test, but deliver us from the evil one."
messages.closing: Pray for forgiveness during this lent.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Our Father Prayer) Jesus said, " Pray in this way: Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name, your kingdom come, your will be done, on earth as in heaven. Give us today our daily bread; and forgive us our debts, as we forgive our debtors. And do not bring us to the test, but deliver us from the evil one." MT(6:9-13) Pray for forgiveness during this lent.

messages.title: Jonah Preached asking people to Repent
messages.verse: Jesus said to them all, "At the judgment the men of Nineveh will arise with this generation and condemn it, because at the preaching of Jonah they repented, and there is something greater than Jonah here."
messages.closing: We are called to repent and turn to God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jonah Preached asking people to Repent ) Jesus said to them all, "At the judgment the men of Nineveh will arise with this generation and condemn it, because at the preaching of Jonah they repented, and there is something greater than Jonah here." LK(11:32) We are called to repent and turn to God.

messages.title: Ask and You Shall Receive
messages.verse: Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him. Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets."
messages.closing: Believe in the power of prayers and receive the Grace of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Ask and You Shall Receive ) Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him. Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets." MT(7:11-12) Believe in the power of prayers and receive the Grace of God.

messages.title: To Enter Kingdom of Heavens
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Leave your offering there before the altar, go and be reconciled with your brother first, and then come back and present your offering."
messages.closing: May the Lord, give us the strength to forgive and accept others.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( To Enter Kingdom of Heavens ) Jesus said, " Leave your offering there before the altar, go and be reconciled with your brother first, and then come back and present your offering." MT(5:24) May the Lord, give us the strength to forgive and accept others.

messages.title: Love for Enemies
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you."
messages.closing: Let's ask God for the Grace to spread his love.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Love for Enemies) Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you." MT(5:44) Let's ask God for the Grace to spread his love.

messages.title: Transfiguration
messages.verse: While Peter was still speaking, suddenly a bright cloud overshadowed them, and from the cloud a voice said, " This is my Son, my Beloved; listen to him!"
messages.closing: We are washes by the precious Blood of Jesus!
messages.fullText: 2nd Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg (Transfiguration ) While Peter was still speaking, suddenly a bright cloud overshadowed them, and from the cloud a voice said, " This is my Son, my Beloved; listen to him!" LK(9:5) We are washes by the precious Blood of Jesus!

messages.verse: Judging Others )  Jesus said, " Do not judge, and you will not be judged, do not condemn, and you will not be condemned. Forgive, and you will be forgiven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg Judging Others )  Jesus said, " Do not judge, and you will not be judged, do not condemn, and you will not be condemned. Forgive, and you will be forgiven." LK(6:37) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Request of the Mother of James and John
messages.verse: Jesus said, " And whoever wishes to be first among you must be your slave; just as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransom for many."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Request of the Mother of James and John) Jesus said, " And whoever wishes to be first among you must be your slave; just as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransom for many." MT(20:27-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Request from the Mother of James and John
messages.verse: Jesus said, " It will not be so among you; but whoever wishes to be great among you must be your servant, and whoever wishes to be first among you must be your slave; just as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransom for many."
messages.closing: Pray asking the Lord for strength, to make us humble.

MT(20:26-28) Pray asking the Lord for strength, to make us humble.

messages.title: Rich Man and Lazarus
messages.verse: The rich man said, " 'No, father Abraham; but if someone goes to them from the dead, they will repent.' He said to him, " If they do not listen to Moses and the prophets, neither will they be convinced even if someone rises from the dead.' "
messages.closing: Pray for forgiveness.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Rich Man and Lazarus) The rich man said, " 'No, father Abraham; but if someone goes to them from the dead, they will repent.' He said to him, " If they do not listen to Moses and the prophets, neither will they be convinced even if someone rises from the dead.' " LK(16:30-31) Pray for forgiveness.

messages.title: Jesus The Corner Stone
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Have you never read the scriptures: 'The stone that the builders rejected has become the cornerstone; this was the Lord's doing, and it is amazing in our eyes'? "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus The Corner Stone) Jesus said to them, " Have you never read the scriptures: 'The stone that the builders rejected has become the cornerstone; this was the Lord's doing, and it is amazing in our eyes'? " MT(21:42) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Prodigal Son
messages.verse: Father said to him, "My son, you are here with me always; everything I have is yours. But now we must celebrate and rejoice, because your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found. "
messages.closing: Let's pray asking God the grace to repent .
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Prodigal Son) Father said to him, "My son, you are here with me always; everything I have is yours. But now we must celebrate and rejoice, because your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found. " LK(15:31-32) Let's pray asking God the grace to repent .

messages.title: Questions People's Faith
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Truly I tell you, no prophet is accepted in the prophet's hometown. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Questions People's Faith) Jesus said to them, " Truly I tell you, no prophet is accepted in the prophet's hometown. " LK(4:24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Forgive and you will be Forgiven
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Then in anger his master handed him over to the torturers until he should pay back the whole debt. So will my heavenly Father do to you, unless each of you forgives your brother and sister from your heart."
messages.closing: Let's pray for the mercy of God, that he may give us the strength to forgive.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Forgive and you will be Forgiven) Jesus said, "Then in anger his master handed him over to the torturers until he should pay back the whole debt. So will my heavenly Father do to you, unless each of you forgives your brother and sister from your heart." MT(18:34-35) Let's pray for the mercy of God, that he may give us the strength to forgive.

messages.title: Fulfill The Commandments
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Fulfill The Commandments) Jesus said, "Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven." MT(5:19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus and Beelzebul
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Whoever is not with me is against me, and whoever does not gather with me scatters."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and Beelzebul ) Jesus said, " Whoever is not with me is against me, and whoever does not gather with me scatters."  LK(11:23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Geatest Commandment
messages.verse: The scribe said to Jesus, "Well said, teacher. You are right in saying, 'He is One and there is no other than he.' And 'to love him with all your heart, with all your understanding, with all your strength, and to love your neighbor as yourself' is worth more than all burnt offerings and sacrifices."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (  Geatest Commandment) The scribe said to Jesus, "Well said, teacher. You are right in saying, 'He is One and there is no other than he.' And 'to love him with all your heart, with all your understanding, with all your strength, and to love your neighbor as yourself' is worth more than all burnt offerings and sacrifices." MK(12:32-33) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Prayer of Repentance
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted."
messages.closing: Jesus give us the wisdom and strength to be humble!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (  Prayer of Repentance) Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted." LK(18:13-14) Jesus give us the wisdom and strength to be humble!

messages.title: Eternal Life
messages.verse: " For God so loved the world that he gave his only Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 4th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Eternal Life ) " For God so loved the world that he gave his only Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life." JH(3:16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals the Officer's Son
messages.verse: The royal official said to him, "Sir, come down before my child dies." Jesus said to him, "You may go; your son will live." The man believed what Jesus said to him and left."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals the Officer's Son) The royal official said to him, "Sir, come down before my child dies." Jesus said to him, "You may go; your son will live." The man believed what Jesus said to him and left." JH(4:49-50) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals Sick Man
messages.verse: Jesus said to him, "Rise, take up your mat, and walk." Immediately the man became well, took up his mat, and walked. Now that day was a sabbath."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals Sick Man) Jesus said to him, "Rise, take up your mat, and walk." Immediately the man became well, took up his mat, and walked. Now that day was a sabbath." JH(5:8-9) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus and the Father
messages.verse: Jesus said, "I say to you, whoever hears my word and believes in the one who sent me has eternal life and will not come under condemnation, but will pass from death to life."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and the Father) Jesus said, "I say to you, whoever hears my word and believes in the one who sent me has eternal life and will not come under condemnation, but will pass from death to life." JH(5:24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Testifies
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But I have testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father gave me to accomplish, these works that I perform testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Testifies) Jesus said, " But I have testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father gave me to accomplish, these works that I perform testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me." JH(5:36) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Dream of Joseph
messages.verse: Solemnity Feast of St.Joseph ( Dream of Joseph) Angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, " Joseph son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary as your wife, for the child conceived in her is from the Holy Spirit. She will bear a son, and you are to name him Jesus, for he will save his people from their sins."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Solemnity Feast of St.Joseph ( Dream of Joseph) Angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, " Joseph son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary as your wife, for the child conceived in her is from the Holy Spirit. She will bear a son, and you are to name him Jesus, for he will save his people from their sins." MT(1:20-21) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the Messiah
messages.verse: Others said, "This is the Messiah." But others said, "The Messiah will not come from Galilee, will he? Does not scripture say that the Messiah will be of David's family and come from Bethlehem, the village where David lived?"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Does not scripture say that the Messiah will be of David's family and come from Bethlehem, the village where David lived?" JH(7:41-42) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Eternal Life
messages.verse: Amen, amen, I say to you, unless a grain of wheat falls to the ground and dies, it remains just a grain of wheat; but if it dies, it produces much fruit. Whoever loves his life loses it, and whoever hates his life in this world will preserve it for eternal life.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 5th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Eternal Life)  Amen, amen, I say to you, unless a grain of wheat falls to the ground and dies, it remains just a grain of wheat; but if it dies, it produces much fruit. Whoever loves his life loses it, and whoever hates his life in this world will preserve it for eternal life. JH(12:24-25) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Forgives  the Women
messages.verse: Then Jesus straightened up and said to her, "Woman, where are they? Has no one condemned you?" She replied, "No one, sir." Then Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go, (and) from now on do not sin any more."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
