Then Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go, (and) from now on do not sin any more." JH(8:10-11) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus  Foretells His Death
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, "I told you that you would die in your sins, for you will die in your sins unless you believe that I am he."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus  Foretells His Death) Jesus said to them, "I told you that you would die in your sins, for you will die in your sins unless you believe that I am he." JH(8:24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: True Disciples
messages.verse: Jesus said to the Jews who had believed in him, "If you continue in my word, you are truly my disciples, and you will know the truth, and the truth will make you free."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( True Disciples) Jesus said to the Jews who had believed in him, "If you continue in my word, you are truly my disciples, and you will know the truth, and the truth will make you free." JH(8:31-32) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Annunciation of The Lord
messages.verse: Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him Jesus."
messages.closing: Let's pray asking the Lord, to give us strength to say yes like Mary did. Wishing all of you and your families, Happy Feast!!🙏🏻

Wishing all of you and your families, Happy Feast!!🙏🏻

messages.title: Father and The Son
messages.verse: Jesus said, "If I do not perform my Father's works, do not believe me; but if I am doing it, then even if you refuse to believe in me, at least believe in the work I do; then you will know for certain that the Father is in me and I am in the Father."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Father and The Son ) Jesus said, "If I do not perform my Father's works, do not believe me; but if I am doing it, then even if you refuse to believe in me, at least believe in the work I do; then you will know for certain that the Father is in me and I am in the Father." JH(10:37-38) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Plot to kill Jesus
messages.verse: But one of them, Caiaphas, who was high priest that year, said to them, "You know nothing, nor do you consider that it is better for you that one man should die instead of the people, so that the whole nation may not perish."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH(11:49-50) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Mary Anoints Jesus
messages.verse: Mary took a pound of costly perfume made of pure nard, anointed Jesus's feet, and wiped them with her hair. The house was filled with the fragrance of the perfumes.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Mary Anoints Jesus ) Mary took a pound of costly perfume made of pure nard, anointed Jesus's feet, and wiped them with her hair. The house was filled with the fragrance of the perfumes.   JH(12:3) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Foretells His Betrayal
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Little children, I am with you only a little longer. You will look for me; and as I said to the Jews so now I say to you 'where I am going, you cannot come."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus Foretells His Betrayal) Jesus said, " Little children, I am with you only a little longer. You will look for me; and as I said to the Jews so now I say to you 'where I am going, you cannot come." JH(13:33) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus is Betrayed
messages.verse: Jesus answered, "The one who has dipped his hand into the bowl with me will betray me. The Son of Man indeed goes, as it is written of him, but woe to that man by whom the Son of Man is betrayed! It would be better for that man if he had never been born."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

The Son of Man indeed goes, as it is written of him, but woe to that man by whom the Son of Man is betrayed! It would be better for that man if he had never been born." MT(26-23-24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Washes the Disciples Feet
messages.verse: Jesus said, " You call me Teacher and Lord--and You are right, for that is what I am. So if I, your Lord and Teacher, have washed your feet, you ought to wash one another's feet. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Holy Thursday Gospel Msg (Jesus Washes the Disciples Feet)  Jesus said, " You call me Teacher and Lord--and You are right, for that is what I am. So if I, your Lord and Teacher, have washed your feet, you ought to wash one another's feet. " JH(13-13-14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Dies on the Cross
messages.verse: After this, Jesus knew that everything had now been completed and, so that the scripture should be completely fulfilled, he said, "I am thirsty. After Jesus had taken the wine he said, 'It is fulfilled'; and bowing his head he gave up his spirit."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

After Jesus had taken the wine he said, 'It is fulfilled'; and bowing his head he gave up his spirit." JH(19-28-30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Resurrection of Jesus
messages.verse: But he said to them, " Do not be alarmed; you are looking for Jesus of Nazareth, who was crucified. He has been raised; he is not here. Look, there is the place they laid him. But go, tell his disciples and Peter that he is going ahead of you to Galilee, there you will see him, just as he told you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Holy Saturday Gospel Msg ( Resurrection of Jesus)  But he said to them, " Do not be alarmed; you are looking for Jesus of Nazareth, who was crucified. He has been raised; he is not here. Look, there is the place they laid him. But go, tell his disciples and Peter that he is going ahead of you to Galilee, there you will see him, just as he told you." MK(16:6-7) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Resurrection of Jesus
messages.verse: "Then the other disciple also went in, the one who had arrived at the tomb first, and he saw and believed. For they did not yet understand the scripture that he had to rise from the dead."
messages.closing: Happy Easter!!! May the risen Lord, bless you and your families abundantly with peace, joy and happiness. From Agnel and Family.

For they did not yet understand the scripture that he had to rise from the dead." JH(20:8-9) Happy Easter!!! May the risen Lord, bless you and your families abundantly with peace, joy and happiness. From Agnel and Family.

messages.title: Disciples Met Jesus
messages.verse: Suddenly Jesus met them and said, "Greetings!" And they came to him, took hold of his feet, and worshipped him. Then Jesus said to them, " Do not be afraid; go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee; there they will see me."
messages.closing: Happy Easter!!! Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Walk to Emmaus
messages.verse: And it happened that, while he was with them at table, he took bread, said the blessing, broke it, and gave it to them. Then they said to each other, "Were not our hearts burning (within us) while he spoke to us on the way and opened the scriptures to us?""
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "Thus it is written that the Messiah would suffer and rise from the dead on the third day and that repentance, for the forgiveness of sins, would be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Appears to the Disciples the 3rd Time
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, "Cast the net over the right side of the boat and you will find something." So they cast it, and were not able to pull it in because of the number of fish." Jesus then stepped forward, took the bread and gave it to them, and the same with the fish.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Shows Himself to the Disciples
messages.verse: Later, as the eleven were at table, he appeared to them and rebuked them for their unbelief and hardness of heart because they had not believed those who saw him after he had been raised. He said to them, "Go into the whole world and proclaim the gospel to every creature."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Love of God- Eternal Life
messages.verse: " For God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!!

messages.title: Jesus the True Food and Drink
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Those who eat my flesh and drink my blood abide in me, and I in them. This is the bread that came down from heaven, not like which your ancestors ate, and they died. But the one who eats this bread will live forever."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!!

messages.title: Receiving Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Very truly I tell you, whoever welcomes the one whom I send, welcomes me, and whoever welcomes me, welcomes the one who sent me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Eternal Life
messages.verse: Feast of St.Joseph the Worker  ( Eternal Life ) Jesus said, " Do you not believe that I am in the Father and the Father is in me? The words that I speak to you I do not speak on my own. The Father who dwells in me is doing his works."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!!

messages.title: Jesus the Way to the Father
messages.verse: Jesus said, " I am the Way; the Truth and the Life. No one can come to the Father except through me. Very truly, I tell you, the one who believes in me will also do the works that I do and, in fact, will do greater works than these because I am going to the Father."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Love of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " No one has greater love than this, to lay down one's life for one's friends. You are my friends if you do what I command you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " This is my commandment, that you love one another as I have loved you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Commissioning of the Disciples
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the So and of the Holy Spirit, and teaching them to obey everything that O have commanded you. And remember, I am with you always, to the end of the age."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus and Peter
messages.verse: Jesus said to him the third time, "Simon, son of John, do you love me?" Peter was distressed that he had said to him a third time, "Do you love me?" and he said to him, "Lord, you know everything; you know that I love you." Jesus said to him, "Feed my sheep."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Request from James and John
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But it shall not be so among you. Rather, whoever wishes to be great among you will be your servant; whoever wishes to be first among you will be the slave of all."

messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Give to the emperor the things that are the emperor's and to God the things  that are God's." And they were utterly amazed at him.

messages.verse: Solemnity Feast of Sacred Heart of Jesus  ( Jesus fulfilled the Scripture ) " One of the soldier pierced his lance into his side, and immediately blood and water flowed out. For this happened so that the scripture passage might be fulfilled: "Not a bone of is will be broken." And again another passage says: "They will look upon him whom they have pierced."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said, " 'But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing.' 'But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret.'"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Restored A Little Girl to life
messages.verse: He took her by the hand and said to her, " Tal' i-tha cum." Which means, "Little girl, get up!" And immediately the girl got up and began to walk about (She was twelve years of age). At this they were overcome with amazement.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Explain the Parable of the Weeds
messages.verse: Jesus said, "The Son of Man will send his angels, and they will collect out of his kingdom all who cause others to sin and all evildoers. They will throw them into the  fiery furnace, where there will be wailing and grinding of teeth. Then the righteous will shine like the sun in the kingdom of their Father. Whoever has ears ought to hear."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Kingdom of Heaven
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The kingdom of heaven is like treasure hidden in a field, which someone found and hid; then in his joy he goes and sells all that he has and buys that field."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Transfiguration
messages.verse: Feast of Transfiguration of   the Lord (Transfiguration )Jesus took Peter, James, and John and led them up a high mountain apart by themselves. And he was transfigured before them, and his clothes became dazzling white, such as no fuller on earth could bleach them. Then a cloud came, casting a shadow over them; then from the cloud came a voice, "This is my beloved Son. Listen to him."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Forgiveness
messages.verse: Peter approached Jesus and asked him, "Lord, if my brother sins against me, how often must I forgive him? As many as seven times?" Jesus answered, "I say to you, not seven times but seventy-seven times."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Rich Young Man
messages.verse: Jesus said, " If you wish to be perfect, go, sell your possessions and give the money to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; then come, follow me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Reads  The Scripture at Nazareth
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he has anointed me to bring good news to the poor. He has sent me to proclaim release to the captives and recovery of sight to the blind, to let the oppressed go free."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Cures a Deaf Man
messages.verse: He took him aside in private, away from the crowd, and put his fingers into his ears, and he spat and touched his tongue. Then looking up to heaven, he sighed and said to him. "Eph'pha-the," that is, "Be opened."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Heals Man on Sabbath
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "I ask you, is it lawful to do good or to do harm on the sabbath, to save life or to destroy it?" After looking around at all of them, he said to him, " Stretch out your hand." He did so, and his hand was restored.

messages.title: Jesus Heals a Centurion's Servant
messages.verse: And Jesus went with them, but when he was not far from the house, the centurion sent friends to say to him, " Lord, do not trouble yourself, for I am not worthy to have you come under my roof; therefore I did not presume to come to you. But only speak the word and let my servant be healed."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: A Lamp under a Jar
messages.verse: Jesus said, " No one after lighting a lamp hides it under a jar, or outs it under a bed, but puts it on a lampstand, so that those who enter may see the light."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Word of God
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Whoever listens to you listens to me. Whoever rejects you rejects me. And whoever rejects me rejects the one who sent me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Memorial of Guardian Angel
messages.verse: Jesus said, " See that you do not despise one of these little ones, for I say to you that their angels in heaven always look upon the face of my heavenly Father."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Teaches how to Pray
messages.verse: He said to them, "When you pray, say: Father, hallowed be your name. Your kingdom come. Give us each day our daily bread. And forgive us our sins, for we ourselves forgive everyone indebted to us. And do not bring us to the time of trail."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Perseverance in Prayer
messages.verse: Jesus said, " So I say to you, Ask, and it will be given to you; search, and you will find; knock, and the door will be opened for you. If you then, who are evil, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will the heavenly Father give the Holy Spirit to those who ask him!"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: He said to him in reply, "Sir, let it alone for one more year, until I dig around it and put manure on it. If it bear fruit next year, well and good; but if not, you can cut it down."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus and Zacchaeus
messages.verse: Zac•chae'us stood there and said tobthe Lord, "Look, half of my possessions, Lord, I will give to the poor; and if I  have defrauded anyone of anything, I will pay back four times as much." Jesus said to him, " Today salvation has come to this house, because he too is a son of Abraham. For the Son of Man has come to seek and to save what was lost."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Feast of Annunciation ( Immaculate Conception) Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him 'Jesus'. Mary said, " Behold, I am the handmaid of the Lord. May it be done to me according to your word." Then the angel departed from her.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Solemnity Mary Mother of God  ( Jesus is Named ) Then the shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all they had heard and seen, just as it had been told to them. When eight days were completed for his circumcision, he was named Jesus, the name given to him by the angel before he was conceived in the womb.
messages.closing: Wishing all of you and your families, Happy New Year 2022!! May Lord Jesus bless and keep you'll safe!! From Agnel and Family.

messages.title: Jesus Reads The Scroll of Isaiah on the Sabbath
messages.verse: Jesus read, "The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he has anointed me to bring good news to the poor. He has sent me to proclaim release to the captives and recovery of sight to the blind, to let the oppressed go free, to proclaim the year of the Lord's favor."

messages.title: Jesus Cleanses  a Man with  Leprosy
messages.verse: When he saw Jesus, he bowed with his face to the ground and begged him, "Lord, if you choose, you can make me clean." Then Jesus stretched out his hand, touched him, and said, " I do choose. Be made clean." Immediately the leprosy left him.

messages.title: John the Baptist talks about Jesus
messages.verse: John said,  "You yourselves can testify that I said. I am not the Messiah, but that I was sent before him. The one who has the bride is the bridegroom; the best man, who stands and listens for him, rejoices greatly at the bridegroom's voice. So this joy of mine has been made complete. He must increase; I must decrease."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Intentions of the Heart
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " It is what comes out of a person that defiles. For it is from within, from human heart, that evil intentions come: fornication, theft, murder, adultery, avarice, wickedness, deceit, licentiousness, envy slander, pride, folly. All these evil things come from within, and they defile a person."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Intentions of the Heart) Jesus said to them, " It is what comes out of a person that defiles. For it is from within, from human heart, that evil intentions come: fornication, theft, murder, adultery, avarice, wickedness, deceit, licentiousness, envy slander, pride, folly. All these evil things come from within, and they defile a person."  MK(7:20-23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Judging Others
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Do not judge, and you will not be judged, do not condemn, and you will not be condemned. Forgive, and you will be forgiven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 7th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg (Judging Others ) Jesus said, " Do not judge, and you will not be judged, do not condemn, and you will not be condemned. Forgive, and you will be forgiven." LK(6:37) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Healing of a Boy with a Spirit
messages.verse: WhenJesussaw that a crowd came running together, he rebuked the unclean spirit, sayingto it, "You spirit that keeps this boy from speaking and hearing, I command you, come out of him, and never enter him again!"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Healing of a Boy with a Spirit) WhenJesussaw that a crowd came running together, he rebuked the unclean spirit, sayingto it, "You spirit that keeps this boy from speaking and hearing, I command you, come out of him, and never enter him again!" MK(9:25) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Feast of the Chair of St.Peter
messages.labelKey: feast of the chair of stpeter
messages.title: Peter The Rock
messages.verse: Feast of the Chair of St.Peter ( Peter The Rock ) Jesus said, " And so I say to you, you are Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church, and the gates of the underworld shall not prevail against it. I will give you the keys to the kingdom of heaven. Whatever you bind on earth shall be bound in heaven; and whatever you loose on earth shall be lost in heaven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Feast of the Chair of St.Peter ( Peter The Rock ) Jesus said, " And so I say to you, you are Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church, and the gates of the underworld shall not prevail against it. I will give you the keys to the kingdom of heaven. Whatever you bind on earth shall be bound in heaven; and whatever you loose on earth shall be lost in heaven." MT(16:18-19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Another Exorcist
messages.verse: But Jesus said," Do not stop him; for no one who does deed of power in my name will be able soon afterward to speak evil of me. Whoever is not against us is for us.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Another Exorcist) But Jesus said," Do not stop him; for no one who does deed of power in my name will be able soon afterward to speak evil of me. Whoever is not against us is for us.   MK(10:39-40) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Temptation to Sin
messages.verse: Jesus said," Salt is good; but if salt has lost its saltiness, how can you season it? Have salt in yourselves, and be at peace with one another."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Temptation to Sin) Jesus said," Salt is good; but if salt has lost its saltiness, how can you season it? Have salt in yourselves, and be at peace with one another." MK(9:50) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Teaching about Divorce
messages.verse: Jesus said," 'For this reason a man shall leave his father and mother and be joined to his wife, and the two shall become one flesh.' So they are no longer two, but one flesh. Therefore what God has joined together, let no one separate."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Teaching about Divorce) Jesus said," 'For this reason a man shall leave his father and mother and be joined to his wife, and the two shall become one flesh.' So they are no longer two, but one flesh. Therefore what God has joined together, let no one separate." MK(10:7-9) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Do not Judge
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Why do you see the speck in your neighbour's  eye, but do not notice the log in your own eye? A good person out of the store of goodness in his heart produces good, but an evil person out of a store of evil produces evil"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 8th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Do not Judge) Jesus said, " Why do you see the speck in your neighbour's  eye, but do not notice the log in your own eye? A good person out of the store of goodness in his heart produces good, but an evil person out of a store of evil produces evil" LK(6:41,45) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Do not Judge
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Why do you see the speck in your neighbour's  eye, but do not notice the log in your own eye? A good person out of the  good treasure of the heart produces good, and the evil person out of evil treasure produces evil; for it is out of the abundance of the heart that the mouth speaks"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 8th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Do not Judge) Jesus said, " Why do you see the speck in your neighbour's  eye, but do not notice the log in your own eye? A good person out of the  good treasure of the heart produces good, and the evil person out of evil treasure produces evil; for it is out of the abundance of the heart that the mouth speaks" LK(6:41,45) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Rich Man
messages.verse: Jesus, looking at him, loved him and said," You lack one thing; go, sell what you own, and give the money to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; then come, follow me. It is easier for a camel  to go through the eye of a needle than for someone who is rich to enter the kingdom of God. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (The Rich Man) Jesus, looking at him, loved him and said," You lack one thing; go, sell what you own, and give the money to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; then come, follow me. It is easier for a camel  to go through the eye of a needle than for someone who is rich to enter the kingdom of God. " MK(10:21,25) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Rewards
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, there is no one who has left house or brothers or sisters or mother or father or children or fields, for my sake and for the sake of the good news, who will not receive a hundredfold now in this age."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Rewards ) Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, there is no one who has left house or brothers or sisters or mother or father or children or fields, for my sake and for the sake of the good news, who will not receive a hundredfold now in this age." MK(10:29-30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."
messages.closing: Let us return to the Lord with ashes during this beautiful time of lent!
messages.fullText: Ash Wednesday Gospel msg ( Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting ) Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."  MT(6:3,6,17-18) Let us return to the Lord with ashes during this beautiful time of lent!

messages.title: Cost of Discipleship
messages.verse: Jesus said to them all, " If anyone wants to  become my followers, let them deny themselves and take up their cross daily and follow me. For those who want to save their life will lose it, and those who lose their life for my sake will save it."
messages.closing: Jesus is calling us to be disciples.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Cost of Discipleship) Jesus said to them all, " If anyone wants to  become my followers, let them deny themselves and take up their cross daily and follow me. For those who want to save their life will lose it, and those who lose their life for my sake will save it." LK(9:23-24) Jesus is calling us to be disciples.

messages.title: Cost of Discipleship
messages.verse: Jesus said to them all, " If anyone wants to  become my followers, let them deny themselves and take up their cross daily and follow me. For those who want to save their life will lose it, and those who lose their life for my sake will save it."
messages.closing: Jesus is calling us to choose life over death like the disciples.

For those who want to save their life will lose it, and those who lose their life for my sake will save it." LK(9:23-24) Jesus is calling us to choose life over death like the disciples.

messages.title: Question about Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot  mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast."
messages.closing: We need to fast from anger, hate and pride in our hearts; which helps us spread the love of Jesus.

The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast." MT(9:15) We need to fast from anger, hate and pride in our hearts; which helps us spread the love of Jesus.

messages.title: Jesus Calls Levi the Tax Collector
messages.verse: Jesus answered, " Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick. I have come to call not the righteous but sinners to repentance."
messages.closing: During lenten season we are all called to repent from our old ways and experience the joy of God's forgiveness.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Calls Levi the Tax Collector) Jesus answered, " Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick. I have come to call not the righteous but sinners to repentance." LK(5:31-32) During lenten season we are all called to repent from our old ways and experience the joy of God's forgiveness.

messages.title: Jesus Teaches the Our Father Prayer
messages.verse: Jesus said , " For if you forgive others their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you; but if you do not forgive others, neither will your Father forgive your trespasses. "
messages.closing: Pray for strength to forgive during this lent.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Teaches the Our Father Prayer) Jesus said , " For if you forgive others their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you; but if you do not forgive others, neither will your Father forgive your trespasses. " MT(6:14-15) Pray for strength to forgive during this lent.

messages.title: Jonah Preached asking people to Repent
messages.verse: Jesus said to them all, "At the judgment the men of Nineveh will arise with this generation and condemn it, because at the preaching of Jonah they repented, and there is something greater than Jonah here."
messages.closing: Self introspection marks the beginning of repentance. We are called to repent and turn towards God's ways.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jonah Preached asking people to Repent ) Jesus said to them all, "At the judgment the men of Nineveh will arise with this generation and condemn it, because at the preaching of Jonah they repented, and there is something greater than Jonah here." LK(11:32) Self introspection marks the beginning of repentance. We are called to repent and turn towards God's ways.

messages.title: Ask and You Shall Receive
messages.verse: Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him. Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets."
messages.closing: Let us humble ourselves and ask for the Grace of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Ask and You Shall Receive ) Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him. Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets." MT(7:11-12) Let us humble ourselves and ask for the Grace of God.

messages.title: Concerning Anger
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Leave your gifts there before the altar and go; first be reconciled to your brother or sister, and then come back and offer your gift."
messages.closing: Lord give us the courage to be patient and humble.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Concerning Anger) Jesus said, " Leave your gifts there before the altar and go; first be reconciled to your brother or sister, and then come back and offer your gift." MT(5:24) Lord give us the courage to be patient and humble.

messages.title: Concerning Anger
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Leave your gifts there before the altar and go; first be reconciled to your brother or sister, and then come back and offer your gift."
messages.closing: Lord give us the courage to respond controlling our emotions.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Concerning Anger) Jesus said, " Leave your gifts there before the altar and go; first be reconciled to your brother or sister, and then come back and offer your gift." MT(5:24) Lord give us the courage to respond controlling our emotions.

messages.title: Love for Enemies
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you."
messages.closing: God give us your love to forgive!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Love for Enemies) Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you." MT(5:44) God give us your love to forgive!

messages.title: Transfiguration
messages.verse: While Peter was still speaking, suddenly a bright cloud came and overshadowed them, and they were terrified as they entered the cloud. Then from the cloud came a voice that said, " This is my Son, my Chosen; listen to him!"
messages.closing: Lord give us your spirit to listen to your voice.
messages.fullText: 2nd Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg (Transfiguration ) While Peter was still speaking, suddenly a bright cloud came and overshadowed them, and they were terrified as they entered the cloud. Then from the cloud came a voice that said, " This is my Son, my Chosen; listen to him!" LK(9:34-35) Lord give us your spirit to listen to your voice.

messages.title: Judging Others
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Give, and  it will be  given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over, will be put into your lap; for the measure you give will be the measure you get back."
messages.closing: Lord give us a generous heart.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Judging Others) Jesus said, " Give, and  it will be  given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over, will be put into your lap; for the measure you give will be the measure you get back." LK(6:38) Lord give us a generous heart.

messages.title: Request of the Mother of James and John
messages.verse: Jesus said, " And whoever wishes to be first among you must be your slave; just as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransom for many."
messages.closing: Lord give us the courage to be your witnesses to spread your word.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Request of the Mother of James and John) Jesus said, " And whoever wishes to be first among you must be your slave; just as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransom for many." MT(20:27-28) Lord give us the courage to be your witnesses to spread your word.

messages.title: Jesus The Corner Stone
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Have you never read the scriptures: 'The stone that the builders rejected has become the cornerstone; this was the Lord's doing, and it is amazing in our eyes'? "
messages.closing: Lord gives the wisdom to ground ourselves to your teachings!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus The Corner Stone) Jesus said to them, " Have you never read the scriptures: 'The stone that the builders rejected has become the cornerstone; this was the Lord's doing, and it is amazing in our eyes'? " MT(21:42) Lord gives the wisdom to ground ourselves to your teachings!

messages.title: Dream of Joseph
messages.verse: Solemnity Feast of St.Joseph ( Dream of Joseph) Angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, " Joseph son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary as your wife, for the child conceived in her is from the Holy Spirit. She will bear a son, and you are to name him Jesus, for he will save his people from their sins."
messages.closing: Lord we pray increase our faith.
messages.fullText: Solemnity Feast of St.Joseph ( Dream of Joseph) Angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, " Joseph son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary as your wife, for the child conceived in her is from the Holy Spirit. She will bear a son, and you are to name him Jesus, for he will save his people from their sins." MT(1:20-21) Lord we pray increase our faith.

messages.title: Jesus Cleanses the Temple
messages.verse: His disciples remembered the words of scripture, "Zeal for your house will consume me." At this the Jews answered and said to him, "What sign can you show us for doing this?" Jesus answered and said to them, "Destroy this temple and in three days I will raise it up."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 3rd Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cleanses the Temple) His disciples remembered the words of scripture, "Zeal for your house will consume me." At this the Jews answered and said to him, "What sign can you show us for doing this?" Jesus answered and said to them, "Destroy this temple and in three days I will raise it up." JH(2:17-19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Forgive and you will be Forgiven
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Then in anger his master handed him over to the torturers until he should pay back the whole debt. So will my heavenly Father do to you, unless each of you forgives your brother and sister from your heart."
messages.closing: Jesus give us the strength to forgive.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Forgive and you will be Forgiven) Jesus said, "Then in anger his master handed him over to the torturers until he should pay back the whole debt. So will my heavenly Father do to you, unless each of you forgives your brother and sister from your heart." MT(18:34-35) Jesus give us the strength to forgive.

messages.title: Fulfill The Commandments
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven."
messages.closing: Lord we pray for the heart and mind to say yes to your will.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Fulfill The Commandments) Jesus said, "Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven." MT(5:19) Lord we pray for the heart and mind to say yes to your will.

messages.title: Jesus and Beelzebul
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Whoever is not with me is against me, and whoever does not gather with me scatters."
messages.closing: Lord Jesus increase our faith.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and Beelzebul ) Jesus said, " Whoever is not with me is against me, and whoever does not gather with me scatters." LK(11:23) Lord Jesus increase our faith.

messages.title: Annunciation of The Lord
messages.verse: Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him Jesus."
messages.closing: Lord give us strength to say like Mary our Mother. Wishing all of you and your families, Happy Feast!!
messages.fullText: Solemnity Feast of Annunciation Gospel Msg ( Annunciation of The Lord) Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him Jesus." LK(1:30-31)  Lord give us strength to say like Mary our Mother. Wishing all of you and your families, Happy Feast!!

messages.title: Prayer of Repentance
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But the tax collector standing far off, would not even look up to heaven, but was beating his breast and praying, 'O God, be merciful to me, a sinner!' I tell you, this man went down to his home justified, rather than the other; for all who exalts themselves will be humbled, but all who humbles themselves will be exalted."
messages.closing: Jesus give us the wisdom and strength to be humble!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (  Prayer of Repentance) Jesus said, " But the tax collector standing far off, would not even look up to heaven, but was beating his breast and praying, 'O God, be merciful to me, a sinner!' I tell you, this man went down to his home justified, rather than the other; for all who exalts themselves will be humbled, but all who humbles themselves will be exalted." LK(18:13-14) Jesus give us the wisdom and strength to be humble!

messages.title: Parable of the Prodigal Son
messages.verse: Father said to him, "My son, you are here with me always; everything I have is yours. But now we must celebrate and rejoice, because your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found. "
messages.closing: Repent and experience the Lord's forgiveness!
messages.fullText: 4th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Prodigal Son) Father said to him, "My son, you are here with me always; everything I have is yours. But now we must celebrate and rejoice, because your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found. " LK(15:31-32) Repent and experience the Lord's forgiveness!

messages.title: Jesus Heals the Officer's Son
messages.verse: The royal official said to him, "Sir, come down before my child dies." Jesus said to him, "You may go; your son will live." The man believed what Jesus said to him and left."
messages.closing: Lord pour out your healing on us.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals the Officer's Son) The royal official said to him, "Sir, come down before my child dies." Jesus said to him, "You may go; your son will live." The man believed what Jesus said to him and left." JH(4:49-50) Lord pour out your healing on us.

messages.title: Jesus Heals Sick Man
messages.verse: Jesus said to him, "Rise, take up your mat, and walk." Immediately the man became well, took up his mat, and walked. Now that day was a sabbath."
messages.closing: Jesus heal us and give us the strength to turn away from sin.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals Sick Man) Jesus said to him, "Rise, take up your mat, and walk." Immediately the man became well, took up his mat, and walked. Now that day was a sabbath." JH(5:8-9) Jesus heal us and give us the strength to turn away from sin.

messages.title: Jesus and the Father
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Very truly, I tell you, anyone who hears my word and believes him who sent me has eternal life, and does not come under judgment, but has passed from death to life."
messages.closing: Lord we pray forgive us our sins.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and the Father) Jesus said, " Very truly, I tell you, anyone who hears my word and believes him who sent me has eternal life, and does not come under judgment, but has passed from death to life." JH(5:24) Lord we pray forgive us our sins.

messages.title: Jesus Testifies
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But I have testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father gave me to accomplish, these works that I perform testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me."
messages.closing: Jesus give us the courage to become your witnesses.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Testifies) Jesus said, " But I have testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father gave me to accomplish, these works that I perform testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me." JH(5:36) Jesus give us the courage to become your witnesses.

messages.title: Is Jesus the Messiah?
messages.verse: Then Jesus cried out as he was teaching in the temple, " You know me, and you know where I am from. I have not come on my own. But the one who sent me is true, and you do not know him. I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me."
messages.closing: We repent asking for your forgiveness Lord.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Is Jesus the Messiah?) Then Jesus cried out as he was teaching in the temple, " You know me, and you know where I am from. I have not come on my own. But the one who sent me is true, and you do not know him. I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me." JH(5:28-29) We repent asking for your forgiveness Lord.

messages.title: Jesus the Messiah
messages.verse: Then Jesus cried out as he was teaching in the temple, " You know me, and you know where I am from. I have not come on my own. But the one who sent me is true, and you do not know him. I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me."
messages.closing: We repent asking for your forgiveness Lord.

But the one who sent me is true, and you do not know him. I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me." JH(5:28-29) We repent asking for your forgiveness Lord.

messages.title: Jesus the Messiah
messages.verse: Others said, "This is the Messiah." But some asked, "Surely the Messiah does not come from Galilee, does he? Has not the scripture said that the Messiah is descended from David and come from Bethlehem, the village where David lived?"
messages.closing: Lord increase our faith.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus the Messiah ) Others said, "This is the Messiah." But some asked, "Surely the Messiah does not come from Galilee, does he? Has not the scripture said that the Messiah is descended from David and come from Bethlehem, the village where David lived?" JH(7:41-42) Lord increase our faith.

messages.title: Jesus Forgives  the Women
messages.verse: Then Jesus straightened up and said to her, "Woman, where are they? Has no one condemned you?" She replied, "No one, sir." Then Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go, (and) from now on do not sin any more."
messages.closing: We repent asking for your forgiveness Lord.
messages.fullText: 5th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg (Jesus Forgives  the Women) Then Jesus straightened up and said to her, "Woman, where are they? Has no one condemned you?" She replied, "No one, sir." Then Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go, (and) from now on do not sin any more." JH(8:10-11) We repent asking for your forgiveness Lord.

messages.title: Jesus  Foretells His Death
messages.verse: So Jesus said, " When you have lifted up the Son of Man, then you will realize thatI am he, and that I do nothing on my own, but I speak these things as the Father instructed me."
messages.closing: Lord gives us the wisdom to believe in you.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus  Foretells His Death) So Jesus said, " When you have lifted up the Son of Man, then you will realize thatI am he, and that I do nothing on my own, but I speak these things as the Father instructed me." JH(8:28) Lord gives us the wisdom to believe in you.

messages.title: Jesus  Foretells His Death
messages.verse: So Jesus said, " When you have lifted up the Son of Man, then you will realize that I am he, and that I do nothing on my own, but I speak these things as the Father instructed me."
messages.closing: Lord gives us the wisdom to believe in you.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus  Foretells His Death) So Jesus said, " When you have lifted up the Son of Man, then you will realize that I am he, and that I do nothing on my own, but I speak these things as the Father instructed me." JH(8:28) Lord gives us the wisdom to believe in you.

messages.title: Father and The Son
messages.verse: Jesus said, "If I do not perform my Father's works, do not believe me; but if I am doing it, then even if you refuse to believe in me, at least believe in the work I do; then you will know for certain that the Father is in me and I am in the Father."
messages.closing: Lord we pray increase our faith.

JH(10:37-38) Lord we pray increase our faith.

messages.title: Plot to kill Jesus
messages.verse: But one of them, Caiaphas, who was high priest that year, said to them, "You know nothing, nor do you consider that it is better for you that one man should die instead of the people, so that the whole nation may not perish."
messages.closing: Lord we repent for all times we have not lived the Christian values.

JH(11:49-50) Lord we repent for all times we have not lived the Christian values.

messages.title: Jesus is Betrayed
messages.verse: Jesus answered, "The one who has dipped his hand into the bowl with me will betray me. The Son of Man indeed goes, as it is written of him, but woe to that man by whom the Son of Man is betrayed! It would be better for that man if he had never been born."
messages.closing: Lord we pray for strength to overcome temptation and sin.

MT(26-23-24) Lord we pray for strength to overcome temptation and sin.

messages.title: Jesus Washes the Disciples Feet
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Do you know what I have done? You call me Teacher and Lord--and You are right, for that is what I am. So if I, your Lord and Teacher, have washed your feet, you ought to wash one another's feet. "
messages.closing: Jesus give us the courage to follow your example.

So if I, your Lord and Teacher, have washed your feet, you ought to wash one another's feet. " JH(13-12-14) Jesus give us the courage to follow your example.

messages.title: Resurrection of Jesus
messages.verse: But he said to them, " Do not be alarmed; you are looking for Jesus of Nazareth, who was crucified. He has been raised; he is not here. Look, there is the place they laid him. But go, tell his disciples and Peter that he is going ahead of you to Galilee, there you will see him, just as he told you."
messages.closing: Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!

He has been raised; he is not here. Look, there is the place they laid him. But go, tell his disciples and Peter that he is going ahead of you to Galilee, there you will see him, just as he told you." MK(16:6-7) Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!

messages.title: Disciples Met Jesus
messages.verse: Suddenly Jesus met them and said, "Greetings!" And they came to him, took hold of his feet, and worshipped him. Then Jesus said to them, " Do not be afraid; go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee; there they will see me."
messages.closing: Happy Easter!!! Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!!

messages.title: Jesus Appears to the Disciples
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "Thus it is written that the Messiah would suffer and rise from the dead on the third day and that repentance, for the forgiveness of sins, would be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem."
messages.closing: Indeed Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!!

messages.title: The One Who Comes from Heaven
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The Father loves the Son and has placed all things in his hands. Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life; whoever disobeys the Son will not see life, but must endure God's wrath."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Jh(21:12-13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus and Peter
messages.verse: Jesus said to him the third time, "Simon, son of John, do you love me?" Peter felt hurt because he said to him the third time, "Do you love me?" And he said to him, "Lord, you know everything; you know that I love you." Jesus said to him, "Feed my sheep."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus answered, " I have told you, and you do not believe. The works that I do in my Father's name testify to me, but you do not believe, because you do not belong to my sheep."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said, " Very truly I tell you, whoever welcomes the one whom I send, welcomes me, and whoever welcomes me, welcomes the one who sent me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said,  " I have said these things to you while still with you; but the Advocate, the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in my name, will teach you everything and remind you of all I have said to you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Father and Jesus are One
messages.verse: Lifting up his eyes to heaven, Jesus prayed saying, " I pray not only for them, but also for those who will believe in me through their word, so that they may all be one, as you, Father, are in me and I in you, that they also may be in us, that the world may believe that you sent me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Spirit of Truth
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " When the Spirit of truth comes, he will guide you to the complete truth, since he will not be speaking of his own accord, but will speak whatever he hears, and he will reveal to you the things that are  to come."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Why were you searching for me? Did you not know that I must be in my Father's house?" Then he went down with them and came to Nazareth, and Was obedient to them. His mother treasured all these things in her heart.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Weeds among the Wheat
messages.verse: Jesus  said, " Let both of them grow together until the harvest, and at harvest time this time I will tell the reapers collective weeds first and bind them in bundles to be burned, but gather the wheat into my barns."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Purpose of the Parable
messages.verse: Jesus said, " To you it has been given to know the secrets of the kingdom of heaven, but to them it has not been given. Truly I tell you, many prophets and righteous people longed to see what you see, but did not see it, and to hear what you hear, but did not hear it."

messages.title: Things that Defile
messages.verse: Jesus then called the crowd to him and said to them, " Listen and understand: it is not what goes into the mouth that defiles a person, but it is what comes out of the mouth that defiles."

messages.title: The Canaanite Woman's Faith
messages.verse: She said, " Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters' table." Then  Jesus answered her, "Women, great is your faith! Let it be done for you as you wish." And her daughter was healed instantly."

messages.title: Cross and Self Denial
messages.verse: Then Jesus told his disciples, "If any man would come after me, let him deny himself and take up his cross and follow me. For whoever would save his life will lose it, and whoever loses his life for my sake will find it. "

messages.verse: But Jesus said to him, " Let the dead bury their own dead; but as for you, go and proclaim the kingdom of God."  Jesus said to him, " No one who puts a hand on the plow and looks back is fit for the kingdom of God."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Would-Be Followers of Jesus)  But Jesus said to him, " Let the dead bury their own dead; but as for you, go and proclaim the kingdom of God." messages.title: Jesus Calls Philip and Nathanael
messages.verse: And Jesus said to him, " Very truly, I tell you, you will see heaven opened and the angels of God ascending and descending upon the Son of Man."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH(1:51) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Sin against the Holy Spirit
messages.verse: Jesus said, " And everyone who speaks a word against the Son of Man will be forgiven; but whoever blasphemes against the Holy Spirit will not be forgiven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus heals a Crippled Woman on Sabbath
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus heals a Crippled Woman on Sabbath) When Jesus saw her, he called to her and said, “Woman, you are set free of your infirmity.” He laid his hands on her, and she at once stood up straight and glorified God.(Luke 13:10-13). Jesus is lord ,spread the living word of God.

Jesus is lord ,spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus and Zacchaeus
messages.verse: Zac-chae'us stood there and said to the Lord, "Look, half of my possessions, Lord, I will give to the poor; and if I  have defrauded anyone of anything, I will pay back four times as much." Jesus said to him, " Today salvation has come to this house, because he too is a son of Abraham. For the Son of Man has come to seek and to save what was lost."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Jesus said to him, " Today salvation has come to this house, because he too is a son of Abraham. For the Son of Man has come to seek and to save what was lost."  LK(19:8-10) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Children of God
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God. Blessed are those who are persecuted for righteousness' sake, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: All Saints day Gospel Msg ( Children of God ) Jesus said, " Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God. Blessed are those who are persecuted for righteousness' sake, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven." MT(5:9-10) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Judgment of the Nations
messages.verse: And the king will answer them, " 'For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me something to drink, l was a stranger and you welcomed me, I was naked and you gave me clothing, I was sick and you took care of me, I was in prison and you visited me.' 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' "
messages.closing: Eternal rest grant unto them, O Lord, and let your perpetual light shine upon them. Have mercy on them O Lord. 🙏

'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' " MT(25:36,40) Eternal rest grant unto them, O Lord, and let your perpetual light shine upon them. Have mercy on them O Lord. 🙏

messages.title: Question about Resurrection
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Indeed they cannot die anymore, because they are like angels and are children of God, being children of the resurrection."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Eternal Life
messages.verse: Jesus answered, "  Whoever tries to save his life will lose it, but whoever loses it will save it. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Reward for Testifying
messages.verse: 33rd Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Reward for Testifying ) Jesus said, " You will be hated by all because of my name. But not a hair of your head will perish. By your endurance you will gain your souls." LK (21:17-19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said, "Moses himself implies that the dead rise again, in the passage about the bush where he calls the Lord the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac and the God of Jacob. Now he is God, not of the dead, but of the living; for to him all men are in fact alive. ’"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Request From The Criminal
messages.verse: Then he said, "Jesus, remember me when you come into your kingdom. " Jesus replied, "Truly I tell you, today you will be with me in Paradise."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Praises John the Baptist
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Truly I tell you, among those born of women no one has arisen greater than John the Baptist; yet the least in the kingdom of heaven is greater than he."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MT(11:11) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Messengers from John the Baptist
messages.verse: Jesus answered the messengers, "Go and tell John what you have seen and heard: the blind receive their sight, the lame walk, the lepers are cleansed, the deaf hear, the dead are raised, the poor have good news brought to them. And blessed is anyone who takes no offense at me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

And blessed is anyone who takes no offense at me." LK(7:22-23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Praises John the Baptist
messages.verse: Jesus said, "This is the one about whom it is written, ' See, I am sending my messenger ahead of you, who will prepare your way before you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Praises John the Baptist ) Jesus said, "This is the one about whom it is written, ' See, I am sending my messenger ahead of you, who will prepare your way before you." LK(7:27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Witness to Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said, "But I have a testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father has given me to complete, the very works that I am doing, testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Witness to Jesus) Jesus said, "But I have a testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father has given me to complete, the very works that I am doing, testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me." JH(5:36) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Dream of Joseph
messages.verse: The angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, "Joseph, son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary as your wife into your home. For it is through the holy Spirit that this child has been conceived in her."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

For it is through the holy Spirit that this child has been conceived in her."  MT(1:20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus is Named
messages.verse: Solemnity Mary Mother of God  ( Jesus is Named ) Then the shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all they had heard and seen, just as it had been told to them. When eight days were completed for his circumcision, he was named Jesus, the name given to him by the angel before he was conceived in the womb.
messages.closing: Happy New Year 2023!! May the good Lord Jesus bless you'll with good health and happiness!! From Agnel and Family.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals Multitude at the Seaside
messages.verse: He had cured many and, as a result, those who had diseases were pressing upon him to touch him. And whenever unclean spirits saw him they would fall down before him and shout, "You are the Son of God." But he sternlyordered them not to make him known.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Kingdom of God is at Hand
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The people who sit in darkness have seen a great light, on those dwelling in a land overshadowed by death light has arisen." From that time on, Jesus began to preach and say, "Repent, for the kingdom of heaven is at hand."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

From that time on, Jesus began to preach and say, "Repent, for the kingdom of heaven is at hand." MT(4:16-17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Beatitudes
messages.verse: Jesus called his disciples and said to them, "Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven. Blessed are those  who mourn, for they will be comforted. Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Blessed are those  who mourn, for they will be comforted. Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God." MK(5:3,4,9) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Kingdom of Heaven
messages.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, "I tell you, unless your righteousness surpasses that of the scribes and Pharisees, you will not enter the kingdom of heaven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 6th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Kingdom of Heaven) Jesus said to his disciples, "I tell you, unless your righteousness surpasses that of the scribes and Pharisees, you will not enter the kingdom of heaven." MT(5:20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Love for Enemies
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you, so that you may be children of your Father in heaven; for he makes his Sun rise on the evil and on good, and sends rain on the righteous and on the unrighteous."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MT(5:44-45) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Geatest
messages.verse: Then he took a little child and put it among them; and putting his arms around the child he said to them, Whoever welcomes one child such as this in my name, welcomes me; and whoever welcomes me, welcomes not me but the one who sent me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MK(9:36-37) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."
messages.closing: Let us repent and return to the Lord.
messages.fullText: Ash Wednesday Gospel msg ( Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting ) Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."  MT(6:3,6,17-18) Let us repent and return to the Lord.

messages.title: Followers of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said to them all, " If anyone wants to  become my followers, let them deny themselves and take up their cross daily and follow me. For those who want to save their life will lose it, and those who lose their life for my sake will save it."
messages.closing: We are all called to be disciples.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Followers of Jesus) Jesus said to them all, " If anyone wants to  become my followers, let them deny themselves and take up their cross daily and follow me. For those who want to save their life will lose it, and those who lose their life for my sake will save it." LK(9:23-24) We are all called to be disciples.

messages.title: Question about Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot  mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast."
messages.closing: Fasting and Prayer helps us overcome challenges.

The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast." MT(9:15) Fasting and Prayer helps us overcome challenges.

messages.title: Jesus Calls Levi the Tax Collector
messages.verse: Jesus answered, " Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick. I have come to call not the righteous but sinners to repentance."
messages.closing: Pray and turn to the Lord.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Calls Levi the Tax Collector) Jesus answered, " Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick. I have come to call not the righteous but sinners to repentance." LK(5:31-32) Pray and turn to the Lord.

messages.title: Temptation of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus answered him, "It is written, 'One does not live by bread alone." Jesus answered, " It is written, 'Worship the Lord your God, and serve only him.' " Jesus answered, " It is said, 'Do not put the Lord your God to test.' "
messages.closing: Prayer gives us the strength to overcome temptation.
messages.fullText: 1st Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Temptation of Jesus ) Jesus answered him, "It is written, 'One does not live by bread alone." Jesus answered, " It is written, 'Worship the Lord your God, and serve only him.' " Jesus answered, " It is said, 'Do not put the Lord your God to test.' "  LK(4:4,8,12) Prayer gives us the strength to overcome temptation.

messages.title: Judgment of the Nations
messages.verse: And the king will answer them, " 'For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me something to drink, l was a stranger and you welcomed me, I was naked and you gave me clothing, I was sick and you took care of me, I was in prison and you visited me.' 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' "
messages.closing: During this time of grace let's treat others as we would like to be treated.

'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' messages.title: Jesus Teaches the Our Father Prayer
messages.verse: Jesus said , " For if you forgive others their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you; but if you do not forgive others, neither will your Father forgive your trespasses. "
messages.closing: Pray gives us spiritual nourishment.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Teaches the Our Father Prayer) Jesus said , " For if you forgive others their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you; but if you do not forgive others, neither will your Father forgive your trespasses. " MT(6:14-15) Pray gives us spiritual nourishment.

messages.title: Jonah Preached asking people to Repent
messages.verse: Jesus said to them all, "At the judgment the men of Nineveh will arise with this generation and condemn it, because at the preaching of Jonah they repented, and there is something greater than Jonah here."
messages.closing: We are called to repent and turn towards God's.

LK(11:32) We are called to repent and turn towards God's.

messages.title: Ask and You Shall Receive
messages.verse: Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him. Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets."
messages.closing: Pray for the strength to become humble.

messages.title: Concerning Anger
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Leave your gifts there before the altar and go; first be reconciled to your brother or sister, and then come back and offer your gift."
messages.closing: Lord give us the strength to forgive.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Concerning Anger) Jesus said, " Leave your gifts there before the altar and go; first be reconciled to your brother or sister, and then come back and offer your gift." MT(5:24) Lord give us the strength to forgive.

messages.title: Love for Enemies
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Judging Others
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Give, and  it will be  given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over, will be put into your lap; for the measure you give will be the measure you get back."
messages.closing: Lord give us a generous heart to share.

messages.title: Request of the Mother of James and John
messages.verse: Jesus said, " And whoever wishes to be first among you must be your slave; just as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransom for many."
messages.closing: Lord give us the courage to serve.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Request of the Mother of James and John) Jesus said, " And whoever wishes to be first among you must be your slave; just as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransom for many." messages.title: Rich Man and Lazarus
messages.verse: The rich man said, " 'No, father Abraham; but if someone goes to them from the dead, they will repent.' He said to him, " If they do not listen to Moses and the prophets, neither will they be convinced even if someone rises from the dead.' "
messages.closing: Let repent and pray asking the Lord for forgiveness.
