He said to him, " If they do not listen to Moses and the prophets, neither will they be convinced even if someone rises from the dead.' " LK(16:30-31) Let repent and pray asking the Lord for forgiveness.

messages.title: Jesus The Corner Stone
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Have you never read the scriptures: 'The stone that the builders rejected has become the cornerstone; this was the Lord's doing, and it is amazing in our eyes'? "
messages.closing: Lord gives the strength to follow your example!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus The Corner Stone) Jesus said to them, " Have you never read the scriptures: 'The stone that the builders rejected has become the cornerstone; this was the Lord's doing, and it is amazing in our eyes'? " MT(21:42) Lord gives the strength to follow your example!

messages.title: Parable of the Prodigal Son
messages.verse: Father said to him, "My son, you are here with me always; everything I have is yours. But now we must celebrate and rejoice, because your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found. "
messages.closing: Lord grant us your grace to realize our faults and to turn towards your forgiving love.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Prodigal Son) Father said to him, "My son, you are here with me always; everything I have is yours. But now we must celebrate and rejoice, because your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found. " LK(15:31-32) Lord grant us your grace to realize our faults and to turn towards your forgiving love.

messages.title: Fulfill The Commandments
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven."
messages.closing: Lord help us discern your will.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Fulfill The Commandments) Jesus said, "Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven." MT(5:19) Lord help us discern your will.

messages.title: Geatest Commandment
messages.verse: The scribe said to Jesus, "Well said, teacher. You are right in saying, 'He is One and there is no other than he.' And 'to love him with all your heart, with all your understanding, with all your strength, and to love your neighbor as yourself' is worth more than all burnt offerings and sacrifices."
messages.closing: Lord increase our love for you and our neighbors.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (  Geatest Commandment) The scribe said to Jesus, "Well said, teacher. You are right in saying, 'He is One and there is no other than he.' And 'to love him with all your heart, with all your understanding, with all your strength, and to love your neighbor as yourself' is worth more than all burnt offerings and sacrifices." MK(12:32-33) Lord increase our love for you and our neighbors.

messages.title: Dream of Joseph
messages.verse: Solemnity Feast of St.Joseph ( Dream of Joseph) Angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, " Joseph son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary as your wife, for the child conceived in her is from the Holy Spirit. She will bear a son, and you are to name him Jesus, for he will save his people from their sins."
messages.closing: Lord increase our faith.
messages.fullText: Solemnity Feast of St.Joseph ( Dream of Joseph) Angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, " Joseph son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary as your wife, for the child conceived in her is from the Holy Spirit. She will bear a son, and you are to name him Jesus, for he will save his people from their sins." MT(1:20-21) Lord increase our faith.

messages.title: Jesus Heals Sick Man
messages.verse: Jesus said to him, "Rise, take up your mat, and walk." Immediately the man became well, took up his mat, and walked. Now that day was a sabbath."
messages.closing: Lord help us walk in your healing light.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals Sick Man) Jesus said to him, "Rise, take up your mat, and walk." Immediately the man became well, took up his mat, and walked. Now that day was a sabbath." JH(5:8-9) Lord help us walk in your healing light.

messages.title: Jesus Testifies
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But I have testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father gave me to accomplish, these works that I perform testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me."
messages.closing: Lord give us your strength to become your witness.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Testifies) Jesus said, " But I have testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father gave me to accomplish, these works that I perform testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me." JH(5:36) Lord give us your strength to become your witness.

messages.title: Jesus Teaches at the Temple
messages.verse: Jesus cried out in the temple area as he was teaching and said, "You know me and also know where I am from. Yet I did not come on my own, but the one who sent me, whom you do not know, is true. I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me."
messages.closing: Lord increase our faith.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Teaches at the Temple) Jesus cried out in the temple area as he was teaching and said, "You know me and also know where I am from. Yet I did not come on my own, but the one who sent me, whom you do not know, is true. I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me." JH(7:28-29) Lord increase our faith.

messages.title: Annunciation of The Lord
messages.verse: Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him Jesus."
messages.closing: Lord give us the strength to say yes like Mary our Mother. Happy Feast!!
messages.fullText: Solemnity Feast of Annunciation Gospel Msg ( Annunciation of The Lord) Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him Jesus." LK(1:30-31)  Lord give us the strength to say yes like Mary our Mother. Happy Feast!!

messages.title: Jesus the Resurection and the life.
messages.verse: 5th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg- ( Jesus the Resurection and the life.) Jesus said to Martha, "I am the resurrection and the life; whoever believes in me, even if he dies, will live, and everyone who lives and believes in me, will never die, Do you belive this?" JN (11:25-26) Lord increase our faith.
messages.fullText: 5th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg- ( Jesus the Resurection and the life.) Jesus said to Martha, "I am the resurrection and the life; whoever believes in me, even if he dies, will live, and everyone who lives and believes in me, will never die, Do you belive this?" JN (11:25-26) Lord increase our faith.

messages.title: Jesus Forgives  the Women
messages.verse: Then Jesus straightened up and said to her, "Woman, where are they? Has no one condemned you?" She replied, "No one, sir." Then Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go, (and) from now on do not sin any more."
messages.closing: Lord we repent asking for forgiveness.

Then Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go, (and) from now on do not sin any more." JH(8:10-11) Lord we repent asking for forgiveness.

messages.title: Jesus  Foretells His Death
messages.verse: So Jesus said, " When you have lifted up the Son of Man, then you will realize that I am he, and that I do nothing on my own, but I speak these things as the Father instructed me."
messages.closing: Lord as we look at the cross fill us with your strength!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus  Foretells His Death) So Jesus said, " When you have lifted up the Son of Man, then you will realize that I am he, and that I do nothing on my own, but I speak these things as the Father instructed me." JH(8:28) Lord as we look at the cross fill us with your strength!

messages.title: Jesus The Son of God
messages.verse: Jesus answered, "If I glorify myself, my glory is worth nothing; but it is my Father who glorifies me, of whom you say, 'He is our God."
messages.closing: Lord forgive us for the times we failed to glorify you.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus The Son of God ) Jesus answered, "If I glorify myself, my glory is worth nothing; but it is my Father who glorifies me, of whom you say, 'He is our God." JH(8:54) Lord forgive us for the times we failed to glorify you.

messages.title: True Disciples
messages.verse: Jesus said to the Jews who had believed in him, "If you continue in my word, you are truly my disciples, and you will know the truth, and the truth will make you free."
messages.closing: Lord open our minds and hearts to your words.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( True Disciples) Jesus said to the Jews who had believed in him, "If you continue in my word, you are truly my disciples, and you will know the truth, and the truth will make you free." JH(8:31-32) Lord open our minds and hearts to your words.

messages.title: Plot to kill Jesus
messages.verse: But one of them, Caiaphas, who was high priest that year, said to them, "You know nothing, nor do you consider that it is better for you that one man should die instead of the people, so that the whole nation may not perish."
messages.closing: Lord we repent for all our sins.

JH(11:49-50) Lord we repent for all our sins.

messages.title: Jesus is Condemned To Death
messages.verse: Jesus said to him, "You have said so. But I tell you, From now on you will see the Son of Man seated at the right hand of Power and coming on the clouds of heaven."
messages.closing: Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a Cross.
messages.fullText: Palm Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus is Condemned To Death ) Jesus said to him, "You have said so. But I tell you, From now on you will see the Son of Man seated at the right hand of Power and coming on the clouds of heaven." MT(26:64) Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a Cross.

messages.title: Jesus Foretells His Betrayal
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Little children, I am with you only a little longer. You will look for me; and as I said to the Jews so now I say to you 'where I am going, you cannot come."
messages.closing: Lord we pray, give us the courage to follow you.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus Foretells His Betrayal) Jesus said, " Little children, I am with you only a little longer. You will look for me; and as I said to the Jews so now I say to you 'where I am going, you cannot come." JH(13:33) Lord we pray, give us the courage to follow you.

messages.title: Jesus Washes the Disciples Feet
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Do you know what I have done? You call me Teacher and Lord--and You are right, for that is what I am. So if I, your Lord and Teacher, have washed your feet, you ought to wash one another's feet. "
messages.closing: Help us to become humble Lord.
messages.fullText: Holy Thursday Gospel Msg (Jesus Washes the Disciples Feet)  Jesus said, " Do you know what I have done? You call me Teacher and Lord--and You are right, for that is what I am. So if I, your Lord and Teacher, have washed your feet, you ought to wash one another's feet. " JH(13-12-14) Help us to become humble Lord.

messages.title: Jesus Dies on the Cross
messages.verse: After this, Jesus knew that everything had now been completed and, so that the scripture should be completely fulfilled, he said, "I am thirsty. After Jesus had taken the wine he said, 'It is fulfilled'; and bowing his head he gave up his spirit."
messages.closing: Jesus give us the strength to carry our daily Cross.

After Jesus had taken the wine he said, 'It is fulfilled'; and bowing his head he gave up his spirit." JH(19-28-30) Jesus give us the strength to carry our daily Cross.

messages.title: Resurrection of Jesus
messages.verse: But he said to them, " Do not be alarmed; you are looking for Jesus of Nazareth, who was crucified. He has been raised; he is not here. Look, there is the place they laid him. But go, tell his disciples and Peter that he is going ahead of you to Galilee, there you will see him, just as he told you."
messages.closing: Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!
messages.fullText: Holy Saturday Gospel Msg ( Resurrection of Jesus)  But he said to them, " Do not be alarmed; you are looking for Jesus of Nazareth, who was crucified. He has been raised; he is not here. Look, there is the place they laid him. But go, tell his disciples and Peter that he is going ahead of you to Galilee, there you will see him, just as he told you." MK(28:6-7) Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!

messages.title: Resurrection of Jesus
messages.verse: But the Angel said to the women, " Do not be afraid; I know that you are looking for Jesus who was crucified. He is not here; for he has been  raised, as he said. Come, see the place where he lay. Then go quickly and tell his disciples, 'He has been raised from th dead, and indeed he is going ahead of you to Galilee; there you will seehim.' This is my message for you."
messages.closing: Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!!
messages.fullText: Holy Saturday Easter Vigil- Gospel Msg ( Resurrection of Jesus)  But the Angel said to the women, " Do not be afraid; I know that you are looking for Jesus who was crucified. He is not here; for he has been  raised, as he said. Come, see the place where he lay. Then go quickly and tell his disciples, 'He has been raised from th dead, and indeed he is going ahead of you to Galilee; there you will seehim.' This is my message for you." MT(28:5-7) Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!!

messages.title: Resurrection of Jesus
messages.verse: "Then the other disciple also went in, the one who had arrived at the tomb first, and he saw and believed. For they did not yet understand the scripture that he had to rise from the dead."
messages.closing: Alleluia Christ has Risen Alleluia!! Stay Blessed may the risen Lord, bless you and your families abundantly with peace, joy and happiness!! Happy Easter from Agnel and Family.

For they did not yet understand the scripture that he had to rise from the dead." JH(20:8-9) Alleluia Christ has Risen Alleluia!! Stay Blessed may the risen Lord, bless you and your families abundantly with peace, joy and happiness!! Happy Easter from Agnel and Family.

messages.title: Jesus Appears to Mary Magdalena
messages.verse: Jesus said to her, "Do not cling to me, because I have not yet ascended to the Father. But go to my brothers, and tell them: I am ascending to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

But go to my brothers, and tell them: I am ascending to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God." JH(20:17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Appears to Seven Disciples
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Come and have breakfast. " Now none of the disciples dared to ask him, "Who are you?" Because they knew it was the Lord.
messages.closing: Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!
messages.fullText: Octave of Easter Gospel Msg (Jesus Appears to Seven Disciples) Jesus said to them, " Come and have breakfast. " Now none of the disciples dared to ask him, "Who are you?" Because they knew it was the Lord. JH(21:12) Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!

messages.title: Jesus Walks with the Disciples
messages.verse: When he was at the table with them, he took bread, blessed and broke it, and gave it to them. Then their eyes were opened, and they recognised him; and he vanished from their sight. They said to each other, "We're not our hearts burning within us while he was talking to us on the road, while he was opening the scriptures to us?"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

They said to each other, "We're not our hearts burning within us while he was talking to us on the road, while he was opening the scriptures to us?" LK(24:30-32) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Abundance of Life
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The thief comes only to steal and kill and destroy. I came that they may have life, and have it abundantly."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the Good Shepherd
messages.verse: Jesus said, " I am the good shepherd. I know my own and my own know me, just as the Father knows me and I know the Father. And I lay down my life for the sheep ."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the Way to the Father
messages.verse: Jesus said, " I am the Way; the Truth and the Life. No one can come to the Father except through me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Fruits of being chosen
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Fruits of being chosen) Jesus said, "You did not choose me, no, I chose you; and I commissioned you to go out and to bear fruit, fruit that will last; so that the Father will give you anything you ask him in my name." JH (15:16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH (15:16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Prays for the Disciples
messages.verse: Jesus prayed, " Now this is eternal life, that they should know you, the only true God, and the one whom you sent, Jesus Christ. I glorified you on earth by accomplishing the work that you gave me to do."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Prays to Father for the Disciples
messages.verse: Jesus prayed, " Sanctify them in the truth; your word is truth. As you have sent me into the world,  so I have sent them into the world. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Testimonies of Jesus
messages.verse: But there are also many other things that Jesus did; if everyone of them were written down, I suppose that the world itself could not contain the books that would be written.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Breaths the Holy Spirit On the Disciples
messages.verse: Jesus said to them again, "Peace be with you. As the Father has sent me, even so I send you." And when he had said this, he breathed on them, and said to them, "Receive the Holy Spirit. If you forgive the sins of any, they are forgiven; if you retain the sins of any, they are retained."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

As the Father has sent me, even so I send you." And when he had said this, he breathed on them, and said to them, "Receive the Holy Spirit. If you forgive the sins of any, they are forgiven; if you retain the sins of any, they are retained." JH(21:21-23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Blessed Virgin Mary Mother Of the Church
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Seeing his mother and the disciple he loved standing near her, Jesus said to his mother, ‘Woman, this is your son.’ Then to the disciple he said, ‘This is your mother.’ And from that moment the disciple made a place for her in his home."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH(19:26-27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Rewards
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, there is no one who has left house or brothers or sisters or mother or father or children or fields, for my sake and for the sake of the good news, who will not receive a hundredfold now in this age."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MK(10:29-30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Healing of Blind Bartimaeus
messages.verse: Jesus said to him, " Go; your faith has made you well." Immediately he regained his sight and followed him on the way.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Faith in God
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Therefore I tell you, all that you ask for in prayer, believe that you will receive it and it shall be yours. When you stand to pray, forgive anyone against whom you have a grievance, so that your heavenly Father may in turn forgive you your transgressions."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MK(11:24-26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus is Questioned
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, "I shall ask you one question. Answer me, and I will tell you by what authority I do these things. Did the baptism of John come from heaven, or was it of human origin? Answer me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Love of God- Eternal Life
messages.verse: " For God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Messiah Son of David
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " David himself, inspired by the holy Spirit, said: 'The Lord said to my lord, "Sit at my right hand until I place your enemies under your feet."'
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Widow's Offering
messages.verse: Jesus called his disciples and to them, " Truly I tell you, this poor widow has put in more than all those who are contributing to the treasury. For all of them have contributed out of their abundance; but she out of her poverty has put in everything she had, all she had to live on."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Widow's Offering) Jesus called his disciples and to them, " Truly I tell you, this poor widow has put in more than all those who are contributing to the treasury. For all of them have contributed out of their abundance; but she out of her poverty has put in everything she had, all she had to live on." MK(12:43-44) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the True Food and Drink
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Those who eat my flesh and drink my blood abide in me, and I in them. This is the bread that came down from heaven, not like which your ancestors ate, and they died. But the one who eats this bread will live forever."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!!
messages.fullText: Corpus Christi Gospel Msg ( Jesus the True Food and Drink ) Jesus said, " Those who eat my flesh and drink my blood abide in me, and I in them. This is the bread that came down from heaven, not like which your ancestors ate, and they died. But the one who eats this bread will live forever." JH(6:56,58) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!!

messages.title: You are the Salt and Light
messages.verse: Jesus said, " You are the light of the world. A city built on a hill cannot be hid. In the same way, let your light shine before others, so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father in heaven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( You are the Salt and Light ) Jesus said, " You are the light of the world. A city built on a hill cannot be hid. In the same way, let your light shine before others, so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father in heaven." MT(5:14,16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Solemnity of Sacred Heart of Jesus
messages.labelKey: solemnity of sacred heart of jesus
messages.title: Jesus Makes Our Burdens Light
messages.verse: Solemnity of Sacred Heart of Jesus  (Jesus Makes Our Burdens Light) Jesus said, " Come to me, all you that are weary and are carrying heavy burdens, and I will give you rest."
messages.closing: May the Sacred Heart of Jesus, shower his healing and mercy on us. Happy Feast!!!
messages.fullText: Solemnity of Sacred Heart of Jesus  (Jesus Makes Our Burdens Light) Jesus said, " Come to me, all you that are weary and are carrying heavy burdens, and I will give you rest." MT(10:28)  May the Sacred Heart of Jesus, shower his healing and mercy on us. Happy Feast!!!

messages.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Beware of practicing your piety before others in order to be seen by them; for then you have no reward from your Father in heaven. But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel msg ( Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting ) Jesus said, " Beware of practicing your piety before others in order to be seen by them; for then you have no reward from your Father in heaven. But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."  MT(6:1,6) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Sound Eye
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The eye is the lamp of the body. So, if your eye is healthy, your whole body will be full of light, but if your eye is unhealthy, your whole body will be full of darkness. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Sound Eye) Jesus said, " The eye is the lamp of the body. So, if your eye is healthy, your whole body will be full of light, but if your eye is unhealthy, your whole body will be full of darkness. " MT(6:22-23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Whom to Fear
messages.verse: Jesus said, " And even the hairs of your head are all counted. So do not be afraid, you are of more value than many sparrows."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 12th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg (Whom to Fear) Jesus said, " And even the hairs of your head are all counted. So do not be afraid, you are of more value than many sparrows." MT(10:30-31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Narrow Gate
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Enter through the narrow gate; fir the gate is wide and the road is leads to destruction, and there are many who take it. For the gate is narrow and the road is hard that leads to life, and there are few who find it."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Reward
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Whoever gives even a cup of cold water to one of these little ones in the name of a disciple-truly I tell you, none of these will lose their reward."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Appears to Thomas
messages.verse: Thomas answered and said to him, "My Lord and my God!" Jesus said to him, "Have you come to believe because you have seen me? Blessed are those who have not seen and have believed."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Blessed are those who have not seen and have believed." JH(20:28-29) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Thanks The Father
messages.verse: Jesus said, " I thank you, Father, Lord of heaven and earth, because you have hidden these things from the wise and the intelligent and have revealed them to infants."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Parable of the Sower
messages.verse: 15th Ordinary Sunday Gospel ( The Parable of the Sower) Jesus said, " But as for what was sown on good soil, this is the one who hears the words and understand it, who indeed bears fruit and yields, in one case a hundredfold, in another sixty, and in another thirty."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MT(13:23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Explain the Parable of the Weeds
messages.verse: Jesus said, "The Son of Man will send his angels, and they will collect out of his kingdom all who cause others to sin and all evildoers. They will throw them into the  fiery furnace, where there will be wailing and grinding of teeth. Then the righteous will shine like the sun in the kingdom of their Father. Let anyone with ears listen."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 16th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Explain the Parable of the Weeds) Jesus said, "The Son of Man will send his angels, and they will collect out of his kingdom all who cause others to sin and all evildoers. They will throw them into the  fiery furnace, where there will be wailing and grinding of teeth. Then the righteous will shine like the sun in the kingdom of their Father. Let anyone with ears listen." MT(13:41-43) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the Resurection and the life.
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg- ( Jesus the Resurection and the life.) Jesus said to Martha, "I am the resurrection and the life; whoever believes in me, even if he dies, will live, and everyone who lives and believes in me, will never die, Do you belive this?" JN (11:25-26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living  word of God

messages.title: Kingdom of Heaven
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Thus it will be at the end of the age. The angels will come out and separate the wicked from the righteous and throw them into the fiery furnace, where there will be wailing and grinding of teeth."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MT(13:49-50) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: 18th Ordinary Sunday "Feast of Transfiguration of  the Lord"
messages.labelKey: 18th ordinary sunday feast of transfiguration of the lord
messages.title: Transfiguration
messages.verse: 18th Ordinary Sunday "Feast of Transfiguration of  the Lord" (Transfiguration ) While Peter was still speaking, suddenly a bright cloud overshadowed them, and from the cloud a voice said, " This is my Son, the Beloved, with him I am well pleased; listen to him."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 18th Ordinary Sunday "Feast of Transfiguration of  the Lord" (Transfiguration ) While Peter was still speaking, suddenly a bright cloud overshadowed them, and from the cloud a voice said, " This is my Son, the Beloved, with him I am well pleased; listen to him." MT(17:5) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Eternal Life
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Whoever serves me must follow me, and where I am, there will my servant be also. Whoever serves me, the Father will honor.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Eternal Life) Jesus said, "Whoever serves me must follow me, and where I am, there will my servant be also. Whoever serves me, the Father will honor. JH(12:26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus and the Temple Tax
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and the Temple Tax) Jesus spoke of it first, asking, "What do you think, Simon? From whom do kings ofbthe earth take toll or tribute? From their children or from others?" Peter said, " From others," Jesus said to him, " Then the children are free." MT (17: 25-26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Feast of Assumption of The Blessed Virgin Mary
messages.labelKey: feast of assumption of the blessed virgin mary
messages.title: Mary's Song of Praise
messages.verse: Feast of Assumption of The Blessed Virgin Mary ( Mary's Song of Praise ) Mary said , " My soul magnifies the Lord, and my spirit rejoices in God my Savior, for he has looked with favor on the lowliness of his servant. Surely from now on all generations will call me blessed."
messages.closing: Happy Feast and Happy Independence Day.
messages.fullText: Feast of Assumption of The Blessed Virgin Mary ( Mary's Song of Praise ) Mary said , " My soul magnifies the Lord, and my spirit rejoices in God my Savior, for he has looked with favor on the lowliness of his servant. Surely from now on all generations will call me blessed." LK(1:46-48) Happy Feast and Happy Independence Day.

messages.title: The Canaanite Woman's Faith
messages.verse: She said, " Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters' table." Then  Jesus answered her, "Women, great is your faith! Let it be done for you as you wish." And her daughter was healed instantly."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Then  Jesus answered her, "Women, great is your faith! Let it be done for you as you wish." And her daughter was healed instantly." MT(15:27-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Rich Young Man
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg (Rich Young Man) Jesus said to him, " I tou wish to be perfect, go, sell your possessions, and give the money to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; then you come follow me. " MT (19:21) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Rich Young Man) Jesus said to him, " I tou wish to be perfect, go, sell your possessions, and give the money to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; then you come follow me. " MT (19:21) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Peter's Declaration about Jesus
messages.verse: And Jesus answered him, "Blessed are you , Simon Son of Jonah! For flesh and blood has not revealed this to you, but my Father in heaven. And I tell you, you are Peter, and on this rock I will build my church, and the gates of hell will not prevail against it."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

For flesh and blood has not revealed this to you, but my Father in heaven. And I tell you, you are Peter, and on this rock I will build my church, and the gates of hell will not prevail against it." MT(16:17-18) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Cross and Self Denial
messages.verse: Then Jesus told his disciples, "If anyone would come after me, let him deny himself and take up his cross and follow me. For whoever would save his life will lose it, and whoever loses his life for my sake will find it."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 22nd Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Cross and Self Denial ) Then Jesus told his disciples, "If anyone would come after me, let him deny himself and take up his cross and follow me. For whoever would save his life will lose it, and whoever loses his life for my sake will find it." MT(16:24-25) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Calls the First Disciples
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to Simon, " Do not be afraid, from now on you will be catching people." When they had brought their boats to shore, they left everything and followed him.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Calls the First Disciples) Then Jesus said to Simon, " Do not be afraid, from now on you will be catching people." When they had brought their boats to shore, they left everything and followed him.  LK(5:10-11) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus  Lord of the Sabbath
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, "How David went into the house of God, took the bread of offering, which only the priests could lawfully eat, ate it, and shared it with his companions." Then he said to them, "The Son of Man is lord of the sabbath."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Power of Praying Together
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Again, truly I tell you, if two of you agree on earth about anything you ask, it will be done for you by my Father in heaven. For where two or three are gathered in my name, I am among them."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

For where two or three are gathered in my name, I am among them." MT(18:19-20)  Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Mary and Disciples
messages.verse: When Jesus saw his mother and the disciple there whom he loved, he said to his mother, "Woman, behold, your son." Then he said to the disciple, "Behold, your mother." And from that hour the disciple took her into his home."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Then he said to the disciple, "Behold, your mother." And from that hour the disciple took her into his home." JH(19:26-27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Forgive and you will be Forgiven
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Then in anger his master handed him over to the torturers until he should pay back the whole debt. So will my heavenly Father do to you, unless each of you forgives your brother and sister from your heart."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus compares this Generation
messages.verse: Jesus said, "The Son of Man has come eating and drinking,   and you say, 'Look, a glutton and drunkard, a friend of tax collectors and sinners!' Nevertheless, wisdom is vindicated by all her children. "
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus compares this Generation) Jesus said, "The Son of Man has come eating and drinking,   and you say, 'Look, a glutton and drunkard, a friend of tax collectors and sinners!' Nevertheless, wisdom is vindicated by all her children. " LK(7:34-35)

messages.title: The Laborers in the Vineyard
messages.verse: The landowner said, " Am I not allowed to do what I choose with what belongs to me? Or are you envious because I am generous? So the last will be first, and the first, will be last."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Parable of the Two Son
messages.verse: Which of the two did the will ofbthe father? They said, "The first." Jesus said to them, "Truly I tell you, the tax collectors and the prostitutes are going into the kingdom of God ahead of you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Parable of the Wicked Tenants
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Have you never read in the scriptures: ' The stone that the builders rejected has become the cornerstone; this was the Lord's doing, and it is amazing in our eye's? "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Perseverance in Prayer
messages.verse: Jesus said, " So I say to you, Ask, and it will be given to you; search, and you will find; knock, and the door will be opened for you. If you then, who are evil, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will the heavenly Father give the Holy Spirit to those who ask him!"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(11:9,13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Parable of the Wedding Banquet
messages.verse: Then he said to his slaves, " The wedding is ready but those invited were not worthy. Go therefore into the main streets, and invite everyone you find to the wedding banquet.' For many are called, but few are chosen."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Go therefore into the main streets, and invite everyone you find to the wedding banquet.' For many are called, but few are chosen." MT(22:8-9,14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Question about Paying Taxes
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, " Whose head is this, and whose title?" They answered, "The emperor's." Then he said to them, " Give therefore to the emperor the things that are the emperor's and to God the things that are God's."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The greatest commandment
messages.verse: 29th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( The greatest commandment ) Jesus said ,“You shall love the Lord, your God, with all your heart, with all your soul, and with all your mind. This is the greatest and the first commandment.  The second is like it: You shall love your neighbor as yourself.” (Matthew 22:37-39). Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Judgment of the Nations
messages.verse: And the king will answer them, " 'For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me something to drink, l was a stranger and you welcomed me, I was naked and you gave me clothing, I was sick and you took care of me, I was in prison and you visited me.' 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' "
messages.closing: Eternal rest grant unto them, O Lord, and let your perpetual light shine upon them. Have mercy on them; Oh, Lord, have mercy on them!🙏🏼🙏🏼🙏🏼

'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' " MT(25:36,40) Eternal rest grant unto them, O Lord, and let your perpetual light shine upon them. Have mercy on them; Oh, Lord, have mercy on them!🙏🏼🙏🏼🙏🏼

messages.title: Humility and Hospitality
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, " For all who exalt themselves will be humbled, and those who humble themselves will be exalted. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Denounces the Scribes and Pharisees
messages.verse: Jesus said, " And call no one your father on earth, for you have one Father-the one in heaven. Nor are you to be called instructor, the messiah."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Ten Bridesmaids
messages.verse: Later the other bridesmaids came also, saying, "'Lord, lord, open to us.' But he replied, 'Truly I tell you, I do not know you.' Keep awake therefore, for you know neither the day nor the hour. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Talent
messages.verse: " So take the talent from him, and give it to the one with ten talents. For to all those who have, more will be given, and they will have an abundance, but from those who have nothing, even what they have will be taken  away. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus and Zacchaeus
messages.verse: Zac-chae-us stood there and said to the Lord, "Look, half of my possessions, Lord, I will give to the poor; and if I  have defrauded anyone of anything, I will pay back four times as much." Jesus said to him, " Today salvation has come to this house, because he too is a son of Abraham. For the Son of Man has come to seek and to save what was lost."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and Zacchaeus)   Zac-chae-us stood there and said to the Lord, "Look, half of my possessions, Lord, I will give to the poor; and if I  have defrauded anyone of anything, I will pay back four times as much." Jesus said to him, " Today salvation has come to this house, because he too is a son of Abraham. For the Son of Man has come to seek and to save what was lost." LK(19:8-10) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Cleanses the Temple
messages.verse: Jesussaid, " It is written, 'My house shall  be a house of prayer'; but you have made it a den of robbers."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cleanses the Temple) Jesussaid, " It is written, 'My house shall  be a house of prayer'; but you have made it a den of robbers." LK(19:46) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Judgement of the Nations
messages.verse: Feast of Christ the King ( Judgement of the Nations) "Then the king will say to those at his right hand, 'Come, you that are blessed by my Father, inherit the kingdom prepared for you from the foundations of the world. 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of my family, you did it to me.'"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Necessity for Watchfulness
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Beware, keep alert; for you do not know when the time will come."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 1st Sunday of Advent Gospel Msg ( Necessity for Watchfulness) Jesus said, " Beware, keep alert; for you do not know when the time will come." MK(13:33) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Proclamation of John the Baptist
messages.verse: John proclaimed, " The one who is more powerful than I is coming after me, I am not worthy to stoop down and untie the thong of his sandals. I have baptized you with water, but he will baptize you with the Holy Spirit."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals a Paralytic
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But so that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins" he said to the one who was paralyzed- " I say to you, stand up and take your bed and go to your home."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(5:24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Proclamation of John the Baptist
messages.verse: 3rd Sunday of Advent - Gospel ( Proclamation of John the Baptist) John said, " I am the voice of one crying out in the wilderness, 'Make straight the way of the Lord,' " as the prophet Isaiah said.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Angel Appeared to Mary
messages.verse: Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him Jesus."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him Jesus." LK(1:30-31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Nativity Of the Lord
messages.verse: But the angel said to them, "Do not be afraid; for see-I am bringing you good news of great joy for all the people: to you is born this day in the city of David a Savior, who is the Messiah, the Lord. This will be a sign for you: you will find a child wrapped in bands of cloth and lying in a manger."
messages.closing: May the Lord bless you and your families this Christmas with Love, Joy, Peace & Good Health! Merry Christmas from Agnel and Family 🌲

LK(2:10-12) May the Lord bless you and your families this Christmas with Love, Joy, Peace & Good Health! Merry Christmas from Agnel and Family 🌲

messages.title: Jesus is Presented in the Temple
messages.verse: Simon praised God, saying, " Master, now you are dismissing your servant in peace, according to your word; for my eyes have seen your salvation, which you have prepared in the presence of all people, a light for the revelation to the Gentiles and for glory to your people Israel."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(2:29-32) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus is Named
messages.verse: Solemnity Mary Mother of God  ( Jesus is Named ) Then the shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all they had heard and seen, just as it had been told to them. When eight days were completed for his circumcision, he was named Jesus, the name given to him by the angel before he was conceived in the womb.
messages.closing: Happy New Year 2024!! May this year be filled with blessings of good health and happiness!! From Agnel and Family.

messages.title: Pharisees Question John
messages.verse: John answered them, "I baptize you with water; but there is one among you whom you do not recognize, the one who is coming after me, whose sandal strap I am not worthy to untie."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH(1:26-27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Dove Resting on Jesus
messages.verse: John said, "I did not know him, but the one who sent me to baptize with water told me, 'On whomever you see the Spirit come down and remain, he is the one who will baptize with the holy Spirit.'"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH(1:33) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus and Nathaniel
messages.verse: Jesus said to him, " Truly, truly, I say to you, you will see heaven opened, and the angels of God ascending and descending on the Son of Man."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Baptism of Jesus
messages.verse: Solemnity of Lord's Baptism (Baptism of Jesus) And just as Jesus was coming up out of the water, he saw the heavens torn apart and the Spirit desending like dove on him. And a voice come from heaven, " You are my Son, the Beloved, with you I am well pleased."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The First Disciples
messages.verse: When Jesus turned and saw them following him and said to them, "What are you looking for?" They said to him, "Rabbi" (which translated means Teacher), "where are you staying?" He said to them,"Come, and see." They came and saw where he was staying, and they remained with him that day. It was about four o'clock in the afternoon.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

It was about four o'clock in the afternoon. JH(1:38-39) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Lord of the Sabbath
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " The sabbath was made for  humankind, and not humankind for the sabbath, so the Son of Man is lord even of the sabbath."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus calls the First Disciples
messages.verse: 3rd Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus calls the First Disciples ) As he passed by the Sea of Galilee, he saw Simon and his brother Andrew casting their nets into the sea; they were fishermen. Jesus said to them, "Come after me, and I will make you fishers of men." Mk(1:16-17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Man with an Unclean Spirit
messages.verse: 4th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Man with an Unclean Spirit ) Just then there was in their synagogue was a man with an unclean spirit, and he cried out, "What have you to do with us, Jesus of Nazareth? Have you come to destroy us? I know who you are, the Holy One of God!" Mk(1:23-24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Feast of Presentation of the Lord
messages.labelKey: feast of presentation of the lord
messages.title: Jesus is Presented in the Temple
messages.verse: When the time came for the purification according to the law of Moses, they brought him up to Jerusalem to present him to the Lord, and they offered a sacrifice according to what is stated in the law of the Lord, "a pair of turtle doves or two young pigeon."
messages.closing: Happy Feast!! Stay blessed!
messages.fullText: Feast of Presentation of the Lord Gospel Msg (Jesus is Presented in the Temple) When the time came for the purification according to the law of Moses, they brought him up to Jerusalem to present him to the Lord, and they offered a sacrifice according to what is stated in the law of the Lord, "a pair of turtle doves or two young pigeon." LK(2:22-24) Happy Feast!! Stay blessed!

messages.title: Jesus Heals Many at Simon's House
messages.verse: Now Simon's mother-in-law was in bed sick with a fever, and at once they told him about her. He went to her, took her by the hand and helped her up. And the fever left her and she began to serve them.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 5th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals Many at Simon's House) Now Simon's mother-in-law was in bed sick with a fever, and at once they told him about her. He went to her, took her by the hand and helped her up. And the fever left her and she began to serve them. MK(1:30-31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Cleanses a Leper
messages.verse: 6th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cleanses a Leper ) A leper came to him begging him, and kneeling, he said to him, "If you choose, you can make me clean." Moved with pity, Jesus stretched out his hand and touched him, and said to him, "I do choose. Be made clean!"  Mk(1:40-41) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 6th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cleanses a Leper ) A leper came to him begging him, and kneeling, he said to him, "If you choose, you can make me clean." Moved with pity, Jesus stretched out his hand and touched him, and said to him, "I do choose. Be made clean!"  Mk(1:40-41) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Followers of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said to them all, " For those who want to save their life will lose it, and those who lose their life for my sake will save it. What does it profit them if they gain the whole world, but lose or forfeit themselves?"
messages.closing: Lord grant us courage to take up our cross daily and follow you.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Followers of Jesus) Jesus said to them all, " For those who want to save their life will lose it, and those who lose their life for my sake will save it. What does it profit them if they gain the whole world, but lose or forfeit themselves?" LK(9:24-25) Lord grant us courage to take up our cross daily and follow you.

messages.title: Question about Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast."
messages.closing: Lord, forgive us as we fast and pray🙏🏼.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Question about Fasting) Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast." MT(9:15) Lord, forgive us as we fast and pray🙏🏼.

messages.title: Judgment of the Nations
messages.verse: And the king will answer them, " 'For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me something to drink, l was a stranger and you welcomed me, I was naked and you gave me clothing, I was sick and you took care of me, I was in prison and you visited me.' 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' "
messages.closing: Lord help us share with the needy.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Judgment of the Nations)  And the king will answer them, " 'For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me something to drink, l was a stranger and you welcomed me, I was naked and you gave me clothing, I was sick and you took care of me, I was in prison and you visited me.' 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' " MT(25:36,40) Lord help us share with the needy.

messages.title: Love for Enemies
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you, so that you may be children of your Father in heaven; for he makes his Sun rise on the evil and on good, and sends rain on the righteous and on the unrighteous."
messages.closing: Jesus give us the strength to love and forgive those who hurt us.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Love for Enemies) Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you, so that you may be children of your Father in heaven; for he makes his Sun rise on the evil and on good, and sends rain on the righteous and on the unrighteous." MT(5:44-45) Jesus give us the strength to love and forgive those who hurt us.

messages.title: Request of the Mother of James and John
messages.verse: Jesus said, " And whoever wishes to be first among you must be your slave; just as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransom for many."
messages.closing: Lord, give us your strength to serve others.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Request of the Mother of James and John) Jesus said, " And whoever wishes to be first among you must be your slave; just as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransom for many." MT(20:27-28) Lord, give us your strength to serve others.

messages.title: Rich Man and Lazarus
messages.verse: The rich man said, " 'No, father Abraham; but if someone goes to them from the dead, they will repent.' He said to him, " If they do not listen to Moses and the prophets, neither will they be convinced even if someone rises from the dead.' "
messages.closing: Lord, we repent and pray asking for your forgiveness.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Rich Man and Lazarus) The rich man said, " 'No, father Abraham; but if someone goes to them from the dead, they will repent.' He said to him, " If they do not listen to Moses and the prophets, neither will they be convinced even if someone rises from the dead.' " LK(16:30-31) Lord, we repent and pray asking for your forgiveness.

messages.title: Jesus Cleanses the Temple
messages.verse: His disciples remembered the words of scripture, "Zeal for your house will consume me." At this the Jews answered and said to him, "What sign can you show us for doing this?" Jesus answered and said to them, "Destroy this temple and in three days I will raise it up."
messages.closing: Jesus cleanse us with your love.
messages.fullText: 3rd Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cleanses the Temple) His disciples remembered the words of scripture, "Zeal for your house will consume me." At this the Jews answered and said to him, "What sign can you show us for doing this?" Jesus answered and said to them, "Destroy this temple and in three days I will raise it up." JH(2:17-19) Jesus cleanse us with your love.

messages.title: Forgive and you will be Forgiven
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Then in anger his master handed him over to the torturers until he should pay back the whole debt. So will my heavenly Father do to you, unless each of you forgives your brother and sister from your heart."
messages.closing: Jesus fill our hearts with your love to forgive.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Forgive and you will be Forgiven) Jesus said, "Then in anger his master handed him over to the torturers until he should pay back the whole debt. So will my heavenly Father do to you, unless each of you forgives your brother and sister from your heart." MT(18:34-35) Jesus fill our hearts with your love to forgive.

messages.title: Geatest Commandment
messages.verse: The scribe said to Jesus, "Well said, teacher. You are right in saying, 'He is One and there is no other than he.' And 'to love him with all your heart, with all your understanding, with all your strength, and to love your neighbor as yourself' is worth more than all burnt offerings and sacrifices."
messages.closing: Lord, help us spread your love and forgiveness.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Geatest Commandment) The scribe said to Jesus, "Well said, teacher. You are right in saying, 'He is One and there is no other than he.' And 'to love him with all your heart, with all your understanding, with all your strength, and to love your neighbor as yourself' is worth more than all burnt offerings and sacrifices." MK(12:32-33) Lord, help us spread your love and forgiveness.

messages.title: Prayer of Repentance
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted."
messages.closing: Lord help us to be humble!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (  Prayer of Repentance) Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted." LK(18:13-14) Lord help us to be humble!

messages.title: Love of God- Eternal Life
messages.verse: Jesus said, " For God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life."
messages.closing: Lord, increase our faith!
messages.fullText: 4th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg  ( Love of God- Eternal Life ) Jesus said, " For God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life." JH(3:16) Lord, increase our faith!

messages.title: The Authority of the Son
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg (The Authority of the Son) Jesus said, "Very truly, I tell you, anyone who hears my word and believes him who sent me has eternal life, and does not come under judgment, but has passed from death to life." JH (5:24) Lord help us to listen to the Father.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (The Authority of the Son) Jesus said, "Very truly, I tell you, anyone who hears my word and believes him who sent me has eternal life, and does not come under judgment, but has passed from death to life." JH (5:24) Lord help us to listen to the Father.

messages.title: Jesus Testifies
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But I have testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father gave me to accomplish, these works that I perform testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me."
messages.closing: Lord, help us become witnesses!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Testifies) Jesus said, " But I have testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father gave me to accomplish, these works that I perform testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me." JH(5:36) Lord, help us become witnesses!

messages.title: Eternal Life
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Amen, amen, I say to you, unless a grain of wheat falls to the ground and dies, it remains just a grain of wheat; but if it dies, it produces much fruit. Whoever loves his life loses it, and whoever hates his life in this world will preserve it for eternal life."
messages.closing: Lord, forgive us as we repent.
messages.fullText: 5th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Eternal Life)  Jesus said, "Amen, amen, I say to you, unless a grain of wheat falls to the ground and dies, it remains just a grain of wheat; but if it dies, it produces much fruit. Whoever loves his life loses it, and whoever hates his life in this world will preserve it for eternal life." JH(12:24-25) Lord, forgive us as we repent.

messages.title: Jesus Forgives  the Women
messages.verse: Then Jesus straightened up and said to her, "Woman, where are they? Has no one condemned you?" She replied, "No one, sir." Then Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go, (and) from now on do not sin any more."
messages.closing: Lord, give us the strength to forgive.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus Forgives  the Women) Then Jesus straightened up and said to her, "Woman, where are they? Has no one condemned you?" She replied, "No one, sir." Then Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go, (and) from now on do not sin any more." JH(8:10-11) Lord, give us the strength to forgive.

messages.title: Dream of Joseph
messages.verse: Solemnity Feast of St.Joseph ( Dream of Joseph) Angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, " Joseph son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary as your wife, for the child conceived in her is from the Holy Spirit. She will bear a son, and you are to name him Jesus, for he will save his people from their sins."
messages.closing: Lord, increase our faith.
messages.fullText: Solemnity Feast of St.Joseph ( Dream of Joseph) Angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, " Joseph son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary as your wife, for the child conceived in her is from the Holy Spirit. She will bear a son, and you are to name him Jesus, for he will save his people from their sins." MT(1:20-21) Lord, increase our faith.

messages.title: Jesus is annointed at Bethany
messages.verse: Palm Sunday Gospel Msg (Jesus is annointed at Bethany ) Jesus said, "Let her alone. Why do you make trouble for her? She has done a good thing for me. The poor you will always have with you, and whenever you wish you can do good to them, but you will not always have me. She has done what she could. She has anticipated anointing my body for burial. Amen, I say to you, wherever the gospel is proclaimed to the whole world, what she has done will be told in memory of her." MK (14:6-9) Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a cross.
messages.fullText: Palm Sunday Gospel Msg (Jesus is annointed at Bethany ) Jesus said, "Let her alone. Why do you make trouble for her? She has done a good thing for me. The poor you will always have with you, and whenever you wish you can do good to them, but you will not always have me. She has done what she could. She has anticipated anointing my body for burial. Amen, I say to you, wherever the gospel is proclaimed to the whole world, what she has done will be told in memory of her." MK (14:6-9) Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a cross.

messages.title: Jesus Foretells His Betrayal
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Little children, I am with you only a little longer. You will look for me; and as I said to the Jews so now I say to you 'where I am going, you cannot come."
messages.closing: Lord,  we pray for courage to be your witnesses.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus Foretells His Betrayal) Jesus said, " Little children, I am with you only a little longer. You will look for me; and as I said to the Jews so now I say to you 'where I am going, you cannot come." JH(13:33) Lord,  we pray for courage to be your witnesses.

messages.title: Jesus Dies on the Cross
messages.verse: After this, Jesus knew that everything had now been completed and, so that the scripture should be completely fulfilled, he said, "I am thirsty. After Jesus had taken the wine, he said, 'It is fulfilled'; and bowing his head, he gave up his spirit."
messages.closing: Lord, help us be witnesses to the Cross.
messages.fullText: Good Friday Gospel Msg (Jesus Dies on the Cross) After this, Jesus knew that everything had now been completed and, so that the scripture should be completely fulfilled, he said, "I am thirsty. After Jesus had taken the wine, he said, 'It is fulfilled'; and bowing his head, he gave up his spirit." JH(19-28-30) Lord, help us be witnesses to the Cross.

messages.title: Resurrection of Jesus
messages.verse: But he said to them, " Do not be alarmed; you are looking for Jesus of Nazareth, who was crucified. He has been raised; he is not here. Look, there is the place they laid him. But go, tell his disciples and Peter that he is going ahead of you to Galilee, there you will see him, just as he told you."
messages.closing: Christ has Risen Alleluia!!
messages.fullText: Holy Saturday Gospel Msg ( Resurrection of Jesus)  But he said to them, " Do not be alarmed; you are looking for Jesus of Nazareth, who was crucified. He has been raised; he is not here. Look, there is the place they laid him. But go, tell his disciples and Peter that he is going ahead of you to Galilee, there you will see him, just as he told you." MK(16:6-7) Christ has Risen Alleluia!!

messages.title: Jesus Shows Himself to the Disciples
messages.verse: Later, as the eleven were at table, he appeared to them and rebuked them for their unbelief and hardness of heart because they had not believed those who saw him after he had been raised. He said to them, "Go into the whole world and proclaim the gospel to every creature."
messages.closing: Jesus Christ is Risen Alleluia!!
messages.fullText: Octave of Easter Gospel Msg ( Jesus Shows Himself to the Disciples) Later, as the eleven were at table, he appeared to them and rebuked them for their unbelief and hardness of heart because they had not believed those who saw him after he had been raised. He said to them, "Go into the whole world and proclaim the gospel to every creature." MK(16:14-15) Jesus Christ is Risen Alleluia!!

messages.title: Jesus Walks on Water
messages.verse: When they had rowed about three or four miles, they saw Jesus walking on the sea and coming near the boat, and they began to be afraid. But he said to them, "It is I. Do not be afraid."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Walks on Water) When they had rowed about three or four miles, they saw Jesus walking on the sea and coming near the boat, and they began to be afraid. But he said to them, "It is I. Do not be afraid." JH(6:19-20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Father's Love for Son
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The Father loves the Son and has placed all things in his hands. Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life; whoever disobeys the Son will not see life, but must endure God's wrath."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Father's Love for Son) Jesus said, " The Father loves the Son and has placed all things in his hands. Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life; whoever disobeys the Son will not see life, but must endure God's wrath." JH(3:35-36) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Love of God- Eternal Life
messages.verse: " For God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg  ( Love of God- Eternal Life ) " For God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life. JH(3:16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Solemnity Theo Annunciation of the Lord
messages.labelKey: solemnity theo annunciation of the lord
messages.title: Immaculate Conception
messages.verse: Solemnity Theo Annunciation of the Lord ( Immaculate Conception) Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him 'Jesus'. Mary said, " Behold, I am the handmaid of the Lord. May it be done to me according to your word." Then the angel departed from her.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!
messages.fullText: Solemnity Theo Annunciation of the Lord ( Immaculate Conception) Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him 'Jesus'. Mary said, " Behold, I am the handmaid of the Lord. May it be done to me according to your word." Then the angel departed from her. LK(1:30,38) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!

messages.title: Jesus Appears to the Disciples
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "Thus it is written that the Messiah would suffer and rise from the dead on the third day and that repentance, for the forgiveness of sins, would be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 3rd Sunday of Easter Gospel Msg ( Jesus Appears to the Disciples ) Then Jesus said to them, "Thus it is written that the Messiah would suffer and rise from the dead on the third day and that repentance, for the forgiveness of sins, would be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem." LK(24:46-47) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the Good Shepherd
messages.verse: Jesus said, " I am the good shepherd. I know my own and my own know me, just as the Father knows me and I know the Father. And I lay down my life for the sheep ."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 4th Sunday of Easter Gospel Msg ( Jesus the Good Shepherd ) Jesus said, " I am the good shepherd. I know my own and my own know me, just as the Father knows me and I know the Father. And I lay down my life for the sheep ." JH(10:14-15) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus The Good Shepherd
messages.verse: Jesus said, " My sheep hear my voice. I know them, and they follow me. I give them eternal life, and they will never perish."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus The Good Shepherd ) Jesus said, " My sheep hear my voice. I know them, and they follow me. I give them eternal life, and they will never perish."JH(10:27-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Summary of Jesus' Teaching
messages.verse: Jesus said, " I do not judge anyone who hears my words and does not keep them, for I came not to judge the world, but to save the world."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Summary of Jesus' Teaching ) Jesus said, " I do not judge anyone who hears my words and does not keep them, for I came not to judge the world, but to save the world."JH(12:47) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Commissions the Disciples
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, " Go into all the world and proclaim the good news to the whole creation. The one who believes and is baptized will be saved;  but the one who does not believe will be condemned."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Commissions the Disciples ) Then Jesus said to them, " Go into all the world and proclaim the good news to the whole creation. The one who believes and is baptized will be saved;  but the one who does not believe will be condemned." MK(16:15-16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the Way to the Father
messages.verse: Jesus said, " In my Father's house there are many dwelling places. If it were not so, would I have told you that I go to prepare a place for you?
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus the Way to the Father) Jesus said, " In my Father's house there are many dwelling places. If it were not so, would I have told you that I go to prepare a place for you? JH(14:2) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Abide in Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " If you remain in me and my words remain in you, ask for whatever you want and it will be done for you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 5th Sunday of Easter Gospel Msg ( Abide in Jesus) Jesus said to them, " If you remain in me and my words remain in you, ask for whatever you want and it will be done for you." JH(15:7) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Abide in Me
messages.verse: Feast of St.Joseph the worker ( Abide in Me) Jesus said, " Remain in me, as I in you. As a branch cannot bear fruit all by itself, unless it remains part of the vine, neither can you unless you remain in me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the Way to the Father
messages.verse: Jesus said, " I am the Way; the Truth and the Life. No one can come to the Father except through me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus the Way to the Father) Jesus said, " I am the Way; the Truth and the Life. No one can come to the Father except through me." JH(14:6) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Calls Us Friends
messages.verse: Jesus said, " I do not call you servants any longer, because the servant does not know what the master is doing; but I have called you friends, because I have made know to you everything that I have heard from my Father."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 6th Sunday of Easter Gospel Msg ( Jesus Calls Us Friends) Jesus said, " I do not call you servants any longer, because the servant does not know what the master is doing; but I have called you friends, because I have made know to you everything that I have heard from my Father." JH(15:15) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Commissioning of the Disciples
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Go into all the world and proclaim the good news to the whole creation. The one who believes and is baptized will be saved; but the one who does not believe will be condemned."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
