messages.title: Love of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " No one has greater love than this, to lay down one's life for one's friends. You are my friends if you do what I command you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Love of Jesus) Jesus said to them, " No one has greater love than this, to lay down one's life for one's friends. You are my friends if you do what I command you." JH(15:13-14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Breaths the Holy Spirit On the Disciples
messages.verse: Jesus said to them again, "Peace be with you. As the Father has sent me, even so I send you." And when he had said this, he breathed on them, and said to them, "Receive the Holy Spirit. If you forgive the sins of any, they are forgiven; if you retain the sins of any, they are retained."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Pentcost Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Breaths the Holy Spirit On the Disciples) Jesus said to them again, "Peace be with you. As the Father has sent me, even so I send you." And when he had said this, he breathed on them, and said to them, "Receive the Holy Spirit. If you forgive the sins of any, they are forgiven; if you retain the sins of any, they are retained." JH(20:21-23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Mary Mother Of the Church
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Seeing his mother and the disciple he loved standing near her, Jesus said to his mother, ‘Woman, this is your son.’ Then to the disciple he said, ‘This is your mother.’ And from that moment the disciple made a place for her in his home."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Mary Mother Of the Church) Jesus said, " Seeing his mother and the disciple he loved standing near her, Jesus said to his mother, ‘Woman, this is your son.’ Then to the disciple he said, ‘This is your mother.’ And from that moment the disciple made a place for her in his home." JH(19:26-27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Transfiguration
messages.verse: Then a cloud overshadowed them, and from the cloud there came a voice, "This is my Son, the Beloved; listen to him!"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (The Transfiguration) Then a cloud overshadowed them, and from the cloud there came a voice, "This is my Son, the Beloved; listen to him!" MK(9:7) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Reward for Serving Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said, " For truly I tell you, whoever gives  you a cup of water to drink because you bear the name of Chris will by no means lose the reward. Salt is good, but if the salt has lost its saltiness,  how will you make it salty again? Have salt in yourselves, and be at peace with one another."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Reward for Serving Jesus) Jesus said, " For truly I tell you, whoever gives  you a cup of water to drink because you bear the name of Chris will by no means lose the reward. Salt is good, but if the salt has lost its saltiness,  how will you make it salty again? Have salt in yourselves, and be at peace with one another." MK(9:41,50) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Commissioning of the Disciples
messages.verse: Jesus said to them , " All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me. Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the So and of the Holy Spirit."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the So and of the Holy Spirit."  MT(28:18-19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Holy Body and Blood of Christ
messages.verse: Solemnity of Most (Holy Body and Blood of Christ) Jesus said to them, "This is my blood of the covenant, which will be shed for many. Amen, I say to you, I shall not drink again the fruit of the vine until the day when I drink it new in the kingdom of God."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Amen, I say to you, I shall not drink again the fruit of the vine until the day when I drink it new in the kingdom of God." MK(14:24-25) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Wicked Tenants
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Have you not read this scripture: 'The stone that the builders rejected has become the cornerstone; this was the Lord's doing and it is amazing in our eye's '?"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Wicked Tenants) Jesus said, " Have you not read this scripture: 'The stone that the builders rejected has become the cornerstone; this was the Lord's doing and it is amazing in our eye's '?" MK(12:10-11) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: God and King
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, "Pay Caesar what belongs to Caesar; and God what belongs to God." And they were amazed at him.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( God and King) Jesus said to them, "Pay Caesar what belongs to Caesar; and God what belongs to God." And they were amazed at him. MK(12:17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Question about Resurrection
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, "As for the dead being raised, have you not read in the Book of Moses, in the passage about the bush, how God told him, 'I am the God of Abraham, God of Isaac, and God of Jacob'? He is not God of the dead but of the living. You are greatly misled."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

He is not God of the dead but of the living. You are greatly misled." MK(12:26-27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Question about  Commandment
messages.verse: Jesus said to him, " 'You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart, with all your soul, with all your mind, and with all your strength.' The second is this, 'You shall love your neighbor as yourself.' There is no other commandment greater than these."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

The second is this, 'You shall love your neighbor as yourself.' There is no other commandment greater than these." MK(12:29-31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Solemnity of The Mst Sacred Heart of Jesus
messages.labelKey: solemnity of the mst sacred heart of jesus
messages.title: Jesus fulfilled the Scripture
messages.verse: Solemnity of The Mst Sacred Heart of Jesus  ( Jesus fulfilled the Scripture ) " One of the soldier pierced his lance into his side, and immediately blood and water flowed out. For this happened so that the scripture passage might be fulfilled: "Not a bone of is will be broken." And again another passage says: "They will look upon him whom they have pierced."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Solemnity of The Mst Sacred Heart of Jesus  ( Jesus fulfilled the Scripture ) " One of the soldier pierced his lance into his side, and immediately blood and water flowed out. For this happened so that the scripture passage might be fulfilled: "Not a bone of is will be broken." And again another passage says: "They will look upon him whom they have pierced." JH(11:34,36-37) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Sin against Holy Spirit  and Jesus's family
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, people will be forgiven for their sins and whatever blasphemes they utter; but whoever blasphemes against the Holy Spirit can never have forgiveness,  but is guilty of an eternal sin."  Jesus looking around at those seated in the circle he said, "Here are my mother and my brothers. For whoever does the will of God is my brother and sister and mother."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Sin against Holy Spirit  and Jesus's family) Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, people will be forgiven for their sins and whatever blasphemes they utter; but whoever blasphemes against the Holy Spirit can never have forgiveness,  but is guilty of an eternal sin."  Jesus looking around at those seated in the circle he said, "Here are my mother and my brothers. For whoever does the will of God is my brother and sister and mother."  MK(3:28-29,34-35) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Law and the Prophets
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven." MT(5:19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Do not Swear
messages.verse: Jesus said, "But I say this to you, do not swear at all, either by heaven, since that is God's throne."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Do not Swear ) Jesus said, "But I say this to you, do not swear at all, either by heaven, since that is God's throne." MT(5:34) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Kingdom of God
messages.verse: Jesus said, " It is like a mustard seed that, when it is sown in the ground, is the smallest of all the seeds on the earth. But once it is sown, it springs up and becomes the largest of plants and puts forth large branches, so that the birds of the sky can dwell in its shade."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 11th Sunday of Ordinary Time Gospel Msg ( Kingdom of God ) Jesus said, " It is like a mustard seed that, when it is sown in the ground, is the smallest of all the seeds on the earth. But once it is sown, it springs up and becomes the largest of plants and puts forth large branches, so that the birds of the sky can dwell in its shade." MK(4:31-32) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel msg ( Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting ) Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."  MT(6:3,6,17-18) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Calmed the Sea
messages.verse: They woke him and said to him, "Teacher, do you not care that we are perishing?" He woke up, rebuked the wind, and said to the sea, "Quiet! Be still!" The wind ceased and there was a great calm. Then he asked them, "Why are you terrified? Do you not yet have faith?"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 12th Sunday in Ordinary Time Gospel Msg ( Jesus Calmed the Sea) They woke him and said to him, "Teacher, do you not care that we are perishing?" He woke up, rebuked the wind, and said to the sea, "Quiet! Be still!" The wind ceased and there was a great calm. Then he asked them, "Why are you terrified? Do you not yet have faith?" MK(4:39-40) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Narrow Gate
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Enter through the narrow gate; for the gate is wide and the road is easy that leads to destruction, and there are many who take it. For the gate is narrow and the road is hard that leads to life, and there are few who find it."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

For the gate is narrow and the road is hard that leads to life, and there are few who find it." MT(7:13-14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Cleanses  a  Lepers
messages.verse: And behold, a leper came to him and knelt before him, saying, "Lord, if you wish, you can make me clean." And he stretched out his hand and touched him, saying, "I wish; be clean." And immediately his leprosy was cleansed. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

And immediately his leprosy was cleansed. " MT(8:2-3) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.labelKey: solemnity feast of stpeter and stpaul
messages.title: Peter's Declaration of Jesus
messages.verse: Solemnity Feast of St.Peter and St.Paul ( Peter's Declaration of Jesus) Simon Peter answered, "You are the Messiah, the Son of the living God." Jesus said, " And I tell you, you are Peter, and on this rock I will build my church, and the gates of Hades will not prevail against it."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Restored A Little Girl to life
messages.verse: He took her by the hand and said to her, " Tal' i-tha cum." Which means, "Little girl, get up!" And immediately the girl got up and began to walk about (She was twelve years of age). At this they were overcome with amazement.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 13th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Restored A Little Girl to life) He took her by the hand and said to her, " Tal' i-tha cum." Which means, "Little girl, get up!" And immediately the girl got up and began to walk about (She was twelve years of age). At this they were overcome with amazement.  MK(5:41-42) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals a Paralytic
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But so that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins" --he then said to the paralytic--"Stand up, take your bed and go to your home. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus is Rejected at Nazareth
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, " Prophets are not without honor, except in their hometown, and among their own relatives, and in their own house." And he was amazed at their unbelief.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Disciples  Proclaimed it's Time to Repent
messages.verse: Jesus summoned the Twelve and began to send them out two by two and gave them authority over unclean spirits. He instructed them to take nothing for the journey but a walking stick--no food, no sack, no money in their belts.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Makes Our Burdens Light
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Come to me, all you that are weary and are carrying heavy burdens, and I will give you rest."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus Makes Our Burdens Light) Jesus said, " Come to me, all you that are weary and are carrying heavy burdens, and I will give you rest." MT(10:28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Compassion for the Crowd
messages.verse: As he went ashore,  he saw a great crowd, his heart was moved with pity for them, for they were like sheep without a shepherd; and he began to teach them many things.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Explains the Parable of the Sower
messages.verse: Jesus said, "But as for what was sown the seed sown on good soil, this is the one who hears the word and understands it, who indeed bears fruit and yields, in one case a hundred fold, in another sixty and in another  thirty."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Feeding the Five Thousand
messages.verse: Then Jesus took the loaves, and when he had given thanks, he distributed them to those who were seated; so also the fish,  as much as they wanted.

messages.title: Jesus Explain the Parable of the Weeds
messages.verse: Jesus said, "The Son of Man will send his angels, and they will collect out of his kingdom all who cause others to sin and all evildoers. They will throw them into the  fiery furnace, where there will be wailing and grinding of teeth."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Bread of Life
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, "I am the bread of life; whoever comes to me will never be hunger, and whoever believes in me will never be thirst."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Treasures New and Old
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Therefore every scribe that is trained for the kingdom of heaven is like the master of the household who brings out of his treasure what is new and what is old."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: She said, " Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters' table." Then Jesus answered her, "Women, great is your faith! Let it be done for you as you wish." And her daughter was healed instantly."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the Bread of Life

messages.title: Jesus and the Temple Tax
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and the Temple Tax) Jesus spoke of it first, asking, "What do you think, Simon? From whom do kings of the earth take toll or tribute? From their children or from others?" Peter said, " From others," Jesus said to him, " Then the children are free." MT (17: 25-26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said, " Those who eat my flesh and drink my blood have eternal life, and I will raise them up on the last day; for my flesh is true food and my blood is true drink."

messages.verse: Simon Peter answered him, " Lord, to whom can we go? You have the words of eternal life. We have come to believe and know that you are the Holy One of God."

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: What Defiles a Person
messages.verse: Jesus said, " It is what comes out of a person that defiles. For it is from within, from the human heart, that evil intentions come: fornication, theft, murder, adultery, avarice, wickedness, deceit, licentiousness, envy, slander, pride, folly."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Calls the First Disciples
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to Simon, " Do not be afraid, from now on you will be catching people." When they had brought their boats to shore, they left everything and followed him.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Question about Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " You cannot make wedding guests fast while the bridegroom is with them, can you? The days will come, when the bridegroom will be taken away from them, and then they will fast in those days."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals Man on Sabbath
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "I ask you, is it lawful to do good or to do harm on the sabbath, to save life or to destroy it?" After looking around at all of them, he said to him, " Stretch out your hand." He did so, and his hand was restored.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: And all in the crowd were trying to touch him, for power came out from him and healed all of them."

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Today's Feast of Matthew the Apostle (Jesus Calls Matthew) As Jesus was walking along, he saw a man called Matthew sitting at the tax both; and he said to him, " Follow me." And he got up and followed him. Jesus said, " Go and learn what this means, 'I desire mercy, not sacrifies.' For I have come to call not the righteous but sinners."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Who is the Greatest
messages.verse: Jesus said , "  Whoever welcomes one such child in my name welcomes me, and whoever welcomes me welcomes not me but the one who sent me."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: And again he said, "To what should I compare the kingdom of God? It is like yeast that a women took and mixed in with three measures of flour until all of it was leavened."

messages.title: The Greatest Commandment
messages.verse: 31st Sunday's Gospel Msg ( The Greatest Commandment ) Jesus said ,“The first is, 'Hear, O Israel: the Lord our God, the Lord is One; you shall love the Lord, your God, with all your heart, with all your soul, and with all your mind, and with all your strength. The second is this, 'You shall love your neighbor as yourself.' There is no other commandments greater than these.” (Mk 12:29-31). Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Jesus said to them, Follow me, and I will make you fish for people." MT (4:18-19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Elizabeth said, " For as soon as I the sound of your greeting, the child in my womb leaped for joy. And blessed is she who believed that there would be a fulfillment of what was spoken to her by the Lord."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the Word
messages.verse: "And the Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us, and we have seen his glory, the glory as of the Father's only Son, full of grace and truth."
messages.closing: May the Lord Bless all of you and your families this Christmas with Joy, Peace, Good Health and Happiness!! From Asher, Chris, Celine & Agnel.

messages.title: Jesus is Named
messages.verse: Solemnity Mary Mother of God (Jesus is Named ) Then the shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all they had heard and seen, just as it had been told to them. When eight days were completed for his circumcision, he was named Jesus, the name given to him by the angel before he was conceived in the womb.
messages.closing: Happy New Year 2025!! May this year be filled with Peace, Hope, Good health and happiness!! From Agnel and Family.

messages.title: The First Disciples
messages.verse: When Jesus turned and saw them following him and said to them, "What are you looking for?" They said to him, "Rabbi" (which translated means Teacher), "where are you staying?" He said to them,"Come, and see." They came and saw where he was staying, and they remained with him that day. It was about four o'clock in the afternoon.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The First Disciples ) When Jesus turned and saw them following him and said to them, "What are you looking for?" They said to him, "Rabbi" (which translated means Teacher), "where are you staying?" He said to them,"Come, and see." They came and saw where he was staying, and they remained with him that day. It was about four o'clock in the afternoon. JH(1:38-39) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Walks on Water
messages.verse: Jesus meant to pass by them, but when they saw him walking on the sea they thought it was a ghost, and cried out, for they all saw him and were terrified. But immediately he spoke to them and said, "Take heart; it is I, Do not be afraid."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

But immediately he spoke to them and said, "Take heart; it is I, Do not be afraid." MK(3:49-50) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Baptism of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus also had been  baptized and was praying, the heaven was opened, and the Holy Spirit descended upon him in bodily form like a dove. And a voice came from heavens, "You are  my Son, the Beloved; with you I am well pleased."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

And a voice came from heavens, "You are  my Son, the Beloved; with you I am well pleased." LK(3:21-22) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Wedding at Cana
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Fill the jars with water." And they filled them up to the brim. He said to them, "Now draw some out, and take it to the chief steward."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God

messages.liturgicalLabel: Today's Feast of Conversion of St Paul
messages.labelKey: todays feast of conversion of st paul
messages.title: Jesus Instructs the Apostles
messages.verse: Jesus said to the eleven: "Go into the whole world and proclaim the Gospel to every creature. Whoever believes and is baptized will be saved; whoever does not believe will be condemned."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Whoever believes and is baptized will be saved; whoever does not believe will be condemned."  MK(16:15-16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Reads The Scroll on Sabbath
messages.verse: Jesus read, " The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he has anointed me to bring good news to the poor. He has sent me to proclaim release to the captives and recovery of sight to the blind, to let the oppressed go free. To proclaim the year of the Lord's favour."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(4:18-19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Sin against Holy Spirit
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, people will be forgiven for their sins and whatever blasphemes they utter; but whoever blasphemes against the Holy Spirit can never have forgiveness,  but is guilty of an eternal sin."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MK(3:28-29) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals the Gerasene Demoniac
messages.verse: But Jesus would not permit him but told him instead, "Go home to your family and announce to them all that the Lord in his mercy has done for you." Then the man went off and began to proclaim in the Decapolis what Jesus had done for him; and all were amazed.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Then the man went off and began to proclaim in the Decapolis what Jesus had done for him; and all were amazed. MK(5:19-20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Calls the First Disciples
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to Simon, " Do not be afraid, from now on you will be catching people." When they had brought their boats to  shore, they left everything and followed him.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 5th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Calls the First Disciples) Then Jesus said to Simon, " Do not be afraid, from now on you will be catching people." When they had brought their boats to  shore, they left everything and followed him. LK(5:10-11) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Blessings and Woes
messages.verse: Jesus looked at his disciples and said, "Blessed are you who are poor, for yours is the kingdom of God. "Blessed are you who are hungry now, for you will be filled. "Blessed are you who weep now,for you will laugh."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

"Blessed are you who are hungry now, for you will be filled. "Blessed are you who weep now,for you will laugh." LK(6:20-21) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Cures a Blind Man at Bethsaida
messages.verse: Then Jesus laid his hands on his eyes again; and he looked intently and his sight was restored, and he saw everything clearly.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cures a Blind Man at Bethsaida) Then Jesus laid his hands on his eyes again; and he looked intently and his sight was restored, and he saw everything clearly. MK(8:25) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Peter's Declaration about Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus asked them, " But who do you say that I am?" Peter answered him, "You are the Messaiah." And he sternly ordered them not to tell anyone about him.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Peter's Declaration about Jesus ) Jesus asked them, " But who do you say that I am?" Peter answered him, "You are the Messaiah." And he sternly ordered them not to tell anyone about him. MK(8:29-30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Take up your cross
messages.verse: Jesus called the crowd with his disciples, and said to them, " If anyone want to become my followers, let them deny themselves and take up their cross and follow me." For what will it profit them to gain the whole world and forfeit their life?
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

For what will it profit them to gain the whole world and forfeit their life? MK(8:34,36) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Feast of the Chair of St.Peter
messages.labelKey: feast of the chair of stpeter
messages.title: Peter The Rock
messages.verse: Feast of the Chair of St.Peter ( Peter The Rock ) Jesus said, " And so I say to you, you are Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church, and the gates of the underworld shall not prevail against it. I will give you the keys to the kingdom of heaven. Whatever you bind on earth shall be bound in heaven; and whatever you loose on earth shall be lost in heaven."
messages.closing: Lord, help us draw strength from St.Peter.
messages.fullText: Feast of the Chair of St.Peter ( Peter The Rock ) Jesus said, " And so I say to you, you are Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church, and the gates of the underworld shall not prevail against it. I will give you the keys to the kingdom of heaven. Whatever you bind on earth shall be bound in heaven; and whatever you loose on earth shall be lost in heaven." MT(16:18-19) Lord, help us draw strength from St.Peter.

messages.title: Judging Others
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Do not judge, and you will not be judged, do not condemn, and you will not be condemned. Forgive, and you will be forgiven. Give, and there will be gifts for you: a full measure, pressed down, shaken together, and overflowing, will be poured into your lap; because the standard you use will be the standard used for you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 7th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg (Judging Others ) Jesus said, " Do not judge, and you will not be judged, do not condemn, and you will not be condemned. Forgive, and you will be forgiven. Give, and there will be gifts for you: a full measure, pressed down, shaken together, and overflowing, will be poured into your lap; because the standard you use will be the standard used for you." LK(6:37-38) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Healing of a Boy with a Spirit
messages.verse: When Jesus saw that a crowd came running together, he rebuked the unclean spirit, saying to it, "You spirit that keeps this boy from speaking and hearing, I command you, come out of him, and never enter him again!"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Healing of a Boy with a Spirit) When Jesus saw that a crowd came running together, he rebuked the unclean spirit, saying to it, "You spirit that keeps this boy from speaking and hearing, I command you, come out of him, and never enter him again!" MK(9:25) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Greatest of All
messages.verse: Jesus sat down, called the Twelve to him and said, “'If anyone wants to be first, he must make himself last of all and servant of all.' ‘Anyone who welcomes a little child such as this in my name, welcomes me; and anyone who welcomes me, welcomes not me but the one who sent me.’ “
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today’s Gospel Msg ( Greatest of All)  Jesus sat down, called the Twelve to him and said, “'If anyone wants to be first, he must make himself last of all and servant of all.' ‘Anyone who welcomes a little child such as this in my name, welcomes me; and anyone who welcomes me, welcomes not me but the one who sent me.’ “MK(9:35-37) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Miracle With the Power of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said, " You must not stop him; no one who works a miracle in my name could soon afterwards speak evil of me. Whoever is not against us is for us."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Miracle With the Power of Jesus) Jesus said, " You must not stop him; no one who works a miracle in my name could soon afterwards speak evil of me. Whoever is not against us is for us." MK(9:39-40) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Reward for Serving Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said, " For truly I tell you, whoever gives  you a cup of water to drink because you bear the name of Chris will by no means lose the reward. Salt is good, but if the salt has lost its saltiness, how will you make it salty again? Have salt in yourselves, and be at peace with one another."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Reward for Serving Jesus) Jesus said, " For truly I tell you, whoever gives  you a cup of water to drink because you bear the name of Chris will by no means lose the reward. Salt is good, but if the salt has lost its saltiness, how will you make it salty again? Have salt in yourselves, and be at peace with one another." MK(9:41,50) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Teaching about Divorce
messages.verse: Jesus said, " And the two shall become one flesh. So they are no longer two, but one flesh. Therefore what God has joined together, let no one separate."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Teaching about Divorce) Jesus said, " And the two shall become one flesh. So they are no longer two, but one flesh. Therefore what God has joined together, let no one separate." MK(10:8-9) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Blesses Little Children
messages.verse: Jesus said to them," Let the little children come to me; do not stop them; for it is to such as these that the kingdom of God belongs. Truly I tell you, whoever does not receive the kingdom of God as a little child will never enter it."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus Blesses Little Children) Jesus said to them," Let the little children come to me; do not stop them; for it is to such as these that the kingdom of God belongs. Truly I tell you, whoever does not receive the kingdom of God as a little child will never enter it." MK(10:14-15) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Rich Man
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Children, how hard it is to enter the kingdom of God! It is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for someone who is rich to enter the kingdom of God."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Rich Man) Jesus said, " Children, how hard it is to enter the kingdom of God! It is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for someone who is rich to enter the kingdom of God." MK(10:24-25) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Rewards for Followers
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, there is no one who has left house or brothers or sisters or mother or father or children or fields, for my sake and for the sake of the good news, who will not receive a hundredfold now in this age."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Rewards for Followers ) Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, there is no one who has left house or brothers or sisters or mother or father or children or fields, for my sake and for the sake of the good news, who will not receive a hundredfold now in this age." MK(10:29-30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Question about Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast."
messages.closing: Lord answer us as we fast and pray🙏🏼.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Question about Fasting) Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast." MT(9:15) Lord answer us as we fast and pray🙏🏼.

messages.title: Temptation of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus answered him, "It is written, 'One does not live by bread alone." Jesus answered, " It is written, 'Worship the Lord your God, and serve only him.' " Jesus answered, " It is said, 'Do not put the Lord your God to test.' "
messages.closing: Lord we pray for your grace to overcome temptations.
messages.fullText: 1st Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Temptation of Jesus ) Jesus answered him, "It is written, 'One does not live by bread alone." Jesus answered, " It is written, 'Worship the Lord your God, and serve only him.' " Jesus answered, " It is said, 'Do not put the Lord your God to test.' "  LK(4:4,8,12) Lord we pray for your grace to overcome temptations.

messages.title: Judgment of the Nations
messages.verse: And the king will answer them, " 'For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me something to drink, l was a stranger and you welcomed me, I was naked and you gave me clothing, I was sick and you took care of me, I was in prison and you visited me.' 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' "
messages.closing: Lord help us to share with the needy.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Judgment of the Nations)  And the king will answer them, " 'For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me something to drink, l was a stranger and you welcomed me, I was naked and you gave me clothing, I was sick and you took care of me, I was in prison and you visited me.' 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' " MT(25:36,40) Lord help us to share with the needy.

messages.title: Jesus Teaches the Our Father Prayer
messages.verse: Jesus said , " For if you forgive others their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you; but if you do not forgive others, neither will your Father forgive your trespasses. "
messages.closing: Lord, give us your grace to forgive.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Teaches the Our Father Prayer) Jesus said , " For if you forgive others their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you; but if you do not forgive others, neither will your Father forgive your trespasses. " MT(6:14-15) Lord, give us your grace to forgive.

messages.title: Jonah Preached asking people to Repent
messages.verse: Jesus said to them all, "At the judgment the men of Nineveh will arise with this generation and condemn it, because at the preaching of Jonah they repented, and there is something greater than Jonah here."
messages.closing: Lord, forgive us as we repent and pray.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jonah Preached asking people to Repent ) Jesus said to them all, "At the judgment the men of Nineveh will arise with this generation and condemn it, because at the preaching of Jonah they repented, and there is something greater than Jonah here." LK(11:32) Lord, forgive us as we repent and pray.

messages.title: Concerning Anger
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Leave your gifts there before the altar and go; first be reconciled to your brother or sister, and then come back and offer your gift."
messages.closing: Lord, give us patience and strength to forgive!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Concerning Anger) Jesus said, " Leave your gifts there before the altar and go; first be reconciled to your brother or sister, and then come back and offer your gift." MT(5:24) Lord, give us patience and strength to forgive!

messages.title: Judging Others
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Give, and  it will be  given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over, will be put into your lap; for the measure you give will be the measure you get back."
messages.closing: Lord help us be generous.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Judging Others) Jesus said, " Give, and  it will be  given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over, will be put into your lap; for the measure you give will be the measure you get back." LK(6:38) Lord help us be generous.

messages.title: Denounces Scribes and Pharisees
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The greatest among you will be your servant. All who exalt themselves will be humbled, and all who humble themselves will be exalted."
messages.closing: Lord Jesus help us to be humble.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Denounces Scribes and Pharisees) Jesus said, " The greatest among you will be your servant. All who exalt themselves will be humbled, and all who humble themselves will be exalted." MT(23:11-12)  Lord Jesus help us to be humble.

messages.title: Rich Man and Lazarus
messages.verse: The rich man said, " 'No, father Abraham; but if someone goes to them from the dead, they will repent.' He said to him, " If they do not listen to Moses and the prophets, neither will they be convinced even if someone rises from the dead.' "
messages.closing: Lord, forgive us, as we fast and pray!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Rich Man and Lazarus) The rich man said, " 'No, father Abraham; but if someone goes to them from the dead, they will repent.' He said to him, " If they do not listen to Moses and the prophets, neither will they be convinced even if someone rises from the dead.' " LK(16:30-31) Lord, forgive us, as we fast and pray!

messages.title: Parable of the Prodigal Son
messages.verse: Father said to him, "My son, you are here with me always; everything I have is yours. But now we must celebrate and rejoice, because your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found. "
messages.closing: Lord, forgive us as we realize and repent from our wicked ways.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Prodigal Son) Father said to him, "My son, you are here with me always; everything I have is yours. But now we must celebrate and rejoice, because your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found. " LK(15:31-32) Lord, forgive us as we realize and repent from our wicked ways.

messages.title: Parable of the Fig Tree
messages.verse: He said to him in reply, "Sir, let it alone for one more year, until I dig around it and put manure on it. If it bears fruit next year, well and good; but if not, you can cut it down."
messages.closing: Lord we pray asking for your forgiveness.
messages.fullText: 3rd Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Fig Tree ) He said to him in reply, "Sir, let it alone for one more year, until I dig around it and put manure on it. If it bears fruit next year, well and good; but if not, you can cut it down." LK(13:8-9) Lord we pray asking for your forgiveness.

messages.title: Fulfill The Commandments
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven."
messages.closing: Lord, give us the strength to obey your teachings.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Fulfill The Commandments) Jesus said, "Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven." MT(5:19) Lord, give us the strength to obey your teachings.

messages.title: The Greatest Commandment
messages.verse: The scribe said to Jesus, "Well said, teacher. You are right in saying, 'He is One and there is no other than he.' And 'to love him with all your heart, with all your understanding, with all your strength, and to love your neighbor as yourself' is worth more than all burnt offerings and sacrifices."
messages.closing: Lord, help us love and forgive our enemies.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Greatest Commandment) The scribe said to Jesus, "Well said, teacher. You are right in saying, 'He is One and there is no other than he.' And 'to love him with all your heart, with all your understanding, with all your strength, and to love your neighbor as yourself' is worth more than all burnt offerings and sacrifices." MK(12:32-33) Lord, help us love and forgive our enemies.

messages.title: Prayer of Repentance
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted."
messages.closing: Lord make us humble!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (  Prayer of Repentance) Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted." LK(18:13-14) Lord make us humble!

messages.title: Parable of the Prodigal Son
messages.verse: l will arise and go to my father, and I will say to him, " Father, I have sinned against heaven and before you; I am no longer worthy to be called your son; treat me as one of your hired servants.” Father said, "My son, but now we must celebrate your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found."
messages.closing: Lord help us realise and repent!
messages.fullText: 4th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Prodigal Son) l will arise and go to my father, and I will say to him, " Father, I have sinned against heaven and before you; I am no longer worthy to be called your son; treat me as one of your hired servants.” Father said, "My son, but now we must celebrate your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found." LK(15:18-19,32) Lord help us realise and repent!

messages.title: Jesus Heals Sick Man
messages.verse: Jesus said to him, "Rise, take up your mat, and walk." Immediately the man became well, took up his mat, and walked. Now that day was a sabbath."
messages.closing: Lord Jesus, heal us.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals Sick Man) Jesus said to him, "Rise, take up your mat, and walk." Immediately the man became well, took up his mat, and walked. Now that day was a sabbath." JH(5:8-9) Lord Jesus, heal us.

messages.title: Jesus Testifies
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But I have testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father gave me to accomplish, these works that I perform testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me."
messages.closing: Lord, increase our faith to become your witnesses!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Testifies) Jesus said, " But I have testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father gave me to accomplish, these works that I perform testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me." JH(5:36) Lord, increase our faith to become your witnesses!

messages.title: Jesus Teaches at the Temple
messages.verse: Jesus cried out in the temple area as he was teaching and said, "You know me and also know where I am from. Yet I did not come on my own, but the one who sent me, whom you do not know, is true. I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me."
messages.closing: Lord, increase our faith so that we may know you.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Teaches at the Temple) Jesus cried out in the temple area as he was teaching and said, "You know me and also know where I am from. Yet I did not come on my own, but the one who sent me, whom you do not know, is true. I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me." JH(7:28-29) Lord, increase our faith so that we may know you.

messages.title: Jesus Forgives the Women
messages.verse: Then Jesus straightened up and said to her, "Woman, where are they? Has no one condemned you?" She replied, "No one, sir." Then Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go, (and) from now on do not sin any more."
messages.closing: Lord, give us the strength to forgive.
messages.fullText: 5th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg (Jesus Forgives the Women) Then Jesus straightened up and said to her, "Woman, where are they? Has no one condemned you?" She replied, "No one, sir." Then Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go, (and) from now on do not sin any more." JH(8:10-11) Lord, give us the strength to forgive.

messages.title: Jesus the Light of the World
messages.verse: Again Jesus spoke to them, saying, " I am the light of the world. Whoever follows me will never walk in darkness  but will  have the light of life."
messages.closing: Lord help us walk in your light.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus the Light of the World) Again Jesus spoke to them, saying, " I am the light of the world. Whoever follows me will never walk in darkness  but will  have the light of life." JH(8:12) Lord help us walk in your light.

messages.title: True Disciples
messages.verse: Jesus said to the Jews who had believed in him, "If you continue in my word, you are truly my disciples, and you will know the truth, and the truth will make you free."
messages.closing: Lord we hunger for your words.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( True Disciples) Jesus said to the Jews who had believed in him, "If you continue in my word, you are truly my disciples, and you will know the truth, and the truth will make you free." JH(8:31-32) Lord we hunger for your words.

messages.title: Jesus is Condemned To Death
messages.verse: They said, " If you are the Messiah, tell us." He replied, "If I tell you, you will not believe; and if I question you, you will not answer. But from now on the Son of Man will be seated at the right hand of the power of God."
messages.closing: Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a Cross.
messages.fullText: Palm Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus is Condemned To Death ) They said, " If you are the Messiah, tell us." He replied, "If I tell you, you will not believe; and if I question you, you will not answer. But from now on the Son of Man will be seated at the right hand of the power of God." LK(67:69) Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a Cross.

messages.title: Mary Anoints Jesus
messages.verse: Mary took a pound of costly perfume made of pure nard, anointed Jesus's feet, and wiped them with her hair. The house was filled with the fragrance of the perfumes.
messages.closing: Lord we repent as we pray.

messages.title: Jesus Washes the Disciples Feet
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Do you know what I have done? You call me Teacher and Lord--and You are right, for that is what I am. So if I, your Lord and Teacher, have washed your feet, you ought to wash one another's feet."
messages.closing: Jesus give us yours grace to serve others in need.

messages.title: Jesus Appears to Mary Magdalena
messages.verse: Jesus said to her, "Do not cling to me, because I have not yet ascended to the Father. But go to my brothers, and tell them: I am ascending to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God."
messages.closing: Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!

messages.title: Jesus Appears to the Disciples
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "Thus it is written that the Messiah would suffer and rise from the dead on the third day and that repentance, for the forgiveness of sins, would be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem."
messages.closing: Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!!

messages.title: Jesus Appears to the Disciples the 3rd Time
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, "Cast the net over the right side of the boat and you will find something." So they cast it, and were not able to pull it in because of the number of fish." Jesus then stepped forward, took the bread and gave it to them, and the same with the fish.
messages.closing: Jesus Christ has risen Alleluia!!!

messages.verse: Later, as the eleven were at table, he appeared to them and rebuked them for their unbelief and hardness of heart because they had not believed those who saw him after he had been raised. He said to them, "Go into the whole world and proclaim the gospel to every creature."
messages.closing: Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!

messages.title: Jesus Explains Born Again
messages.verse: Jesus answered, "Amen, amen, I say to you, no one can enter the kingdom of God without being born of water and Spirit. What is born of flesh is flesh and what is born of spirit is spirit."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said, "Do not work for food that perishes but for the food that endures for eternal life, which the Son of Man will give you. For on him the Father, God, has set his seal."

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Peace I leave with you; my peace I give to you. I do not give to you as the world gives. Do not let your hearts be troubled, and do not let them be afraid."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said, " I do not call you servants any longer, because the servant does not know what the master is doing; but I have called you friends, because I have made know to you everything that I have heard from my Father."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Nevertheless I tell you the truth: it is to your advantage that I go away, for if I do not go away, the Advocate will not come to you; but if I go, I will send him to you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus prayed,  "I am no longer in the world, but they are in the world, and I am coming to you. Holy Father, protect them in your name that you have given me, so that they may be one like us."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus prayed, " I gave them your word, and the world hated them, because they do not belong to the world any more than I belong to the world. I do not ask that you take them out of the world but that you keep them from the evil one."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus and Peter
messages.verse: Jesus said to him the third time, "Simon, son of John, do you love me?" Peter felt hurt because he said to him the third time, "Do you love me?" And he said to him, "Lord, you know everything; you know that I love you." Jesus said to him, "Feed my sheep."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Testimony of Jesus

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said to them again, "Peace be with you. messages.title: The Beatitudes
messages.verse: Jesus called his disciples and said to them, "Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven. Blessed are those  who mourn, for they will be comforted. Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: You are the Salt and Light
messages.verse: Jesus said, " You are the light of the world. A city built on a hill cannot be hid. In the same way, let your light shine before others, so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father in heaven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said, " So then, if you are bringing your offering to the altar and there remember that your brother has something against you, leave your offering there before the altar, go and be reconciled with your brother first, and then come back and present your offering."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MT(5:23-24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Adultery
messages.verse: Jesus said, " If your right eye causes you to sin, pluck it out and throw it away; it is better that you lose one of your members than that your whole body be thrown into hell."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Adultery) Jesus said, " If your right eye causes you to sin, pluck it out and throw it away; it is better that you lose one of your members than that your whole body be thrown into hell." MT(5:29) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Do not Swear
messages.verse: Jesus said, "But I say this to you, do not swear at all, either by heaven, since that is God's throne. Let what you say be simply ‘Yes’ or ‘NO’; anything more than this comes from evil.”
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Let what you say be simply ‘Yes’ or ‘NO’; anything more than this comes from evil.” MT(5:34,37) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Teaching of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you, offer no resistance to one who is evil. When someone strikes you on (your) right cheek, turn the other one to him as well."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Teaching of Jesus) Jesus said, " But I say to you, offer no resistance to one who is evil. When someone strikes you on (your) right cheek, turn the other one to him as well." MT(5:39) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God

messages.title: Love for Enemies
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you, so that you may be children of your Father in heaven; for he makes his Sun rise on the evil and on good, and sends rain on the righteous and on the unrighteous."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Love for Enemies) Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you, so that you may be children of your Father in heaven; for he makes his Sun rise on the evil and on good, and sends rain on the righteous and on the unrighteous." MT(5:44-45) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God!
messages.fullText: Today’s Gospel msg ( Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting ) Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."  MT(6:3,6,17-18) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God!

messages.title: Jesus Teaches to Pray The Our Father
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Pray then in this way: Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name. Your kingdom come. Your will be done, on earth as it is in heaven. Give us this day our daily bread. And forgive us our debts, as we also have forgiven our debtors. And do not bring us to the time of trail, but rescue us from the evil one. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Teaches to Pray The Our Father) Jesus said, " Pray then in this way: Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name. Your kingdom come. Your will be done, on earth as it is in heaven. Give us this day our daily bread. And forgive us our debts, as we also have forgiven our debtors. And do not bring us to the time of trail, but rescue us from the evil one. " MT(6:9-13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Sound Eye
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The eye is the lamp of the body. So, if your eye is healthy, your whole body will be full of light, but if your eye is unhealthy, your whole body will be full of darkness."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Sound Eye) Jesus said, " The eye is the lamp of the body. So, if your eye is healthy, your whole body will be full of light, but if your eye is unhealthy, your whole body will be full of darkness." MT(6:22-23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Do Not Worry
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But strive first for the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well. So do not worry about tomorrow for tomorrow will bring worries of its own. Today's trouble is enough for today.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

So do not worry about tomorrow for tomorrow will bring worries of its own. Today's trouble is enough for today. MT(6:33-34) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Feeding Five Thousand
messages.verse: Jesus then took the five loaves and the two fish, raised his eyes to heaven, and said the blessing over them; then he broke them and handed them to his disciples to distribute among the crowd."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(9:16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Judging Others
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Do not judge, and you will not be judged,  Why do you see the speck that is in your brother's eye, but do not notice the log that is in your own eye?"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Solemnity Nativity of John the Baptist-
messages.labelKey: solemnity nativity of john the baptist
messages.title: The Birth of John the Baptist
messages.verse: Solemnity Nativity of John the Baptist-  ( The Birth of John the Baptist) " Then they began motioning to his father to find out what name he wanted to give him. He asked for a writing tablet and wrote, " His name is John." And all of them were amazed. Immediately his mouth was opened, his tongue freed, and he spoke blessing God."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Solemnity Nativity of John the Baptist-  ( The Birth of John the Baptist) " Then they began motioning to his father to find out what name he wanted to give him. He asked for a writing tablet and wrote, " His name is John." And all of them were amazed. Immediately his mouth was opened, his tongue freed, and he spoke blessing God." LK(1:62-64) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Tree and Its Fruits
messages.verse: Jesus said, " A good tree cannot bear bad fruit, nor can a bad tree bear good fruit. Every tree that does not bear good fruit is cut down and thrown Into the fire."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Tree and Its Fruits) Jesus said, " A good tree cannot bear bad fruit, nor can a bad tree bear good fruit. Every tree that does not bear good fruit is cut down and thrown Into the fire."  MT(7:18-19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Hearers and Doers
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Everyone then who hears these words of mine and acts on them will be like a wise man who built his house on rock."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Solemnity of Sacred Heart of Jesus
messages.labelKey: solemnity of sacred heart of jesus
messages.title: Parable of the Lost Sheep
messages.verse: Solemnity of Sacred Heart of Jesus ( Parable of the Lost Sheep) Jesus said, " Just so, I tell you, there will be more joy in heaven over one sinner who repents than over ninety-nine righteous person who need no repentance."
messages.closing: Divine love of God, flows through the Sacred Heart of Jesus. Happy Feast!!!
messages.fullText: Solemnity of Sacred Heart of Jesus ( Parable of the Lost Sheep) Jesus said, " Just so, I tell you, there will be more joy in heaven over one sinner who repents than over ninety-nine righteous person who need no repentance." LK(15:7) Divine love of God, flows through the Sacred Heart of Jesus. Happy Feast!!!

messages.liturgicalLabel: Memorial Immaculate Heart of Blessed Virgin Mary
messages.labelKey: memorial immaculate heart of blessed virgin mary
messages.title: Boy Jesus in The Temple
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Why were you searching for me? Did you not know that I must be in my Father's house?" Then he went down with them and came to Nazareth, and Was obedient to them. His mother treasured all these things in her heart.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(2:49-51) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Solemnity Feast of St.Peter and St.Paul - 13th Ordinary Sunday
messages.labelKey: solemnity feast of stpeter and stpaul 13th ordinary sunday
messages.title: Peter's Declaration of Jesus
messages.verse: Simon Peter answered, "You are the Messiah, the Son of the living God." Jesus said, " And I tell you, you are Peter, and on this rock I will build my church, and the gates of Hades will not prevail against it."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Jesus said, " And I tell you, you are Peter, and on this rock I will build my church, and the gates of Hades will not prevail against it."  MT(16:16-18) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Followers of Jesus
messages.verse: And Jesus said to them, "Foxes have holes and birds of the sky have nests, but the Son of Man has nowhere to rest his head."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Followers of Jesus) And Jesus said to them, "Foxes have holes and birds of the sky have nests, but the Son of Man has nowhere to rest his head." MT(8:20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Stills the Storm
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, "Why are you terrified, you of little faith?" Then he got up, rebuked the winds and the sea, and there was great calm."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus Stills the Storm ) Jesus said to them, "Why are you terrified, you of little faith?" Then he got up, rebuked the winds and the sea, and there was great calm." MT(8:26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals  Two Demonic
messages.verse: They cried out, "What have you to do with us, Son of God? Have you come here to torment us before the appointed time."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals  Two Demonic ) They cried out, "What have you to do with us, Son of God? Have you come here to torment us before the appointed time." MT(8:29) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Feast of St. Thomas the Apostle of India
messages.labelKey: feast of st thomas the apostle of india
messages.title: Jesus Appears to Thomas
messages.verse: Thomas answered and said to him, "My Lord and my God!" Jesus said to him, "Have you come to believe because you have seen me? Blessed are those who have not seen and have believed."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Feast of St. Thomas the Apostle of India- Gospel Msg ( Jesus Appears to Thomas) Thomas answered and said to him, "My Lord and my God!" Jesus said to him, "Have you come to believe because you have seen me? Blessed are those who have not seen and have believed." JH(20:28-29) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Calls Matthew the Tax Collector
messages.verse: Jesus heard this and said, "Those who are well do not need a physician, but the sick do. Go and learn the meaning of the words, 'I desire mercy, not sacrifice.' I did not come to call the righteous but sinners."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg( Jesus Calls Matthew the Tax Collector ) Jesus heard this and said, "Those who are well do not need a physician, but the sick do. Go and learn the meaning of the words, 'I desire mercy, not sacrifice.' I did not come to call the righteous but sinners." MT(9:12-13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Question about Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The wedding guests cannot mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg( Question about Fasting ) Jesus said, " The wedding guests cannot mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast. " MT(9:15) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Mission of The Seventy
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " The harvest is plentiful, but the labourers are few; therefore ask the Lord of the harvest to send out laborers into his harvest. Go on your way. See, I am sending you out like lambs into the midst of wolves."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Go on your way. See, I am sending you out like lambs into the midst of wolves." LK(10:2-3) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: A Woman Healed
messages.verse: Jesus turned, and seeing her he said, " Take heart, daughter; your faith has made you well. " And instantly the woman was made well.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Harvest is Great
messages.verse: Jesus then said to his disciples, " The harvest is plentiful, but the labourers are few; therefore ask the Lord of the harvest to send out laborers into the harvest. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg( The Harvest is Great) Jesus then said to his disciples, " The harvest is plentiful, but the labourers are few; therefore ask the Lord of the harvest to send out laborers into the harvest. " MT(9:37-38) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Mission of the Twelve
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But go rather To The lost sheep of the house of Israel. As you go, proclaim the good news, 'The kingdom of heaven has come near.'"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg(The Mission of the Twelve) Jesus said, " But go rather To The lost sheep of the house of Israel. As you go, proclaim the good news, 'The kingdom of heaven has come near.'" MT(10:6-7) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Mission of the Twelve
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Cure the sick, raise the dead, cleanse the lepers, cast out demons. You received without payment, give without payment."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg(The Mission of the Twelve) Jesus said, " Cure the sick, raise the dead, cleanse the lepers, cast out demons. You received without payment, give without payment." MT(10:8) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Coming Persecutions
messages.verse: Jesus said, " When they hand you over, do not worry about how you are to speak or what you are to say; for what you are to say will be given to you at that time; for it is not you who speak, but the Spirit of your Father speaking through you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg(The Coming Persecutions) Jesus said, " When they hand you over, do not worry about how you are to speak or what you are to say; for what you are to say will be given to you at that time; for it is not you who speak, but the Spirit of your Father speaking through you." MT(10:19-20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Whom to Fear
messages.verse: Jesus said, " And even the hairs of your head are all counted. So do not be afraid, you are of more value than many sparrows."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg(Whom to Fear) Jesus said, " And even the hairs of your head are all counted. So do not be afraid, you are of more value than many sparrows." MT(10:30-31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Parable of the Good Samaritan
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But a Samaritan while travelling came near him; and when he saw him, he was moved with pity. He went to him and bandaged his wounds, having poured oil and wine on them. Then he put him on his own animal, brought him to an inn, and took care of him."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(10:33-34) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Rewards
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Whoever welcomes you welcomes me, and whoever welcomes me welcomes the one who sent me. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Rewards) Jesus said, " Whoever welcomes you welcomes me, and whoever welcomes me welcomes the one who sent me. " MT(10:40) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Woe to Unrepentant Cities
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Woe to you, Cho-ra-zin! Woe to you, Beth-sa' i-da! For if the deeds of power done in you had been done in Tyre and Sidon, they would have repented long ago in sackcloth and ashes."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Thanks His Father
messages.verse: Jesus said, " All things have been handed over to me by my Father, and no one knows the Son except the Father, and no one knows the  Father except the Son and anyone to whom the Son chooses to reveal him."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus Thanks His Father) Jesus said, " All things have been handed over to me by my Father, and no one knows the Son except the Father, and no one knows the  Father except the Son and anyone to whom the Son chooses to reveal him." MT(11:27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus The Lord of the Sabbath
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But if you had known what this means, ' I desire mercy and not sacrifice,' you would not have condemned the guiltless. For the Son of Man is Lord of the Sabbath."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

For the Son of Man is Lord of the Sabbath." MT(12:7-8) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: God's Chosen Servant
messages.verse: This was to fulfill what prophet Isaiah spoke, " Here is my servant, whom I have chosen, my beloved, with whom my soul is well pleased. I will put my Spirit upon him, and he will proclaim justice to the Gentiles."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

I will put my Spirit upon him, and he will proclaim justice to the Gentiles." MT(12:17-18) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Visits Martha and Mary
messages.verse: But the Lord answered her, " Martha, Martha, you are worried and distracted by many things; there is need of only one thing. Mary has chosen the better part, which will not be taken away from her."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Sign of Jonah
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Just as Jonah was in the belly of the whale three days and three nights, so will the Son of Man be in the heart of the earth three days and three nights."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Sign of Jonah) Jesus said, "Just as Jonah was in the belly of the whale three days and three nights, so will the Son of Man be in the heart of the earth three days and three nights." MT(12:40) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Mary of Magdala visits Tomb of Jesus
messages.verse: Feast of Mary Magdalene- Gospel Msg( Mary of Magdala visits Tomb of Jesus) Jesus said to her, "Mary!" She turned and said to him in Hebrew, "Rabbouni," which means Teacher. Jesus said to her, "Stop holding on to me, for I have not yet ascended to the Father. But go to my brothers and tell them, 'I am going to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God.'" Jh(20:16-17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
