messages.title: Parable of the Sower
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But some seed fell on rich soil, and produced fruit, a hundredfold,  sixtyfold and thirtyfold. Whoever has ears ought to hear."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg( Parable of the Sower) Jesus said, " But some seed fell on rich soil, and produced fruit, a hundredfold,  sixtyfold and thirtyfold. Whoever has ears ought to hear." MT(13:8-9) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Purpose of the Parable
messages.verse: Jesus said, " To you it has been given to know the secrets of the kingdom of heaven, but to them it has not been given. But blessed are your eyes, for they see, and your ears, for the hear. Truly I tell you, many prophets and righteous people longed to see what you see, but did not see it, and to hear what you hear, but did not hear it."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Purpose of the Parable) Jesus said, " To you it has been given to know the secrets of the kingdom of heaven, but to them it has not been given. But blessed are your eyes, for they see, and your ears, for the hear. Truly I tell you, many prophets and righteous people longed to see what you see, but did not see it, and to hear what you hear, but did not hear it." MT(13:11,16,17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Feast of St.James the apostle Today's
messages.labelKey: feast of stjames the apostle todays
messages.title: Request from Mother of James and John
messages.verse: Jesus said, " whoever wishes to be first among you shall be your slave. Just so, the Son of Man did not come to be served but to serve and to give his life as a ransom for many."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Just so, the Son of Man did not come to be served but to serve and to give his life as a ransom for many."  MT(20:27-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Weeds among the Wheat
messages.verse: Jesus  said, " Let both of them grow together until the harvest, and at harvest time this time I will tell the reapers to collect the weeds first and bind them in bundles to be burned, but gather the wheat into my barns."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Perseverance in Prayer
messages.verse: Jesus said, " So I say to you, Ask, and it will be given to you; search, and you will find; knock, and the door will be opened for you. If you then, who are evil, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will the heavenly Father give the Holy Spirit to those who ask him!"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(11:9,13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Parable of the Mustard Seed
messages.verse: Jesus said, " It is the smallest of all the seeds, but when it has grown it is the greatest of shrubs and becomes a tree, so that the birds of the air comes and make nests in its branches."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the Resurection and the life.
messages.verse: Memorial of Martha, Mary and Lazarus- Gospel Msg (Jesus the Resurection and the life.) Jesus said to Martha, "I am the resurrection and the life; whoever believes in me, even if he dies, will live, and everyone who lives and believes in me, will never die, Do you belive this?" JN (11:25-26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living  word of God

JN (11:25-26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living  word of God

messages.title: Kingdom of God
messages.verse: Jesus said to the disciples, “The Kingdom of heaven is like a treasure buried in a field, which a person finds and hides again, and out of joy goes and sells all that he has and buys that field."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.l
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Kingdom of God) Jesus said to the disciples, “The Kingdom of heaven is like a treasure buried in a field, which a person finds and hides again, and out of joy goes and sells all that he has and buys that field."  MT(13:44) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.l

messages.title: Jesus and John the Baptist
messages.verse: At that time Herod the ruler heard reports about Jesus and he said to his servants, " This is John the Baptist; he has been raised from dead, and for this reason these powers are at work in him."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and John the Baptist) At that time Herod the ruler heard reports about Jesus and he said to his servants, " This is John the Baptist; he has been raised from dead, and for this reason these powers are at work in him." MT(14:1-2) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the of the Rich Fool
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Take care! Be on your guard against all kinds of greed; for one's life does not consist in the abundance of possessions."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 18th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Parable of the of the Rich Fool)  Jesus said to them, " Take care! Be on your guard against all kinds of greed; for one's life does not consist in the abundance of possessions." LK(12:15) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Feeding Five Thousand
messages.verse: Then Jesus ordered the crowds to sit down on the grass. Taking the five loaves and the two fish, he looked up to heaven, and blessed and broke the loaves, and gave them to the disciples, and the disciples gave them to the crowds.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MT(14:19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Feast of Transfiguration of   the Lord
messages.labelKey: feast of transfiguration of the lord
messages.title: Transfiguration
messages.verse: Feast of Transfiguration of   the Lord (Transfiguration ) Jesus took Peter, James, and John and led them up a high mountain apart by themselves. And he was transfigured before them, and his clothes became dazzling white, such as no one on earth could bleach them. Then a cloud came, casting a shadow over them; then from the cloud came a voice, "This is my beloved Son. Listen to him."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Feast of Transfiguration of   the Lord (Transfiguration ) Jesus took Peter, James, and John and led them up a high mountain apart by themselves. And he was transfigured before them, and his clothes became dazzling white, such as no one on earth could bleach them. Then a cloud came, casting a shadow over them; then from the cloud came a voice, "This is my beloved Son. Listen to him." MK(9:2,3,7) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Peter's Declaration about Jesus
messages.verse: Simon Peter answered, " You are the Messaiah, the Son of the living God." And Jesus answered him, "Blessed are you , Simon Son of Jonah! For flesh and blood has not revealed this to you, but my Father in heaven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

And Jesus answered him, "Blessed are you , Simon Son of Jonah! For flesh and blood has not revealed this to you, but my Father in heaven." MT(16:16-17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Self Denial and Reward
messages.verse: Then Jesus told his disciples, "If any man would come after me, let him deny himself and take up his cross and follow me. For whoever would save his life will lose it, and whoever loses his life for my sake will find it. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Self Denial and Reward ) Then Jesus told his disciples, "If any man would come after me, let him deny himself and take up his cross and follow me. For whoever would save his life will lose it, and whoever loses his life for my sake will find it. " MT(16:24-25) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Be Watchful
messages.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Be sure of this: if the master of the house had known the hour when the thief was coming, he would not have let his house be broken into. You also must be prepared, for at an hour you do not expect, the Son of Man will come."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

You also must be prepared, for at an hour you do not expect, the Son of Man will come." LK(12:39-40) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: True Greatness
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Whoever becomes humble like this child is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven. Whoever welcomes one such child in my name welcomes me. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( True Greatness ) Jesus said, "Whoever becomes humble like this child is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven. Whoever welcomes one such child in my name welcomes me. " MT(18:4-5) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Power of Praying Together
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Again, truly I tell you, if two of you agree on earth about anything you ask, it will be done for you by my Father in heaven. For where two or three are gathered in my name, I am among them."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Power of Praying Together) Jesus said, " Again, truly I tell you, if two of you agree on earth about anything you ask, it will be done for you by my Father in heaven. For where two or three are gathered in my name, I am among them." MT(18:19-20)  Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Unforgiving Servant
messages.verse: Jesus said, " And in anger his lord handed him over to be tortured until he would pay his entire debt. So my heavenly Father will also do to every one of you, if you do not forgive your brother or sister from your heart."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Unforgiving Servant) Jesus said, " And in anger his lord handed him over to be tortured until he would pay his entire debt. So my heavenly Father will also do to every one of you, if you do not forgive your brother or sister from your heart."  MT(18:34-35)  Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Feast of Assumption of The Blessed Virgin Mary
messages.labelKey: feast of assumption of the blessed virgin mary
messages.title: Mary's Song of Praise
messages.verse: Feast of Assumption of The Blessed Virgin Mary ( Mary's Song of Praise ) Mary said , " My soul magnifies the Lord, and my spirit rejoices in God my Savior, for he has looked with favor on the lowliness of his servant. Surely from now on all generations will call me blessed."
messages.closing: Happy Feast and Happy Independence Day!!
messages.fullText: Feast of Assumption of The Blessed Virgin Mary ( Mary's Song of Praise ) Mary said , " My soul magnifies the Lord, and my spirit rejoices in God my Savior, for he has looked with favor on the lowliness of his servant. Surely from now on all generations will call me blessed." LK(1:46-48) Happy Feast and Happy Independence Day!!

messages.title: Jesus Blesses Little Children
messages.verse: But Jesus said , " Let the little children come to me, and do not stop them; for it is to such as these that the kingdom of heaven belongs."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Blesses Little Children) But Jesus said , " Let the little children come to me, and do not stop them; for it is to such as these that the kingdom of heaven belongs." MT(19:14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the cause of Division
messages.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Do you think that I have come to establish peace on the earth? No, I tell you, but rather division. From now on a household of five will be divided, three against two and two against three."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

No, I tell you, but rather division. From now on a household of five will be divided, three against two and two against three." LK(12:51-52) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Rich Young Man
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg (Rich Young Man) Jesus said to him, " If you wish to be perfect, go, sell your possessions, and give the money to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; then you come follow me. " MT (19:21) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Rich Man to Enter the Kingdom of God
messages.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, " Truly I tell you, it will be hard for a rich person to enter the kingdom of heaven. Again I tell you, it is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for someone who is rich to enter the kingdom of God."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Laborers in the Vineyard
messages.verse: The landowner said, " Am I not allowed to do what I choose with what belongs to me? Or are you envious because I am generous? So the last will be first, and the first, will be last."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Parable of the Wedding Banquet
messages.verse: Then he said to his slaves, " 'The wedding is ready but those invited were not worthy. Go, therefore, into the main streets, and invite everyone you find to the wedding banquet.' For many are called, but few are chosen."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Go, therefore, into the main streets, and invite everyone you find to the wedding banquet.' For many are called, but few are chosen." MT(22:8-9,14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Greatest Commandment
messages.verse: Jesus said, " 'You shall love your God with all your heart, and with all your soul, and with all your mind.' This is the greatest and first commandment. And the second is like it: 'You shall love your neighbour as yourself.' "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Denounces Scribes and Pharisees
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The greatest among you will be your servant. All who exalt themselves will be humbled, and all who humble themselves will be exalted."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Narrow Door
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, "Strive to enter through the narrow door; for many, I tell you, will try to enter and will not be able. Indeed, some are last who will be first, and some are first who will be last."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Hypocrites- Scribes and Pharisees
messages.verse: Jesus said, " So whoever swears by the sanctuary, swears by it and by the one who dwells in it, and whoever swears by heaven, swears by the throne of God and by the one who is seated upon it."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MT(23:20-22) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Hypocrites- Scribes and Pharisees
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Woe to you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! For you clean the outside of the cup and of the plate, but inside they are full of greed and self-indulgence."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Teachers of Law
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Woe to you, scribes and Pharisees, you hypocrites. You are like whitewashed tombs, which appear beautiful on the outside, but inside are full of dead men's bones and every kind of filth."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Faithful Slave
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Blessed is that slave whom the master will find at work when he arrives. Truly I tell you, he will put that one in charge of all his possessions."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Death of John the Baptist
messages.verse: Immediately she rushed back to the king and requested, " I want you to give me at once the head of John the Baptist on a platter."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Talents
messages.verse: 'For to all those who have, more will be given, and they will have an abundance, but from those who have nothing, even what they have will be taken away.'
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals a Man with Unclean Spirit
messages.verse: The man with unclean demon cried out with a loud voice, " Let us alone! What have you to do with us, Jesus of Nazareth? Have you come to destroy us? I know who you are, the Holy One of God."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Preaches in the Synagogues
messages.verse: But Jesus said to them, " I must proclaim the goodnews of the kingdom of God to the other cities also; for I was sent for this purpose."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Calls the First Disciples
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to Simon, " Do not be afraid, from now on you will be catching people." When they had brought their boats to shore, they left everything and followed him.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Memorial of St. Teresa of Calcutta
messages.labelKey: memorial of st teresa of calcutta
messages.title: Question about Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " You cannot make wedding guests fast while the bridegroom is with them, can you? The days will come, when the bridegroom will be taken away from them, and then they will fast in those days."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Cost of Discipleship
messages.verse: 23rd Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Cost of Discipleship) Jesus said, " In the same way, anyone of you who does not renounce all his possessions cannot be my disciple." Lk(14:33) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Teaches and Heals
messages.verse: Crowd from coastal region of Tyre and Sidon came to hear him and to be healed of their diseases; and even those who were tormented by unclean spirits were cured. And all in the crowd were trying to touch him, for power came out from him and healed all of them."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Blessings
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Blessed are you when people hate you, and when they exclude you, revile you, and defame you on account of the Son of Man."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Blessings ) Jesus said, " Blessed are you when people hate you, and when they exclude you, revile you, and defame you on account of the Son of Man."  LK(6:22) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Do not Judge
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But love your enemies, do good, and lend, expecting nothing in return. Your reward will be great, and you will be children of the Most High; for he is kind to the ungrateful and the wicked. Forgive, and you will be forgiven; give, and it will be given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over, will be put into your lap; for the measure you give will be the measure you get back."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over, will be put into your lap; for the measure you give will be the measure you get back." LK(6:35,38) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Do not Judge
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Why do you see the speck in your neighbour's  eye, but do  not notice the log in your own eye?"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: A Tree and Its Fruits
messages.verse: Jesus  said, " No good tree bears bad fruit, nor does a bad tree bear good fruit." The good person out of the treasure of the heart produces good, and the evil person out of evil treasure produces evil; for it is out of the abundance of the heart that the mouth speaks.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(6:43-45) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals a Centurion's Servant
messages.verse: The centurion sent friends to say to him, " Lord, do not trouble yourself, for I am not worthy to have you come under my roof; therefore I did not presume to come to you. But only speak the word and let my servant be healed."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

But only speak the word and let my servant be healed." LK(7:6-7) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Raises the Widow's Son to life
messages.verse: Then he went up and touched the bier and the bearers stood still, and he said, "Young man, I say to you, rise!" And the dead man sat up and began to talk, and Jesus gave him to his mother.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus compares this Generation
messages.verse: Jesus said, "The Son of Man has come eating and drinking, and you say, 'Look, a glutton and drunkard, a friend of tax collectors and sinners!' Nevertheless, wisdom is vindicated by all her children. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Sinful Woman Forgiven
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Therefore, I tell you, her sins, which were many, have been forgiven; hence, she has shown great love. But the one to whom little is forgiven, loves little." Then he said to her, "Your sins are forgiven. Your faith has saved you; go in peace. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

" LK(7:47-48, 50) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Some Women Accompany Jesus
messages.verse: Soon afterwards he went on through cities and villages, proclaiming and bringing the good news of the kingdom of God. The twelve were with him, as well as some women who had been cured of evil spirits and infirmities.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Sower Explained
messages.verse: Jesus said , " But as for that in the good soil, these are the ones who, when they hear the word, hold it fast in an honest and good heart, and bear fruit with patient endurance."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: God and Wealth
messages.verse: Jesus said, " No slave can serve two masters; for a slave will either hate the one and love the other, or be devoted to the one and despise the other. You cannot serve God and wealth."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: A Lamp under a Jar
messages.verse: Jesus said, " No one after lighting a lamp hides it under a jar, or put it under a bed, but puts it on a lampstand, so that those who enter may see the light."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Rejoices
messages.verse: The seventy-two came back rejoicing, saying, "Lord, even the demons submit to us when we use your name!" And he said to them, "I watched Satan fall like lightning from heaven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK (17:6) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Parable of the Good Samaritan
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But a Samaritan while travelling came near him; and when he saw him, he was moved with pity. He went to him and bandaged his wounds, having poured oil and wine on them. Then he put him on his own animal, brought him to an inn, and took care of him."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Visits Martha and Mary
messages.verse: But the Lord answered her, " Martha, Martha, you are worried and distracted by many things; there is need of only one thing. Mary has chosen the better part, which will not be taken away from her."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Lord's Prayer
messages.verse: He said to them, "When you pray, say: Father, hallowed be your name. Your kingdom come. Give us each day our daily bread. And forgive us our sins, for we ourselves forgive everyone indebted to us. And do not bring us to the time of trail."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Perseverance in Prayer
messages.verse: Jesus said, " So I say to you, Ask, and it will be given to you; search, and you will find; knock, and the door will be opened for you. If you then, who are evil, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will the heavenly Father give the Holy Spirit to those who ask him!"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Be Watchful
messages.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Be sure of this: if the master of the house had known the hour when the thief was coming, he would not have let his house be broken into. You also must be prepared, for at an hour you do not expect, the Son of Man will come."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the cause of Division
messages.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Do you think that I have come to establish peace on the earth? No, I tell you, but rather division. From now on a household of five will be divided, three against two and two against three."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Interpreting the Time
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, " You hypocrites! You know how to interpret  the appearance of the earth and sky, but why do you not know how to interpret the present time."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: The gardener said to him in reply, "Sir, let it alone for one more year, until I dig around it and put manure on it. If it bears fruit next year, well and good; but if not, you can cut it down."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Prayer of Repentance
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Now during those days he went out to the mountain to pray; and he spent the night in prayer to God. And when day came, he called his disciples and chose twelve of them, whom he also named apostles.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Narrow Door
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, "Strive to enter through the narrow door; for many, I tell you, will try to enter and will not be able. Indeed, some are last who will be first, and some are first who will be last."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Judgment of the Nations
messages.verse: And the king will answer them, " 'For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me something to drink, l was a stranger and you welcomed me, I was naked and you gave me clothing, I was sick and you took care of me, I was in prison and you visited me.' 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' "
messages.closing: Eternal rest grant unto them, O Lord, and let your perpetual light shine upon them. May the souls of all the faithful departed, rest in peace. Amen

messages.verse: Jesus said, "Rather, when you hold a banquet, invite the poor, the crippled, the lame, the blind; blessed indeed will you be because of their inability to repay you. For you will be repaid at the resurrection of the righteous.”

messages.verse: Jesus said, " No slave can serve two masters; for a slave will either hate the one and love the other, or be devoted to the one and despise the other. You cannot serve God and wealth."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said, " Be on your guard! If another disciple sins, you must rebuke the offender, and if there is repentance, you must forgive."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Duty of a Slave
messages.verse: Jesus said, " So you also, when you have done all that you were ordered to do, say, 'we are worthless slaves, we have done only what we ought to have done!' "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Cleanses Ten Lepers
messages.verse: Then Jesus asked, " Were not ten made clean? But the other nine, where are they? Was none of them found to return and give praise to God except this foreigner?"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Coming of The Kingdom
messages.verse: Jesus answered, "The kingdom of God is not coming with things that can be observed; nor will they say, 'Look, here it is!' Or 'There it is!' For, in fact, the kingdom of God is among you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Coming of the Kingdom of God
messages.verse: Jesus answered, " Those who try to make their life secure will lose it, but those who lose their life will keep it."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Dishonest Judge and Persistent Widow
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Pay attention to what the dishonest judge says. Will not God then do justice for his chosen ones who call out to him day and night? Will he be slow to answer them?  "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Reward for Testifying
messages.verse: Jesus said, " You will be hated by all because of my name. But not a hair of your head will perish. By your endurance you will gain your souls."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals a Blind Beggar Near Jericho
messages.verse: Jesus said, " What do you want me to do for you?" Blind man said, " Lord, let me see again." Jesus said to him, "Receive your sight, your faith has saved you."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus and Zacchaeus
messages.verse: Zac-chae-us stood there and said to the Lord, "Look, half of my possessions, Lord, I will give to the poor; and if I  have defrauded anyone of anything, I will pay back four times as much." Jesus said to him, " Today salvation has come to this house, because he too is a son of Abraham. For the Son of Man has come to seek and to save what was lost."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Nobleman
messages.verse: Jesus said, "I tell you, to everyone who has, more will be given, but from the one who has not, even what he has will be taken away."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Weeps over Jerusalem
messages.verse: As he came near and saw the city, he wept over it, saying, "If you, even you, had only recognized on this day the things that make for peace! But now they are hidden from your eyes."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Cleanses the Temple
messages.verse: Jesus said, " It is written, 'My house shall be a house of prayer'; but you have made it a den of robbers."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Question about Resurrection
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Moses himself implies that the dead rise again, in the passage about the bush where he calls the Lord the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac and the God of Jacob. Now he is God, not of the dead, but of the living; for to him all men are in fact alive.’"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Then he said, "Jesus, remember me when you come into your kingdom. " Jesus replied, "Truly I tell you, today you will be with me in Paradise."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Widow's offering
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, this poor widow has put in more than all of them, for all of them have contributed out of their abundance, but she out of her poverty has put in all she had to live on."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(21:3-4) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Signs and Persecutions
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Beware that you are not led astray; for many will come in my name and say, I am he!' and, 'The time is near!' Do not go after them.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Coming Of The Son Of Man
messages.verse: Jesus said, "People will faint from fear and foreboding of what is coming upon the world, for the powers of the heaven will be shaken. Then they will see 'the Son Of Man coming in a cloud' with power and great glory. "
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Kingdom of God is Near
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Kingdom of God is Near ) Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, this generation will not pass away until all things have taken place. Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will not pass away." LK (21:32-33) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Exhortation to Watch
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg (Exhortation to Watch) Jesus said, " Be alert at all times, praying that you may have the strength to escape all these things that will take place, and to stand before the Son of Man." LK (21:36) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Coming of the Son of Man
messages.verse: "Be sure of this, if the master of the house had known the hour of night when the thief was coming, he would have stayed awake and not let his house be broken into. So too, you also must be prepared, for at an hour you do not expect, the Son of Man will come."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals a Centurion's Servant
messages.verse: The centurion said in reply, "Lord, I am not worthy to have you enter under my roof; only say the word and my servant will be healed."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Rejoices
messages.verse: Turning to the disciples in private he said, "Blessed are the eyes that see what you see. For I say to you, many prophets and kings desired to see what you see, but did not see it, and to hear what you hear, but did not hear it."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Cures Many People
messages.verse: Great crowds came to him, bringing with them the lame, the maimed, the blind, the mute, and many others. They put them at his feet, and he cured them, so that the crowd was amazed when they saw the mute speaking, the maimed whole, the lame walking, and the blind seeing. And they praised the God of Israel.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

And they praised the God of Israel. MT(15:30-31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Hearers and Doers
messages.verse: Jesus said to his disciples: "Not everyone who says to me, 'Lord, Lord,' will enter the kingdom of heaven, but only the one who does the will of my Father in heaven. Everyone who listens to these words of mine and acts on them will be like a wise man who built his house on  rock."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Mission of the Twelve
messages.verse: Jesus said, "As you go, proclaim the good news, 'The kingdom of heaven has come near.' Cure the sick, raise the dead, cleanse the lepers, cast out demons. You received without payment, give without payment."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Proclamation of John the Baptist
messages.verse: John the Baptist proclaimed, "Repent, for the Kingdom of heaven has come near." " I baptize you with water for repentance, but one who is more powerful than I is coming after me; I am not worthy to carry his sandals. He will baptize you with the Holy Spirit and fire."

messages.title: Immaculate Conception
messages.verse: Feast of Annunciation ( Immaculate Conception) Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him 'Jesus'. Mary said, " Behold, I am the handmaid of the Lord. May it be done to me according to your word." Then the angel departed from her.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!

messages.verse: Jesus said, "Truly I tell you, among those born of women no one has arisen greater than John the Baptist; yet the least in the kingdom of heaven is greater than he."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Jesus said, "The Son of Man came eating and drinking, and they say, 'Look a glutton and a drunkard, a friend of tax collectors and sinners!' Yet wisdom is vindicated by her deeds."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.verse: Thus the total number of generations from Abraham to David is fourteen generations; from David to the Babylonian exile, fourteen generations; from the Babylonian exile to the Messiah, fourteen generations."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Dream of Joseph
messages.verse: The angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, "Joseph, son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary as your wife into your home. For it is through the holy Spirit that this child has been conceived in her."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus the Word
messages.verse: "And the Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us, and we have seen his glory, the glory as of the Father's only Son, full of grace and truth."
messages.closing: Merry Christmas Everyone!!May the Lord Bless you and your families this Christmas with Joy, Peace, Good Health and Happiness!! From Asher, Chris, Celine & Agnel.

messages.title: Coming Persecution
messages.verse: Today's Feast day of St. Stephen the Apostle ( Coming Persecution) Jesus said, " Brother will betray brother to death, and a father his child, and children will rise against parents and have them put to death, and you will be hated by all because  of my name. But the one who endures to the end will be saved."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Escape to Egypt
messages.verse: When the Magi had departed, behold, the angel of the Lord appeared to Joseph in a dream and said, "Rise, take the child and his mother, flee to Egypt, and stay there until I tell you. Herod is going to search for the child to destroy him."

Herod is going to search for the child to destroy him." MT(2:13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus is Presented in the Temple
messages.verse: Simon took him in his arms and praised God, saying, " Master, now you are dismissing your servant in peace, according to your word; for my eyes have seen your salvation."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(2:28-30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Prophet Anna Speaks of the Savior
messages.verse: And coming forward at that very time, she gave thanks to God and spoke about the child to all who were awaiting the redemption of Jerusalem.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Prophet Anna Speaks of the Savior) And coming forward at that very time, she gave thanks to God and spoke about the child to all who were awaiting the redemption of Jerusalem. LK(2:38) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: John Testifies
messages.verse: John said, " 'And the Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us, and we saw his glory, the glory as of the Father's only Son, full of grace and truth. John testified to him and cried out, saying, "This was he of whom I said, 'The one who is coming after me ranks ahead of me because he existed before me.'"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH(1:14-15) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus is Named
messages.verse: Solemnity Mary Mother of God (Jesus is Named ) Then the shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all they had heard and seen, just as it had been told to them. When eight days were completed for his circumcision, he was named Jesus, the name given to him by the angel before he was conceived in the womb.
messages.closing: Wishing Everyone Happy New Year 2026!! May this year be filled with Peace, Hope, Good health and Happiness!! From Agnel and Family.

messages.title: John Testifies
messages.verse: John answered them, “I baptise you with water; but standing among you, unknown to you, is the one who is coming after me; and I am not worthy to untie the strap of his sandal.”
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Dove Resting on Jesus
messages.verse: John said, "I did not know him, but the one who sent me to baptize with water told me, 'On whom ever you see the Spirit come down and remain, he is the one who will baptize with the holy Spirit.'"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH(1:33) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Visit of Three Wise Men
messages.verse: When they saw that the star had stopped  they were over- whelmed with joy. On entering the house, they saw the child with Mary his mother; and they knelt down and paid him homage. Then, opening their treasure chests, they offered him gifts of gold, frankincense, and myrrh."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

On entering the house, they saw the child with Mary his mother; and they knelt down and paid him homage. Then, opening their treasure chests, they offered him gifts of gold, frankincense, and myrrh."  MT(2:10-11) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Begins His Ministry in Galilee
messages.verse: Jesus went round the whole of Galilee teaching in their synagogues, proclaiming the good news of the kingdom and curing all kinds of disease and illness among the people.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Begins His Ministry in Galilee) Jesus went round the whole of Galilee teaching in their synagogues, proclaiming the good news of the kingdom and curing all kinds of disease and illness among the people. MT(4:23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Walks on Water
messages.verse: But when they saw him walking on the sea, they thought it was a ghost and cried out. They had all seen him and were terrified. But at once he spoke with them, "Take courage, it is I, do not be afraid!"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

But at once he spoke with them, "Take courage, it is I, do not be afraid!"  MK(6:49-50) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Reads  The Scroll
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he has anointed me to bring good news to the poor. He has sent me to proclaim release to the captives and recovery of sight to the blind, to let the oppressed go free. To proclaim the year of the Lord's favour."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

He has sent me to proclaim release to the captives and recovery of sight to the blind, to let the oppressed go free. To proclaim the year of the Lord's favour." LK(4:18-19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Cleanses  a Man with  Leprosy
messages.verse: Jesus stretched out his hand, touched him, and said, " Yes I do wish. Be made clean." And the leprosy left him immediately.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cleanses  a Man with  Leprosy) Jesus stretched out his hand, touched him, and said, " Yes I do wish. Be made clean." And the leprosy left him immediately. LK(5:13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: John the Baptist talks about Jesus
messages.verse: John said, "You yourselves can testify that I said. I am not the Messiah, but that I was sent before him. The one who has the bride is the bridegroom; the best man, who stands and listens for him, rejoices greatly at the bridegroom's voice. So this joy of mine has been made complete. He must increase; I must decrease."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

The one who has the bride is the bridegroom; the best man, who stands and listens for him, rejoices greatly at the bridegroom's voice. So this joy of mine has been made complete. He must increase; I must decrease." JH(3:28-30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Baptism of Jesus
messages.verse: After Jesus was baptized, he came out from the water and behold, the heavens were opened, and he saw the Spirit of God descending like a dove and coming upon him. And a voice came from the heavens, saying, "This is my beloved Son, with whom I am well pleased."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

And a voice came from the heavens, saying, "This is my beloved Son, with whom I am well pleased." MT(3:16-17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus calls the First Disciples
messages.verse: Today’s Gospel Msg ( Jesus calls the First Disciples ) As he passed by the Sea of Galilee, he saw Simon and his brother Andrew casting their nets into the sea; they were fishermen. Jesus said to them, "Come after me, and I will make you fishers of men." Mk(1:16-17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Man with an Unclean Spirit
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Man with an Unclean Spirit ) He cried out, "What have you to do with us, Jesus of Nazareth? Have you come to destroy us? I know who you are, the Holy One of God!" Jesus rebuked him and said, "Quiet! Come out of him!" Mk(1:24-25) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals Many at Simon's House
messages.verse: Now Simon's mother-in-law was in bed sick with a fever, and at once they told him about her. He went to her, took her by the hand and helped her up. And the fever left her and she began to serve them.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Cleanses a Leper
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cleanses a Leper ) A leper came to him begging him, and kneeling he said to him, "If you choose, you can make me clean." Moved with pity, Jesus stretched out his hand and touched him, and said to him, "I do choose. Be made clean!"  Mk(1:40-41) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals a Paralytic
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals a Paralytic ) Jesus said," But so that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins" -- he said to the paralytic-- "I say to you, stand up take your mat and go to your home"  Mk(2:11-12) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus  Calls Levi
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus  Calls Levi) Jesus heard this and said to them, "Those who are well do not need a physician, but the sick do. I did not come to call the righteous but sinners."  Mk(2:17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: John's Testimony
messages.verse: John the Baptist saw Jesus coming toward him and said, "Behold, the Lamb of God, who takes away the sin of the world."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 2nd Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( John's Testimony) John the Baptist saw Jesus coming toward him and said, "Behold, the Lamb of God, who takes away the sin of the world." JH(1:29) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Question about Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot fast while the bridegroom is with them, can they? As long as they have the bridegroom with them, they cannot fast."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Lord of the Sabbath
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, "The sabbath was made for humankind, and not humankind for the sabbath, so the Son of Man is lord even of the sabbath."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Lord of the Sabbath ) Jesus said to them, "The sabbath was made for humankind, and not humankind for the sabbath, so the Son of Man is lord even of the sabbath." MK(2:27-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Man with a Withered Hand
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, " Is it lawful to do good or to do harm on the sabbath, to save life or to kill?" But they were silent.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Man with a Withered Hand) Then Jesus said to them, " Is it lawful to do good or to do harm on the sabbath, to save life or to kill?" But they were silent. MK(3:4) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Heals Multitude at the Seaside
messages.verse: He had cured many and, as a result, those who had diseases were pressing upon him to touch him. And whenever unclean spirits saw him they would fall down before him and shout, "You are the Son of God." But he sternly ordered them not to make him known.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MK(3:10-12) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Appoints the Twelve Apostles
messages.verse: Jesus went up the mountain and summoned those whom he wanted and they came to him. He appointed twelve (whom he also named apostles) that they might be with him and he might send them forth to preach"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

He appointed twelve (whom he also named apostles) that they might be with him and he might send them forth to preach"  MK(3:13-14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Crowd Follows Everywhere
messages.verse: Jesus came with his disciples into the house. Again the crowd gathered, making it impossible for them even to eat.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Kingdom of God is at Hand
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The people who sit in darkness have seen a great light, on those dwelling in a land overshadowed by death light has arisen." From that time on, Jesus began to preach and say, "Repent, for the kingdom of heaven is at hand."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Mission of The Seventy
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " The harvest is plentiful, but the labourers are few; therefore ask the Lord of the harvest to send out laborers into his harvest."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Family of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus looking around at those seated in the circle he said, "Here are my mother and my brothers. For whoever does the will of God is my brother and sister and mother."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Parable of the Sower
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But those sown on rich soil are the ones who hear the word and accept it and bear fruit thirty and sixty and a hundredfold."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Sower) Jesus said, " But those sown on rich soil are the ones who hear the word and accept it and bear fruit thirty and sixty and a hundredfold." MK(4:20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Measure you Give Will You Get Back
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Pay attention to what you hear; the measure you give will be the measure you get, and still more will be given to you. For to those who have, more will be given; and from those who have nothing, even what they have will be taken away."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

For to those who have, more will be given; and from those who have nothing, even what they have will be taken away."  MK(4:24-25) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Kingdom of God
messages.verse: Jesus said to the crowds, "This is how it is with the Kingdom of God; it is as if a man were to scatter seed on the land and would sleep and rise night and day and the seed would sprout and grow, he knows not how."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MK(4:26-27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Calmed the Sea
messages.verse: They woke him and said to him, "Teacher, do you not care that we are perishing?" He woke up, rebuked the wind, and said to the sea, "Quiet! Be still!" The wind ceased and there was great calm. Then he asked them, "Why are you terrified? Do you not yet have faith?"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Beatitudes
messages.verse: Jesus called his disciples and said to them, "Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven. Blessed are those  who mourn, for they will be comforted. Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.liturgicalLabel: Feast of Presentation of the Lord
messages.labelKey: feast of presentation of the lord
messages.title: Jesus is Presented in the Temple
messages.verse: Feast of Presentation of the Lord ( Jesus is Presented in the Temple) When the time came for the purification according to the law of Moses, they brought him up to Jerusalem to present him to the Lord, and they offered a sacrifice according to what is stated in the law of the Lord, "a pair of turtle doves or two young pigeon."
messages.closing: Happy Feast!! Stay blessed!
messages.fullText: Feast of Presentation of the Lord ( Jesus is Presented in the Temple) When the time came for the purification according to the law of Moses, they brought him up to Jerusalem to present him to the Lord, and they offered a sacrifice according to what is stated in the law of the Lord, "a pair of turtle doves or two young pigeon." LK(2:22-24) Happy Feast!! Stay blessed!

messages.title: Jesus Restored A Little Girl to life
messages.verse: He took her by the hand and said to her, " Tal' i-tha cum." Which means, "Little girl, get up!" And immediately the girl got up and began to walk about (She was twelve years of age). At this they were overcome with amazement.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Rejection of Jesus at Nazareth
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "Prophets are not without honor, except in their hometown, and among their own relatives, and in their own house." And he was amazed at their unbelief.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Disciples  Proclaimed it's Time to Repent
messages.verse: Jesus summoned the Twelve and began to send them out two by two and gave them authority over unclean spirits.So they went out and proclaimed that all should repent.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Disciples  Proclaimed it's Time to Repent) Jesus summoned the Twelve and began to send them out two by two and gave them authority over unclean spirits.So they went out and proclaimed that all should repent. MK(6:7,12) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Death of John the Baptist
messages.verse: King Herod heard about Jesus, for his fame had become wide spread, and people were saying, "John the Baptist has been raised from the dead; That is why mighty powers are at work in him." Others were saying, "He is Elijah"; still others, "He is a prophet like any of the prophets." But when Herod learned of it, he said, "It is John whom I beheaded. He has been raised up.""
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MK(6:14-16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Compassion for the Crowd
messages.verse: As he went ashore,  he saw a great crowd, his heart was moved with pity for them, for they were like sheep without a shepherd; and he began to teach them many things.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: You are the Salt and Light
messages.verse: Jesus said, " You are the light of the world. A city built on a hill cannot be hid. In the same way, let your light shine before others, so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father in heaven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

In the same way, let your light shine before others, so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father in heaven." MT(5:14,16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Healing the Sick in Gennesaret
messages.verse: And wherever he went, into villages or cities or farms, they laid the Sick in the marketplace, and begged him that they might touch even the fringe of his cloaks; and all who touched it were healed.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MK(6:56) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Tradition of the Elders
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Isaiah prophesied rightly about you hypocrites, as it is written: 'This people honors me with their lips, but their hearts are far from me; In vain do they worship me, teaching as human precepts as doctrines.' You disregard God's commandment but cling to human tradition."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

You disregard God's commandment but cling to human tradition."  MK(7:6-8) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: What Defiles a Person
messages.verse: Jesus said, " It is what comes out of a person that defiles. For it is from within, from the human heart, that evil intentions come: fornication, theft, murder, adultery, avarice, wickedness, deceit, licentiousness, envy, slander, pride, folly."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
