For it is from within, from the human heart, that evil intentions come: fornication, theft, murder, adultery, avarice, wickedness, deceit, licentiousness, envy, slander, pride, folly." MK(7:20-22) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Syrophoenician Women's Faith
messages.verse: Jesus said to her, " Let the children be fed first, for it is not fair to take the children's food and throw it to the dogs." But she answered him, "Sir, even the dogs under the table eat the children's crumbs." Then he said to her, " For saying that, you may go- the demon has left your daughter."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Syrophoenician Women's Faith) Jesus said to her, " Let the children be fed first, for it is not fair to take the children's food and throw it to the dogs." But she answered him, "Sir, even the dogs under the table eat the children's crumbs." Then he said to her, " For saying that, you may go- the demon has left your daughter." MK(7:27-29) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Cures a Deaf Man
messages.verse: He took him aside in private, away from the crowd, and put his fingers into his ears, and he spat and touched his tongue. Then looking up to heaven, he sighed and said to him. "Eph'pha-the," that is, "Be opened."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cures a Deaf Man ) He took him aside in private, away from the crowd, and put his fingers into his ears, and he spat and touched his tongue. Then looking up to heaven, he sighed and said to him. "Eph'pha-the," that is, "Be opened." MK(7:33-34) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Feed Four Thousand
messages.verse: He ordered the crowd to sit down on the ground. Then, taking the seven loaves he gave thanks, broke them, and gave them to his disciples to distribute, and they distributed them to the crowd. They also had a few fish. He said the blessing over them and ordered them distributed also.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Feed Four Thousand  ) He ordered the crowd to sit down on the ground. Then, taking the seven loaves he gave thanks, broke them, and gave them to his disciples to distribute, and they distributed them to the crowd. They also had a few fish. He said the blessing over them and ordered them distributed also. MK(8:6-7) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Kingdom of Heaven
messages.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, "I tell you, unless your righteousness surpasses that of the Scribes and Pharisees, you will not enter the kingdom of heaven."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 6th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Kingdom of Heaven) Jesus said to his disciples, "I tell you, unless your righteousness surpasses that of the Scribes and Pharisees, you will not enter the kingdom of heaven." MT(5:20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Demand for a Sign
messages.verse: Jesus sighed deeply in his spirit and said, " Why does this generation ask for a sign? Truly I tell you, no sign will be given to this generation."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Demand for a Sign ) Jesus sighed deeply in his spirit and said, " Why does this generation ask for a sign? Truly I tell you, no sign will be given to this generation." MK(8:12) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: The Yeast of Pharisees and of Herod
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Do you have eyes, and fail to see? Do you have ears, and fail to hear? And do you not remember?"
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Yeast of Pharisees and of Herod) Jesus said, " Do you have eyes, and fail to see? Do you have ears, and fail to hear? And do you not remember?" MK(8:18) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."
messages.closing: Let us all pray and repent this lent.
messages.fullText: Ash Wednesday Gospel msg ( Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting ) Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."  MT(6:3,6,17-18) Let us all pray and repent this lent.

messages.title: Followers of Jesus
messages.verse: Jesus said to them all, " For those who want to save their life will lose it, and those who lose their life for my sake will save it. What does it profit them if they gain the whole world, but lose or forfeit themselves?"
messages.closing: Lord help us carry our daily cross!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Followers of Jesus) Jesus said to them all, " For those who want to save their life will lose it, and those who lose their life for my sake will save it. What does it profit them if they gain the whole world, but lose or forfeit themselves?" LK(9:24-25) Lord help us carry our daily cross!

messages.title: Question about Fasting
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast."
messages.closing: Lord listen to our petitions, as we fast and pray🙏🏼.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Question about Fasting) Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast." MT(9:15) Lord listen to our petitions, as we fast and pray🙏🏼.

messages.title: Jesus Calls Levi the Tax Collector
messages.verse: Jesus answered, " Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick. I have come to call, not the righteous but sinners to repentance."
messages.closing: Jesus forgive our sins.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Calls Levi the Tax Collector) Jesus answered, " Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick. I have come to call, not the righteous but sinners to repentance." LK(5:31-32) Jesus forgive our sins.

messages.title: Judgment of the Nations
messages.verse: And the king will answer them, " 'For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me something to drink, l was a stranger and you welcomed me, I was naked and you gave me clothing, I was sick and you took care of me, I was in prison and you visited me.' 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' "
messages.closing: Lord help us to share generously with the needy.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Judgment of the Nations)  And the king will answer them, " 'For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me something to drink, l was a stranger and you welcomed me, I was naked and you gave me clothing, I was sick and you took care of me, I was in prison and you visited me.' 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' " MT(25:36,40) Lord help us to share generously with the needy.

messages.title: Jesus Teaches the Our Father Prayer
messages.verse: Jesus said , " For if you forgive others their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you; but if you do not forgive others, neither will your Father forgive your trespasses. "
messages.closing: Lord, may we forget our egos and pray for others and give us your grace to forgive.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Teaches the Our Father Prayer) Jesus said , " For if you forgive others their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you; but if you do not forgive others, neither will your Father forgive your trespasses. " MT(6:14-15) Lord, may we forget our egos and pray for others and give us your grace to forgive.

messages.title: Jonah Preached asking people to Repent
messages.verse: Jesus said to them all, "At the judgment the men of Nineveh will arise with this generation and condemn it, because at the preaching of Jonah they repented, and there is something greater than Jonah here."
messages.closing: Forgive us Lord, as we repent and pray.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jonah Preached asking people to Repent ) Jesus said to them all, "At the judgment the men of Nineveh will arise with this generation and condemn it, because at the preaching of Jonah they repented, and there is something greater than Jonah here." LK(11:32) Forgive us Lord, as we repent and pray.

messages.title: Ask and You Shall Receive
messages.verse: Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him. Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets."
messages.closing: Lord we ask for your Grace and forgiveness!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Ask and You Shall Receive ) Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him. Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets." MT(7:11-12) Lord we ask for your Grace and forgiveness!

messages.title: Concerning Anger
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Leave your gifts there before the altar and go; first be reconciled to your brother or sister, and then come back and offer your gift."
messages.closing: Lord, give us your mercy and strength to forgive!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Concerning Anger) Jesus said, " Leave your gifts there before the altar and go; first be reconciled to your brother or sister, and then come back and offer your gift." MT(5:24) Lord, give us your mercy and strength to forgive!

messages.title: Love for Enemies
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you, so that you may be children of your Father in heaven; for he makes his Sun rise on the evil and on good, and sends rain on the righteous and on the unrighteous."
messages.closing: Lord Jesus give us your mercy to forgive others.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Love for Enemies) Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you, so that you may be children of your Father in heaven; for he makes his Sun rise on the evil and on good, and sends rain on the righteous and on the unrighteous." MT(5:44-45) Lord Jesus give us your mercy to forgive others.

messages.title: Judging Others
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Give, and  it will be  given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over, will be put into your lap; for the measure you give will be the measure you get back."
messages.closing: Lord help us to be generous and share with the needy.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Judging Others) Jesus said, " Give, and  it will be  given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over, will be put into your lap; for the measure you give will be the measure you get back." LK(6:38) Lord help us to be generous and share with the needy.

messages.title: Denounces Scribes and Pharisees
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The greatest among you will be your servant. All who exalt themselves will be humbled, and all who humble themselves will be exalted."
messages.closing: Lord Jesus help us to become humble.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Denounces Scribes and Pharisees) Jesus said, " The greatest among you will be your servant. All who exalt themselves will be humbled, and all who humble themselves will be exalted." MT(23:11-12)  Lord Jesus help us to become humble.

messages.title: Request of the Mother of James and John
messages.verse: Jesus said, " And whoever wishes to be first among you must be your slave; just as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransom for many."
messages.closing: Lord, help us to serve people in need.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Request of the Mother of James and John) Jesus said, " And whoever wishes to be first among you must be your slave; just as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransom for many." MT(20:27-28) Lord, help us to serve people in need.

messages.title: Rich Man and Lazarus
messages.verse: The rich man said, " 'No, father Abraham; but if someone goes to them from the dead, they will repent.' He said to him, " If they do not listen to Moses and the prophets, neither will they be convinced even if someone rises from the dead.' "
messages.closing: Lord, forgive our sins; as we fast and pray!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Rich Man and Lazarus) The rich man said, " 'No, father Abraham; but if someone goes to them from the dead, they will repent.' He said to him, " If they do not listen to Moses and the prophets, neither will they be convinced even if someone rises from the dead.' " LK(16:30-31) Lord, forgive our sins; as we fast and pray!

messages.title: Jesus The Corner Stone
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Have you never read the scriptures: 'The stone that the builders rejected has become the cornerstone; this was the Lord's doing, and it is amazing in our eyes'? "
messages.closing: Lord, gives us the strength to make you the cornerstone of our lives!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus The Corner Stone) Jesus said to them, " Have you never read the scriptures: 'The stone that the builders rejected has become the cornerstone; this was the Lord's doing, and it is amazing in our eyes'? " MT(21:42) Lord, gives us the strength to make you the cornerstone of our lives!

messages.title: Parable of the Prodigal Son
messages.verse: Father said to him, "My son, you are here with me always; everything I have is yours. But now we must celebrate and rejoice, because your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found. "
messages.closing: Lord, forgive us as we repent and return to your grace!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Prodigal Son) Father said to him, "My son, you are here with me always; everything I have is yours. But now we must celebrate and rejoice, because your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found. " LK(15:31-32) Lord, forgive us as we repent and return to your grace!

messages.title: Living Water
messages.verse: Jesus said to her, " Everyone who drinks of this water will be thirsty again, but those who drink of the water that I will give them will never be thirsty. The water that I will give them will become in them a spring of water gushing up to eternal life. "
messages.closing: Lord Jesus give us your living waters.
messages.fullText: 3rd Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Living Water) Jesus said to her, " Everyone who drinks of this water will be thirsty again, but those who drink of the water that I will give them will never be thirsty. The water that I will give them will become in them a spring of water gushing up to eternal life. " JH(4:13-14) Lord Jesus give us your living waters.

messages.title: Questions People's Faith
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, " Truly I tell you, no prophet is accepted in the prophet's hometown. "Again, there were many lepers in Israel during the time of Elisha the prophet; yet not one of them was cleansed, but only Naaman the Syrian.”
messages.closing: Lord Jesus increase our Faith.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Questions People's Faith) Jesus said to them, " Truly I tell you, no prophet is accepted in the prophet's hometown. "Again, there were many lepers in Israel during the time of Elisha the prophet; yet not one of them was cleansed, but only Naaman the Syrian.” LK(4:24,27) Lord Jesus increase our Faith.

messages.title: Forgive and you will be Forgiven
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Then in anger his master handed him over to the torturers until he should pay back the whole debt. So will my heavenly Father do to you, unless each of you forgives your brother and sister from your heart."
messages.closing: Lord Jesus give us a loving heart to forgive.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Forgive and you will be Forgiven) Jesus said, "Then in anger his master handed him over to the torturers until he should pay back the whole debt. So will my heavenly Father do to you, unless each of you forgives your brother and sister from your heart." MT(18:34-35) Lord Jesus give us a loving heart to forgive.

messages.title: Fulfill The Commandments
messages.verse: Jesus said, "Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven."
messages.closing: Lord, give us the courage to be your witnesses.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Fulfill The Commandments) Jesus said, "Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven." MT(5:19) Lord, give us the courage to be your witnesses.

messages.title: Jesus and Beelzebul
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Whoever is not with me is against me, and whoever does not gather with me scatters."
messages.closing: Lord increase our faith.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and Beelzebul ) Jesus said, " Whoever is not with me is against me, and whoever does not gather with me scatters." LK(11:23) Lord increase our faith.

messages.title: The Greatest Commandment
messages.verse: The scribe said to Jesus, "Well said, teacher. You are right in saying, 'He is One and there is no other than he.' And 'to love him with all your heart, with all your understanding, with all your strength, and to love your neighbor as yourself' is worth more than all burnt offerings and sacrifices."
messages.closing: Lord, help us love and forgive those who hurt us.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Greatest Commandment) The scribe said to Jesus, "Well said, teacher. You are right in saying, 'He is One and there is no other than he.' And 'to love him with all your heart, with all your understanding, with all your strength, and to love your neighbor as yourself' is worth more than all burnt offerings and sacrifices." MK(12:32-33) Lord, help us love and forgive those who hurt us.

messages.title: Prayer of Repentance
messages.verse: Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted."
messages.closing: Lord we pray, help us become humble!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (  Prayer of Repentance) Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted." LK(18:13-14) Lord we pray, help us become humble!

messages.title: Jesus Heals the Officer's Son
messages.verse: The royal official said to him, "Sir, come down before my child dies." Jesus said to him, "You may go; your son will live." The man believed what Jesus said to him and left."
messages.closing: Lord, we pray for all the sick to be healed!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals the Officer's Son) The royal official said to him, "Sir, come down before my child dies." Jesus said to him, "You may go; your son will live." The man believed what Jesus said to him and left." JH(4:49-50) Lord, we pray for all the sick to be healed!

messages.title: Jesus Heals Sick Man
messages.verse: Jesus said to him, "Rise, take up your mat, and walk." Immediately the man became well, took up his mat, and walked. Now that day was a sabbath."
messages.closing: Lord Jesus, we pray for your healing.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals Sick Man) Jesus said to him, "Rise, take up your mat, and walk." Immediately the man became well, took up his mat, and walked. Now that day was a sabbath." JH(5:8-9) Lord Jesus, we pray for your healing.

messages.title: The Authority of the Son
messages.verse: Today's Gospel Msg (The Authority of the Son) Jesus said, "Very truly, I tell you, anyone who hears my word and believes him who sent me has eternal life, and does not come under judgment, but has passed from death to life." JH (5:24) Lord, help us to listen to your words.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (The Authority of the Son) Jesus said, "Very truly, I tell you, anyone who hears my word and believes him who sent me has eternal life, and does not come under judgment, but has passed from death to life." JH (5:24) Lord, help us to listen to your words.

messages.title: Dream of Joseph
messages.verse: Solemnity Feast of St.Joseph ( Dream of Joseph) Angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, " Joseph son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary as your wife, for the child conceived in her is from the Holy Spirit. She will bear a son, and you are to name him Jesus, for he will save his people from their sins."
messages.closing: Lord, increase our faith like St.Joseph.
messages.fullText: Solemnity Feast of St.Joseph ( Dream of Joseph) Angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, " Joseph son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary as your wife, for the child conceived in her is from the Holy Spirit. She will bear a son, and you are to name him Jesus, for he will save his people from their sins." MT(1:20-21) Lord, increase our faith like St.Joseph.

messages.title: Jesus Teaches at the Temple
messages.verse: Jesus cried out in the temple area as he was teaching and said, "You know me and also know where I am from. Yet I did not come on my own, but the one who sent me, whom you do not know, is true. I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me."
messages.closing: Lord, increase our faith.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Teaches at the Temple) Jesus cried out in the temple area as he was teaching and said, "You know me and also know where I am from. Yet I did not come on my own, but the one who sent me, whom you do not know, is true. I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me." JH(7:28-29) Lord, increase our faith.

messages.title: Jesus the Messiah
messages.verse: Others said, "This is the Messiah." But some asked, "Surely the Messiah does not come from Galilee, does he? Has not the scripture said that the Messiah is descended from David and come from Bethlehem, the village where David lived?"
messages.closing: Lord, increase our faith.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus the Messiah ) Others said, "This is the Messiah." But some asked, "Surely the Messiah does not come from Galilee, does he? Has not the scripture said that the Messiah is descended from David and come from Bethlehem, the village where David lived?" JH(7:41-42) Lord, increase our faith.

messages.title: Jesus the Resurection and the life- Jesus Raises Lazarus to LifeI
messages.verse: 5th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg- ( Jesus the Resurection and the life- Jesus Raises Lazarus to LifeI) Jesus said to Martha, "I am the resurrection and the life; whoever believes in me, even if he dies, will live, and everyone who lives and believes in me, will never die, Do you belive this?" JN (11:25-26) Lord increase our faith.
messages.fullText: 5th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg- ( Jesus the Resurection and the life- Jesus Raises Lazarus to LifeI) Jesus said to Martha, "I am the resurrection and the life; whoever believes in me, even if he dies, will live, and everyone who lives and believes in me, will never die, Do you belive this?" JN (11:25-26) Lord increase our faith.

messages.title: Jesus Forgives the Women
messages.verse: Then Jesus straightened up and said to her, "Woman, where are they? Has no one condemned you?" She replied, "No one, sir." Then Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go, (and) from now on do not sin any more."
messages.closing: Lord, give us the strength to forgive.
messages.fullText: Today’s Gospel Msg (Jesus Forgives the Women) Then Jesus straightened up and said to her, "Woman, where are they? Has no one condemned you?" She replied, "No one, sir." Then Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go, (and) from now on do not sin any more." JH(8:10-11) Lord, give us the strength to forgive.

messages.title: Jesus  Foretells His Death
messages.verse: So Jesus said, " When you have lifted up the Son of Man, then you will realize that I am he, and that I do nothing on my own, but I speak these things as the Father instructed me."
messages.closing: Lord give us the strength to carry our cross!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus  Foretells His Death) So Jesus said, " When you have lifted up the Son of Man, then you will realize that I am he, and that I do nothing on my own, but I speak these things as the Father instructed me." JH(8:28) Lord give us the strength to carry our cross!

messages.title: Immaculate Conception
messages.verse: Solemnity-The Annunciation of the Lord ( Immaculate Conception) Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him 'Jesus'. Mary said, " Behold, I am the handmaid of the Lord. May it be done to me according to your word." Then the angel departed from her.
messages.closing: Lord increase our Faith! Happy Feast Everyone!!
messages.fullText: Solemnity-The Annunciation of the Lord ( Immaculate Conception) Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him 'Jesus'. Mary said, " Behold, I am the handmaid of the Lord. May it be done to me according to your word." Then the angel departed from her. LK(1:30,38) Lord increase our Faith! Happy Feast Everyone!!

messages.title: Jesus The Son of God
messages.verse: Jesus answered, "If I glorify myself, my glory is worth nothing; but it is my Father who glorifies me, of whom you say, 'He is our God."
messages.closing: Forgive us Lord for the times we failed to glorify You and the Father.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus The Son of God ) Jesus answered, "If I glorify myself, my glory is worth nothing; but it is my Father who glorifies me, of whom you say, 'He is our God." JH(8:54) Forgive us Lord for the times we failed to glorify You and the Father.

messages.title: Father and The Son
messages.verse: Jesus said, "If I do not perform my Father's works, do not believe me; but if I am doing it, then even if you refuse to believe in me, at least believe in the work I do; then you will know for certain that the Father is in me and I am in the Father."
messages.closing: Lord help our unbelief!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Father and The Son ) Jesus said, "If I do not perform my Father's works, do not believe me; but if I am doing it, then even if you refuse to believe in me, at least believe in the work I do; then you will know for certain that the Father is in me and I am in the Father." JH(10:37-38) Lord help our unbelief!

messages.title: Plot to kill Jesus
messages.verse: But one of them, Caiaphas, who was high priest that year, said to them, "You know nothing, nor do you consider that it is better for you that one man should die instead of the people, so that the whole nation may not perish."
messages.closing: Lord, we pray repenting for all our sins.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Plot to kill Jesus ) But one of them, Caiaphas, who was high priest that year, said to them, "You know nothing, nor do you consider that it is better for you that one man should die instead of the people, so that the whole nation may not perish." JH(11:49-50) Lord, we pray repenting for all our sins.

messages.title: Jesus is Condemned To Death
messages.verse: Jesus said to him, "You have said so. But I tell you, From now on you will see the Son of Man seated at the right hand of Power and coming on the clouds of heaven."
messages.closing: Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a Cross. Therefore God has highly exalted him and bestowed on him the name that is above every name.
messages.fullText: Palm Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus is Condemned To Death ) Jesus said to him, "You have said so. But I tell you, From now on you will see the Son of Man seated at the right hand of Power and coming on the clouds of heaven." MT(26:64) Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a Cross. Therefore God has highly exalted him and bestowed on him the name that is above every name.

messages.title: Mary Anoints Jesus
messages.verse: Mary took a pound of costly perfume made of pure nard, anointed Jesus's feet, and wiped them with her hair. The house was filled with the fragrance of the perfumes.
messages.closing: Lord forgive us, as we repent and pray.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Mary Anoints Jesus ) Mary took a pound of costly perfume made of pure nard, anointed Jesus's feet, and wiped them with her hair. The house was filled with the fragrance of the perfumes. JH(12:3) Lord forgive us, as we repent and pray.

messages.title: Jesus Foretells His Betrayal
messages.verse: Jesus answered, "It is the one to whom I hand the morsel after I have dipped it." So he dipped the morsel and (took it and) handed it to Judas, son of Simon the Iscariot. After he took the morsel, Satan entered him. So Jesus said to him, "What you are going to do, do quickly."
messages.closing: Lord,  we pray for courage to be your witnesses.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus Foretells His Betrayal) Jesus answered, "It is the one to whom I hand the morsel after I have dipped it." So he dipped the morsel and (took it and) handed it to Judas, son of Simon the Iscariot. After he took the morsel, Satan entered him. So Jesus said to him, "What you are going to do, do quickly."JH(13:26-27) Lord,  we pray for courage to be your witnesses.

messages.title: Jesus is Betrayed
messages.verse: Jesus answered, "The one who has dipped his hand into the bowl with me will betray me. The Son of Man indeed goes, as it is written of him, but woe to that man by whom the Son of Man is betrayed! It would be better for that man if he had never been born."
messages.closing: Lord give us your grace to overcome temptations.
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus is Betrayed) Jesus answered, "The one who has dipped his hand into the bowl with me will betray me. The Son of Man indeed goes, as it is written of him, but woe to that man by whom the Son of Man is betrayed! It would be better for that man if he had never been born." MT(26:23-24) Lord give us your grace to overcome temptations.

messages.title: Jesus Washes the Disciples Feet
messages.verse: Jesus said, " Do you know what I have done? You call me Teacher and Lord--and You are right, for that is what I am. So if I, your Lord and Teacher, have washed your feet, you ought to wash one another's feet."
messages.closing: Jesus give us yours grace to serve others in need.
messages.fullText: Maundy Thursday Gospel Msg (Jesus Washes the Disciples Feet)  Jesus said, " Do you know what I have done? You call me Teacher and Lord--and You are right, for that is what I am. So if I, your Lord and Teacher, have washed your feet, you ought to wash one another's feet." JH(13-12-14) Jesus give us yours grace to serve others in need.

messages.title: Jesus Dies on the Cross
messages.verse: After this, Jesus knew that everything had now been completed and, so that the scripture should be completely fulfilled, he said, "I am thirsty. After Jesus had taken the wine, he said, 'It is fulfilled'; and bowing his head, he gave up his spirit."
messages.closing: Lord, we pray give us the courage to carry our cross, and be your witnesses!
messages.fullText: Good Friday Gospel Msg (Jesus Dies on the Cross) After this, Jesus knew that everything had now been completed and, so that the scripture should be completely fulfilled, he said, "I am thirsty. After Jesus had taken the wine, he said, 'It is fulfilled'; and bowing his head, he gave up his spirit." JH(19-28-30) Lord, we pray give us the courage to carry our cross, and be your witnesses!

messages.title: Resurrection of Jesus
messages.verse: But the Angel said to the women, " Do not be afraid; I know that you are looking for Jesus who was crucified. He is not here; for he has been  raised, as he said. Come, see the place where he lay. Then go quickly and tell his disciples, 'He has been raised from th dead, and indeed he is going ahead of you to Galilee; there you will see him.' This is my message for you."
messages.closing: Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!!
messages.fullText: Holy Saturday Easter Vigil- Gospel Msg ( Resurrection of Jesus)  But the Angel said to the women, " Do not be afraid; I know that you are looking for Jesus who was crucified. He is not here; for he has been  raised, as he said. Come, see the place where he lay. Then go quickly and tell his disciples, 'He has been raised from th dead, and indeed he is going ahead of you to Galilee; there you will see him.' This is my message for you." MT(28:5-7) Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!!

messages.title: Resurrection of Jesus
messages.verse: "Then the other disciple also went in, the one who had arrived at the tomb first, and he saw and believed. For they did not yet understand the scripture that he had to rise from the dead."
messages.closing: Alleluia Christ has Risen Alleluia!! May the risen Lord, bless you and your families abundantly with Peace, Joy and Happiness!! Happy Easter from Agnel and Family.
messages.fullText: Easter Sunday Gospel Msg ( Resurrection of Jesus ) "Then the other disciple also went in, the one who had arrived at the tomb first, and he saw and believed. For they did not yet understand the scripture that he had to rise from the dead." JH(20:8-9) Alleluia Christ has Risen Alleluia!! May the risen Lord, bless you and your families abundantly with Peace, Joy and Happiness!! Happy Easter from Agnel and Family.

messages.title: Disciples Met Jesus
messages.verse: Suddenly Jesus met them and said, "Greetings!" And they came to him, took hold of his feet, and worshipped him. Then Jesus said to them, " Do not be afraid; go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee; there they will see me."
messages.closing: Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!!
messages.fullText: Octave of Easter Gospel Msg ( Disciples Met Jesus) Suddenly Jesus met them and said, "Greetings!" And they came to him, took hold of his feet, and worshipped him. Then Jesus said to them, " Do not be afraid; go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee; there they will see me." MT(28:9-10) Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!!

messages.title: Jesus Appears to Mary Magdalena
messages.verse: Jesus said to her, "Do not cling to me, because I have not yet ascended to the Father. But go to my brothers, and tell them: I am ascending to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God."
messages.closing: Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!
messages.fullText: Octave of Easter Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Appears to Mary Magdalena  ) Jesus said to her, "Do not cling to me, because I have not yet ascended to the Father. But go to my brothers, and tell them: I am ascending to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God." JH(20:17) Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!

messages.title: The Walk to Emmaus
messages.verse: And it happened that, while he was with them at table, he took bread, said the blessing, broke it, and gave it to them. Then they said to each other, "Were not our hearts burning (within us) while he spoke to us on the way and opened the scriptures to us?""
messages.closing: Indeed Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!!
messages.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Walk to Emmaus) And it happened that, while he was with them at table, he took bread, said the blessing, broke it, and gave it to them. Then they said to each other, "Were not our hearts burning (within us) while he spoke to us on the way and opened the scriptures to us?"" LK(24:30-33) Indeed Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!!

messages.closing: Indeed Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!!

messages.title: Jesus Appears to the Disciples
messages.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "Thus it is written that the Messiah would suffer and rise from the dead on the third day and that repentance, for the forgiveness of sins, would be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem."
messages.closing: Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!!
messages.fullText: Octave of Easter Thursday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Appears to the Disciples ) Then Jesus said to them, "Thus it is written that the Messiah would suffer and rise from the dead on the third day and that repentance, for the forgiveness of sins, would be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem." LK(24:46-47) Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!!

messages.title: Jesus Appears to the Disciples the 3rd Time
messages.verse: Jesus said to them, "Cast the net over the right side of the boat and you will find something." So they cast it, and were not able to pull it in because of the number of fish." Jesus then stepped forward, took the bread and gave it to them, and the same with the fish.
messages.closing: Jesus Christ has risen Alleluia!!!
messages.fullText: Octave of Easter Friday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Appears to the Disciples the 3rd Time) Jesus said to them, "Cast the net over the right side of the boat and you will find something." So they cast it, and were not able to pull it in because of the number of fish." Jesus then stepped forward, took the bread and gave it to them, and the same with the fish. JH(21:6,13) Jesus Christ has risen Alleluia!!!

messages.title: Eternal Life
messages.verse: Jesus said, " And just as Moses lifted up the serpent in the wilderness, so must the Son of Man be lifted up, that whoever believes in him may have eternal life."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 2nd Weeknof Easter Tuesday’s Gospel Msg ( Eternal Life) Jesus said, " And just as Moses lifted up the serpent in the wilderness, so must the Son of Man be lifted up, that whoever believes in him may have eternal life." JH(3:14-15) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Love of God- Eternal Life
messages.verse: " For God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life.”
messages.closing: Jesus died for our sins.
messages.fullText: 2nd Week of Easter Wednesday's Gospel Msg  ( Love of God- Eternal Life ) " For God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life.” JH(3:16) Jesus died for our sins.

messages.title: Father's Love for Son
messages.verse: Jesus said, " The Father loves the Son and has placed all things in his hands. Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life; whoever disobeys the Son will not see life, but must endure God's wrath."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 2nd Week of Easter Thursday’s Gospel Msg ( Father's Love for Son) Jesus said, " The Father loves the Son and has placed all things in his hands. Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life; whoever disobeys the Son will not see life, but must endure God's wrath." JH(3:35-36) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Feeding the Five Thousand
messages.verse: Then Jesus took the loaves, and when he had given thanks, he distributed them to those who were seated; so also the fish,  as much as they wanted.
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
messages.fullText: 2nd Week of Easter Friday’s Gospel Msg ( Feeding the Five Thousand ) Then Jesus took the loaves, and when he had given thanks, he distributed them to those who were seated; so also the fish,  as much as they wanted. JH(6:11) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

messages.title: Jesus Walks on Water
messages.verse: When they had rowed about three or four miles, they saw Jesus walking on the sea and coming near the boat, and they began to be afraid. But he said to them, "It is I. Do not be afraid."
messages.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

But he said to them, "It is I. Do not be afraid." JH(6:19-20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-12.title: Sign of Jonah
03-12.verse: Jesus said, " For just as Jonah became a sign of the people of Nin-e-veh, so the Son of Man will be to this generation."
03-12.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
03-12.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Sign of Jonah ) Jesus said, " For just as Jonah became a sign of the people of Nin-e-veh, so the Son of Man will be to this generation." LK(11:30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-12.title: Prayer of Repentance
03-12.verse: Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted."
03-12.closing: Jesus give us the wisdom and strength to be humble!
03-12.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (  Prayer of Repentance) Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted." LK(18:13-14) Jesus give us the wisdom and strength to be humble!

03-12.title: Transfiguration
03-12.verse: While Peter was still speaking, suddenly a bright cloud came and overshadowed them, and they were terrified as they entered the cloud. Then from the cloud came a voice that said, " This is my Son, my Chosen; listen to him!"
03-12.closing: Lord give us your spirit to listen to your voice.

Then from the cloud came a voice that said, " This is my Son, my Chosen; listen to him!" LK(9:34-35) Lord give us your spirit to listen to your voice.

03-12.title: The Authority of the Son
03-12.verse: Today's Gospel Msg (The Authority of the Son) Jesus said, "Very truly, I tell you, anyone who hears my word and believes him who sent me has eternal life, and does not come under judgment, but has passed from death to life." JH (5:24) Lord help us to listen to the Father.
03-12.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (The Authority of the Son) Jesus said, "Very truly, I tell you, anyone who hears my word and believes him who sent me has eternal life, and does not come under judgment, but has passed from death to life." JH (5:24) Lord help us to listen to the Father.

03-12.title: The Greatest Commandment
03-12.verse: The scribe said to Jesus, "Well said, teacher. You are right in saying, 'He is One and there is no other than he.' And 'to love him with all your heart, with all your understanding, with all your strength, and to love your neighbor as yourself' is worth more than all burnt offerings and sacrifices."
03-12.closing: Lord, help us love and forgive those who hurt us.
03-12.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Greatest Commandment) The scribe said to Jesus, "Well said, teacher. You are right in saying, 'He is One and there is no other than he.' And 'to love him with all your heart, with all your understanding, with all your strength, and to love your neighbor as yourself' is worth more than all burnt offerings and sacrifices." MK(12:32-33) Lord, help us love and forgive those who hurt us.

03-13.title: Ask and You will Receive and Follow the Golden Rule
03-13.verse: Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him. Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets."
03-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
03-13.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Ask and You will Receive and Follow the Golden Rule ) Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him. Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets." MT(7:11-12) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-13.title: Parable of the Prodigal Son
03-13.verse: Father said to him, "My son, you are here with me always; everything I have is yours. But now we must celebrate and rejoice, because your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found. "
03-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

But now we must celebrate and rejoice, because your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found. " LK(15:31-32) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-13.title: Eternal Life
03-13.verse: " For God so loved the world that he gave his only Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life."
03-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
03-13.fullText: 4th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Eternal Life ) " For God so loved the world that he gave his only Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life." JH(3:16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-13.title: Judging Others
03-13.verse: Jesus said, " Give, and  it will be  given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over, will be put into your lap; for the measure you give will be the measure you get back."
03-13.closing: Lord give us a generous heart.
03-13.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Judging Others) Jesus said, " Give, and  it will be  given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over, will be put into your lap; for the measure you give will be the measure you get back." LK(6:38) Lord give us a generous heart.

03-13.title: Jesus Testifies
03-13.verse: Jesus said, " But I have testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father gave me to accomplish, these works that I perform testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me."
03-13.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Testifies) Jesus said, " But I have testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father gave me to accomplish, these works that I perform testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me." JH(5:36) Lord, help us become witnesses!

03-13.title: Concerning Anger
03-13.verse: Jesus said, " Leave your gifts there before the altar and go; first be reconciled to your brother or sister, and then come back and offer your gift."
03-13.closing: Lord, give us patience and strength to forgive!
03-13.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Concerning Anger) Jesus said, " Leave your gifts there before the altar and go; first be reconciled to your brother or sister, and then come back and offer your gift." MT(5:24) Lord, give us patience and strength to forgive!

I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted."
03-13.closing: Lord we pray, help us become humble!

LK(18:13-14) Lord we pray, help us become humble!

03-14.title: In order to Enter Kingdom of Heavens
03-14.verse: Jesus said, " leave your offering there before the altar, go and be reconciled with your brother first, and then come back and present your offering."
03-14.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
03-14.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( In order to Enter Kingdom of Heavens ) Jesus said, " leave your offering there before the altar, go and be reconciled with your brother first, and then come back and present your offering." MT(5:24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-14.title: Living Water
03-14.verse: Jesus said to her, " Everyone who drinks of this water will be thirsty again, but those who drink of the water that I will give them will never be thirsty. The water that I will give them will become in them a spring of water gushing up to eternal life. "
03-14.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

The water that I will give them will become in them a spring of water gushing up to eternal life. " JH(4:13-14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-14.title: Jesus Heals the Officer's Son
03-14.verse: The royal official said to him, "Sir, come down before my child dies." Jesus said to him, "You may go; your son will live." The man believed what Jesus said to him and left."
03-14.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
03-14.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals the Officer's Son) The royal official said to him, "Sir, come down before my child dies." Jesus said to him, "You may go; your son will live." The man believed what Jesus said to him and left." JH(4:49-50) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-14.title: Fulfill The Commandments
03-14.verse: Jesus said, "Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven."
03-14.closing: Lord help us discern your will.

But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven." MT(5:19) Lord help us discern your will.

03-16.title: Transfiguration
03-16.verse: Then from the cloud came a voice that said, " This is my Son, my Chosen, listen to him!"
03-16.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-16.title: Forgive and you will be Forgiven
03-16.verse: Jesus said, "Then in anger his master handed him over to the torturers until he should pay back the whole debt. So will my heavenly Father do to you, unless each of you forgives your brother and sister from your heart."
03-16.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-16.title: Jesus and the Father
03-16.verse: Jesus said, "I say to you, whoever hears my word and believes in the one who sent me has eternal life and will not come under condemnation, but will pass from death to life."
03-16.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-16.title: Geatest Commandment
03-16.verse: The scribe said to Jesus, "Well said, teacher. You are right in saying, 'He is One and there is no other than he.' And 'to love him with all your heart, with all your understanding, with all your strength, and to love your neighbor as yourself' is worth more than all burnt offerings and sacrifices."
03-16.closing: Lord increase our love for you and our neighbors.

MK(12:32-33) Lord increase our love for you and our neighbors.

03-16.title: Eternal Life
03-16.verse: Jesus said, "Amen, amen, I say to you, unless a grain of wheat falls to the ground and dies, it remains just a grain of wheat; but if it dies, it produces much fruit. Whoever loves his life loses it, and whoever hates his life in this world will preserve it for eternal life."
03-16.closing: Lord, forgive us as we repent.

Whoever loves his life loses it, and whoever hates his life in this world will preserve it for eternal life." JH(12:24-25) Lord, forgive us as we repent.

03-16.verse: Jesus said, " Give, and  it will be  given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over, will be put into your lap; for the measure you give will be the measure you get back."

03-16.title: Jesus Heals Sick Man
03-16.verse: Jesus said to him, "Rise, take up your mat, and walk." Immediately the man became well, took up his mat, and walked. Now that day was a sabbath."
03-16.closing: Lord Jesus, we pray for your healing.
03-16.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals Sick Man) Jesus said to him, "Rise, take up your mat, and walk." Immediately the man became well, took up his mat, and walked. Now that day was a sabbath." JH(5:8-9) Lord Jesus, we pray for your healing.

03-18.title: Angel Appeared in a Dream
03-18.verse: Feast day of St.Joseph (Angel Appeared in a Dream) Angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, " Joseph son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary as your wife, for the child conceived in her is from the Holy Spirit. She will bear a son, and you are to name him Jesus, for he will save his people from their sins."
03-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-23.verse: Palm Sunday Gospel Msg (Jesus is annointed at Bethany ) Jesus said, "Let her alone. Why do you make trouble for her? She has done a good thing for me. The poor you will always have with you, and whenever you wish you can do good to them, but you will not always have me. She has done what she could. She has anticipated anointing my body for burial. Amen, I say to you, wherever the gospel is proclaimed to the whole world, what she has done will be told in memory of her." MK (14:6-9) Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a cross.

03-25.closing: Lord,  we pray for courage to be your witnesses.

03-25.closing: Lord, give us the strength to obey your teachings.

05-02.title: Way to the Father
05-02.verse: Jesus said, "Jesus said: I am the Way; the Truth and the Life. No one can come to the Father except through me."
05-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-02.verse: Jesus said, " The thief comes only to steal and kill and destroy. I came that they may have life, and have it abundantly."
05-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-02.title: Jesus the Way to the Father
05-02.verse: Jesus said, " I am the Way; the Truth and the Life. No one can come to the Father except through me. Very truly, I tell you, the one who believes in me will also do the works that I do and, in fact, will do greater works than these because I am going to the Father."
05-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH(14:6,12) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-04.title: Jesus and Peter
05-04.verse: Then he said to him a third time, " 'Simon son of John, do you love me?' Peter was hurt that he asked him a third time, 'Do you love me?' and said, 'Lord, you know everything; you know I love you.' Jesus said to him, 'Feed my sheep.' "
05-04.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

" JH(21:17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-04.title: Jesus Calls Us Friends
05-04.verse: Jesus said, " I do not call you servants any longer, because the servant does not know what the master is doing; but I have called you friends, because I have made know to you everything that I have heard from my Father."
05-04.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH(15:15) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-04.title: Everlasting Food
05-04.verse: Jesus said, "Do not work for food that perishes but for the food that endures for eternal life, which the Son of Man will give you. For on him the Father, God, has set his seal."
05-04.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-06.title: Bread of Life
05-06.verse: Jesus said to them, "I am the bread of life; whoever comes to me will never hunger, and whoever believes in me will never thirst."
05-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-06.title: Jesus the Way to the Father

05-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-06.title: Eternal Life
05-06.verse: Jesus said to them, " This is indeed the will of my Father, that all who see the Son and believe in him may have eternal life; and I will raise them up on the last day. "
05-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-06.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Eternal Life ) Jesus said to them, " This is indeed the will of my Father, that all who see the Son and believe in him may have eternal life; and I will raise them up on the last day. " JH(6:40) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-08.title: Jesus the Bread of Life
05-08.verse: Jesus said to them, " I am the living bread that came down from heaven; whoever eats this bread will live forever; and the bread that I will give is my flesh for the life of the world."
05-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-08.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus the Bread of Life ) Jesus said to them, " I am the living bread that came down from heaven; whoever eats this bread will live forever; and the bread that I will give is my flesh for the life of the world." JH(6:51) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-08.title: Father and the Son
05-08.verse: Jesus said, " And whatever you ask in my name, I will do, so that the Father may be glorified in the Son. If in my name you ask me for anything, I will do it."
05-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-08.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Father and the Son) Jesus said, " And whatever you ask in my name, I will do, so that the Father may be glorified in the Son. If in my name you ask me for anything, I will do it." JH(14:13-14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-08.title: Love of Jesus
05-08.verse: Jesus said to them, " No one has greater love than this, to lay down one's life for one's friends. You are my friends if you do what I command you."
05-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-08.title: Jesus the True Food and Drink
05-08.verse: Jesus said, " Those who eat my flesh and drink my blood have eternal life, and I will raise them up on the last day; for my flesh is true food and my blood is true drink."
05-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-09.title: Jesus is Rejected by the Jews
05-09.verse: Jesus answered, " I have told you, and you do not believe. The works that I do in my Father's name testify to me, but you do not believe, because you do not belong to my sheep."
05-09.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-09.title: The Words of Eternal Life
05-09.verse: Simon Peter answered him, " Lord, to whom can we go? You have the words of eternal life. We have come to believe and know that you are the Holy One of God."
05-09.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-10.title: Simon Peter and Jesus
05-10.verse: Simon Peter answered him, "Master, to whom shall we go? You have the words of eternal life. We have come to believe and are convinced that you are the Holy One of God."
05-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-10.verse: Jesus answered and said to him, "Whoever loves me will keep my word, and my Father will love him, and we will come to him and make our dwelling with him."
05-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. 05-10.title: Jesus The Good Shepherd
05-10.verse: Jesus said, " My sheep hear my voice. I know them, and they follow me. I give them eternal life, and they will never perish."
05-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-13.verse: Jesus said, " I no longer call you slaves, because a slave does not know what his master is doing. I have called you friends, because I have told you everything I have heard from my Father.."
05-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-13.verse: Jesus said to them, " This is my commandment, that you love one another as I have loved you."
05-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-16.title: Promise of the Holy Spirit
05-16.verse: Jesus said, " If you love me, you will keep my commandments. And I will ask the Father, and he will give you another Advocate to be with you forever."
05-16.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-18.title: New Commandment
05-18.verse: Jesus said, " I give you a new commandment: love one another. As I have loved you, so you also should love one another."
05-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-18.title: The Works of the Spirit
05-18.verse: Jesus said to them, " And when he comes, he will prove that the world wrong about sin and righteousness and judgement."
05-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-18.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Works of the Spirit) Jesus said to them, " And when he comes, he will prove that the world wrong about sin and righteousness and judgement." JH(16:8) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-18.title: Jesus Breaths the Holy Spirit On the Disciples
05-18.verse: Jesus said to them again, "Peace be with you. As the Father has sent me, even so I send you." And when he had said this, he breathed on them, and said to them, "Receive the Holy Spirit. If you forgive the sins of any, they are forgiven; if you retain the sins of any, they are retained."
05-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

As the Father has sent me, even so I send you." And when he had said this, he breathed on them, and said to them, "Receive the Holy Spirit. If you forgive the sins of any, they are forgiven; if you retain the sins of any, they are retained." JH(20:21-23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-18.title: Words of Jesus
05-18.verse: Jesus answered and said to him, "Whoever loves me will keep my word, and my Father will love him, and we will come to him and make our dwelling with him."
05-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-18.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Words of Jesus) Jesus answered and said to him, "Whoever loves me will keep my word, and my Father will love him, and we will come to him and make our dwelling with him." JH(14:23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-18.title: Peace of Jesus Christ
05-18.verse: Jesus said to them, " Peace I leave with you; my peace I give to you. I do not give to you as the world gives. Do not let your hearts be troubled, and do not let them be afraid."
05-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-22.title: Remain in Jesus
05-22.verse: Jesus said to them, " If you keep my commandments you will remain in my love, just as I have kept my Father's commandments and remain in his love."
05-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-22.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Remain in Jesus) Jesus said to them, " If you keep my commandments you will remain in my love, just as I have kept my Father's commandments and remain in his love." JH(15:10) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-22.title: Jesus Prays for the Disciples
05-22.verse: Jesus prayed, " And this is eternal life, that they may know you, the only true God, and Jesus Christ  whom you have sent. I glorified you on earth by accomplishing the work that you gave me to do."
05-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-22.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Prays for the Disciples) Jesus prayed, " And this is eternal life, that they may know you, the only true God, and Jesus Christ  whom you have sent. I glorified you on earth by accomplishing the work that you gave me to do." JH(17:3-4) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-22.title: Reward for Serving Jesus
05-22.verse: Jesus said, " For truly I tell you, whoever gives  you a cup of water to drink because you bear the name of Chris will by no means lose the reward. Salt is good, but if the salt has lost its saltiness,  how will you make it salty again? Have salt in yourselves, and be at peace with one another."
05-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-22.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Reward for Serving Jesus) Jesus said, " For truly I tell you, whoever gives  you a cup of water to drink because you bear the name of Chris will by no means lose the reward. Salt is good, but if the salt has lost its saltiness,  how will you make it salty again? Have salt in yourselves, and be at peace with one another." MK(9:41,50) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-22.title: Jesus Calls Us Friends
05-22.verse: Jesus said, " I do not call you servants any longer, because the servant does not know what the master is doing; but I have called you friends, because I have made know to you everything that I have heard from my Father."
05-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH(15:15) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-28.title: Spirit of Truth
05-28.verse: Jesus said to them, " However, when the Spirit of truth comes he will lead you to the complete truth, since he will not be speaking of his own accord, but will say only what he has been told; and he will reveal to you the things to come."
05-28.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH(16:13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-28.title: Blessed Virgin Mary Mother Of the Church
05-28.verse: Jesus said, " Seeing his mother and the disciple he loved standing near her, Jesus said to his mother, ‘Woman, this is your son.’ Then to the disciple he said, ‘This is your mother.’ And from that moment the disciple made a place for her in his home."
05-28.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-28.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Blessed Virgin Mary Mother Of the Church) Jesus said, " Seeing his mother and the disciple he loved standing near her, Jesus said to his mother, ‘Woman, this is your son.’ Then to the disciple he said, ‘This is your mother.’ And from that moment the disciple made a place for her in his home." JH(19:26-27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-28.title: Rewards
05-28.verse: Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, there is no one who has left house or brothers or sisters or mother or father or children or fields, for my sake and for the sake of the good news, who will not receive a hundredfold now in this age."
05-28.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MK(10:29-30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-28.title: Sorrow will Turn into Joy
05-28.verse: Jesus said, " Very truly, I tell you, you will weep and mourn, but the world will rejoice; you will have pain, but your pain will turn into joy."
05-28.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-28.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Sorrow will Turn into Joy) Jesus said, " Very truly, I tell you, you will weep and mourn, but the world will rejoice; you will have pain, but your pain will turn into joy." JH(16:20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-29.title: Ascension of the Lord
05-29.verse: Jesus then took them out as far as the outskirts of Bethany, and raising his hands he blessed them. Now as he blessed them, he withdrew from them and was carried up to heaven.
05-29.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Now as he blessed them, he withdrew from them and was carried up to heaven. JH(16:50-51) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-29.title: Sorrow will Turn into Joy
05-29.verse: Jesus said, " On that day you will ask nothing of me. Very truly, I tell you, if you ask anything of the Father in my name, he will give it to you."
05-29.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-29.title: Peace for the Disciples
05-29.verse: Jesus said, " On that day you will ask in my name. I do not say to you that I will ask the Father on your behalf; for the Father himself loves you, because you have loved me and have believed that I came from God."
05-29.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

I do not say to you that I will ask the Father on your behalf; for the Father himself loves you, because you have loved me and have believed that I came from God." JH(16:26-27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-31.title: Jesus and Father are One
05-31.verse: Jesus said to them, "Until now you have not asked anything in my name. Ask and you will receive, and so your joy will be complete."
05-31.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-31.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and Father are One) Jesus said to them, "Until now you have not asked anything in my name. Ask and you will receive, and so your joy will be complete." JH(16:24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-31.title: Question about Paying Taxes
05-31.verse: Jesus said to them, " Give to the emperor the things that are the emperor's and to God the things  that are God's." And they were utterly amazed at him.
05-31.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-31.title: Healing of Blind Bartimaeus
05-31.verse: Jesus said to him, " Go; your faith has made you well." Immediately he regained his sight and followed him on the way.
05-31.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-31.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Healing of Blind Bartimaeus) Jesus said to him, " Go; your faith has made you well." Immediately he regained his sight and followed him on the way. MK(10:52) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-31.title: Holy Body and Blood of Christ
05-31.verse: Solemnity of Most (Holy Body and Blood of Christ) Jesus said to them, "This is my blood of the covenant, which will be shed for many. Amen, I say to you, I shall not drink again the fruit of the vine until the day when I drink it new in the kingdom of God."
05-31.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-31.title: Ascension of the Lord
05-31.verse: Jesus then took them out as far as the outskirts of Bethany, and raising his hands he blessed them. Now as he blessed them, he withdrew from them and was carried up to heaven.
05-31.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-18.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
06-18.verse: Jesus said, " But when you pray, go to your private room, shut yourself in, and so pray to your Father who is in that secret place, and your Father who sees all that is done in secret will reward you."
06-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-18.liturgicalLabel: Solemnity Feast of Sacred Heart of Jesus
06-18.labelKey: solemnity feast of sacred heart of jesus
06-18.title: Jesus Thanks His Father
06-18.verse: Jesus said, " Come to me, all you that are weary and are carrying heavy burden, and I will give you rest. Take my yoke upon you, and learn from me; for I am gentle and humble in heart, and you will find rest for your souls. For my yoke is easy, and my burden is light."
06-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Take my yoke upon you, and learn from me; for I am gentle and humble in heart, and you will find rest for your souls. For my yoke is easy, and my burden is light." MT(11:28-30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-18.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
06-18.verse: Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."
06-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

"But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."  MT(6:3,6,17-18) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-18.title: Jesus Teaches to Pray The Our Father
06-18.verse: Jesus said, " Pray then in this way: Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name. Your kingdom come. Your will be done, on earth as it is in heaven. Give us this day our daily bread. And forgive us our debts, as we also have forgiven our debtors. And do not bring us to the time of trail, but rescue us from the evil one. "
06-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-19.labelKey: memorial of immaculate heart of blessed virgin mary

06-19.verse: Jesus said to them, " Why were you searching for me? Did you not know that I must be in my Father's house?" Then he went down with them and came to Nazareth, and Was obedient to them. His mother treasured all these things in her heart.
06-19.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-19.title: The Narrow Gate
06-19.verse: Jesus said, " For the gate is narrow and the road is hard that leads to life, and there are few who find it."
06-19.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-19.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Narrow Gate ) Jesus said, " For the gate is narrow and the road is hard that leads to life, and there are few who find it." MT(7:14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-19.title: The Sound Eye
06-19.verse: Jesus said, " The eye is the lamp of the body. So, if your eye is healthy, your whole body will be full of light, but if your eye is unhealthy, your whole body will be full of darkness."
06-19.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-22.title: Feeding Five Thousand
06-22.verse: Jesus then took the five loaves and the two fish, raised his eyes to heaven, and said the blessingover them; then he broke them and handed them to his disciples to distribute among the crowd."
06-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(9:16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-22.title: Golden Rule
06-22.verse: Jesus said, " In everything do to others as you would have them do to you, for this is the law and the prophets.
06-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-22.title: Eternal Life
06-22.verse: Jesus said, "Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life, but whoever disobeys the Son will not see life, but the wrath of God remains upon him."

06-22.title: Jesus Calmed the Sea
06-22.verse: They woke him and said to him, "Teacher, do you not care that we are perishing?" He woke up, rebuked the wind, and said to the sea, "Quiet! Be still!" The wind ceased and there was a great calm. Then he asked them, "Why are you terrified? Do you not yet have faith?"
06-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MK(4:39-40) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-22.title: Judging Others
06-22.verse: Jesus said, " Do not judge, and you will not be judged,  Why do you see the speck that is in your brother's eye, but do not notice the log that is in your own eye?"
06-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-23.title: The Birth of John the Baptist
06-23.verse: " Then they began motioning to his father to find out what name he wanted to give him. He asked for a writing tablet and wrote, " His name is John." And all of them were amazed.
06-23.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-27.title: Parable of the Lost Sheep
06-27.verse: Jesus said, "I tell you, in just the same way there will be more joy in heaven over one sinner who repents than over ninety-nine righteous people who have no need of repentance."
06-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-27.title: Reward
06-27.verse: Jesus said, " Whoever finds his life will lose it, and whoever loses his life for my sake will find it. Whoever receives you receives me, and whoever receives me receives the one who sent me."
06-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-27.title: Jesus Cleanses  a  Lepers
06-27.verse: And behold, a leper came to him and knelt before him, saying, "Lord, if you wish, you can make me clean." And he stretched out his hand and touched him, saying, "I wish; be clean." And immediately his leprosy was cleansed. "
06-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-29.title: Cost of Discipleship
06-29.verse: Jesus said, "Foxes have holes and the birds of the air have nests, but the Son of man has nowhere to lay his head."
06-29.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-29.title: Jesus Stills the Strom
06-29.verse: Jesus said to them, "Why are you terrified, you of little faith?" Then he got up, rebuked the winds and the sea, and there was great calm."
06-29.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-29.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus Stills the Strom ) Jesus said to them, "Why are you terrified, you of little faith?" Then he got up, rebuked the winds and the sea, and there was great calm." MT(8:26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-29.title: Jesus Restored A Little Girl to life
06-29.verse: He took her by the hand and said to her, " Tal' i-tha cum." Which means, "Little girl, get up!" And immediately the girl got up and began to walk about (She was twelve years of age). At this they were overcome with amazement.
06-29.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-29.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-06.title: The Harvest is Great
07-06.verse: Jesus then said to his disciples, " The harvest is plentiful, but the labourers are few; therefore ask the Lord of the harvest to send out laborers into the harvest."
07-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-06.title: Jesus is Rejected at Nazareth
07-06.verse: Then Jesus said to them, " Prophets are not without honor, except in their hometown, and among their own relatives, and in their own house." And he was amazed at their unbelief.
07-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-06.title: A Woman Healed
07-06.verse: Jesus turned, and seeing her he said, " Take heart, daughter; your faith has made you well. " And instantly the woman was made well.
07-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-12.title: Not to have Fear
07-12.verse: Jesus said, " And even the hairs of your head are all counted. So do not be afraid, you are of more value than many sparrows."
07-12.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-12.title: The Parable of the Good Samaritan
07-12.verse: Jesus said, " But a Samaritan while travelling came near him; and when he saw him, he was moved with pity. He went to him and bandaged his wounds, having poured oil and wine on them. Then he put him on his own animal, brought him to an inn, and took care of him."
07-12.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-13.title: Disciples  Proclaimed it's Time to Repent
07-13.verse: Jesus summoned the Twelve and began to send them out two by two and gave them authority over unclean spirits. He instructed them to take nothing for the journey but a walking stick--no food, no sack, no money in their belts.
07-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
