07-13.title: Rewards
07-13.verse: Jesus said, " Whoever welcomes you welcomes me, and whoever welcomes me welcomes the one who sent me. "
07-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-15.title: Woes to Unrepentant Cities
07-15.verse: Jesus said, " But I tell you that on the day of judgement it will be more tolerable for the land of Sodom than for you."
07-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-15.title: The Parable of the Sower
07-15.verse: 15th Ordinary Sunday Gospel ( The Parable of the Sower) Jesus said, " But as for what was sown on good soil, this is the one who hears the words and understand it, who indeed bears fruit and yields, in one case a hundredfold, in another sixty, and in another thirty."
07-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-15.title: Jesus Thanks His Father
07-15.verse: Jesus said, " All things have been handed over to me by my Father, and no one knows the Son except the Father, and no one knows the  Father except the Son and anyone to whom the Son chooses to reveal him."
07-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-15.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus Thanks His Father) Jesus said, " All things have been handed over to me by my Father, and no one knows the Son except the Father, and no one knows the  Father except the Son and anyone to whom the Son chooses to reveal him." MT(11:27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-16.title: Jesus Thanks His Father
07-16.verse: Jesus said, " All things have been handed over to me by my Father, and no one knows the Son except the Father, and no one knows the  Father except the Son and anyone to whom the Son chooses to reveal him."
07-16.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MT(10:27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-20.title: Jesus Visits Martha and Mary
07-20.verse: Jesus said to her in reply, "Martha, Martha, you are anxious and worried about many things. There is need of only one thing. Mary has chosen the better part and it will not be taken from her."
07-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-20.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg(  Jesus Visits Martha and Mary) Jesus said to her in reply, "Martha, Martha, you are anxious and worried about many things. There is need of only one thing. Mary has chosen the better part and it will not be taken from her." LK(10:41-42) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-20.title: Parable of the Sower
07-20.verse: Jesus said, " But some seed fell on rich soil, and produced fruit, a hundred or sixty or thirtyfold. Whoever has ears ought to hear."
07-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-20.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg( Parable of the Sower) Jesus said, " But some seed fell on rich soil, and produced fruit, a hundred or sixty or thirtyfold. Whoever has ears ought to hear." MT(13:8-9) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-20.title: Parable of the Weeds among the Wheat
07-20.verse: Jesus  said, " Let both of them grow together until the harvest, and at harvest time this time I will tell the reapers collective weeds first and bind them in bundles to be burned, but gather the wheat into my barns."
07-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-20.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Weeds among the Wheat) Jesus  said, " Let both of them grow together until the harvest, and at harvest time this time I will tell the reapers collective weeds first and bind them in bundles to be burned, but gather the wheat into my barns." MT(13:30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-20.title: Purpose of the Parable
07-20.verse: Jesus said, " To you it has been given to know the secrets of the kingdom of heaven, but to them it has not been given. Truly I tell you, many prophets and righteous people longed to see what you see, but did not see it, and to hear what you hear, but did not hear it."
07-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-20.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Purpose of the Parable) Jesus said, " To you it has been given to know the secrets of the kingdom of heaven, but to them it has not been given. Truly I tell you, many prophets and righteous people longed to see what you see, but did not see it, and to hear what you hear, but did not hear it." MT(13:11,17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-20.title: Sign of Jonah
07-20.verse: Jesus said, "Just as Jonah was in the belly of the whale three days and three nights, so will the Son of Man be in the heart of the earth three days and three nights."
07-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-20.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Sign of Jonah) Jesus said, "Just as Jonah was in the belly of the whale three days and three nights, so will the Son of Man be in the heart of the earth three days and three nights." MT(12:40) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-21.title: Mary of Magdala visits Tomb of Jesus
07-21.verse: Today's Gospel Msg( Mary of Magdala visits Tomb of Jesus) Jesus said to her, "Mary!" She turned and said to him in Hebrew, "Rabbouni," which means Teacher. Jesus said to her, "Stop holding on to me, for I have not yet ascended to the Father. But go to my brothers and tell them, 'I am going to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God.'" Jh(20:16-17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Jh(20:16-17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-21.title: True Family of Jesus
07-21.verse: Jesus pointing to his disciples, he said, " Here are my mother and my brothers! For whoever does the will of my Father in heaven is my brother and sister and mother."
07-21.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-27.title: Teaches How to Pray
07-27.verse: Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will the Father in heaven give the Holy Spirit to those who ask him?"
07-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-27.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg( Teaches How to Pray ) Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will the Father in heaven give the Holy Spirit to those who ask him?" LK(11:13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-27.title: Jesus Explain the Parable of the Weeds
07-27.verse: The Son of Man will send his angels, and they will collect out of his kingdom all causes of sin and all evildoers, and they will throw them into the furnace of fire, where there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
07-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-27.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Explain the Parable of the Weeds) The Son of Man will send his angels, and they will collect out of his kingdom all causes of sin and all evildoers, and they will throw them into the furnace of fire, where there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth. MT(13:41-42) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-27.title: Jesus Explain the Parable of the Weeds
07-27.verse: The Son of Man will send his angels, and they will collect out of his kingdom all who cause others to sin and all evildoers. They will throw them into the  fiery furnace, where there will be wailing and grinding of teeth. Then the righteous will shine like the sun in the kingdom of their Father. Whoever has ears ought to hear
07-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

They will throw them into the  fiery furnace, where there will be wailing and grinding of teeth. Then the righteous will shine like the sun in the kingdom of their Father. Whoever has ears ought to hearMT(13:41-42) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-27.title: Kingdom of Heaven
07-27.verse: Jesus said, " The kingdom of heaven is like treasure hidden in a field, which someone found and hid; then in his joy he goes and sells all that he has and buys that field."
07-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-27.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Kingdom of Heaven ) Jesus said, " The kingdom of heaven is like treasure hidden in a field, which someone found and hid; then in his joy he goes and sells all that he has and buys that field."  MT(13:44) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-27.title: Kingdom of God
07-27.verse: Jesus said to the disciples, “The Kingdom of heaven is like a treasure buried in a field, which a person finds and hides again, and out of joy goes and sells all that he has and buys that field."
07-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.l

MT(13:44-45) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.l

07-27.title: The Parable of the Mustard Seed
07-27.verse: Jesus said, " It is the smallest of all the seeds, but when it has grown it is the greatest of shrubs and becomes a tree, so that the birds of the air comes and make nests in its branches."
07-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-27.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (The Parable of the Mustard Seed) Jesus said, " It is the smallest of all the seeds, but when it has grown it is the greatest of shrubs and becomes a tree, so that the birds of the air comes and make nests in its branches." MT(13:32) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-28.title: Jesus and Martha
07-28.verse: Jesus said to her, "I am the resurrection and the life; whoever believes in me, even if he dies, will live, and everyone who lives and believes in me will never die. Do you believe this?"
07-28.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Do you believe this?" JH(11:25-26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-31.title: Kingdom of Heaven
07-31.verse: Jesus said to the disciples, “The Kingdom of heaven is like a net thrown into the sea, which collects fish of every kind. When it is full they haul it ashore and sit down to put what is good into buckets. What is bad they throw away."
07-31.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.l

When it is full they haul it ashore and sit down to put what is good into buckets. What is bad they throw away."  MT(13:47-48) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.l

07-31.title: Bread of Life
07-31.verse: Jesus said to them, "I am the bread of life; whoever comes to me will never be hunger, and whoever believes in me will never be thirst."
07-31.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-31.fullText: 18th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Bread of Life ) Jesus said to them, "I am the bread of life; whoever comes to me will never be hunger, and whoever believes in me will never be thirst." JH(6:35) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-31.title: Treasures New and Old
07-31.verse: Jesus said, " Therefore every scribe that is trained for the kingdom of heaven is like the master of the household who brings out of his treasure what is new and what is old."
07-31.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-31.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Treasures New and Old) Jesus said, " Therefore every scribe that is trained for the kingdom of heaven is like the master of the household who brings out of his treasure what is new and what is old." MT(13:52) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-01.title: Rejectionof Jesus
08-01.verse: And they took offense at him. But Jesus said to them, "A prophet is not without honor except in his native place and in his own house."
08-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-01.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (  Rejectionof Jesus) And they took offense at him. But Jesus said to them, "A prophet is not without honor except in his native place and in his own house."  MT(13:57) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-01.title: Feeding Five Thousand
08-01.verse: Then Jesus ordered the crowds to sit down on the grass. Taking the five loaves and the two fish, he looked up to heaven, and blessed and broke the loaves, and gave them to the disciples, and the disciples gave them to the crowds.
08-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MT(14:19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-01.title: Things that Defile
08-01.verse: Jesus then called the crowd to him and said to them, " Listen and understand: it is not what goes into the mouth that defiles a person, but it is what comes out of the mouth that defiles."
08-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-01.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Things that Defile ) Jesus then called the crowd to him and said to them, " Listen and understand: it is not what goes into the mouth that defiles a person, but it is what comes out of the mouth that defiles." MT(15:10-11) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-01.title: Jesus and John the Baptist
08-01.verse: At that time Herod the ruler heard reports about Jesus and he said to his servants, " This is John the Baptist; he has been raised from dead, and for this reason these powers are at work in him."
08-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-01.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and John the Baptist) At that time Herod the ruler heard reports about Jesus and he said to his servants, " This is John the Baptist; he has been raised from dead, and for this reason these powers are at work in him." MT(14:1-2) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-03.title: Parable of Rich Fool
08-03.verse: But God said to him, 'You fool, this night your life will be demanded of you; and the things you have prepared, to whom will they belong?' Thus will it be for the one who stores up treasure for himself but is not rich in what matters to God."
08-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Thus will it be for the one who stores up treasure for himself but is not rich in what matters to God." LK(12:20-21) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-03.verse: Then Jesus ordered the crowds to sit down on the grass. Taking the five loaves and the two fish, he looked up to heaven, and blessed and broke the loaves, and gave them to the disciples, and the disciples gave them to the crowds.
08-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-04.title: Feeding Five Thousand
08-04.verse: "Taking the five loaves and the two fish, and looking up to heaven, he said the blessing, broke the loaves, and gave them to the disciples, who inturn gave them to the crowds."
08-04.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-04.title: Cross and Self Denial
08-04.verse: Then Jesus told his disciples, "If any man would come after me, let him deny himself and take up his cross and follow me. For whoever would save his life will lose it, and whoever loses his life for my sake will find it. "
08-04.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-05.labelKey: feast of transfiguration of the lord
08-05.title: My Beloved Son
08-05.verse: Feast of Transfiguration of the Lord ( My Beloved Son) While he was saying this, a cloud came and overshadowed them, and they were terrified as they entered the cloud. Then from the cloud came a voice that said, " This is my Son, my Chosen; listen to him!"
08-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-05.labelKey: feast of transfiguration of the lord
08-05.title: Transfiguration
08-05.verse: Feast of Transfiguration of   the Lord (Transfiguration ) While Peter was still speaking, suddenly a bright cloud overshadowed them, and from the cloud a voice said, " This is my Son, the Beloved, with him I am well pleased; listen to him."
08-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-05.liturgicalLabel: Feast of Transfiguration of   the Lord
08-05.labelKey: feast of transfiguration of the lord
08-05.title: Transfiguration
08-05.verse: Feast of Transfiguration of   the Lord (Transfiguration )Jesus took Peter, James, and John and led them up a high mountain apart by themselves. And he was transfigured before them, and his clothes became dazzling white, such as no fuller on earth could bleach them. Then a cloud came, casting a shadow over them; then from the cloud came a voice, "This is my beloved Son. Listen to him."
08-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-08.title: Followers of Jesus
08-08.verse: Jesus said, "For whoever wishes to save his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life for my sake will find it. What profit would there be for one to gain the whole world and forfeit his life? Or what can one give in exchange for his life?
08-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-08.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Followers of Jesus) Jesus said, "For whoever wishes to save his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life for my sake will find it. What profit would there be for one to gain the whole world and forfeit his life? Or what can one give in exchange for his life? MT(16:25-26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-09.title: Eternal Life
08-09.verse: Jesus said, " Very truly, I tell you, unless a grain of wheat falls into the earth and dies, it remains just a single grain, but if it dies, it bears much fruit."
08-09.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-09.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg  ( Eternal Life) Jesus said, " Very truly, I tell you, unless a grain of wheat falls into the earth and dies, it remains just a single grain, but if it dies, it bears much fruit."  JH(12:24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-09.title: Eternal Life
08-09.verse: Jesus said, "Whoever serves me must follow me, and where I am, there will my servant be also. Whoever serves me, the Father will honor.
08-09.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-09.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Eternal Life) Jesus said, "Whoever serves me must follow me, and where I am, there will my servant be also. Whoever serves me, the Father will honor. JH(12:26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-09.title: Be Watchful
08-09.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Be sure of this: if the master of the house had known the hour when the thief was coming, he would not have let his house be broken into. You also must be prepared, for at an hour you do not expect, the Son of Man will come."
08-09.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-09.fullText: 19th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Be Watchful) Jesus said to his disciples, “Be sure of this: if the master of the house had known the hour when the thief was coming, he would not have let his house be broken into. You also must be prepared, for at an hour you do not expect, the Son of Man will come." LK(12:39-40) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-10.title: Watchful Slave
08-10.verse: Jesus said, " But know this: if the master of the house had known the hour when the thief was coming, he would not have let his house be broken into. You also must be prepared, for at an hour you do not expect, the Son of Man will come."
08-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

You also must be prepared, for at an hour you do not expect, the Son of Man will come."LK(12:39-40) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-10.title: Forgiveness
08-10.verse: Jesus said, " So my heavenly Father will also do to every one of you, if you do not forgive your brother or sister from your heart."
08-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-10.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Forgiveness) Jesus said, " So my heavenly Father will also do to every one of you, if you do not forgive your brother or sister from your heart." MT(18:35)  Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-10.title: Jesus the Bread of Life
08-10.verse: Jesus said to them, " I am the living bread that came down from heaven. Whoever eats of this bread will live forever; and the bread that I will give for the life of the world is my flesh."
08-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-10.fullText: 19th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus the Bread of Life ) Jesus said to them, " I am the living bread that came down from heaven. Whoever eats of this bread will live forever; and the bread that I will give for the life of the world is my flesh." JH(6:51) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-12.title: True Greatness
08-12.verse: Jesus said , " Truly I tell you, unless you change and become like children, you will never enter the Kingdom of Heaven. Whoever becomes humble like this child is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven."
08-12.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-12.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( True Greatness) Jesus said , " Truly I tell you, unless you change and become like children, you will never enter the Kingdom of Heaven. Whoever becomes humble like this child is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven."  MT(18:3-4) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-12.title: Power of Praying Together
08-12.verse: Jesus said, " Again, truly I tell you, if two of you agree on earth about anything you ask, it will be done for you by my Father in heaven. For where two or three are gathered in my name, I am among them."
08-12.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-12.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Power of Praying Together) Jesus said, " Again, truly I tell you, if two of you agree on earth about anything you ask, it will be done for you by my Father in heaven. For where two or three are gathered in my name, I am among them." MT(18:19-20)  Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-13.title: Assurance of Jesus
08-13.verse: Jesus said, " Again, I say to you, if two of you agree on earth about anything for which they are to pray, it shall be granted to them by my heavenly Father. For where two or three are gathered together in my name, there am I in the midst of them."
08-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-13.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Assurance of Jesus) Jesus said, " Again, I say to you, if two of you agree on earth about anything for which they are to pray, it shall be granted to them by my heavenly Father. For where two or three are gathered together in my name, there am I in the midst of them." MT(18:19-20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-13.title: Jesus and the Temple Tax
08-13.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and the Temple Tax) Jesus spoke of it first, asking, "What do you think, Simon? From whom do kings ofbthe earth take toll or tribute? From their children or from others?" Peter said, " From others," Jesus said to him, " Then the children are free." MT (17: 25-26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-13.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and the Temple Tax) Jesus spoke of it first, asking, "What do you think, Simon? From whom do kings ofbthe earth take toll or tribute? From their children or from others?" Peter said, " From others," Jesus said to him, " Then the children are free." MT (17: 25-26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-13.title: Parable of the Unforgiving Servant
08-13.verse: Jesus said, " And in anger his lord handed him over to be tortured until he would pay his entire debt. So my heavenly Father will also do to every one of you, if you do not forgive your brother or sister from your heart."
08-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-13.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Unforgiving Servant) Jesus said, " And in anger his lord handed him over to be tortured until he would pay his entire debt. So my heavenly Father will also do to every one of you, if you do not forgive your brother or sister from your heart."  MT(18:34-35)  Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-17.title: Jesus the cause for Division
08-17.verse: Jesus said, " A father will be divided against his son and a son against his father, a mother against her daughter and a daughter against her mother, a mother-in-law against her daughter-in-law and a daughter-in-law against her mother-in-law."
08-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-17.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus the cause for Division) Jesus said, " A father will be divided against his son and a son against his father, a mother against her daughter and a daughter against her mother, a mother-in-law against her daughter-in-law and a daughter-in-law against her mother-in-law." LK(12:53) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-17.title: Rich Man and Kingdom of God
08-17.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, " Truly I tell you, it will be hard for a rich person to enter the kingdom of heaven. Again I tell you, it is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for someone who is rich to enter the kingdom of God."
08-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Again I tell you, it is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for someone who is rich to enter the kingdom of God." MT(19:23-24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-17.title: The Parable of the Wedding Banquet
08-17.verse: Then he said to his slaves, " The wedding is ready but those invited were not worthy. Go therefore into the main streets, and invite everyone you find to the wedding banquet.' For many are called, but few are chosen."
08-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Go therefore into the main streets, and invite everyone you find to the wedding banquet.' For many are called, but few are chosen." MT(22:8-9,14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-17.title: Jesus the True Food and Drink
08-17.verse: Jesus said, " Those who eat my flesh and drink my blood have eternal life, and I will raise them up on the last day; for my flesh is true food and my blood is true drink."
08-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!!
08-17.fullText: 20th Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus the True Food and Drink ) Jesus said, " Those who eat my flesh and drink my blood have eternal life, and I will raise them up on the last day; for my flesh is true food and my blood is true drink." JH(6:54-55) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!!

08-17.title: Rich Young Man
08-17.verse: Today's Gospel Msg (Rich Young Man) Jesus said to him, " If you wish to be perfect, go, sell your possessions, and give the money to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; then you come follow me. " MT (19:21) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-18.verse: Jesus said to him, " If you wish to be perfect, go, sell your possessions, and give the money to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; then come, follow me."
08-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-22.title: Greatest Commandment
08-22.verse: Jesus said, " You shall love the Lord, your God, with all your heart, with all your soul, and with all your mind. This is the greatest and the first commandment. The second is like it: You shall love your neighbor as yourself."
08-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

This is the greatest and the first commandment. The second is like it: You shall love your neighbor as yourself." MT(22:37-39) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-22.title: Peter's Declaration
08-22.verse: Simon Peter said in reply, "You are the Messiah, the Son of the living God." Jesus said to him, " Blessed are you, Simon son of Jonah. For flesh and blood has not revealed this to you, but my heavenly Father."
08-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-22.fullText: 21st Sunday Gospel Msg ( Peter's Declaration) Simon Peter said in reply, "You are the Messiah, the Son of the living God." Jesus said to him, " Blessed are you, Simon son of Jonah. For flesh and blood has not revealed this to you, but my heavenly Father."  MT(16:16-17)  Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-22.title: Denounces Scribes and Pharisees
08-22.verse: Jesus said, " The greatest among you will be your servant. All who exalt themselves will be humbled, and all who humble themselves will be exalted."
08-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-22.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Denounces Scribes and Pharisees) Jesus said, " The greatest among you will be your servant. All who exalt themselves will be humbled, and all who humble themselves will be exalted." MT(23:11-12)  Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-23.title: Jesus Calls Philip and Nathanael
08-23.verse: Jesus said to Nathanael, " Very truly, I tell you, you will see heaven opened and the angles of God ascending and descending upon the Son of Man."
08-23.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-23.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-23.title: Narrow Door
08-23.verse: Jesus said to them, "Strive to enter through the narrow door; for many, I tell you, will try to enter and will not be able. Indeed, some are last who will be first, and some are first who will be last."
08-23.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Indeed, some are last who will be first, and some are first who will be last." LK(13:24,30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-24.title: Narrow Gate
08-24.verse: Jesus said, " Try your hardest to enter by the narrow door, because, I tell you, many will try to enter and willnot succeed."
08-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-24.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Narrow Gate) Jesus said, " Try your hardest to enter by the narrow door, because, I tell you, many will try to enter and willnot succeed." LK(1:24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-24.title: The Words of Eternal Life
08-24.verse: Simon Peter answered him, " Lord, to whom can we go? You have the words of eternal life. We have come to believe and know that you are the Holy One of God."
08-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-24.fullText: 21st Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( The Words of Eternal Life ) Simon Peter answered him, " Lord, to whom can we go? You have the words of eternal life. We have come to believe and know that you are the Holy One of God." JH(6:68-69) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-24.title: Hypocrites- Scribes and Pharisees
08-24.verse: Jesus said, " So whoever swears by the sanctuary, swears by it and by the one who dwells in it, and whoever swears by heaven, swears by the throne of God and by the one who is seated upon it."
08-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MT(23:20-22) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-27.title: Teachers of Law
08-27.verse: Jesus said, " Woe to you, scribes and Pharisees, you hypocrites. You are like whitewashed tombs, which appear beautiful on the outside, but inside are full of dead men's bones and every kind of filth.."
08-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

You are like whitewashed tombs, which appear beautiful on the outside, but inside are full of dead men's bones and every kind of filth.." MT(23:27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-27.title: Parable of the Ten Bridesmaids
08-27.verse: But he replied, 'Truly I tell you, I do not know you.' Keep awake therefore, for you know neither the day nor the hour."
08-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-27.title: Faithful Slave
08-27.verse: Jesus said, " Blessed is that slave whom the master will find at work when he arrives. Truly I tell you, he will put that one in charge of all his possessions."
08-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-28.title: Martyrdom Of John the Baptist
08-28.verse: Immediately she rushed back to the king and requested, " I want you to give me at once the head of John the Baptist on a platter."
08-28.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-31.title: Humility and Hospitality
08-31.verse: Jesus said, " 'For  all who exalt themselves will be humbled, and those who humble themselves will be exalted.' 'But when you give a banquet, invite the poor, the crippled, the lame, and the blind."
08-31.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

'But when you give a banquet, invite the poor, the crippled, the lame, and the blind." LK(14:11,13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-31.title: What Defiles a Person
08-31.verse: Jesus said, " It is what comes out of a person that defiles. For it is from within, from the human heart, that evil intentions come: fornication, theft, murder, adultery, avarice, wickedness, deceit, licentiousness, envy, slander, pride, folly."
08-31.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-31.fullText: 22nd Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( What Defiles a Person ) Jesus said, " It is what comes out of a person that defiles. For it is from within, from the human heart, that evil intentions come: fornication, theft, murder, adultery, avarice, wickedness, deceit, licentiousness, envy, slander, pride, folly." MK(7:20-22) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-01.title: Rejection of Jesus at Nazareth
09-01.verse: Jesus read the scroll of prophet Isaiah, ' The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he has anointed me to bring good news to the poor. He has sent me to proclaim release to the captives and recovery of sight to the blind, to let the oppressed go free, to proclaim the year of the Lord's favor."
09-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
09-01.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Rejection of Jesus at Nazareth) Jesus read the scroll of prophet Isaiah, ' The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he has anointed me to bring good news to the poor. He has sent me to proclaim release to the captives and recovery of sight to the blind, to let the oppressed go free, to proclaim the year of the Lord's favor." LK(4:18-19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-01.title: Healing at Simon's House
09-01.verse: Demons also came out of many, shouting, " You are the Son of God!" But he rebuked them and would not allow them to speak, because they knew that he was the Messiah."
09-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
09-01.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Healing at Simon's House) Demons also came out of many, shouting, " You are the Son of God!" But he rebuked them and would not allow them to speak, because they knew that he was the Messiah." LK(4:41) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-01.title: Jesus Heals a Man with Unclean Spirit
09-01.verse: The man with unclean demon cried out with a loud voice, " Let us alone! What have you to do with us, Jesus of Nazareth? Have you come to destroy us? I know who you are, the Holy One of God."
09-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
09-01.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals a Man with Unclean Spirit) The man with unclean demon cried out with a loud voice, " Let us alone! What have you to do with us, Jesus of Nazareth? Have you come to destroy us? I know who you are, the Holy One of God." LK(4:33-34) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-09.title: Jesus Appoints Disciples
09-09.verse: Jesus departed to the mountain to pray, and he spent the night in prayer to God. When day came, he called his disciples to himself, and from them he chose Twelve, whom he also named apostles."
09-09.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
09-09.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Appoints Disciples) Jesus departed to the mountain to pray, and he spent the night in prayer to God. When day came, he called his disciples to himself, and from them he chose Twelve, whom he also named apostles." LK(6:12-13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-09.title: Love for Enemies
09-09.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you that listen, Love your enemies, do good to those who hate you, bless those who curse you, pray for those who abuse you. Do to others as you would have them do to you."
09-09.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
09-09.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Love for Enemies ) Jesus said, " But I say to you that listen, Love your enemies, do good to those who hate you, bless those who curse you, pray for those who abuse you. Do to others as you would have them do to you."  LK(6:27-28,31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-09.title: The Two Foundations
09-09.verse: Jesus said, " That one is like a man building a house, who dug deeply and laid the foundations on rock; when a flood arose, the river burst against that house but could not shake it, because it had been well built."
09-09.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-14.verse: The centurion sent friends to say to him, " Lord, do not trouble yourself, for I am not worthy to have you come under my roof; therefore I did not presume to come to you. But only speak the word and let my servant be healed."

11-16.verse: 33rd Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Coming of the Son of God) Jesus said, "Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will not pass away. But of that day or hour, no one knows, neither the angels in heaven, nor the Son, but only the Father." Mk(13:31-32) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-16.title: Jesus Heals a Blind Beggar Near Jericho
11-16.verse: Jesus said, " What do you want me to do for you?" Blind man said, " Lord, let me see again." Jesus said to him, "Receive your sight, your faith has saved you."
11-16.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-17.title: Parable of the Ten Pounds
11-17.verse: The King said, " But as for these enemies of mine who did not want me to be king over thembring them here and slaughter them in my presence."
11-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-17.title: Question about Resurrection
11-17.verse: Jesus said, " Indeed they cannot die anymore, because they are like angels and are children of God, being children of the resurrection."
11-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-17.title: Jesus and Zacchaeus
11-17.verse: Zac-chae-us stood there and said to the Lord, "Look, half of my possessions, Lord, I will give to the poor; and if I  have defrauded anyone of anything, I will pay back four times as much." Jesus said to him, " Today salvation has come to this house, because he too is a son of Abraham. For the Son of Man has come to seek and to save what was lost."
11-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-20.title: Jesus Weeps over Jerusalem
11-20.verse: As he came near and saw the city, hevwept over it, saying, "If you, even you, had only recognized on this day the things that make for peace! But now they are hidden from your eyes."
11-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-20.title: Jesus speaks to the Sadduces
11-20.verse: Jesus replied 'Those who are judged worthy of a place in the other world and in the resurrection from the dead do not marry because they can no longer die, for they are the same as the angels, and being children of the resurrection they are children of God.'
11-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-20.verse: Jesus said, " It is written, 'My house shall be a house of prayer'; but you have made it a den of robbers."
11-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-21.title: Jesus drives the merchants out of the temple.
11-21.verse: Then Jesus entered the temple and began driving out those who were busy trading , saying, "According to scripture, my house shall be a house of prayer, but you have turned it into a bandit's den."
11-21.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-21.title: Question about Resurrection
11-21.verse: Jesus said, "Moses himself implies that the dead rise again, in the passage about the bush where he calls the Lord the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac and the God of Jacob. Now he is God, not of the dead, but of the living; for to him all men are in fact alive.’"
11-21.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-23.title: Jesus speaks to the two criminals.
11-23.verse: Then turning to Jesus, the thief said," Just remember me,when you come into your kingdom." Jesus replied, "In truth I tell you, today, you will be with me today in paradise"
11-23.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-23.title: Signs and Persecutions
11-23.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Signs and Persecutions ) Jesus then said to them, " Nations will rise against nations and kingdom against kingdom; there will be powerful earthquakes, and in various places famines and plagues; and there will be dreadful portents and great signs from heaven." LK (21:10-11) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-23.verse: Feast of Christ The King (  Jesus the King of the Jews) Pilate asked him, "So you are a King?" Jesus answered, "You say that I am a King. For this I was born, and for this I came into the world, to testify to the truth. Everyone who belongs to the truth listens to my voice." Jh(18:37) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God

11-23.title: The Widow's offering
11-23.verse: Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, this poor widow has put in more than all of them, for all of them have contributed out of their abundance, but she out of her poverty has put in all she had to live on."
11-23.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-24.title: The Widow's Offering.
11-24.verse: Jesus said, "Truly, I tell you, this poor widow put in more than all of them. For all of them gave an offering from their plenty; but she, out of her poverty, gave all she had to live on."
11-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-24.title: The Coming Of The Son Of Man
11-24.verse: Jesus said, " There will be signs in the sun, the moon, and the earth distress among nations confused by the roaring of the sea and the waves. People will faint from fear and foreboding of what is coming upon the world, for the powers of the heaven will be shaken. "
11-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-24.title: Signs and Persecutions
11-24.verse: Jesus said, "Beware that you are not led astray; for many will come in my name and say, I am he!' and, 'The time is near!' Do not go after them.
11-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-25.title: Jesus speaks at the temple.
11-25.verse: Jesus said,"Take care not to be deceived, for many will come in my name, saying, 'I am he; the time is near at hand!' Do not follow them. When you hear of wars and troubled times, dont be frightened; for all these things must happen first, even though the end is not so soon."
11-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-25.title: The Coming Of The Son Of Man
11-25.verse: Jesus said, "People will faint from fear and foreboding of what is coming upon the world, for the powers of the heaven will be shaken. Then they will see 'the Son Of Man coming in a cloud' with power and great glory. Now when these things begin to take place, stand up and raise your heads, because your redemption is drawing near"
11-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-25.title: Judgement of the Nations
11-25.verse: Feast of Christ the King ( Judgement of the Nations) "Then the king will say to those at his right hand, 'Come, you that are blessed by my Father, inherit the kingdom prepared for you from the foundations of the world. 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of my family, you did it to me.'"
11-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-25.title: Reward for Testifying
11-25.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Reward for Testifying ) Jesus said, " You will be hated by all because of my name. But not a hair of your head will perish. By your endurance you will gain your souls." LK (21:17-19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-26.title: Witness for Jesus
11-26.verse: You will be hated by all because of my name, but not a hair on your head will be destroyed. By your perseverance you will save your souls."
11-26.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-28.title: Lessons of the Fig Tree
11-28.verse: Jesus told his disciples a parable. “Consider the fig tree and all the other trees. When their buds burst open, you see for yourselves and know that summer is now near; in the same way, when you see these things happening, know that the kingdom of God is near.
11-28.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-28.title: Necessity for Watchfulness
11-28.verse: Jesus said, " Beware, keep alert; for you do not know when the time will come."
11-28.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-28.title: Exhortation to Watch
11-28.verse: Today's Gospel Msg (Exhortation to Watch) Jesus said, " Be alert at all times, praying that you may have the strength to escape all these things that will take place, and to stand before the Son of Man." LK (21:36) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-29.title: Jesus Calls Four Fishermen
11-29.verse: Jesus said to them "Come with me, and I will teach you to catch men." At once they left their nets and went with him.
11-29.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-29.title: Jesus Calls the First Disciples
11-29.verse: Feast of St.Andrew ( Jesus Calls the First Disciples) As he walked by the Sea of Galilee, he saw two brothers, Simon, who is called Peter, and Andrew his brother, casting net into the sea- for they were fishermen. Jesus said to them, Follow me, and I will make you fish for people." MT (4:18-19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-29.title: Coming of the Son of Man
11-29.verse: "Be sure of this, if the master of the house had known the hour of night when the thief was coming, he would have stayed awake and not let his house be broken into. So too, you also must be prepared, for at an hour you do not expect, the Son of Man will come."
11-29.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-01.title: Jesus Heals a Centurion's Servant
12-01.verse: The centurion answered,  " Lord, I am not worthy to have you come under my roof; but only speak the word, and my servant will be healed."
12-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
12-01.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (  Jesus Heals a Centurion's Servant ) The centurion answered,  " Lord, I am not worthy to have you come under my roof; but only speak the word, and my servant will be healed." MT(5:8) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-01.title: Jesus Cures Many People
12-01.verse: Great crowds came to him, bringing with them the lame, the maimed, the blind, the mute, and many others. They put them at his feet, and he cured them, do that the crowd was amazed when they saw the mute speaking, the maimed whole, the lame walking, and the blind seeing. And they praised the God of Israel.
12-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

And they praised the God of Israel. MT(15:30-31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-01.title: Wise and Foolish Builder
12-01.verse: Jesus said to his disciples: "Not everyone who says to me, 'Lord, Lord,' will enter the kingdom of heaven, but only the one who does the will of my Father in heaven. Everyone who listens to these words of mine and acts on them will be like a wise man who built his house on  rock."
12-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-01.title: Jesus Rejoices
12-01.verse: Turning to the disciples in private he said, "Blessed are the eyes that see what you see. For I say to you, many prophets and kings desired to see what you see, but did not see it, and to hear what you hear, but did not hear it."
12-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

For I say to you, many prophets and kings desired to see what you see, but did not see it, and to hear what you hear, but did not hear it." LK(10:23-24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-03.title: Jesus Feeds Four Thousand Men
12-03.verse: Then Jesus took the seven  loaves and the fish,gave thanks to God , broke them , and gave them to the disciples ; and the disciples gave it to the people. They all ate and had enough. Then the disciples took up seven baskets full of pieces left over . The number of men that ate were four thousand not counting the women and children .
12-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him 'Jesus'. Mary said, " Behold, I am the handmaid of the Lord. May it be done to me according to your word." Then the angel departed from her.
12-07.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-13.verse: Jesus answered the messengers, "Go and tell John what you have seen and heard: the blind receive their sight, the lame walk, the lepers are cleansed, the deaf hear, the dead are raised, the poor have good news brought to them. And blessed is anyone who takes no offense at me."

12-25.verse: Feast of the Holy Family (Jesus is Lost in the Temple) Jesus replied, "Why were you looking for me? Did you not know that I must be in my Father's house?"
12-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

But the one who endures to the end will be saved."
12-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-27.title: Angel Appeared to Joseph
12-27.verse: When the Magi had departed, behold, the angel of the Lord appeared to Joseph in a dream and said, "Rise, take the child and his mother, flee to Egypt, and stay there until I tell you. Herod is going to search for the child to destroy him."
12-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-28.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-28.title: Jesus is Presented in the Temple
12-28.verse: Simon took him in his arms and praised God, saying, " Master, now you are dismissing your servant in peace, according to your word; for my eyes have seen your salvation."
12-28.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-31.title: Jesus is Named
12-31.verse: Mary Mother of God Solemnity ( Jesus is Named ) Then the shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all they had heard and seen, just as it had been told to them. When eight days were completed for his circumcision, he was named Jesus, the name given him by the angel before he was conceived in the womb.
12-31.closing: Happy New year wishes to each one of you and your families, stay blessed during this year!! From Agnel and Family.

01-02.title: Spirit Resting on Jesus
01-02.verse: John said, "I did not know him, but the one who sent me to baptize with water told me, 'On whomever you see the Spirit come down and remain, he is the one who will baptize with the holy Spirit.'"
01-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-02.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Spirit Resting on Jesus  ) John said, "I did not know him, but the one who sent me to baptize with water told me, 'On whomever you see the Spirit come down and remain, he is the one who will baptize with the holy Spirit.'" JH(1:33) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-02.title: Jesus Begins His Ministry in Galilee
01-02.verse: From that time Jesus began to proclaim,  " Repent for the Kingdom of Heaven has come near."
01-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-03.title: Jesus The Lamb of God
01-03.verse: He first found his own brother Simon and told him, "We have found the Messiah" (which is translated Christ). Then he brought him to Jesus. Jesus looked at him and said, "You are Simon the son of John; you will be called Kephas"  (which is translated Peter)
01-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Jesus looked at him and said, "You are Simon the son of John; you will be called Kephas"  (which is translated Peter)  JH(1:41-42) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-03.title: Jesus feeds Five Thousand Men
01-03.verse: Then, taking the five loaves and the two fish and looking up to heaven, he said the blessing, broke the loaves, and gave them to his disciples to set before the people; he also divided the two fish among them all.
01-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MK(6:41) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-03.title: The First Disciples
01-03.verse: When Jesus turned and saw them following him and said to them, "What are you looking for?" They said to him, "Rabbi" (which translated means Teacher), "where are you staying?" He said to them,"Come, and see." They came and saw where he was staying, and they remained with him that day. It was about four o'clock in the afternoon.
01-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

It was about four o'clock in the afternoon. JH(1:38-39) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-03.title: Visit of Three Wise Men
01-03.verse: When they saw that the star had stopped  they were over- whelmed with joy. On entering the house, they saw the child with Mary his mother; and they knelt down and paid him homage. Then, opening their treasure chests, they offered him gifts of gold, frankincense, and myrrh."
01-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

On entering the house, they saw the child with Mary his mother; and they knelt down and paid him homage. Then, opening their treasure chests, they offered him gifts of gold, frankincense, and myrrh."  MT(2:10-11) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-14.title: Preaching Tour in Galilee
01-14.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Preaching Tour in Galilee ) Jesus answered, "Let us go onto the neighbouring towns, so that I may proclaim the  message there also; for that is what I came out to do."  Mk(1:23-24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-14.title: Jesus Cleanses a Leper
01-14.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cleanses a Leper ) A leper came to him begging him, and kneeling he said to him, "If you choose, you can make me clean." Moved with pity, Jesus stretched out his hand and touched him, and said to him, "I do choose. Be made clean!"  Mk(1:40-41) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-18.title: John's Testimony
01-18.verse: John the Baptist saw Jesus coming toward him and said, "Behold, the Lamb of God, who takes away the sin of the world."
01-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-18.title: Pronouncement of the Sabbath
01-18.verse: Jesus said to them, " The sabbath was made for  humankind, and not humankind for the sabbath, so the Son of Man is lord even of the sabbath."
01-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-18.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Pronouncement of the Sabbath ) Jesus said to them, " The sabbath was made for  humankind, and not humankind for the sabbath, so the Son of Man is lord even of the sabbath." MK(2:27-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-18.title: Jesus Heals Multitude at the Seaside
01-18.verse: He had cured many and, as a result, those who had diseases were pressing upon him to touch him. And whenever unclean spirits saw him they would fall down before him and shout, "You are the Son of God." But he sternlyordered them not to make him known.
01-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-18.verse: Jesus said to them, " Fill the jars with water." And they filled them up to the brim. He said to them, "Now draw some out, and take it to the chief steward."
01-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God

01-18.title: Question about Fasting
01-18.verse: Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot fast while the bridegroom is with them, can they? As long as they have the bridegroom with them, they cannot fast."
01-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-20.title: Jesus calls the First Disciples
01-20.verse: 3rd Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus calls the First Disciples ) As he passed by the Sea of Galilee, he saw Simon and his brother Andrew casting their nets into the sea; they were fishermen. 01-20.verse: Then Jesus said to them, " Is it lawful to do good or to do harm on the sabbath, to save life or to kill?" But they were silent.
01-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-21.title: Jesus Heals a Man on Sabbath
01-21.verse: Looking around at them with anger and grieved at their hardness of heart, he said to the man, "Stretch out your hand." He stretched it out and his hand was restored."
01-21.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-21.verse: Jesus said, " The people who sit in darkness have seen a great light, on those dwelling in a land overshadowed by death light has arisen." From that time on, Jesus began to preach and say, "Repent, for the kingdom of heaven is at hand."

01-26.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-31.title: Jesus Calls the Sea
01-31.verse: They woke him and said to him, "Teacher, do you not care that we are perishing?" He woke up, rebuked the wind, and said to the sea, "Quiet! Be still!" The wind ceased and there was great calm. Then he asked them, "Why are you terrified? Do you not yet have faith?"
01-31.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-01.verse: Simeon blessed them and said to Mary his mother, "Behold, this child is destined for the fall and rise of many in Israel, and to be a sign that will be contradicted, and you yourself a sword will pierce so that the thoughts of many hearts may be revealed."

02-01.verse: When the time came for the purification according to the law of Moses, they brought him up to Jerusalem to present him to the Lord, and they offered a sacrifice according to what is stated in the law of the Lord, "a pair of turtle doves or two young pigeon."

02-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-02.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "Prophets are not without honor, except in their hometown, and among their own kin, and in their own house." And he was amazed at their unbelief.

02-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-02.verse: But Jesus would not permit him but told him instead, "Go home to your family and announce to them all that the Lord in his mercy has done for you." Then the man went off and began to proclaim in the Decapolis what Jesus had done for him; and all were amazed.
02-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-02.verse: He took her by the hand and said to her, " Tal' i-tha cum." Which means, "Little girl, get up!" And immediately the girl got up and began to walk about (She was twelve years of age). At this they were overcome with amazement.
02-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-04.title: Death of John the Baptist
02-04.verse: King Herod heard about Jesus, for his fame had become widespread, and people were saying, "John the Baptist has been raised from the dead; That is why mighty powers are at work in him." Others were saying, "He is Elijah"; still others, "He is a prophet like any of the prophets." But when Herod learned of it, he said, "It is John whom I beheaded. He has been raised up.""
02-04.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-10.title: Pharisees and Jesus
02-10.verse: He answered, 'How rightly Isaiah prophesied about you hypocrites in the passage of scripture: This people honours me only with lip-service, while their hearts are far from me.
02-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-10.verse: 6th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cleanses a Leper ) A leper came to him begging him, and kneeling, he said to him, "If you choose, you can make me clean." Moved with pity, Jesus stretched out his hand and touched him, and said to him, "I do choose. Be made clean!"  Mk(1:40-41) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-10.title: What Defiles a Person
02-10.verse: Jesus said, " It is what comes out of a person that defiles. For it is from within, from the human heart, that evil intentions come: fornication, theft, murder, adultery, avarice, wickedness, deceit, licentiousness, envy, slander, pride, folly."
02-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-12.title: The Syrophoenician Women's Faith
02-12.verse: She replied and said to him, "Lord, even the dogs under the table eat the children's scraps." Then he said to her, "For saying this, you may go. The demon has gone out of your daughter."
02-12.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-12.title: Jesus Cures a Deaf Man
02-12.verse: He took him aside in private, away from the crowd, and put his fingers into his ears, and he spat and touched his tongue. Then looking up to heaven, he sighed and said to him. "Eph'pha-the," that is, "Be opened."
02-12.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-15.title: Commandment of Lord
02-15.verse: Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven."
02-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-15.title: Question about Fasting
02-15.verse: Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast."
02-15.closing: Lord, forgive us as we fast and pray🙏🏼.

02-15.title: Blessings and Woes
02-15.verse: Jesus looked at his disciples and said, "Blessed are you who are poor, for yours is the kingdom of God. "Blessed are you who are hungry now, for you will be filled. "Blessed are you who weep now,for you will laugh."
02-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-15.title: Demand for a Sign
02-15.verse: Jesus sighed deeply in his spirit and said, " Why does this generation ask for a sign? Truly I tell you, no sign will be given to this generation."
02-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-17.title: Questions the Disciples
02-17.verse: When he became aware of this he said to them, "Why do you conclude that it is because you have no bread? Do you not yet understand or comprehend? Are your hearts hardened? Do you have eyes and not see, ears and not hear? And do you not remember?
02-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MK(8:17-18) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-17.verse: Jesus said to them all, " If any want to  become my followers, let them deny themselves and take up their cross and follow me."
02-17.closing: Jesus his calling us to be a part of his mission.

02-17.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
02-17.verse: Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."
02-17.closing: Let us all pray and repent this lent.

MT(6:3,6,17-18) Let us all pray and repent this lent.

02-20.title: Take up your cross and follow Me
02-20.verse: Jesus said to them, " For whoever wishes to save his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life for my sake and that of the gospel will save it." What profit is there for one to gain the whole world and forfeit his life?
02-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-20.title: Jesus Began Preaching
02-20.verse: Now after John was arrested, Jesus came to Galilee, proclaiming the good news of God, and saying, "The time is fulfilled, and the kingdom of God has come near; repent, and believe in the good news. "

" MK(1:14-15) Jesus forgives everyone who repents!

02-20.title: Healing of a Boy with a Spirit
02-20.verse: WhenJesussaw that a crowd came running together, he rebuked the unclean spirit, sayingto it, "You spirit that keeps this boy from speaking and hearing, I command you, come out of him, and never enter him again!"
02-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-20.title: The Geatest
02-20.verse: Then he took a little child and put it among them; and putting his arms around the child he said to them, Whoever welcomes one child such as this in my name, welcomes me; and whoever welcomes me, welcomes not me but the one who sent me."
02-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-20.title: Take up your cross
02-20.verse: Jesus called the crowd with his disciples, and said to them, " If anyone want to become my followers, let them deny themselves and take up their cross and follow me." For what will it profit them to gain the whole world and forfeit their life?
02-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-20.title: Jesus Calls Levi the Tax Collector
02-20.verse: Jesus answered, " Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick. I have come to call, not the righteous but sinners to repentance."
02-20.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Calls Levi the Tax Collector) Jesus answered, " Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick. I have come to call, not the righteous but sinners to repentance." LK(5:31-32) Jesus forgive our sins.

02-22.title: Teachings Jesus

02-22.closing: We are all called to be disciples.

03-01.closing: Let us return to the Lord with ashes during this beautiful time of lent!

03-28.closing: Lord forgive us for the times we failed to glorify you.

03-28.title: True Disciples
03-28.verse: Jesus said to the Jews who had believed in him, "If you continue in my word, you are truly my disciples, and you will know the truth, and the truth will make you free."
03-28.closing: Lord open our minds and hearts to your words.
03-28.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( True Disciples) Jesus said to the Jews who had believed in him, "If you continue in my word, you are truly my disciples, and you will know the truth, and the truth will make you free." JH(8:31-32) Lord open our minds and hearts to your words.

03-28.title: Jesus Dies on the Cross
03-28.verse: After this, Jesus knew that everything had now been completed and, so that the scripture should be completely fulfilled, he said, "I am thirsty. After Jesus had taken the wine, he said, 'It is fulfilled'; and bowing his head, he gave up his spirit."
03-28.closing: Lord, help us be witnesses to the Cross.
03-28.fullText: Good Friday Gospel Msg (Jesus Dies on the Cross) After this, Jesus knew that everything had now been completed and, so that the scripture should be completely fulfilled, he said, "I am thirsty. After Jesus had taken the wine, he said, 'It is fulfilled'; and bowing his head, he gave up his spirit." JH(19-28-30) Lord, help us be witnesses to the Cross.

03-28.title: Prayer of Repentance
03-28.verse: Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted."
03-28.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (  Prayer of Repentance) Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted." LK(18:13-14) Lord make us humble!

03-28.title: Jesus is Condemned To Death
03-28.verse: Jesus said to him, "You have said so. But I tell you, From now on you will see the Son of Man seated at the right hand of Power and coming on the clouds of heaven."
03-28.closing: Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a Cross. Therefore God has highly exalted him and bestowed on him the name that is above every name.

But I tell you, From now on you will see the Son of Man seated at the right hand of Power and coming on the clouds of heaven." MT(26:64) Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a Cross. Therefore God has highly exalted him and bestowed on him the name that is above every name.

04-01.title: Jesus the Messiah
04-01.verse: Others said, "This is the Messiah." But some asked, "Surely the Messiah does not come from Galilee, does he? Has not the scripture said that the Messiah is descended from David and come from Bethlehem, the village where David lived?"

04-01.verse: Jesus said to him, "You have said so. But I tell you, From now on you will see the Son of Man seated at the right hand of Power and coming on the clouds of heaven."

04-01.title: Jesus Washes the Disciples Feet
04-01.verse: Jesus said, " Do you know what I have done? You call me Teacher and Lord--and You are right, for that is what I am. So if I, your Lord and Teacher, have washed your feet, you ought to wash one another's feet."
04-01.closing: Jesus give us yours grace to serve others in need.

So if I, your Lord and Teacher, have washed your feet, you ought to wash one another's feet." JH(13-12-14) Jesus give us yours grace to serve others in need.

04-05.title: Mary Anoints Jesus
04-05.verse: Jesus said, " Leave her alone, She brought it so that she might keep it for the day of my burial. You always have the poor with you,but you do not always have me."
04-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-05.title: Jesus Walks on Water
04-05.verse: When they had rowed about three or four miles, they saw Jesus walking on the sea and coming near the boat, and they began to be afraid. But he said to them, "It is I. Do not be afraid."
04-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-05.title: Father's Love for Son
04-05.verse: Jesus said, " The Father loves the Son and has placed all things in his hands. Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life; whoever disobeys the Son will not see life, but must endure God's wrath."
04-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-05.title: Love of God- Eternal Life
04-05.verse: " For God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life.
04-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-05.title: Immaculate Conception
04-05.verse: Solemnity Theo Annunciation of the Lord ( Immaculate Conception) Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him 'Jesus'. Mary said, " Behold, I am the handmaid of the Lord. May it be done to me according to your word." Then the angel departed from her.
04-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!

Then the angel departed from her. LK(1:30,38) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!

04-05.title: Jesus Forgives the Women
04-05.verse: Then Jesus straightened up and said to her, "Woman, where are they? Has no one condemned you?" She replied, "No one, sir." Then Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go, (and) from now on do not sin any more."
04-05.closing: Lord, give us the strength to forgive.

Then Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go, (and) from now on do not sin any more." JH(8:10-11) Lord, give us the strength to forgive.

04-05.title: Disciples Met Jesus
04-05.verse: Suddenly Jesus met them and said, "Greetings!" And they came to him, took hold of his feet, and worshipped him. Then Jesus said to them, " Do not be afraid; go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee; there they will see me."

Then Jesus said to them, " Do not be afraid; go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee; there they will see me." MT(28:9-10) Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!!

04-10.title: Resurrection of Jesus
04-10.verse: "Then the other disciple also went in, the one who had arrived at the tomb first, and he saw and believed. For they did not yet understand the scripture that he had to rise from the dead."
04-10.closing: May the risen Lord, bless you and your families abundantly with peace, joy and happiness. From Agnel and Family. 04-10.verse: But the Angel said to the women, " Do not be afraid; I know that you are looking for Jesus who was crucified. He is not here; for he has been raised, as he said. Come, see the place where he lay."
04-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-10.title: Jesus Appears to Mary Magdalena
04-10.verse: Jesus said to her, "Do not cling to me, because I have not yet ascended to the Father. But go to my brothers, and tell them: I am ascending to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God."
04-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-22.title: Eternal Life
04-22.verse: Jesus said, " The Father loves the Son and has placed all things in his hands. Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life; whoever disobeys the Son will not see life, but must endure God's wrath."
04-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-22.title: Jesus the True Food and Drink
04-22.verse: Jesus said, " Those who eat my flesh and drink my blood abide in me, and I in them. This is the bread that came down from heaven, not like which your ancestors ate, and they died. But the one who eats this bread will live forever."
04-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!!

JH(6:56,58) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!!

04-22.title: Jesus Walks with the Disciples
04-22.verse: When he was at the table with them, he took bread, blessed and broke it, and gave it to them. Then their eyes were opened, and they recognised him; and he vanished from their sight. They said to each other, "We're not our hearts burning within us while he was talking to us on the road, while he was opening the scriptures to us?"
04-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

They said to each other, "We're not our hearts burning within us while he was talking to us on the road, while he was opening the scriptures to us?" LK(24:30-32) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-22.title: Jesus The Good Shepherd
04-22.verse: Jesus said, " My sheep hear my voice. I know them, and they follow me. I give them eternal life, and they will never perish."
04-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
04-22.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus The Good Shepherd ) Jesus said, " My sheep hear my voice. I know them, and they follow me. I give them eternal life, and they will never perish."JH(10:27-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-03.title: Jesus the Good Shepherd
05-03.verse: Jesus said, " I am the good shepherd. I know my own and my own know me, just as the Father knows me and I know the Father. And I lay down my life for the sheep."
05-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-03.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus the Good Shepherd ) Jesus said, " I am the good shepherd. I know my own and my own know me, just as the Father knows me and I know the Father. And I lay down my life for the sheep." JH(10:14-15) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-05.title: Jesus's Teaching
05-05.verse: Jesus said, " I have come as light into the world, so that everyone who believes in me should not remain in the darkness."
05-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-05.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus's Teaching ) Jesus said, " I have come as light into the world, so that everyone who believes in me should not remain in the darkness."JH(12:46) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-05.title: Jesus the True Food and Drink
05-05.verse: Jesus said, " Those who eat my flesh and drink my blood have eternal life, and I will raise them up on the last day; for my flesh is true food and my blood is true drink."
05-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!!

05-05.title: Bread of Life
05-05.verse: Jesus said to them, "I am the bread of life; whoever comes to me will never be hunger, and whoever believes in me will never be thirst."
05-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-14.title: Jesus Calls Us Friends
05-14.verse: Jesus said, " You did not choose me but I chose you. And I appointed you to go and bear fruit that will last, so that the Father will give you whatever you ask him in my name."
05-14.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-14.title: give you a new commandment: love one another; you must love one another just as I have loved you." JH(13:34
05-14.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-14.title: The New Commandment
05-14.verse: I give you a new commandment: love one another; you must love one another just as I have loved you."
05-14.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-14.fullText: 5th Easter Sunday Gospel Msg ( The New Commandment) I give you a new commandment: love one another; you must love one another just as I have loved you." JH(13:34) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-14.title: Jesus speaks to the Disciples
05-14.verse: Jesus said, " Very truly I tell you, whoever welcomes the one whom I send, welcomes me, and whoever welcomes me, welcomes the one who sent me."
05-14.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-14.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus speaks to the Disciples ) Jesus said, " Very truly I tell you, whoever welcomes the one whom I send, welcomes me, and whoever welcomes me, welcomes the one who sent me."JH(13:20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-23.title: Commissioning of the Disciples
05-23.verse: Jesus said, " Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the So and of the Holy Spirit, and teaching them to obey everything that O have commanded you. And remember, I am with you always, to the end of the age."
05-23.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

And remember, I am with you always, to the end of the age."  MT(28:19-20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-23.title: Prays to Father for the Disciples
05-23.verse: Jesus prayed, " Sanctify them in the truth; your word is truth. As you have sent me into the world,  so I have sent them into the world. "
05-23.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-23.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Prays to Father for the Disciples) Jesus prayed, " Sanctify them in the truth; your word is truth. As you have sent me into the world,  so I have sent them into the world. " JH(17:17-18) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-23.title: World Hates You
05-23.verse: Jesus said to them, " If you belonged to the world, the world would love its own; but because you do not belong to the world, and I have chosen you out of the world, the world hates you."
05-23.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-27.title: Prays to Father for the Disciples
05-27.verse: Lifting up his eyes to heaven, Jesus prayed saying, " I pray not only for them, but also for those who will believe in me through their word, so that they may all be one, as you, Father, are in me and I in you, that they also may be in us, that the world may believe that you sent me."
05-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
