JH(17:20-21) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-27.title: Jesus Breaths the Holy Spirit On the Disciples
05-27.verse: Jesus said to them again, "Peace be with you. As the Father has sent me, even so I send you." And when he had said this, he breathed on them, and said to them, "Receive the Holy Spirit. If you forgive the sins of any, they are forgiven; if you retain the sins of any, they are retained."
05-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-27.fullText: Pentcost Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Breaths the Holy Spirit On the Disciples) Jesus said to them again, "Peace be with you. As the Father has sent me, even so I send you." And when he had said this, he breathed on them, and said to them, "Receive the Holy Spirit. If you forgive the sins of any, they are forgiven; if you retain the sins of any, they are retained." JH(21:21-23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-27.title: Spirit of Truth
05-27.verse: Jesus said to them, " When the Spirit of truth comes, he will guide you to the complete truth, since he will not be speaking of his own accord, but will speak whatever he hears, and he will reveal to you the things that are  to come."
05-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH(16:13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-01.title: Testing Jesus
06-01.verse: Jesus said to them, "Pay Caesar what belongs to Caesar; and God what belongs to God." And they were amazed at him.
06-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-01.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Testing Jesus) Jesus said to them, "Pay Caesar what belongs to Caesar; and God what belongs to God." And they were amazed at him. MK(12:17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-01.title: Father and Jesus are One
06-01.verse: Lifting up his eyes to heaven, Jesus prayed saying, " I pray not only for them, but also for those who will believe in me through their word, so that they may all be one, as you, Father, are in me and I in you, that they also may be in us, that the world may believe that you sent me."
06-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-01.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Father and Jesus are One) Lifting up his eyes to heaven, Jesus prayed saying, " I pray not only for them, but also for those who will believe in me through their word, so that they may all be one, as you, Father, are in me and I in you, that they also may be in us, that the world may believe that you sent me." JH(17:20-21) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-01.title: Faith in God
06-01.verse: Jesus said, " Therefore I tell you, all that you ask for in prayer, believe that you will receive it and it shall be yours. When you stand to pray, forgive anyone against whom you have a grievance, so that your heavenly Father may in turn forgive you your transgressions."
06-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-01.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Faith in God) Jesus said, " Therefore I tell you, all that you ask for in prayer, believe that you will receive it and it shall be yours. When you stand to pray, forgive anyone against whom you have a grievance, so that your heavenly Father may in turn forgive you your transgressions." MK(11:24-26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-01.title: Peace for the Disciples
06-01.verse: Jesus said to them, "I have said this to you, so that in me you may have peace. In the world you face persecution. But take courage; I have conquered the world!"
06-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-01.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Peace for the Disciples) Jesus said to them, "I have said this to you, so that in me you may have peace. In the world you face persecution. But take courage; I have conquered the world!" JH(16:33) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-07.title: The Beatitudes
06-07.verse: Jesus called his disciples and to them, "Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven. Blessed are those  who mourn, for they will be comforted. Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God."
06-07.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-07.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Beatitudes) Jesus called his disciples and to them, "Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven. Blessed are those  who mourn, for they will be comforted. Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God." MK(5:3,4,9) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-07.title: Jesus Breaths the Holy Spirit On the Disciples
06-07.verse: Jesus said to them again, "Peace be with you. As the Father has sent me, even so I send you." And when he had said this, he breathed on them, and said to them, "Receive the Holy Spirit. If you forgive the sins of any, they are forgiven; if you retain the sins of any, they are retained."
06-07.closing: Lord fill us with your Holy Spirit.
06-07.fullText: Pentcost Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Breaths the Holy Spirit On the Disciples) Jesus said to them again, "Peace be with you. As the Father has sent me, even so I send you." And when he had said this, he breathed on them, and said to them, "Receive the Holy Spirit. If you forgive the sins of any, they are forgiven; if you retain the sins of any, they are retained." JH(20:21-23) Lord fill us with your Holy Spirit.

06-12.title: Concerning Oaths
06-12.verse: Jesus said, " Let your word be 'Yes, Yes' or 'No, No'; anything more than this comes from the evil one."
06-12.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-12.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Concerning Oaths ) Jesus said, " Let your word be 'Yes, Yes' or 'No, No'; anything more than this comes from the evil one." MT(5:37) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-12.title: You are the Salt and Light
06-12.verse: Jesus said, " You are the light of the world. A city built on a hill cannot be hid. In the same way, let your light shine before others, so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father in heaven."
06-12.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-12.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( You are the Salt and Light ) Jesus said, " You are the light of the world. A city built on a hill cannot be hid. In the same way, let your light shine before others, so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father in heaven." MT(5:14,16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-12.title: Adultery
06-12.verse: Jesus said, " If your right eye causes you to sin, pluck it out and throw it away; it is better that you lose one of your members than that your whole body be thrown into hell."
06-12.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-12.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Adultery) Jesus said, " If your right eye causes you to sin, pluck it out and throw it away; it is better that you lose one of your members than that your whole body be thrown into hell." MT(5:29) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-13.title: Jesus the True Food and Drink
06-13.verse: Jesus said, " Those who eat my flesh and drink my blood abide in me, and I in them. This is the bread that came down from heaven, not like which your ancestors ate, and they died. But the one who eats this bread will live forever."
06-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!!
06-13.fullText: Sunday's Gospel Msg ( Jesus the True Food and Drink ) Jesus said, " Those who eat my flesh and drink my blood abide in me, and I in them. This is the bread that came down from heaven, not like which your ancestors ate, and they died. But the one who eats this bread will live forever." JH(6:56,58) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!!

06-13.title: Do not Swear
06-13.verse: Jesus said, "But I say this to you, do not swear at all, either by heaven, since that is God's throne."
06-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-13.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Do not Swear ) Jesus said, "But I say this to you, do not swear at all, either by heaven, since that is God's throne." MT(5:34) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-13.title: Do not Swear
06-13.verse: Jesus said, "But I say this to you, do not swear at all, either by heaven, since that is God's throne. Let what you say be simply ‘Yes’ or ‘NO’; anything more than this comes from evil.”
06-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-13.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Do not Swear ) Jesus said, "But I say this to you, do not swear at all, either by heaven, since that is God's throne. Let what you say be simply ‘Yes’ or ‘NO’; anything more than this comes from evil.” MT(5:34,37) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-20.title: Whom to Fear
06-20.verse: Jesus said, " Do not fear those who kill the body but cannot kill the soul; rather fear him who can destroy both soul and body in hell. And even the hairs of your head are all counted. So do not be afraid; you are of more value than many sparrows.
06-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-20.fullText: Sunday's Gospel Msg ( Whom to Fear ) Jesus said, " Do not fear those who kill the body but cannot kill the soul; rather fear him who can destroy both soul and body in hell. And even the hairs of your head are all counted. So do not be afraid; you are of more value than many sparrows. MT(10:28,30,31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-20.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
06-20.verse: Jesus said, " Beware of practicing your piety before others in order to be seen by them; for then you have no reward from your Father in heaven. But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."
06-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-20.fullText: Today's Gospel msg ( Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting ) Jesus said, " Beware of practicing your piety before others in order to be seen by them; for then you have no reward from your Father in heaven. But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."  MT(6:1,6) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-20.title: Do Not Worry
06-20.verse: Jesus said, " But strive first for the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well. So do not worry about tomorrow for tomorrow will bring worries of its own. Today's trouble is enough for today.
06-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-20.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Do Not Worry) Jesus said, " But strive first for the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well. So do not worry about tomorrow for tomorrow will bring worries of its own. Today's trouble is enough for today. MT(6:33-34) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-02.liturgicalLabel: Feast of St. Thomas the Appostle of India
07-02.labelKey: feast of st thomas the appostle of india
07-02.title: Thomas and Jesus
07-02.verse: Feast of St. Thomas the Appostle of India- Gospel Msg (Thomas and Jesus) Thomas answered and said to Jesus, "My Lord and my God!" Jesus said to him, "Have you come to believe because you have seen me? Blessed are those who have not seen and yet have come to believed." JN (20:28-29) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-02.fullText: Feast of St. Thomas the Appostle of India- Gospel Msg (Thomas and Jesus) Thomas answered and said to Jesus, "My Lord and my God!" Jesus said to him, "Have you come to believe because you have seen me? Blessed are those who have not seen and yet have come to believed." JN (20:28-29) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-02.liturgicalLabel: Feast of St. Thomas the Appostle of India
07-02.labelKey: feast of st thomas the appostle of india
07-02.title: Thomas and Jesus
07-02.verse: Feast of St. Thomas the Appostle of India- Gospel Msg (Thomas and Jesus) Then Jesus said to Thomas, "Put your finger here and see my hands, and bring your hand and put it into my side, and do not be unbelieving, but believe. Thomas answered and said to Jesus, "My Lord and my God!"  JN (20:27-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-02.fullText: Feast of St. Thomas the Appostle of India- Gospel Msg (Thomas and Jesus) Then Jesus said to Thomas, "Put your finger here and see my hands, and bring your hand and put it into my side, and do not be unbelieving, but believe. Thomas answered and said to Jesus, "My Lord and my God!"  JN (20:27-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-02.title: Jesus Appears to Thomas
07-02.verse: Thomas answered and said to him, "My Lord and my God!" Jesus said to him, "Have you come to believe because you have seen me? Blessed are those who have not seen and have believed."
07-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-02.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Appears to Thomas) Thomas answered and said to him, "My Lord and my God!" Jesus said to him, "Have you come to believe because you have seen me? Blessed are those who have not seen and have believed." JH(20:28-29) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-02.title: Jesus Appears to Thomas
07-02.verse: Thomas answered and said to him, "My Lord and my God!" Jesus said to him, "Have you come to believe because you have seen me? Blessed are those who have not seen and have believed."
07-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Jesus said to him, "Have you come to believe because you have seen me? Blessed are those who have not seen and have believed." JH(20:28-29) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-04.title: Jesus Makes Our Burdens Light
07-04.verse: Jesus said, " Come to me, all you that are weary and are carrying heavy burdens, and I will give you rest. Take my yoke upon you, and learn from me; for I am gentle and humble in heart, and you will find rest for your souls. For my yoke is easy, and my burden is light."
07-04.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-04.fullText: Sunday's Gospel Msg (Jesus Makes Our Burdens Light) Jesus said, " Come to me, all you that are weary and are carrying heavy burdens, and I will give you rest. Take my yoke upon you, and learn from me; for I am gentle and humble in heart, and you will find rest for your souls. For my yoke is easy, and my burden is light." MT(10:28-30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-04.title: Question about Fasting
07-04.verse: Jesus said, " The wedding guests cannot mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast. "
07-04.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-04.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg( Question about Fasting ) Jesus said, " The wedding guests cannot mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast. " MT(9:15) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-11.title: Parable of the Sower
07-11.verse: Jesus  said, " But as for what was sown on good soil, this is the one who hears the word and understands  it, who indeed bears fruit and yields, in one case hundredfold, in an sixty and in another thirty ."
07-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-11.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Sower) Jesus  said, " But as for what was sown on good soil, this is the one who hears the word and understands  it, who indeed bears fruit and yields, in one case hundredfold, in an sixty and in another thirty ." MT(13:23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-11.title: Parable of the Sower
07-11.verse: Jesus  said, " But as for what was sown on good soil, this is the one who hears the word and understands  it, who indeed bears fruit and yields, in one case hundredfold, in an sixty and in another thirty ."
07-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-11.fullText: 15th Sunday Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Sower) Jesus  said, " But as for what was sown on good soil, this is the one who hears the word and understands  it, who indeed bears fruit and yields, in one case hundredfold, in an sixty and in another thirty ." MT(13:23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-11.title: Woes to Unrepentant Cities
07-11.verse: Jesus said, " But I tell you that on the day of judgement it will be more tolerable for the land of Sodom than for you."
07-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-11.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Woes to Unrepentant Cities) Jesus said, " But I tell you that on the day of judgement it will be more tolerable for the land of Sodom than for you." MT(11:24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-11.title: Whom to Fear
07-11.verse: Jesus said, " And even the hairs of your head are all counted. So do not be afraid, you are of more value than many sparrows."
07-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-11.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg(Whom to Fear) Jesus said, " And even the hairs of your head are all counted. So do not be afraid, you are of more value than many sparrows." MT(10:30-31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-18.title: Parable of the Weeds among the Wheat
07-18.verse: Jesus  said, " Let both of them grow together until the harvest, and at harvest time this time I will tell the reapers collective weeds first and bind them in bundles to be burned, but gather the wheat into my barns."
07-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-18.fullText: 16th Sunday Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Weeds among the Wheat) Jesus  said, " Let both of them grow together until the harvest, and at harvest time this time I will tell the reapers collective weeds first and bind them in bundles to be burned, but gather the wheat into my barns." MT(13:30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-18.title: Parable of the Weeds among the Wheat
07-18.verse: Jesus  said, " Let both of them grow together until the harvest, and at harvest time, I will tell the reapers to collect the weeds first and bind them in bundles to be burned, but gather the wheat into my barns."
07-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-18.fullText: 16th Sunday Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Weeds among the Wheat) Jesus  said, " Let both of them grow together until the harvest, and at harvest time, I will tell the reapers to collect the weeds first and bind them in bundles to be burned, but gather the wheat into my barns." MT(13:30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-18.title: Compassion for the Crowd
07-18.verse: As he went ashore,  he saw a great crowd, his heart was moved with pity for them, for they were like sheep without a shepherd; and he began to teach them many things.
07-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-18.fullText: 16th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Compassion for the Crowd ) As he went ashore,  he saw a great crowd, his heart was moved with pity for them, for they were like sheep without a shepherd; and he began to teach them many things. MK(6:34) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-18.title: God's Chosen Servant
07-18.verse: This was to fulfill what prophet Isaiah spoke, " Here is my servant, whom I have chosen, my beloved, with whom my soul is well pleased. I will put my Spirit upon him, and he will proclaim justice to the Gentiles."
07-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-18.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (God's Chosen Servant) This was to fulfill what prophet Isaiah spoke, " Here is my servant, whom I have chosen, my beloved, with whom my soul is well pleased. I will put my Spirit upon him, and he will proclaim justice to the Gentiles." MT(12:17-18) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-24.title: Request from the Mother of James and John
07-24.verse: Jesus said, " You will indeed drink my cup, but to sit at my right and at my left , this is not mine to grant, but it is for those for whom it has been prepared by my Father."
07-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God
07-24.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Request from the Mother of James and John) Jesus said, " You will indeed drink my cup, but to sit at my right and at my left , this is not mine to grant, but it is for those for whom it has been prepared by my Father." MT(20:23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God

07-24.title: Explains the Parable of the Sower
07-24.verse: Jesus said, "But as for what was sown the seed sown on good soil, this is the one who hears the word and understands it, who indeed bears fruit and yields, in one case a hundred fold, in another sixty and in another  thirty."
07-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-24.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Explains the Parable of the Sower) Jesus said, "But as for what was sown the seed sown on good soil, this is the one who hears the word and understands it, who indeed bears fruit and yields, in one case a hundred fold, in another sixty and in another  thirty." MT(13:23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-24.liturgicalLabel: Feast of St.James the apostle Today's
07-24.labelKey: feast of stjames the apostle todays
07-24.title: Request from Mother of James and John
07-24.verse: Jesus said, " whoever wishes to be first among you shall be your slave. Just so, the Son of Man did not come to be served but to serve and to give his life as a ransom for many."
07-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-24.fullText: Feast of St.James the apostle Today's Gospel Msg( Request from Mother of James and John ) Jesus said, " whoever wishes to be first among you shall be your slave. Just so, the Son of Man did not come to be served but to serve and to give his life as a ransom for many."  MT(20:27-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-25.title: Kingdom of Heaven
07-25.verse: Jesus said to the disciples, “The Kingdom of heaven is like a net thrown into the sea, which collects fish of every kind. When it is full they haul it ashore and sit down to put what is good into buckets. What is bad they throw away."
07-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.l
07-25.fullText: 17th Sunday's Gospel Msg ( Kingdom of Heaven ) Jesus said to the disciples, “The Kingdom of heaven is like a net thrown into the sea, which collects fish of every kind. When it is full they haul it ashore and sit down to put what is good into buckets. What is bad they throw away."  MT(13:47-48) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.l

07-25.title: Parable of the Weeds among the Wheat
07-25.verse: Jesus  said, " Let both of them grow together until the harvest, and at harvest time this time I will tell the reapers to collect the weeds first and bind them in bundles to be burned, but gather the wheat into my barns."
07-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-25.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Weeds among the Wheat) Jesus  said, " Let both of them grow together until the harvest, and at harvest time this time I will tell the reapers to collect the weeds first and bind them in bundles to be burned, but gather the wheat into my barns." MT(13:30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-26.title: Use of Parables
07-26.verse: This was to fulfill what had been spoken through the prophets, " I will open my mouth to speak in parables, I will proclaim what has been hidden from the foundation of the world."
07-26.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-26.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Use of Parables) This was to fulfill what had been spoken through the prophets, " I will open my mouth to speak in parables, I will proclaim what has been hidden from the foundation of the world." MT(13:35) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-26.title: Jesus Explain the Parable of the Weeds
07-26.verse: Jesus said, "The Son of Man will send his angels, and they will collect out of his kingdom all who cause others to sin and all evildoers. They will throw them into the  fiery furnace, where there will be wailing and grinding of teeth. Then the righteous will shine like the sun in the kingdom of their Father. Whoever has ears ought to hear."
07-26.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-26.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Explain the Parable of the Weeds) Jesus said, "The Son of Man will send his angels, and they will collect out of his kingdom all who cause others to sin and all evildoers. They will throw them into the  fiery furnace, where there will be wailing and grinding of teeth. Then the righteous will shine like the sun in the kingdom of their Father. Whoever has ears ought to hear." MT(13:41-43) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-26.title: Feeding the Five Thousand
07-26.verse: Then Jesus took the loaves, and when he had given thanks, he distributed them to those who were seated; so also the fish,  as much as they wanted.
07-26.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-26.fullText: 17th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Feeding the Five Thousand ) Then Jesus took the loaves, and when he had given thanks, he distributed them to those who were seated; so also the fish,  as much as they wanted. JH(6:11) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-26.title: Perseverance in Prayer
07-26.verse: Jesus said, " So I say to you, Ask, and it will be given to you; search, and you will find; knock, and the door will be opened for you. If you then, who are evil, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will the heavenly Father give the Holy Spirit to those who ask him!"
07-26.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-26.fullText: 17th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Perseverance in Prayer) Jesus said, " So I say to you, Ask, and it will be given to you; search, and you will find; knock, and the door will be opened for you. If you then, who are evil, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will the heavenly Father give the Holy Spirit to those who ask him!" LK(11:9,13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-11.title: True Greatness and The Parable of the Lost Sheep
08-11.verse: Jesus said, "Whoever becomes humble like this child is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven. Whoever welcomes one such child in my name welcomes me. So it is not the will of your Father in heaven that one of these little ones should be lost."
08-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-11.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( True Greatness and The Parable of the Lost Sheep) Jesus said, "Whoever becomes humble like this child is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven. Whoever welcomes one such child in my name welcomes me. So it is not the will of your Father in heaven that one of these little ones should be lost." MT(18:4,5&14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-11.title: Forgiveness
08-11.verse: Peter approached Jesus and asked him, "Lord, if my brother sins against me, how often must I forgive him? As many as seven times?" Jesus answered, "I say to you, not seven times but seventy-seven times."
08-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-11.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Forgiveness) Peter approached Jesus and asked him, "Lord, if my brother sins against me, how often must I forgive him? As many as seven times?" Jesus answered, "I say to you, not seven times but seventy-seven times." MT(18:20-21)  Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-11.title: Jesus and the Temple Tax
08-11.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and the Temple Tax) Jesus spoke of it first, asking, "What do you think, Simon? From whom do kings of the earth take toll or tribute? From their children or from others?" Peter said, " From others," Jesus said to him, " Then the children are free." MT (17: 25-26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-11.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus and the Temple Tax) Jesus spoke of it first, asking, "What do you think, Simon? From whom do kings of the earth take toll or tribute? From their children or from others?" Peter said, " From others," Jesus said to him, " Then the children are free." MT (17: 25-26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-11.title: True Greatness
08-11.verse: Jesus said, "Whoever becomes humble like this child is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven. Whoever welcomes one such child in my name welcomes me. "
08-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-11.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( True Greatness ) Jesus said, "Whoever becomes humble like this child is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven. Whoever welcomes one such child in my name welcomes me. " MT(18:4-5) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-15.title: The Canaanite Woman's Faith
08-15.verse: She said, " Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters' table." Then  Jesus answered her, "Women, great is your faith! Let it be done for you as you wish." And her daughter was healed instantly."
08-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-15.fullText: 20th Sunday Gospel Msg  ( The Canaanite Woman's Faith) She said, " Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters' table." Then  Jesus answered her, "Women, great is your faith! Let it be done for you as you wish." And her daughter was healed instantly." MT(15:27-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-15.title: Rich Young Man

09-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-05.verse: Jesus said to them, " You cannot make wedding guests fast while the bridegroom is with them, can you? The days will come, when the bridegroom will be taken away from them, and then they will fast in those days."
09-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-12.verse: And Jesus went with them, but when he was not far from the house, the centurion sent friends to say to him, " Lord, do not trouble yourself, for I am not worthy to have you come under my roof; therefore I did not presume to come to you. But only speak the word and let my servant be healed."
09-12.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-12.title: A Tree and Its Fruits
09-12.verse: Jesus  said, " No good tree bears bad fruit, nor does a bad tree bear good fruit." The good person out of the treasure of the heart produces good, and the evil person out of evil treasure produces evil; for it is out of the abundance of the heart that the mouth speaks.
09-12.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Then he said to her, "Your sins are forgiven." And Jesus said to thewomen, " Your faith has saved you; go in peace. "

10-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-21.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-23.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-31.verse: Fortunate are you when people insult you and persecute you and speak all kinds of evil against you because you are my follower. Be glad and joyful for a great reward is kept for you in God.

11-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-10.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Faith) Jesus replied, "If you had faith the size of a mustard seed, you could say to this mulberry tree, ' Be uprooted and planted in the  sea,' and it would obey you." LK (17:6) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-10.verse: Jesus said, " So you also, when you have done all that you were ordered to do, say, 'we are worthless slaves, we have done only what we ought to have done!' "
11-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-30.title: Jesus Rejoices
11-30.verse: Then turning to the disciples, Jesus said to them privately, " Blessed are the eyes that see what you see! For I tell you that many prophets and kings desired to see what you see, but did not see it, and to hear what you hear, but did not hear it."
11-30.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(10:23-24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-30.title: Be Alert
11-30.verse: 1st Sunday of Advent Gospel Msg ( Be Alert) Jesus said, " Be on guard so that your hearts are not weighed down with dissipation and drunkenness and the worries of this life, and that day catch you unexpectedly, like a trap." LK (21:34) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-30.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-02.title: Wise and Foolish Builder
12-02.verse: Jesus said to his disciples: "Not everyone who says to me, 'Lord, Lord,' will enter the kingdom of heaven, but only the one who does the will of my Father in heaven. Everyone who listens to these words of mine and acts on them will be like a wise man who built his house on rock."
12-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-02.title: Necessity for Watchfulness
12-02.verse: Jesus said, " Beware, keep alert; for you do not know when the time will come."
12-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-02.title: Jesus Cures Many People
12-02.verse: Great crowds came to him, bringing with them the lame, the maimed, the blind, the mute, and many others. They put them at his feet, and he cured them, so that the crowd was amazed when they saw the mute speaking, the maimed whole, the lame walking, and the blind seeing. And they praised the God of Israel.
12-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

And they praised the God of Israel. MT(15:30-31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-05.title: Proclamation of John the Baptist
12-05.verse: 2nd Advent Sunday-Gospel ( Proclamation of John the Baptist) John proclaimed, " The one who is more powerful than I is coming after me, I am not worthy to stoop down and untie the thong of his sandals. I have baptized you with water, but he will baptize you with the Holy Spirit."
12-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-05.title: Mission of the Twelve
12-05.verse: Jesus said, "As you go, proclaim the good news, 'The kingdom of heaven has come near.' Cure the sick, raise the dead, cleanse the lepers, cast out demons. You received without payment, give without payment."
12-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-15.title: Messengers from John the Baptist
12-15.verse: Jesus answered the messengers, "Go and tell John what you have seen and heard: the blind receive their sight, the lame walk, the lepers are cleansed, the deaf hear, the dead are raised, the poor have good news brought to them. And blessed is anyone who takes no offense at me."
12-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-15.verse: Jesus said, "But I have a testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father has given me to complete, the very works that I am doing, testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me."
12-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-19.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-19.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-19.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-06.verse: Jesus read, "The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he has anointed me to bring glad tidings to the poor. He has sent me to proclaim liberty to captives and recovery of sight to the blind, to let the oppressed go free, and to proclaim a year acceptable to the Lord."
01-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-06.title: Jesus Cleanses  a Man with  Leprosy
01-06.verse: When he saw Jesus, he bowed with his face to the ground and begged him, "Lord, if you choose, you can make me clean." Then Jesus stretched out his hand, touched him, and said, " I do choose. Be made clean." Immediately the leprosy left him.
01-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-06.verse: But when they saw him walking on the sea, they thought it was a ghost and cried out. They had all seen him and were terrified. But at once he spoke with them, "Take courage, it is I, do not be afraid!"
01-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-12.verse: And Jesus cured many who were sick with various diseases, and cast out many demons, and he would not permit the demons to speak,  because they knew him.

01-12.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Man with an Unclean Spirit ) He cried out, "What have you to do with us, Jesus of Nazareth? Have you come to destroy us? I know who you are, the Holy One of God!" 01-23.title: Jesus Calls the First Disciple
01-23.verse: As Jesus passes along the Sea of Galilee, he saw Simon and his brother Andrew casting a net into the sea - for they were fishermen. And Jesus said to them, "Follow me and I will make you fish for people."
01-23.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-24.verse: Jesus said to the eleven: "Go into the whole world and proclaim the Gospel to every creature. Whoever believes and is baptized will be saved; whoever does not believe will be condemned."
01-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-25.verse: Jesus said to them, " The harvest is plentiful, but the labourers are few; therefore ask the Lord of the harvest to send out laborers into his harvest. Go on your way. See I am sending you out like lambs into the midst of wolves."
01-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-28.verse: Jesus said to the crowds, "This is how it is with the Kingdom of God; it is as if a man were to scatter seed on the land and would sleep and rise night and day and the seed would sprout and grow, he knows not how."

01-28.verse: Jesus said to them, " Pay attention to what you hear; the measure you give will be the measure you get, and still more will be given to you. For to those who have, more will be given; and from those who have nothing, even what they have will be taken away."

01-30.title: Jesus Heals the Gerasene Demoniac
01-30.verse: When he saw Jesus from a distance, he ran and bowed down before him, and he shouted at the top of his voice, " What have you to do with me, Jesus, Son of the most High God? I adjure you by God, do not torment me."
01-30.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-30.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals the Gerasene Demoniac) When he saw Jesus from a distance, he ran and bowed down before him, and he shouted at the top of his voice, " What have you to do with me, Jesus, Son of the most High God? I adjure you by God, do not torment me." MK(5:6,7) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-30.title: Jesus Calmed the Sea
01-30.verse: They woke him and said to him, "Teacher, do you not care that we are perishing?" He woke up, rebuked the wind, and said to the sea, "Quiet! Be still!" The wind ceased and there was great calm. Then he asked them, "Why are you terrified? Do you not yet have faith?"
01-30.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-30.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Calmed the Sea) They woke him and said to him, "Teacher, do you not care that we are perishing?" He woke up, rebuked the wind, and said to the sea, "Quiet! Be still!" The wind ceased and there was great calm. Then he asked them, "Why are you terrified? Do you not yet have faith?" MK(4:39-40) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-03.title: Disciples  Proclaimed it's Time to Repent
02-03.verse: Jesus summoned the Twelve and began to send them out two by two and gave them authority over unclean spirits. He instructed them to take nothing for the journey but a walking stick--no food, no sack, no money in their belts.
02-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

He instructed them to take nothing for the journey but a walking stick--no food, no sack, no money in their belts. MK(6:7-8) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-03.title: The Mission of the Twelve
02-03.verse: Then Jesus called the twelve and began to send them out two by two, and gave them authority over the unclean spirits. So they went out and proclaimed that all should repent.
02-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-03.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Mission of the Twelve ) Then Jesus called the twelve and began to send them out two by two, and gave them authority over the unclean spirits. So they went out and proclaimed that all should repent.  MK(6:7&12) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-03.title: Jesus Heals Many at Simon's House
02-03.verse: Now Simon's mother-in-law was in bed sick with a fever, and at once they told him about her. He went to her, took her by the hand and helped her up. And the fever left her and she began to serve them.
02-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-03.fullText: 5th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals Many at Simon's House) Now Simon's mother-in-law was in bed sick with a fever, and at once they told him about her. He went to her, took her by the hand and helped her up. And the fever left her and she began to serve them. MK(1:30-31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-03.title: The Rejection of Jesus at Nazareth
02-03.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "Prophets are not without honor, except in their hometown, and among their own relatives, and in their own house." And he was amazed at their unbelief.
02-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-03.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Rejection of Jesus at Nazareth) Then Jesus said to them, "Prophets are not without honor, except in their hometown, and among their own relatives, and in their own house." And he was amazed at their unbelief. MK(6:4-6) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-06.title: Jesus Heals Many at Simon's House
02-06.verse: And Jesus cured many who were sick with various diseases, and cast out many demons, and he would not permit the demons to speak,  because they knew him.
02-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-06.fullText: 5th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals Many at Simon's House) And Jesus cured many who were sick with various diseases, and cast out many demons, and he would not permit the demons to speak,  because they knew him. MK(1:34) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-06.title: Compassion for the Crowd
02-06.verse: As he went ashore,  he saw a great crowd, his heart was moved with pity for them, for they were like sheep without a shepherd; and he began to teach them many things.
02-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-06.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Compassion for the Crowd ) As he went ashore,  he saw a great crowd, his heart was moved with pity for them, for they were like sheep without a shepherd; and he began to teach them many things. MK(6:34) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-07.title: Healing the Sick in Gennesaret
02-07.verse: And wherever he went, into villages or cities or farms, they laid the Sick in the marketplace, and bagged him that they might touch even the fringe of his cloaks; and all who touched it were healed.
02-07.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-07.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Healing the Sick in Gennesaret ) And wherever he went, into villages or cities or farms, they laid the Sick in the marketplace, and bagged him that they might touch even the fringe of his cloaks; and all who touched it were healed.  MK(6:56) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-07.title: You are the Salt and Light
02-07.verse: Jesus said, " You are the light of the world. A city built on a hill cannot be hid. In the same way, let your light shine before others, so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father in heaven."
02-07.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-07.fullText: 5th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( You are the Salt and Light ) Jesus said, " You are the light of the world. A city built on a hill cannot be hid. In the same way, let your light shine before others, so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father in heaven." MT(5:14,16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-13.title: Jesus Cleanses a Leper
02-13.verse: 6th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cleanses a Leper ) A leper came to him begging him, and kneeling he said to him, "If you choose, you can make me clean." Moved with pity, Jesus stretched out his hand and touched him, and said to him, "I do choose. Be made clean!"  Mk(1:40-41) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-13.fullText: 6th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cleanses a Leper ) A leper came to him begging him, and kneeling he said to him, "If you choose, you can make me clean." Moved with pity, Jesus stretched out his hand and touched him, and said to him, "I do choose. Be made clean!"  Mk(1:40-41) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-13.title: Jesus Feed Four Thousand
02-13.verse: He ordered the crowd to sit down on the ground. Then, taking the seven loaves he gave thanks, broke them, and gave them to his disciples to distribute, and they distributed them to the crowd. They also had a few fish. He said the blessing over them and ordered them distributed also.
02-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-13.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Feed Four Thousand  ) He ordered the crowd to sit down on the ground. Then, taking the seven loaves he gave thanks, broke them, and gave them to his disciples to distribute, and they distributed them to the crowd. They also had a few fish. He said the blessing over them and ordered them distributed also. MK(8:6-7) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-16.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
02-16.verse: Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."
02-16.closing: Stay blessed during this beautiful time of lent!!
02-16.fullText: Ash Wednesday Gospel msg ( Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting ) Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."  MT(6:3,6,17-18) Stay blessed during this beautiful time of lent!!

02-16.title: The Yeast of Pharisees and of Herod
02-16.verse: Jesus said, " Do you have eyes, and fail to see? Do you have ears, and fail to hear? And do you not remember?"
02-16.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-16.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Yeast of Pharisees and of Herod) Jesus said, " Do you have eyes, and fail to see? Do you have ears, and fail to hear? And do you not remember?" MK(8:18) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-18.title: Question about Fasting
02-18.verse: Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot  mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast."
02-18.closing: Let's fast from anger, hate and pride that stop us from spreading the love of Jesus.
02-18.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Question about Fasting) Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot  mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast." MT(9:15) Let's fast from anger, hate and pride that stop us from spreading the love of Jesus.

02-18.title: Love for Enemies
02-18.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you, so that you may be children of your Father in heaven; for he makes his Sun rise on the evil and on good, and sends rain on the righteous and on the unrighteous."
02-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-18.fullText: 7th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Love for Enemies) Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you, so that you may be children of your Father in heaven; for he makes his Sun rise on the evil and on good, and sends rain on the righteous and on the unrighteous." MT(5:44-45) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-18.title: Judgment of the Nations
02-18.verse: And the king will answer them, " 'For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me something to drink, l was a stranger and you welcomed me, I was naked and you gave me clothing, I was sick and you took care of me, I was in prison and you visited me.' 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' "
02-18.closing: Lord help us share with the needy.
02-18.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Judgment of the Nations)  And the king will answer them, " 'For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me something to drink, l was a stranger and you welcomed me, I was naked and you gave me clothing, I was sick and you took care of me, I was in prison and you visited me.' 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' " MT(25:36,40) Lord help us share with the needy.

02-18.title: Jesus Cures a Blind Man at Bethsaida
02-18.verse: Then Jesus laid his hands on his eyes again; and he looked intently and his sight was restored, and he saw everything clearly.
02-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-18.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cures a Blind Man at Bethsaida) Then Jesus laid his hands on his eyes again; and he looked intently and his sight was restored, and he saw everything clearly. MK(8:25) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-18.title: Followers of Jesus
02-18.verse: Jesus said to them all, " For those who want to save their life will lose it, and those who lose their life for my sake will save it. What does it profit them if they gain the whole world, but lose or forfeit themselves?"
02-18.closing: Lord help us carry our daily cross!
02-18.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Followers of Jesus) Jesus said to them all, " For those who want to save their life will lose it, and those who lose their life for my sake will save it. What does it profit them if they gain the whole world, but lose or forfeit themselves?" LK(9:24-25) Lord help us carry our daily cross!

02-19.title: Jesus Calls Levi the Tax Collector
02-19.verse: Jesus answered, " Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick. I have come to call not the righteous but sinners to repentance."
02-19.closing: Repentance marks the joy of living.
02-19.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Calls Levi the Tax Collector) Jesus answered, " Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick. I have come to call not the righteous but sinners to repentance." LK(5:31-32) Repentance marks the joy of living.

02-19.title: Judging Others
02-19.verse: Jesus said, " Do not judge, and you will not be judged, do not condemn, and you will not be condemned. Forgive, and you will be forgiven."
02-19.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-19.fullText: 7th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg (Judging Others ) Jesus said, " Do not judge, and you will not be judged, do not condemn, and you will not be condemned. Forgive, and you will be forgiven." LK(6:37) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-19.title: Peter's Declaration about Jesus
02-19.verse: Jesus asked them, " But who do you say that I am?" Peter answered him, "You are the Messaiah." And he sternly ordered them not to tell anyone about him.
02-19.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-19.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Peter's Declaration about Jesus ) Jesus asked them, " But who do you say that I am?" Peter answered him, "You are the Messaiah." And he sternly ordered them not to tell anyone about him. MK(8:29-30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-19.title: Question about Fasting
02-19.verse: Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast."
02-19.closing: Lord listen to our petitions, as we fast and pray🙏🏼.

The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast." MT(9:15) Lord listen to our petitions, as we fast and pray🙏🏼.

02-24.title: Ask and You Shall Receive
02-24.verse: Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him. Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets."
02-24.closing: Believe in the power of prayers and receive the Grace of God.
02-24.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Ask and You Shall Receive ) Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him. Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets." MT(7:11-12) Believe in the power of prayers and receive the Grace of God.

02-24.title: Teaching about Divorce
02-24.verse: Jesus said," 'For this reason a man shall leave his father and mother and be joined to his wife, and the two shall become one flesh.' So they are no longer two, but one flesh. Therefore what God has joined together, let no one separate."
02-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-24.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Teaching about Divorce) Jesus said," 'For this reason a man shall leave his father and mother and be joined to his wife, and the two shall become one flesh.' So they are no longer two, but one flesh. Therefore what God has joined together, let no one separate." MK(10:7-9) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-24.title: Jesus Calls Levi the Tax Collector
02-24.verse: Jesus answered, " Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick. I have come to call not the righteous but sinners to repentance."
02-24.closing: Pray and turn to the Lord.

02-24.title: Greatest of All
02-24.verse: Jesus sat down, called the Twelve to him and said, “'If anyone wants to be first, he must make himself last of all and servant of all.' ‘Anyone who welcomes a little child such as this in my name, welcomes me; and anyone who welcomes me, welcomes not me but the one who sent me.’ “
02-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-24.fullText: Today’s Gospel Msg ( Greatest of All)  Jesus sat down, called the Twelve to him and said, “'If anyone wants to be first, he must make himself last of all and servant of all.' ‘Anyone who welcomes a little child such as this in my name, welcomes me; and anyone who welcomes me, welcomes not me but the one who sent me.’ “MK(9:35-37) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-24.title: Jonah Preached asking people to Repent
02-24.verse: Jesus said to them all, "At the judgment the men of Nineveh will arise with this generation and condemn it, because at the preaching of Jonah they repented, and there is something greater than Jonah here."
02-24.closing: Forgive us Lord, as we repent and pray.
02-24.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jonah Preached asking people to Repent ) Jesus said to them all, "At the judgment the men of Nineveh will arise with this generation and condemn it, because at the preaching of Jonah they repented, and there is something greater than Jonah here." LK(11:32) Forgive us Lord, as we repent and pray.

02-25.title: To Enter Kingdom of Heavens
02-25.verse: Jesus said, " Leave your offering there before the altar, go and be reconciled with your brother first, and then come back and present your offering."
02-25.closing: May the Lord, give us the strength to forgive and accept others.
02-25.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( To Enter Kingdom of Heavens ) Jesus said, " Leave your offering there before the altar, go and be reconciled with your brother first, and then come back and present your offering." MT(5:24) May the Lord, give us the strength to forgive and accept others.

02-25.title: Temptation of Jesus
02-25.verse: Jesus answered him, "It is written, 'One does not live by bread alone." Jesus answered, " It is written, 'Worship the Lord your God, and serve only him.' " Jesus answered, " It is said, 'Do not put the Lord your God to test.' "
02-25.closing: Prayer gives us the strength to overcome temptation.
02-25.fullText: 1st Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Temptation of Jesus ) Jesus answered him, "It is written, 'One does not live by bread alone." Jesus answered, " It is written, 'Worship the Lord your God, and serve only him.' " Jesus answered, " It is said, 'Do not put the Lord your God to test.' "  LK(4:4,8,12) Prayer gives us the strength to overcome temptation.

02-25.title: Miracle With the Power of Jesus
02-25.verse: Jesus said, " You must not stop him; no one who works a miracle in my name could soon afterwards speak evil of me. Whoever is not against us is for us."
02-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-25.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Miracle With the Power of Jesus) Jesus said, " You must not stop him; no one who works a miracle in my name could soon afterwards speak evil of me. Whoever is not against us is for us." MK(9:39-40) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-25.title: Ask and You Shall Receive
02-25.verse: Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him. Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets."
02-25.closing: Lord we ask for your Grace and forgiveness!

Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets." MT(7:11-12) Lord we ask for your Grace and forgiveness!

03-03.title: Rich Man and Lazarus
03-03.verse: The rich man said, " 'No, father Abraham; but if someone goes to them from the dead, they will repent.' He said to him, " If they do not listen to Moses and the prophets, neither will they be convinced even if someone rises from the dead.' "
03-03.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Rich Man and Lazarus) The rich man said, " 'No, father Abraham; but if someone goes to them from the dead, they will repent.' He said to him, " If they do not listen to Moses and the prophets, neither will they be convinced even if someone rises from the dead.' " LK(16:30-31) Pray for forgiveness.

03-03.title: Question about Fasting
03-03.verse: Jesus said to them, " The wedding guests cannot  mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them, can they? The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast."
03-03.closing: We need to fast from anger, hate and pride in our hearts; which helps us spread the love of Jesus.

03-03.title: Love for Enemies
03-03.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you."
03-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-03.title: Rewards for Followers
03-03.verse: Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, there is no one who has left house or brothers or sisters or mother or father or children or fields, for my sake and for the sake of the good news, who will not receive a hundredfold now in this age."
03-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MK(10:29-30) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-03.title: Request of the Mother of James and John
03-03.verse: Jesus said, " And whoever wishes to be first among you must be your slave; just as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransom for many."
03-03.closing: Lord, help us to serve people in need.
03-03.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Request of the Mother of James and John) Jesus said, " And whoever wishes to be first among you must be your slave; just as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransom for many." MT(20:27-28) Lord, help us to serve people in need.

03-08.title: Forgive and you will be Forgiven
03-08.verse: Jesus said, "Then in anger his master handed him over to the torturers until he should pay back the whole debt. So will my heavenly Father do to you, unless each of you forgives your brother and sister from your heart."
03-08.closing: Let's pray for the mercy of God, that he may give us the strength to forgive.

So will my heavenly Father do to you, unless each of you forgives your brother and sister from your heart." MT(18:34-35) Let's pray for the mercy of God, that he may give us the strength to forgive.

03-08.title: Jonah Preached asking people to Repent
03-08.verse: Jesus said to them all, "At the judgment the men of Nineveh will arise with this generation and condemn it, because at the preaching of Jonah they repented, and there is something greater than Jonah here."
03-08.closing: Self introspection marks the beginning of repentance. We are called to repent and turn towards God's ways.

03-08.title: Rich Man and Lazarus
03-08.verse: The rich man said, " 'No, father Abraham; but if someone goes to them from the dead, they will repent.' He said to him, " If they do not listen to Moses and the prophets, neither will they be convinced even if someone rises from the dead.' "
03-08.closing: Let repent and pray asking the Lord for forgiveness.

" LK(16:30-31) Let repent and pray asking the Lord for forgiveness.

03-08.title: Prayer of Repentance
03-08.verse: Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted."
03-08.closing: Lord help us to be humble!
03-08.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (  Prayer of Repentance) Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted." LK(18:13-14) Lord help us to be humble!

03-08.title: Temptation of Jesus
03-08.verse: Jesus answered him, "It is written, 'One does not live by bread alone." Jesus answered, " It is written, 'Worship the Lord your God, and serve only him.' " Jesus answered, " It is said, 'Do not put the Lord your God to test.' "
03-08.closing: Lord we pray for your grace to overcome temptations.
03-08.fullText: 1st Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Temptation of Jesus ) Jesus answered him, "It is written, 'One does not live by bread alone." Jesus answered, " It is written, 'Worship the Lord your God, and serve only him.' " Jesus answered, " It is said, 'Do not put the Lord your God to test.' "  LK(4:4,8,12) Lord we pray for your grace to overcome temptations.

03-08.title: Questions People's Faith
03-08.verse: Jesus said to them, " Truly I tell you, no prophet is accepted in the prophet's hometown. "Again, there were many lepers in Israel during the time of Elisha the prophet; yet not one of them was cleansed, but only Naaman the Syrian.”
03-08.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Questions People's Faith) Jesus said to them, " Truly I tell you, no prophet is accepted in the prophet's hometown. "Again, there were many lepers in Israel during the time of Elisha the prophet; yet not one of them was cleansed, but only Naaman the Syrian.” LK(4:24,27) Lord Jesus increase our Faith.

03-09.title: Fulfill The Commandments
03-09.verse: Jesus said, "Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven."
03-09.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven." MT(5:19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-09.title: Ask and You Shall Receive
03-09.verse: Jesus said, " If you then, who are wicked, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him. Do to others whatever you would have them do to you. This is the law and the prophets."
03-09.closing: Let us humble ourselves and ask for the Grace of God.

03-09.title: Jesus The Corner Stone
03-09.verse: Jesus said to them, " Have you never read the scriptures: 'The stone that the builders rejected has become the cornerstone; this was the Lord's doing, and it is amazing in our eyes'? "
03-09.closing: Lord gives the strength to follow your example!

" MT(21:42) Lord gives the strength to follow your example!

03-09.title: Love of God- Eternal Life
03-09.verse: Jesus said, " For God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life."
03-09.fullText: 4th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg  ( Love of God- Eternal Life ) Jesus said, " For God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life." JH(3:16) Lord, increase our faith!

03-09.title: Judgment of the Nations
03-09.verse: And the king will answer them, " 'For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me something to drink, l was a stranger and you welcomed me, I was naked and you gave me clothing, I was sick and you took care of me, I was in prison and you visited me.' 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' "
03-09.closing: Lord help us to share with the needy.

'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' " MT(25:36,40) Lord help us to share with the needy.

03-09.title: Forgive and you will be Forgiven
03-09.verse: Jesus said, "Then in anger his master handed him over to the torturers until he should pay back the whole debt. So will my heavenly Father do to you, unless each of you forgives your brother and sister from your heart."
03-09.closing: Lord Jesus give us a loving heart to forgive.

03-15.title: Jesus Heals Sick Man
03-15.verse: Jesus said to him, "Rise, take up your mat, and walk." Immediately the man became well, took up his mat, and walked. Now that day was a sabbath."
03-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-15.title: Request of the Mother of James and John
03-15.verse: Jesus said, " And whoever wishes to be first among you must be your slave; just as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransom for many."
03-15.closing: Lord give us the courage to be your witnesses to spread your word.

MT(20:27-28) Lord give us the courage to be your witnesses to spread your word.

03-15.title: Jesus Heals the Officer's Son
03-15.verse: The royal official said to him, "Sir, come down before my child dies." Jesus said to him, "You may go; your son will live." The man believed what Jesus said to him and left."
03-15.closing: Lord, we pray for all the sick to be healed!

The man believed what Jesus said to him and left." JH(4:49-50) Lord, we pray for all the sick to be healed!

03-17.verse: Jesus said, " But I have testimony greater than John's. The works that the Father gave me to accomplish, these works that I perform testify on my behalf that the Father has sent me."
03-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-17.closing: Lord, give us the strength to forgive.

03-17.verse: Jesus said, " The greatest among you will be your servant. All who exalt themselves will be humbled, and all who humble themselves will be exalted."
03-17.closing: Lord Jesus help us to be humble.

03-17.title: The Authority of the Son
03-17.verse: Today's Gospel Msg (The Authority of the Son) Jesus said, "Very truly, I tell you, anyone who hears my word and believes him who sent me has eternal life, and does not come under judgment, but has passed from death to life." JH (5:24) Lord, help us to listen to your words.

03-22.verse: Jesus said to them, "I told you that you would die in your sins, for you will die in your sins unless you believe that I am he."
03-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-22.closing: Lord we pray for the heart and mind to say yes to your will.

03-22.verse: He said to him in reply, "Sir, let it alone for one more year, until I dig around it and put manure on it. If it bears fruit next year, well and good; but if not, you can cut it down."
03-22.closing: Lord we pray asking for your forgiveness.

03-26.title: Plot to kill Jesus
03-26.verse: But one of them, Caiaphas, who was high priest that year, said to them, "You know nothing, nor do you consider that it is better for you that one man should die instead of the people, so that the whole nation may not perish."
03-26.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-26.verse: Father said to him, "My son, you are here with me always; everything I have is yours. But now we must celebrate and rejoice, because your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found. "
03-26.closing: Repent and experience the Lord's forgiveness!

03-26.title: Father and The Son
03-26.verse: Jesus said, "If I do not perform my Father's works, do not believe me; but if I am doing it, then even if you refuse to believe in me, at least believe in the work I do; then you will know for certain that the Father is in me and I am in the Father."

JH(10:37-38) Lord help our unbelief!

03-29.title: Jesus Foretells His Betrayal
03-29.verse: Jesus said, " Little children, I am with you only a little longer. You will look for me; and as I said to the Jews so now I say to you 'where I am going, you cannot come."
03-29.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-29.verse: Jesus said, " Very truly, I tell you, anyone who hears my word and believes him who sent me has eternal life, and does not come under judgment, but has passed from death to life."
03-29.closing: Lord we pray forgive us our sins.

03-29.verse: But he said to them, " Do not be alarmed; you are looking for Jesus of Nazareth, who was crucified. He has been raised; he is not here. Look, there is the place they laid him. 03-29.verse: l will arise and go to my father, and I will say to him, " Father, I have sinned against heaven and before you; I am no longer worthy to be called your son; treat me as one of your hired servants.” Father said, "My son, but now we must celebrate your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found."
03-29.closing: Lord help us realise and repent!

03-29.verse: Mary took a pound of costly perfume made of pure nard, anointed Jesus's feet, and wiped them with her hair. The house was filled with the fragrance of the perfumes.
03-29.closing: Lord forgive us, as we repent and pray.

03-31.title: Jesus Washes the Disciples Feet
03-31.verse: Jesus said, " You call me Teacher and Lord--and You are right, for that is what I am. So if I, your Lord and Teacher, have washed your feet, you ought to wash one another's feet. "
03-31.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

03-31.verse: Then Jesus cried out as he was teaching in the temple, " You know me, and you know where I am from. I have not come on my own. But the one who sent me is true, and you do not know him. I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me."
03-31.closing: We repent asking for your forgiveness Lord.

04-03.title: Jesus Shows Himself to the Disciples
04-03.verse: Later, as the eleven were at table, he appeared to them and rebuked them for their unbelief and hardness of heart because they had not believed those who saw him after he had been raised. He said to them, "Go into the whole world and proclaim the gospel to every creature."
04-03.fullText: Octave of Easter Gospel Msg ( Jesus Shows Himself to the Disciples) Later, as the eleven were at table, he appeared to them and rebuked them for their unbelief and hardness of heart because they had not believed those who saw him after he had been raised. He said to them, "Go into the whole world and proclaim the gospel to every creature." MK(16:14-15) Jesus Christ is Risen Alleluia!!

04-03.title: Jesus Teaches at the Temple
04-03.verse: Jesus cried out in the temple area as he was teaching and said, "You know me and also know where I am from. Yet I did not come on my own, but the one who sent me, whom you do not know, is true. I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me."
04-03.closing: Lord, increase our faith so that we may know you.
04-03.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Teaches at the Temple) Jesus cried out in the temple area as he was teaching and said, "You know me and also know where I am from. Yet I did not come on my own, but the one who sent me, whom you do not know, is true. I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me." JH(7:28-29) Lord, increase our faith so that we may know you.

04-03.title: Resurrection of Jesus
04-03.verse: But the Angel said to the women, " Do not be afraid; I know that you are looking for Jesus who was crucified. He is not here; for he has been  raised, as he said. Come, see the place where he lay. Then go quickly and tell his disciples, 'He has been raised from th dead, and indeed he is going ahead of you to Galilee; there you will see him.' This is my message for you."
04-03.fullText: Holy Saturday Easter Vigil- Gospel Msg ( Resurrection of Jesus)  But the Angel said to the women, " Do not be afraid; I know that you are looking for Jesus who was crucified. He is not here; for he has been  raised, as he said. Come, see the place where he lay. Then go quickly and tell his disciples, 'He has been raised from th dead, and indeed he is going ahead of you to Galilee; there you will see him.' This is my message for you." MT(28:5-7) Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!!

04-06.title: The Walk to Emmaus
04-06.verse: And it happened that, while he was with them at table, he took bread, said the blessing, broke it, and gave it to them. Then they said to each other, "Were not our hearts burning (within us) while he spoke to us on the way and opened the scriptures to us?""
04-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
04-06.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Walk to Emmaus) And it happened that, while he was with them at table, he took bread, said the blessing, broke it, and gave it to them. Then they said to each other, "Were not our hearts burning (within us) while he spoke to us on the way and opened the scriptures to us?"" LK(24:30-33) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-06.title: Jesus Dies on the Cross
04-06.verse: After this, Jesus knew that everything had now been completed and, so that the scripture should be completely fulfilled, he said, "I am thirsty. After Jesus had taken the wine he said, 'It is fulfilled'; and bowing his head he gave up his spirit."
04-06.closing: Jesus give us the strength to carry our daily Cross.
04-06.fullText: Good Friday Gospel Msg (Jesus Dies on the Cross) After this, Jesus knew that everything had now been completed and, so that the scripture should be completely fulfilled, he said, "I am thirsty. After Jesus had taken the wine he said, 'It is fulfilled'; and bowing his head he gave up his spirit." JH(19-28-30) Jesus give us the strength to carry our daily Cross.

04-06.closing: Lord help us carry our Cross.

After Jesus had taken the wine he said, 'It is fulfilled'; and bowing his head he gave up his spirit." JH(19-28-30) Lord help us carry our Cross.

04-06.title: Jesus the Light of the World
04-06.verse: Again Jesus spoke to them, saying, " I am the light of the world. Whoever follows me will never walk in darkness  but will  have the light of life."
04-06.closing: Lord help us walk in your light.
04-06.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus the Light of the World) Again Jesus spoke to them, saying, " I am the light of the world. Whoever follows me will never walk in darkness  but will  have the light of life." JH(8:12) Lord help us walk in your light.

04-06.title: Jesus Appears to Mary Magdalena
04-06.verse: Jesus said to her, "Do not cling to me, because I have not yet ascended to the Father. But go to my brothers, and tell them: I am ascending to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God."
04-06.fullText: Octave of Easter Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Appears to Mary Magdalena  ) Jesus said to her, "Do not cling to me, because I have not yet ascended to the Father. But go to my brothers, and tell them: I am ascending to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God." JH(20:17) Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!

04-07.title: Jesus Appears to the Disciples
04-07.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "Thus it is written that the Messiah would suffer and rise from the dead on the third day and that repentance, for the forgiveness of sins, would be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem."
04-07.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
04-07.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Appears to the Disciples ) Then Jesus said to them, "Thus it is written that the Messiah would suffer and rise from the dead on the third day and that repentance, for the forgiveness of sins, would be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem." LK(24:46-47) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-07.title: Father and The Son
04-07.verse: Jesus said, "If I do not perform my Father's works, do not believe me; but if I am doing it, then even if you refuse to believe in me, at least believe in the work I do; then you will know for certain that the Father is in me and I am in the Father."
04-07.closing: Lord we pray increase our faith.

JH(10:37-38) Lord we pray increase our faith.

04-07.title: Resurrection of Jesus
04-07.verse: But he said to them, " Do not be alarmed; you are looking for Jesus of Nazareth, who was crucified. He has been raised; he is not here. Look, there is the place they laid him. But go, tell his disciples and Peter that he is going ahead of you to Galilee, there you will see him, just as he told you."

He has been raised; he is not here. Look, there is the place they laid him. But go, tell his disciples and Peter that he is going ahead of you to Galilee, there you will see him, just as he told you." MK(28:6-7) Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!

04-08.title: Jesus Appears to the Disciples the 3rd Time
04-08.verse: Jesus said to them, "Cast the net over the right side of the boat and you will find something." So they cast it, and were not able to pull it in because of the number of fish." Jesus then stepped forward, took the bread and gave it to them, and the same with the fish.
04-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
