So they cast it, and were not able to pull it in because of the number of fish." Jesus then stepped forward, took the bread and gave it to them, and the same with the fish. JH(21:6,13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-08.title: Plot to kill Jesus
04-08.verse: But one of them, Caiaphas, who was high priest that year, said to them, "You know nothing, nor do you consider that it is better for you that one man should die instead of the people, so that the whole nation may not perish."
04-08.closing: Lord we repent for all times we have not lived the Christian values.

JH(11:49-50) Lord we repent for all times we have not lived the Christian values.

04-08.title: Resurrection of Jesus
04-08.verse: "Then the other disciple also went in, the one who had arrived at the tomb first, and he saw and believed. For they did not yet understand the scripture that he had to rise from the dead."
04-08.closing: Alleluia Christ has Risen Alleluia!! Stay Blessed may the risen Lord, bless you and your families abundantly with peace, joy and happiness!! Happy Easter from Agnel and Family.

For they did not yet understand the scripture that he had to rise from the dead." JH(20:8-9) Alleluia Christ has Risen Alleluia!! Stay Blessed may the risen Lord, bless you and your families abundantly with peace, joy and happiness!! Happy Easter from Agnel and Family.

04-08.title: True Disciples
04-08.verse: Jesus said to the Jews who had believed in him, "If you continue in my word, you are truly my disciples, and you will know the truth, and the truth will make you free."
04-08.closing: Lord we hunger for your words.
04-08.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( True Disciples) Jesus said to the Jews who had believed in him, "If you continue in my word, you are truly my disciples, and you will know the truth, and the truth will make you free." JH(8:31-32) Lord we hunger for your words.

04-08.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "Thus it is written that the Messiah would suffer and rise from the dead on the third day and that repentance, for the forgiveness of sins, would be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem."

LK(24:46-47) Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!!

04-28.title: Receiving Jesus
04-28.verse: Jesus said, " Very truly I tell you, whoever welcomes the one whom I send, welcomes me, and whoever welcomes me, welcomes the one who sent me."
04-28.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
04-28.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Receiving Jesus ) Jesus said, " Very truly I tell you, whoever welcomes the one whom I send, welcomes me, and whoever welcomes me, welcomes the one who sent me."JH(13:20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-28.title: Abundance of Life
04-28.verse: Jesus said, " The thief comes only to steal and kill and destroy. I came that they may have life, and have it abundantly."
04-28.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
04-28.fullText: 4th Sunday of Easter Gospel Msg (Abundance of Life ) Jesus said, " The thief comes only to steal and kill and destroy. I came that they may have life, and have it abundantly." JH(10:10) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-28.title: Eternal Life
04-28.verse: Jesus said, " And just as Moses lifted up the serpent in the wilderness, so must the Son of Man be lifted up, that whoever believes in him may have eternal life."
04-28.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
04-28.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Eternal Life) Jesus said, " And just as Moses lifted up the serpent in the wilderness, so must the Son of Man be lifted up, that whoever believes in him may have eternal life." JH(3:14-15) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-15.title: Commissioning of the Disciples
05-15.verse: Jesus said, " Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the So and of the Holy Spirit, and teaching them to obey everything that O have commanded you. And remember, I am with you always, to the end of the age."
05-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-15.fullText: Solemnity Ascension Of The Lord Gospel Msg ( Commissioning of the Disciples) Jesus said, " Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the So and of the Holy Spirit, and teaching them to obey everything that O have commanded you. And remember, I am with you always, to the end of the age."  MT(28:19-20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-15.title: Jesus the Way to the Father
05-15.verse: Jesus said to him, "I am the way and the truth and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me."
05-15.closing: Jesus is the Lord, spread the living word of God
05-15.fullText: Today’s Gospel Msg (Jesus the Way to the Father) Jesus said to him, "I am the way and the truth and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me." JH(14:6) Jesus is the Lord, spread the living word of God

05-20.title: Jesus and Peter
05-20.verse: Jesus said to him the third time, "Simon, son of John, do you love me?" Peter was distressed that he had said to him a third time, "Do you love me?" and he said to him, "Lord, you know everything; you know that I love you." Jesus said to him, "Feed my sheep."
05-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Peter was distressed that he had said to him a third time, "Do you love me?" and he said to him, "Lord, you know everything; you know that I love you." Jesus said to him, "Feed my sheep." JH(21:17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-20.title: Jesus Prays for the Disciples
05-20.verse: Jesus prayed, " Now this is eternal life, that they should know you, the only true God, and the one whom you sent, Jesus Christ. I glorified you on earth by accomplishing the work that you gave me to do."
05-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-20.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Prays for the Disciples) Jesus prayed, " Now this is eternal life, that they should know you, the only true God, and the one whom you sent, Jesus Christ. I glorified you on earth by accomplishing the work that you gave me to do." JH(17:3-4) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-20.title: The Transfiguration
05-20.verse: Then a cloud overshadowed them, and from the cloud there came a voice, "This is my Son, the Beloved; listen to him!"
05-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-20.title: Abide in Jesus
05-20.verse: Jesus said to them, " If you remain in me and my words remain in you, ask for whatever you want and it will be done for you."
05-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-20.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Abide in Jesus) Jesus said to them, " If you remain in me and my words remain in you, ask for whatever you want and it will be done for you." JH(15:7) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-20.title: Remain in Jesus Love
05-20.verse: Jesus said to them, " If you keep my commandments you will remain in my love, just as I have kept my Father's commandments and remain in his love."
05-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-20.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Remain in Jesus Love) Jesus said to them, " If you keep my commandments you will remain in my love, just as I have kept my Father's commandments and remain in his love." JH(15:10) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-25.title: Request from James and John
05-25.verse: Jesus said, " But it shall not be so among you. Rather, whoever wishes to be great among you will be your servant; whoever wishes to be first among you will be the slave of all."
05-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-25.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Request from James and John) Jesus said, " But it shall not be so among you. Rather, whoever wishes to be great among you will be your servant; whoever wishes to be first among you will be the slave of all." MK(10:44) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-25.title: Commissioning of the Disciples
05-25.verse: Jesus said to them , " All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me. Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the So and of the Holy Spirit."
05-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the So and of the Holy Spirit."  MT(28:18-19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-25.title: Promises of Advocate
05-25.verse: Jesus said to them, " When the Advocate comes, whom I will send to you from the Father, the Spirit of truth who comes from the Father, he will testify on my behalf."
05-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-05.title: Holy Body and Blood of Christ
06-05.verse: Solemnity of Most (Holy Body and Blood of Christ) Jesus said to them, "This is my blood of the covenant, which will be shed for many. Amen, I say to you, I shall not drink again the fruit of the vine until the day when I drink it new in the kingdom of God." MK14:24-25 Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Amen, I say to you, I shall not drink again the fruit of the vine until the day when I drink it new in the kingdom of God." MK14:24-25 Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-05.title: Question about  Commandment
06-05.verse: Jesus said to him, " 'You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart, with all your soul, with all your mind, and with all your strength.' The second is this, 'You shall love your neighbor as yourself.' There is no other commandment greater than these."
06-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

The second is this, 'You shall love your neighbor as yourself.' There is no other commandment greater than these." MK(12:29-31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-05.title: Jesus and Peter
06-05.verse: Jesus said to him the third time, "Simon, son of John, do you love me?" Peter felt hurt because he said to him the third time, "Do you love me?" And he said to him, "Lord, you know everything; you know that I love you." Jesus said to him, "Feed my sheep."
06-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-10.liturgicalLabel: Solemnity Feast of Sacred Heart of Jesus
06-10.labelKey: solemnity feast of sacred heart of jesus
06-10.title: Jesus fulfilled the Scripture
06-10.verse: Solemnity Feast of Sacred Heart of Jesus  ( Jesus fulfilled the Scripture ) " One of the soldier pierced his lance into his side, and immediately blood and water flowed out. For this happened so that the scripture passage might be fulfilled: "Not a bone of is will be broken." And again another passage says: "They will look upon him whom they have pierced."
06-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-10.fullText: Solemnity Feast of Sacred Heart of Jesus  ( Jesus fulfilled the Scripture ) " One of the soldier pierced his lance into his side, and immediately blood and water flowed out. For this happened so that the scripture passage might be fulfilled: "Not a bone of is will be broken." And again another passage says: "They will look upon him whom they have pierced." JH(11:34,36-37) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-10.title: Jesus the True Food and Drink
06-10.verse: Jesus said, " Those who eat my flesh and drink my blood abide in me, and I in them. This is the bread that came down from heaven, not like which your ancestors ate, and they died. But the one who eats this bread will live forever."
06-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!!
06-10.fullText: Corpus Christi Gospel Msg ( Jesus the True Food and Drink ) Jesus said, " Those who eat my flesh and drink my blood abide in me, and I in them. This is the bread that came down from heaven, not like which your ancestors ate, and they died. But the one who eats this bread will live forever." JH(6:56,58) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God. Happy Feast!!!

06-10.title: The Mission of the Twelve
06-10.verse: Jesus said, " As you go, proclaim the good news, 'The kingdom of heaven has come near. Cure the sick, raise the dead, cleanse the lepers, cast out demons. You received without payment, give without payment."
06-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-10.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg(The Mission of the Twelve) Jesus said, " As you go, proclaim the good news, 'The kingdom of heaven has come near. Cure the sick, raise the dead, cleanse the lepers, cast out demons. You received without payment, give without payment." MT(10:7-8) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-15.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
06-15.verse: Jesus said, " 'But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing.' 'But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret.'"
06-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-15.liturgicalLabel: Solemnity of Sacred Heart of Jesus
06-15.labelKey: solemnity of sacred heart of jesus
06-15.title: Jesus Makes Our Burdens Light
06-15.verse: Solemnity of Sacred Heart of Jesus  (Jesus Makes Our Burdens Light) Jesus said, " Come to me, all you that are weary and are carrying heavy burdens, and I will give you rest."
06-15.closing: May the Sacred Heart of Jesus, shower his healing and mercy on us. Happy Feast!!!
06-15.fullText: Solemnity of Sacred Heart of Jesus  (Jesus Makes Our Burdens Light) Jesus said, " Come to me, all you that are weary and are carrying heavy burdens, and I will give you rest." MT(10:28)  May the Sacred Heart of Jesus, shower his healing and mercy on us. Happy Feast!!!

06-15.title: Kingdom of God
06-15.verse: Jesus said, " It is like a mustard seed that, when it is sown in the ground, is the smallest of all the seeds on the earth. But once it is sown, it springs up and becomes the largest of plants and puts forth large branches, so that the birds of the sky can dwell in its shade."
06-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

But once it is sown, it springs up and becomes the largest of plants and puts forth large branches, so that the birds of the sky can dwell in its shade." MK(4:31-32) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-15.title: Teaching of Jesus
06-15.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you, offer no resistance to one who is evil. When someone strikes you on (your) right cheek, turn the other one to him as well."
06-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God

06-26.title: Jesus Restored A Little Girl to life
06-26.verse: He took her by the hand and said to her, " Tal' i-tha cum." Which means, "Little girl, get up!" And immediately the girl got up and began to walk about (She was twelve years of age). At this they were overcome with amazement.
06-26.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-26.title: The Narrow Gate
06-26.verse: Jesus said, "Enter through the narrow gate; fir the gate is wide and the road is leads to destruction, and there are many who take it. For the gate is narrow and the road is hard that leads to life, and there are few who find it."
06-26.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-26.title: Parable of the Lost Sheep
06-26.verse: Solemnity of Sacred Heart of Jesus ( Parable of the Lost Sheep) Jesus said, " Just so, I tell you, there will be more joy in heaven over one sinner who repents than over ninety-nine righteous person who need no repentance."
06-26.closing: Divine love of God, flows through the Sacred Heart of Jesus. Happy Feast!!!

09-04.title: Jesus Cures a Deaf Man
09-04.verse: He took him aside in private, away from the crowd, and put his fingers into his ears, and he spat and touched his tongue. Then looking up to heaven, he sighed and said to him. "Eph'pha-the," that is, "Be opened."
09-04.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-04.title: Jesus Heals Man with a Withered Hand
09-04.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "I ask you, is it lawful to do good or to do harm on the sabbath, to save life or to destroy it?" After looking around at all of them, he said to him, " Stretch out your hand." He did so, and his hand was restored.
09-04.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-04.labelKey: memorial of st teresa of calcutta
09-04.title: Jesus Calls the First Disciples
09-04.verse: Then Jesus said to Simon, " Do not be afraid, from now on you will be catching people." When they had brought their boats to shore, they left everything and followed him.
09-04.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-04.title: Question about Fasting
09-04.verse: Jesus said to them, " You cannot make wedding guests fast while the bridegroom is with them, can you? The days will come, when the bridegroom will be taken away from them, and then they will fast in those days."
09-04.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-05.title: Jesus Teaches how to Pray
10-05.verse: He said to them, "When you pray, say: Father, hallowed be your name. Your kingdom come. Give us each day our daily bread. And forgive us our sins, for we ourselves forgive everyone indebted to us. And do not bring us to the time of trail."
10-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-05.title: Teaching about Divorce
10-05.verse: Jesus said, " And the two shall become one flesh. So they are no longer two, but one flesh. Therefore what God has joined together, let no one separate."
10-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-05.title: The Parable of the Good Samaritan
10-05.verse: Jesus said, " But a Samaritan while travelling came near him; and when he saw him, he was moved with pity. He went to him and bandaged his wounds, having poured oil and wine on them. Then he put him on his own animal, brought him to an inn, and took care of him."
10-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(10:33-34) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-22.title: Parable of the Fig Tree
10-22.verse: He said to him in reply, "Sir, let it alone for one more year, until I dig around it and put manure on it. If it bear fruit next year, well and good; but if not, you can cut it down."
10-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-22.title: Jesus the cause of Division
10-22.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Do you think that I have come to establish peace on the earth? No, I tell you, but rather division. From now on a household of five will be divided, three against two and two against three."
10-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-01.title: Eternal Life
11-01.verse: Jesus said, " This is indeed the will of my Father, that all who see the Son and believe in him may have eternal life; and I will raise them up on the last day."
11-01.closing: Eternal Rest Grant unto them, O Lord, And let your perpetual light shine upon them. May they rest in peace. Amen 🙏

11-01.title: Judgment of the Nations
11-01.verse: And the king will answer them, " 'For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me something to drink, l was a stranger and you welcomed me, I was naked and you gave me clothing, I was sick and you took care of me, I was in prison and you visited me.' 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' "
11-01.closing: Eternal rest grant unto them, O Lord, and let your perpetual light shine upon them. Have mercy on them O Lord. 🙏

'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' " MT(25:36,40) Eternal rest grant unto them, O Lord, and let your perpetual light shine upon them. Have mercy on them O Lord. 🙏

11-08.title: Jesus Cleanses the Temple
11-08.verse: Jesus told those who were selling the doves, "Take these things out of here! Stop making my Father's house a market place!"
11-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-22.title: Destruction of the Temple Foretold
11-22.verse: Jesus said," As for these things that you see, the days will come when not one stone will be left upon another; all will be thrown down."
11-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-22.verse: Then he said, "Jesus, remember me when you come into your kingdom. " Jesus replied, "Truly I tell you, today you will be with me in Paradise."
11-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-27.title: Be Alert
11-27.verse: 1st Sunday of Advent Gospel Msg ( Be Alert) Jesus said, " Be on guard so that your hearts are not weigheddownwith dissipation and drunkennessandthe worriesof this life, and that day catch you unexpectedly, like a trap." LK (21:34) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

11-27.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Kingdom of God is Near ) Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, this generation will not pass away until all things have taken place. Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will not pass away." LK (21:32-33) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-05.title: Jesus Reads The Scroll of Isaiah on the Sabbath
01-05.verse: Jesus read, "The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he has anointed me to bring good news to the poor. He has sent me to proclaim release to the captives and recovery of sight to the blind, to let the oppressed go free, to proclaim the year of the Lord's favor."
01-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-05.title: Proclamation of John the Baptist
01-05.verse: John proclaimed, " The one who is more powerful than I is coming after me, I am not worthy to stoop down and untie the thong of his sandals. I have baptized you with water, but he will baptize you with the Holy Spirit."
01-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-07.title: John the Baptist talks about Jesus
01-07.verse: John said,  "You yourselves can testify that I said. I am not the Messiah, but that I was sent before him. The one who has the bride is the bridegroom; the best man, who stands and listens for him, rejoices greatly at the bridegroom's voice. So this joy of mine has been made complete. He must increase; I must decrease."
01-07.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-07.title: Baptism of Jesus

01-07.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-07.title: Jesus Walks on Water
01-07.verse: Jesus meant to pass by them, but when they saw him walking on the sea they thought it was a ghost, and cried out, for they all saw him and were terrified. But immediately he spoke to them and said, "Take heart; it is I, Do not be afraid."
01-07.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-10.title: Baptism of Jesus

01-11.title: A Preaching Tour in Galilee
01-11.verse: Jesus answered, " Let us go on to the neighboring towns, so that I may proclaim the message there also; for that is what I came out to do."
01-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-11.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( A Preaching Tour in Galilee) Jesus answered, " Let us go on to the neighboring towns, so that I may proclaim the message there also; for that is what I came out to do."  MK(1:38) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-11.title: Baptism of Jesus
01-11.verse: Jesus also had been  baptized and was praying, the heaven was opened, and the Holy Spirit descended upon him in bodily form like a dove. And a voice came from heavens, "You are  my Son, the Beloved; with you I am well pleased."
01-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-11.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Baptism of Jesus)  Jesus also had been  baptized and was praying, the heaven was opened, and the Holy Spirit descended upon him in bodily form like a dove. And a voice came from heavens, "You are  my Son, the Beloved; with you I am well pleased." LK(3:21-22) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-11.title: Jesus calls the First Disciples
01-11.verse: Today’s Gospel Msg ( Jesus calls the First Disciples ) As he passed by the Sea of Galilee, he saw Simon and his brother Andrew casting their nets into the sea; they were fishermen. Jesus said to them, "Come after me, and I will make you fishers of men." Mk(1:16-17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-11.fullText: Today’s Gospel Msg ( Jesus calls the First Disciples ) As he passed by the Sea of Galilee, he saw Simon and his brother Andrew casting their nets into the sea; they were fishermen. Jesus said to them, "Come after me, and I will make you fishers of men." Mk(1:16-17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-15.title: Wedding at Cana
01-15.verse: Jesus said to them, " Fill the jars with water." And they filled them up to the brim. He said to them, "Now draw some out, and take it to the chief steward."
01-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God
01-15.fullText: Sunday Gospel Msg (Wedding at Cana) Jesus said to them, " Fill the jars with water." And they filled them up to the brim. He said to them, "Now draw some out, and take it to the chief steward." JH(2:7-8) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God

01-15.title: Jesus Lord of the Sabbath
01-15.verse: Jesus said to them, " The sabbath was made for  humankind, and not humankind for the sabbath, so the Son of Man is lord even of the sabbath."
01-15.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-15.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Lord of the Sabbath ) Jesus said to them, " The sabbath was made for  humankind, and not humankind for the sabbath, so the Son of Man is lord even of the sabbath." MK(2:27-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-15.title: Jesus Heals a Paralytic
01-15.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals a Paralytic ) Jesus said," But so that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins" -- he said to the paralytic-- "I say to you, stand up take your mat and go to your home"  Mk(2:11-12) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-15.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals a Paralytic ) Jesus said," But so that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins" -- he said to the paralytic-- "I say to you, stand up take your mat and go to your home"  Mk(2:11-12) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-29.title: Rejection of Jesus at Nazareth
01-29.verse: 4th Ordinary Sunday  Gospel Msg ( Rejection of Jesus at Nazareth) And Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, no prophet is accepted in the prophet's hometown." Lk(4:24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-29.fullText: 4th Ordinary Sunday  Gospel Msg ( Rejection of Jesus at Nazareth) And Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, no prophet is accepted in the prophet's hometown." Lk(4:24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-29.title: Kingdom of God
01-29.verse: Jesus said to the crowds, "This is how it is with the Kingdom of God; it is as if a man were to scatter seed on the land and would sleep and rise night and day and the seed would sprout and grow, he knows not how."
01-29.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-29.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Kingdom of God) Jesus said to the crowds, "This is how it is with the Kingdom of God; it is as if a man were to scatter seed on the land and would sleep and rise night and day and the seed would sprout and grow, he knows not how." MK(4:26-27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-08.title: Intentions of the Heart
02-08.verse: Jesus said to them, " It is what comes out of a person that defiles. For it is from within, from human heart, that evil intentions come: fornication, theft, murder, adultery, avarice, wickedness, deceit, licentiousness, envy slander, pride, folly. All these evil things come from within, and they defile a person."
02-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-08.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Intentions of the Heart) Jesus said to them, " It is what comes out of a person that defiles. For it is from within, from human heart, that evil intentions come: fornication, theft, murder, adultery, avarice, wickedness, deceit, licentiousness, envy slander, pride, folly. All these evil things come from within, and they defile a person."  MK(7:20-23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-08.title: Jesus Calls the First Disciples
02-08.verse: Then Jesus said to Simon, " Do not be afraid, from now on you will be catching people." When they had brought their boats to  shore, they left everything and followed him.
02-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-08.fullText: 5th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Calls the First Disciples) Then Jesus said to Simon, " Do not be afraid, from now on you will be catching people." When they had brought their boats to  shore, they left everything and followed him. LK(5:10-11) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-08.title: Healing the Sick in Gennesaret
02-08.verse: And wherever he went, into villages or cities or farms, they laid the Sick in the marketplace, and begged him that they might touch even the fringe of his cloaks; and all who touched it were healed.
02-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-08.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Healing the Sick in Gennesaret ) And wherever he went, into villages or cities or farms, they laid the Sick in the marketplace, and begged him that they might touch even the fringe of his cloaks; and all who touched it were healed.  MK(6:56) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-21.liturgicalLabel: Feast of the Chair of St.Peter
02-21.labelKey: feast of the chair of stpeter
02-21.title: Peter The Rock
02-21.verse: Feast of the Chair of St.Peter ( Peter The Rock ) Jesus said, " And so I say to you, you are Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church, and the gates of the underworld shall not prevail against it. I will give you the keys to the kingdom of heaven. Whatever you bind on earth shall be bound in heaven; and whatever you loose on earth shall be lost in heaven."
02-21.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-21.fullText: Feast of the Chair of St.Peter ( Peter The Rock ) Jesus said, " And so I say to you, you are Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church, and the gates of the underworld shall not prevail against it. I will give you the keys to the kingdom of heaven. Whatever you bind on earth shall be bound in heaven; and whatever you loose on earth shall be lost in heaven." MT(16:18-19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-21.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
02-21.verse: Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."
02-21.closing: Let us repent and return to the Lord.
02-21.fullText: Ash Wednesday Gospel msg ( Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting ) Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."  MT(6:3,6,17-18) Let us repent and return to the Lord.

02-21.liturgicalLabel: Feast of the Chair of St.Peter

I will give you the keys to the kingdom of heaven. Whatever you bind on earth shall be bound in heaven; and whatever you loose on earth shall be lost in heaven."
02-21.closing: Lord, help us draw strength from St.Peter.
02-21.fullText: Feast of the Chair of St.Peter ( Peter The Rock ) Jesus said, " And so I say to you, you are Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church, and the gates of the underworld shall not prevail against it. I will give you the keys to the kingdom of heaven. Whatever you bind on earth shall be bound in heaven; and whatever you loose on earth shall be lost in heaven." MT(16:18-19) Lord, help us draw strength from St.Peter.

04-12.title: Jesus is Betrayed
04-12.verse: Jesus answered, "The one who has dipped his hand into the bowl with me will betray me. The Son of Man indeed goes, as it is written of him, but woe to that man by whom the Son of Man is betrayed! It would be better for that man if he had never been born."
04-12.closing: Lord we pray for strength to overcome temptation and sin.
04-12.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus is Betrayed) Jesus answered, "The one who has dipped his hand into the bowl with me will betray me. The Son of Man indeed goes, as it is written of him, but woe to that man by whom the Son of Man is betrayed! It would be better for that man if he had never been born." MT(26-23-24) Lord we pray for strength to overcome temptation and sin.

04-12.title: Jesus is Condemned To Death
04-12.verse: They said, " If you are the Messiah, tell us." He replied, "If I tell you, you will not believe; and if I question you, you will not answer. But from now on the Son of Man will be seated at the right hand of the power of God."
04-12.closing: Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a Cross.
04-12.fullText: Palm Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus is Condemned To Death ) They said, " If you are the Messiah, tell us." He replied, "If I tell you, you will not believe; and if I question you, you will not answer. But from now on the Son of Man will be seated at the right hand of the power of God." LK(67:69) Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a Cross.

04-17.title: Disciples Met Jesus
04-17.verse: Suddenly Jesus met them and said, "Greetings!" And they came to him, took hold of his feet, and worshipped him. Then Jesus said to them, " Do not be afraid; go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee; there they will see me."
04-17.closing: Happy Easter!!! Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!!
04-17.fullText: Easter Monday Gospel Msg ( Disciples Met Jesus) Suddenly Jesus met them and said, "Greetings!" And they came to him, took hold of his feet, and worshipped him. Then Jesus said to them, " Do not be afraid; go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee; there they will see me." MT(28:9-10) Happy Easter!!! Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!!

04-17.title: Disciples Met Jesus
04-17.verse: Suddenly Jesus met them and said, "Greetings!" And they came to him, took hold of his feet, and worshipped him. Then Jesus said to them, " Do not be afraid; go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee; there they will see me."
04-17.closing: Happy Easter!!! Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!!
04-17.fullText: Octave of Easter Gospel Msg ( Disciples Met Jesus) Suddenly Jesus met them and said, "Greetings!" And they came to him, took hold of his feet, and worshipped him. Then Jesus said to them, " Do not be afraid; go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee; there they will see me." MT(28:9-10) Happy Easter!!! Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!!

04-17.title: Jesus Walks on Water
04-17.verse: When they had rowed about three or four miles, they saw Jesus walking on the sea and coming near the boat, and they began to be afraid. But he said to them, "It is I. Do not be afraid."
04-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
04-17.fullText: 2nd Week od Easter Saturday’s  Gospel Msg ( Jesus Walks on Water) When they had rowed about three or four miles, they saw Jesus walking on the sea and coming near the boat, and they began to be afraid. But he said to them, "It is I. Do not be afraid." JH(6:19-20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-20.title: Jesus Appears to the Disciples
04-20.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "Thus it is written that the Messiah would suffer and rise from the dead on the third day and that repentance, for the forgiveness of sins, would be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem."
04-20.closing: Indeed Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!!
04-20.fullText: Octave of Easter Gospel Msg ( Jesus Appears to the Disciples ) Then Jesus said to them, "Thus it is written that the Messiah would suffer and rise from the dead on the third day and that repentance, for the forgiveness of sins, would be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem." LK(24:46-47) Indeed Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!!

04-20.title: Jesus the Good Shepherd
04-20.verse: Jesus said, " I am the good shepherd. I know my own and my own know me, just as the Father knows me and I know the Father. And I lay down my life for the sheep ."
04-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
04-20.fullText: 4th Sunday of Easter Gospel Msg ( Jesus the Good Shepherd ) Jesus said, " I am the good shepherd. I know my own and my own know me, just as the Father knows me and I know the Father. And I lay down my life for the sheep ." JH(10:14-15) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-27.title: The One Who Comes from Heaven
04-27.verse: Jesus said, " The Father loves the Son and has placed all things in his hands. Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life; whoever disobeys the Son will not see life, but must endure God's wrath."
04-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
04-27.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The One Who Comes from Heaven) Jesus said, " The Father loves the Son and has placed all things in his hands. Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life; whoever disobeys the Son will not see life, but must endure God's wrath." JH(3:35-36) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-27.title: Abide in Jesus
04-27.verse: Jesus said to them, " If you remain in me and my words remain in you, ask for whatever you want and it will be done for you."
04-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
04-27.fullText: 5th Sunday of Easter Gospel Msg ( Abide in Jesus) Jesus said to them, " If you remain in me and my words remain in you, ask for whatever you want and it will be done for you." JH(15:7) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-27.title: Jesus Explains Born Again
04-27.verse: Jesus answered, "Amen, amen, I say to you, no one can enter the kingdom of God without being born of water and Spirit. What is born of flesh is flesh and what is born of spirit is spirit."
04-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
04-27.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Explains Born Again) Jesus answered, "Amen, amen, I say to you, no one can enter the kingdom of God without being born of water and Spirit. What is born of flesh is flesh and what is born of spirit is spirit." JH(3:5-6) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-07.title: Jesus The Good Shepherd
05-07.verse: Jesus said, " My sheep hear my voice. I know them, and they follow me. I give them eternal life, and they will never perish."
05-07.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-07.fullText: 4th Sunday of Easter Gospel Msg ( Jesus The Good Shepherd ) Jesus said, " My sheep hear my voice. I know them, and they follow me. I give them eternal life, and they will never perish."JH(10:27-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-07.title: Jesus the Bread of Life
05-07.verse: Jesus said to them, " I am the living bread that came down from heaven. Whoever eats of this bread will live forever; and the bread that I will give for the life of the world is my flesh."
05-07.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-07.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus the Bread of Life ) Jesus said to them, " I am the living bread that came down from heaven. Whoever eats of this bread will live forever; and the bread that I will give for the life of the world is my flesh." JH(6:51) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-11.title: Jesus speaks after Washing the Disciples' Feet
05-11.verse: Jesus said, " Very truly I tell you, whoever welcomes the one whom I send, welcomes me, and whoever welcomes me, welcomes the one who sent me."
05-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-11.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus speaks after Washing the Disciples' Feet) Jesus said, " Very truly I tell you, whoever welcomes the one whom I send, welcomes me, and whoever welcomes me, welcomes the one who sent me."JH(13:20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-11.title: Fruits of being chosen
05-11.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Fruits of being chosen) Jesus said, "You did not choose me, no, I chose you; and I commissioned you to go out and to bear fruit, fruit that will last; so that the Father will give you anything you ask him in my name." JH (15:16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-11.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Fruits of being chosen) Jesus said, "You did not choose me, no, I chose you; and I commissioned you to go out and to bear fruit, fruit that will last; so that the Father will give you anything you ask him in my name." JH (15:16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-11.title: Commissioning of the Disciples
05-11.verse: Jesus said, " Go into all the world and proclaim the good news to the whole creation. The one who believes and is baptized will be saved; but the one who does not believe will be condemned."
05-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-11.fullText: Solemnity Ascension Of The Lord Gospel Msg ( Commissioning of the Disciples) Jesus said, " Go into all the world and proclaim the good news to the whole creation. The one who believes and is baptized will be saved; but the one who does not believe will be condemned."  MK(16:15-16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-11.title: Abundance of Life
05-11.verse: Jesus said, " The thief comes only to steal and kill and destroy. I came that they may have life, and have it abundantly."
05-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-11.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Abundance of Life ) Jesus said, " The thief comes only to steal and kill and destroy. I came that they may have life, and have it abundantly." JH(10:10) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-21.title: Promise of the Hly Spirit
05-21.verse: Jesus said,  " I have said these things to you while still with you; but the Advocate, the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in my name, will teach you everything and remind you of all I have said to you."
05-21.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-21.fullText: 6th Easter Sunday Gospel Msg ( Promise of the Hly Spirit) Jesus said,  " I have said these things to you while still with you; but the Advocate, the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in my name, will teach you everything and remind you of all I have said to you." JH(14:25-26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-11.title: Spirit of Truth
06-11.verse: Jesus said to them, " When the Spirit of truth comes, he will guide you to the complete truth, since he will not be speaking of his own accord, but will speak whatever he hears, and he will reveal to you the things that are  to come."
06-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-11.fullText: Holy Trinity Sunday Gospel msg  ( Spirit of Truth) Jesus said to them, " When the Spirit of truth comes, he will guide you to the complete truth, since he will not be speaking of his own accord, but will speak whatever he hears, and he will reveal to you the things that are  to come." JH(16:13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-11.title: Spirit of Truth
06-11.verse: Jesus said to them, " When the Spirit of truth comes, he will guide you into all the truth; for he will not speak on his own, but will speak whatever he hears, and he will declare to you the things that are to come."
06-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-11.fullText: Holy Trinity Sunday Gospel msg  ( Spirit of Truth) Jesus said to them, " When the Spirit of truth comes, he will guide you into all the truth; for he will not speak on his own, but will speak whatever he hears, and he will declare to you the things that are to come." JH(16:13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-11.title: The Law and the Prophets
06-11.verse: Jesus said, "Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven."
06-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-11.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Law and the Prophets) Jesus said, "Therefore, whoever breaks one of the least of these commandments and teaches others to do so will be called least in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever obeys and teaches these commandments will be called greatest in the kingdom of heaven." MT(5:19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-11.title: Love your Brother
06-11.verse: Jesus said, " So then, if you are bringing your offering to the altar and there remember that your brother has something against you, leave your offering there before the altar, go and be reconciled with your brother first, and then come back and present your offering."
06-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-11.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Love your Brother) Jesus said, " So then, if you are bringing your offering to the altar and there remember that your brother has something against you, leave your offering there before the altar, go and be reconciled with your brother first, and then come back and present your offering." MT(5:23-24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-24.liturgicalLabel: Memorial Immaculate Heart of Blessed Virgin Mary
06-24.labelKey: memorial immaculate heart of blessed virgin mary
06-24.title: Boy  Jesus in The Temple
06-24.verse: Jesus said to them, " Why were you searching for me? Did you not know that I must be in my Father's house?" Then he went down with them and came to Nazareth, and Was obedient to them. His mother treasured all these things in her heart.
06-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-24.fullText: Memorial Immaculate Heart of Blessed Virgin Mary Gospel Msg (Boy  Jesus in The Temple) Jesus said to them, " Why were you searching for me? Did you not know that I must be in my Father's house?" Then he went down with them and came to Nazareth, and Was obedient to them. His mother treasured all these things in her heart. LK(2:49-51) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-24.title: Whom to Fear
06-24.verse: Jesus said, " And even the hairs of your head are all counted. So do not be afraid, you are of more value than many sparrows."
06-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-24.fullText: 12th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg (Whom to Fear) Jesus said, " And even the hairs of your head are all counted. So do not be afraid, you are of more value than many sparrows." MT(10:30-31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-24.title: The Narrow Gate
06-24.verse: Jesus said, "Enter through the narrow gate; for the gate is wide and the road is easy that leads to destruction, and there are many who take it. For the gate is narrow and the road is hard that leads to life, and there are few who find it."
06-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-24.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Narrow Gate ) Jesus said, "Enter through the narrow gate; for the gate is wide and the road is easy that leads to destruction, and there are many who take it. For the gate is narrow and the road is hard that leads to life, and there are few who find it." MT(7:13-14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-24.title: Tree and Its Fruits
06-24.verse: Jesus said, " A good tree cannot bear bad fruit, nor can a bad tree bear good fruit. Every tree that does not bear good fruit is cut down and thrown Into the fire."
06-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-24.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Tree and Its Fruits) Jesus said, " A good tree cannot bear bad fruit, nor can a bad tree bear good fruit. Every tree that does not bear good fruit is cut down and thrown Into the fire."  MT(7:18-19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-25.title: Would-Be Followers of Jesus
06-25.verse: Jesus said, " No one who puts a hand to the plow and looks back is fit for the kingdom of God."
06-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-25.fullText: 13th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Would-Be Followers of Jesus) Jesus said, " No one who puts a hand to the plow and looks back is fit for the kingdom of God." LK(9:62) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-25.title: Hearers and Doers
06-25.verse: Jesus said, " Everyone then who hears these words of mine and acts on them will be like a wise man who built his house on rock."
06-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-25.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Hearers and Doers) Jesus said, " Everyone then who hears these words of mine and acts on them will be like a wise man who built his house on rock."  MT(7:24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-10.title: Reward
07-10.verse: Jesus said, " Whoever gives even a cup of cold water to one of these little ones in the name of a disciple-truly I tell you, none of these will lose their reward."
07-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-10.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg(Reward) Jesus said, " Whoever gives even a cup of cold water to one of these little ones in the name of a disciple-truly I tell you, none of these will lose their reward." MT(10:41) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-10.title: The Coming Persecutions
07-10.verse: Jesus said, " When they hand you over, do not worry about how you are to speak or what you are to say; for what you are to say will be given to you at that time; for it is not you who speak, but the Spirit of your Father speaking through you."
07-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-10.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg(The Coming Persecutions) Jesus said, " When they hand you over, do not worry about how you are to speak or what you are to say; for what you are to say will be given to you at that time; for it is not you who speak, but the Spirit of your Father speaking through you." MT(10:19-20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-02.title: The Canaanite Woman's Faith
08-02.verse: She said, " Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters' table." Then  Jesus answered her, "Women, great is your faith! Let it be done for you as you wish." And her daughter was healed instantly."
08-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-02.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg  ( The Canaanite Woman's Faith) She said, " Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters' table." 08-07.verse: Then Jesus told his disciples, "If any man would come after me, let him deny himself and take up his cross and follow me. For whoever would save his life will lose it, and whoever loses his life for my sake will find it. "

10-29.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-04.verse: Jesus went round the whole of Galilee teaching in their synagogues, proclaiming the good news of the kingdom and curing all kinds of disease and illness among the people.
01-04.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-11.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, "I tell you, unless your righteousness surpasses that of the scribes and Pharisees, you will not enter the kingdom of heaven."
02-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-11.verse: Jesus said to her, " Let the children be fed first, for it is not fair to take the children's food and throw it to the dogs." But she answered him, "Sir, even the dogs under the table eat the children's crumbs." Then he said to her, " For saying that, you may go- the demon has left your daughter."
02-11.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-26.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-26.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-02.verse: Jesus said to them, "I shall ask you one question. Answer me, and I will tell you by what authority I do these things. Did the baptism of John come from heaven, or was it of human origin? Answer me."
06-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-03.verse: Jesus prayed, " I gave them your word, and the world hated them, because they do not belong to the world any more than I belong to the world. I do not ask that you take them out of the world but that you keep them from the evil one."
06-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-08.verse: Jesus said to them, " David himself, inspired by the holy Spirit, said: 'The Lord said to my lord, "Sit at my right hand until I place your enemies under your feet."'
06-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-08.verse: Jesus said, " Truly I tell you, people will be forgiven for their sins and whatever blasphemes they utter; but whoever blasphemes against the Holy Spirit can never have forgiveness,  but is guilty of an eternal sin."  Jesus looking around at those seated in the circle he said, "Here are my mother and my brothers. For whoever does the will of God is my brother and sister and mother."
06-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-08.verse: Jesus called his disciples and said to them, "Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven. Blessed are those  who mourn, for they will be comforted. Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God."
06-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-09.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-22.verse: Jesus said, "The Son of Man will send his angels, and they will collect out of his kingdom all who cause others to sin and all evildoers. They will throw them into the  fiery furnace, where there will be wailing and grinding of teeth. Then the righteous will shine like the sun in the kingdom of their Father. Let anyone with ears listen."

07-29.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Explain the Parable of the Weeds) Jesus said, "The Son of Man will send his angels, and they will collect out of his kingdom all who cause others to sin and all evildoers. They will throw them into the  fiery furnace, where there will be wailing and grinding of teeth." MT(13:41-42) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-29.title: Kingdom of God
07-29.verse: Jesus said to the disciples, “The Kingdom of heaven is like a treasure buried in a field, which a person finds and hides again, and out of joy goes and sells all that he has and buys that field."
07-29.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.l
07-29.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Kingdom of God) Jesus said to the disciples, “The Kingdom of heaven is like a treasure buried in a field, which a person finds and hides again, and out of joy goes and sells all that he has and buys that field."  MT(13:44) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.l

08-14.liturgicalLabel: Feast of Assumption of The Blessed Virgin Mary
08-14.labelKey: feast of assumption of the blessed virgin mary
08-14.title: Mary's Song of Praise
08-14.verse: Feast of Assumption of The Blessed Virgin Mary ( Mary's Song of Praise ) Mary said , " My soul magnifies the Lord, and my spirit rejoices in God my Savior, for he has looked with favor on the lowliness of his servant. Surely from now on all generations will call me blessed."
08-14.closing: Happy Feast and Happy Independence Day.
08-14.fullText: Feast of Assumption of The Blessed Virgin Mary ( Mary's Song of Praise ) Mary said , " My soul magnifies the Lord, and my spirit rejoices in God my Savior, for he has looked with favor on the lowliness of his servant. Surely from now on all generations will call me blessed." LK(1:46-48) Happy Feast and Happy Independence Day.

08-14.verse: Feast of Assumption of The Blessed Virgin Mary ( Mary's Song of Praise ) Mary said , " My soul magnifies the Lord, and my spirit rejoices in God my Savior, for he has looked with favor on the lowliness of his servant. Surely from now on all generations will call me blessed."
08-14.closing: Happy Feast and Happy Independence Day!!
