Surely from now on all generations will call me blessed." LK(1:46-48) Happy Feast and Happy Independence Day!!

08-19.title: The Canaanite Woman's Faith
08-19.verse: She said, " Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters' table." Then  Jesus answered her, "Women, great is your faith! Let it be done for you as you wish." And her daughter was healed instantly."
08-19.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-19.fullText: 20th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg  ( The Canaanite Woman's Faith) She said, " Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters' table." Then  Jesus answered her, "Women, great is your faith! Let it be done for you as you wish." And her daughter was healed instantly." MT(15:27-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-19.title: The Laborers in the Vineyard
08-19.verse: The landowner said, " Am I not allowed to do what I choose with what belongs to me? Or are you envious because I am generous? So the last will be first, and the first, will be last."
08-19.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-19.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Laborers in the Vineyard) The landowner said, " Am I not allowed to do what I choose with what belongs to me? Or are you envious because I am generous? So the last will be first, and the first, will be last." MT(20:15-16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-20.title: Rich Young Man
08-20.verse: Today's Gospel Msg (Rich Young Man) Jesus said to him, " I tou wish to be perfect, go, sell your possessions, and give the money to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; then you come follow me. " MT (19:21) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-20.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Rich Young Man) Jesus said to him, " I tou wish to be perfect, go, sell your possessions, and give the money to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; then you come follow me. " MT (19:21) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-20.title: The Parable of the Wedding Banquet
08-20.verse: Then he said to his slaves, " 'The wedding is ready but those invited were not worthy. Go, therefore, into the main streets, and invite everyone you find to the wedding banquet.' For many are called, but few are chosen."
08-20.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-20.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( The Parable of the Wedding Banquet) Then he said to his slaves, " 'The wedding is ready but those invited were not worthy. Go, therefore, into the main streets, and invite everyone you find to the wedding banquet.' For many are called, but few are chosen." MT(22:8-9,14) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-26.title: Peter's Declaration about Jesus
08-26.verse: And Jesus answered him, "Blessed are you , Simon Son of Jonah! For flesh and blood has not revealed this to you, but my Father in heaven. And I tell you, you are Peter, and on this rock I will build my church, and the gates of hell will not prevail against it."
08-26.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-26.fullText: 21st Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg  ( Peter's Declaration about Jesus) And Jesus answered him, "Blessed are you , Simon Son of Jonah! For flesh and blood has not revealed this to you, but my Father in heaven. And I tell you, you are Peter, and on this rock I will build my church, and the gates of hell will not prevail against it." MT(16:17-18) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-26.title: Teachers of Law
08-26.verse: Jesus said, " Woe to you, scribes and Pharisees, you hypocrites. You are like whitewashed tombs, which appear beautiful on the outside, but inside are full of dead men's bones and every kind of filth."
08-26.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
08-26.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Teachers of Law ) Jesus said, " Woe to you, scribes and Pharisees, you hypocrites. You are like whitewashed tombs, which appear beautiful on the outside, but inside are full of dead men's bones and every kind of filth." MT(23:27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-02.title: Cross and Self Denial
09-02.verse: Then Jesus told his disciples, "If anyone would come after me, let him deny himself and take up his cross and follow me. For whoever would save his life will lose it, and whoever loses his life for my sake will find it."
09-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
09-02.fullText: 22nd Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Cross and Self Denial ) Then Jesus told his disciples, "If anyone would come after me, let him deny himself and take up his cross and follow me. For whoever would save his life will lose it, and whoever loses his life for my sake will find it." MT(16:24-25) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-02.title: Jesus Preaches in the Synagogues
09-02.verse: But Jesus said to them, " I must proclaim the goodnews of the kingdom of God to the other cities also; for I was sent for this purpose."
09-02.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
09-02.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Preaches in the Synagogues) But Jesus said to them, " I must proclaim the goodnews of the kingdom of God to the other cities also; for I was sent for this purpose." LK(4:43) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-08.title: Jesus  Lord of the Sabbath
09-08.verse: Jesus said to them, "How David went into the house of God, took the bread of offering, which only the priests could lawfully eat, ate it, and shared it with his companions." Then he said to them, "The Son of Man is lord of the sabbath."
09-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
09-08.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus  Lord of the Sabbath) Jesus said to them, "How David went into the house of God, took the bread of offering, which only the priests could lawfully eat, ate it, and shared it with his companions." Then he said to them, "The Son of Man is lord of the sabbath." LK(6:4-5)  Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-08.title: Jesus Heals Man on Sabbath
09-08.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "I ask you, is it lawful to do good or to do harm on the sabbath, to save life or to destroy it?" After looking around at all of them, he said to him, " Stretch out your hand." He did so, and his hand was restored.
09-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
09-08.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals Man on Sabbath) Then Jesus said to them, "I ask you, is it lawful to do good or to do harm on the sabbath, to save life or to destroy it?" After looking around at all of them, he said to him, " Stretch out your hand." He did so, and his hand was restored. LK(6:9-10) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-08.title: Jesus Teaches and Heals
09-08.verse: Crowd from coastal region of Tyre and Sidon came to hear him and to be healed of their diseases; and even those who were tormented by unclean spirits were cured. And all in the crowd were trying to touch him, for power came out from him and healed all of them."
09-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
09-08.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Teaches and Heals)  Crowd from coastal region of Tyre and Sidon came to hear him and to be healed of their diseases; and even those who were tormented by unclean spirits were cured. And all in the crowd were trying to touch him, for power came out from him and healed all of them." LK(6:18-19) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-09.title: Proclamation of John the Baptist
12-09.verse: John proclaimed, " The one who is more powerful than I is coming after me, I am not worthy to stoop down and untie the thong of his sandals. I have baptized you with water, but he will baptize you with the Holy Spirit."
12-09.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
12-09.fullText: 2nd Sunday Of Advent-Gospel Msg ( Proclamation of John the Baptist) John proclaimed, " The one who is more powerful than I is coming after me, I am not worthy to stoop down and untie the thong of his sandals. I have baptized you with water, but he will baptize you with the Holy Spirit." MK(1:7-8) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-09.title: Jesus Makes Our Burdens Light
12-09.verse: Jesus said, " Come to me, all you that are weary and are carrying heavy burdens, and I will give you rest."
12-09.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
12-09.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus Makes Our Burdens Light) Jesus said, " Come to me, all you that are weary and are carrying heavy burdens, and I will give you rest." MT(11:28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-16.title: Proclamation of John the Baptist
12-16.verse: 3rd Sunday of Advent - Gospel ( Proclamation of John the Baptist) John said, " I am the voice of one crying out in the wilderness, 'Make straight the way of the Lord,' " as the prophet Isaiah said.
12-16.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
12-16.fullText: 3rd Sunday of Advent - Gospel ( Proclamation of John the Baptist) John said, " I am the voice of one crying out in the wilderness, 'Make straight the way of the Lord,' " as the prophet Isaiah said. JH(1:23) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-16.title: Genealogy of Jesus
12-16.verse: Thus the total number of generations from Abraham to David is fourteen generations; from David to the Babylonian exile, fourteen generations; from the Babylonian exile to the Messiah, fourteen generations."
12-16.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
12-16.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Genealogy of Jesus) Thus the total number of generations from Abraham to David is fourteen generations; from David to the Babylonian exile, fourteen generations; from the Babylonian exile to the Messiah, fourteen generations."  MT(1:17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-23.title: Angel Appeared to Mary
12-23.verse: Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him Jesus."
12-23.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
12-23.fullText: 4th Sunday of Advent Gospel Msg (Angel Appeared to Mary)  Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him Jesus." LK(1:30-31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-23.title: Zechariah Prophesies
12-23.verse: Zechariah said, "Blessed be the Lord, the God of Israel, for he has visited his people, he has set them free, and he has established for us a saving power in the House of his servant David."
12-23.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
12-23.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg( Zechariah Prophesies) Zechariah said, "Blessed be the Lord, the God of Israel, for he has visited his people, he has set them free, and he has established for us a saving power in the House of his servant David." LK(1:68-69) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-30.title: Jesus is Presented in the Temple
12-30.verse: Simon praised God, saying, " Master, now you are dismissing your servant in peace, according to your word; for my eyes have seen your salvation, which you have prepared in the presence of all people, a light for the revelation to the Gentiles and for glory to your people Israel."
12-30.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
12-30.fullText: Feast of Holy Family Gospel Msg ( Jesus is Presented in the Temple) Simon praised God, saying, " Master, now you are dismissing your servant in peace, according to your word; for my eyes have seen your salvation, which you have prepared in the presence of all people, a light for the revelation to the Gentiles and for glory to your people Israel." LK(2:29-32) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-30.title: Jesus the Word
12-30.verse: "And the Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us, and we have seen his glory, the glory as of the Father's only Son, full of grace and truth."
12-30.closing: May the Lord Bless you this Christmas with Joy, Peace, Good Health and Happiness!! From Asher, Chris, Celine & Agnel.
12-30.fullText: Christmas Gospel Msg ( Jesus the Word) "And the Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us, and we have seen his glory, the glory as of the Father's only Son, full of grace and truth." JH(1:14) May the Lord Bless you this Christmas with Joy, Peace, Good Health and Happiness!! From Asher, Chris, Celine & Agnel.

12-30.title: John Testifies
12-30.verse: John said, " 'And the Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us, and we saw his glory, the glory as of the Father's only Son, full of grace and truth. John testified to him and cried out, saying, "This was he of whom I said, 'The one who is coming after me ranks ahead of me because he existed before me.'"
12-30.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
12-30.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( John Testifies ) John said, " 'And the Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us, and we saw his glory, the glory as of the Father's only Son, full of grace and truth. John testified to him and cried out, saying, "This was he of whom I said, 'The one who is coming after me ranks ahead of me because he existed before me.'" JH(1:14-15) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-01.title: Pharisees Question John
01-01.verse: John answered them, "I baptize you with water; but there is one among you whom you do not recognize, the one who is coming after me, whose sandal strap I am not worthy to untie."
01-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-01.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Pharisees Question John ) John answered them, "I baptize you with water; but there is one among you whom you do not recognize, the one who is coming after me, whose sandal strap I am not worthy to untie." JH(1:26-27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-01.title: John Testifies
01-01.verse: John answered them, “I baptise you with water; but standing among you, unknown to you, is the one who is coming after me; and I am not worthy to untie the strap of his sandal.”
01-01.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-01.fullText: Today’s Gospel Msg (John Testifies) John answered them, “I baptise you with water; but standing among you, unknown to you, is the one who is coming after me; and I am not worthy to untie the strap of his sandal.” JH(1:26-27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-13.title: The First Disciples
01-13.verse: When Jesus turned and saw them following him and said to them, "What are you looking for?" They said to him, "Rabbi" (which translated means Teacher), "where are you staying?" He said to them,"Come, and see." They came and saw where he was staying, and they remained with him that day. It was about four o'clock in the afternoon.
01-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-13.fullText: 2nd Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( The First Disciples ) When Jesus turned and saw them following him and said to them, "What are you looking for?" They said to him, "Rabbi" (which translated means Teacher), "where are you staying?" He said to them,"Come, and see." They came and saw where he was staying, and they remained with him that day. It was about four o'clock in the afternoon. JH(1:38-39) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-13.title: Jesus Heals Many at Simon's House
01-13.verse: Now Simon's mother-in-law was in bed sick with a fever, and at once they told him about her. He went to her, took her by the hand and helped her up. And the fever left her and she began to serve them.
01-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-13.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus Heals Many at Simon's House) Now Simon's mother-in-law was in bed sick with a fever, and at once they told him about her. He went to her, took her by the hand and helped her up. And the fever left her and she began to serve them. MK(1:30-31) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-27.title: Man with an Unclean Spirit
01-27.verse: 4th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Man with an Unclean Spirit ) Just then there was in their synagogue was a man with an unclean spirit, and he cried out, "What have you to do with us, Jesus of Nazareth? Have you come to destroy us? I know who you are, the Holy One of God!" Mk(1:23-24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-27.fullText: 4th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Man with an Unclean Spirit ) Just then there was in their synagogue was a man with an unclean spirit, and he cried out, "What have you to do with us, Jesus of Nazareth? Have you come to destroy us? I know who you are, the Holy One of God!" Mk(1:23-24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-27.title: Parable of the Sower
01-27.verse: Jesus said, " But those sown on rich soil are the ones who hear the word and accept it and bear fruit thirty and sixty and a hundredfold."
01-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
01-27.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Parable of the Sower) Jesus said, " But those sown on rich soil are the ones who hear the word and accept it and bear fruit thirty and sixty and a hundredfold." MK(4:20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-14.title: Followers of Jesus
02-14.verse: Jesus said to them all, " For those who want to save their life will lose it, and those who lose their life for my sake will save it. What does it profit them if they gain the whole world, but lose or forfeit themselves?"
02-14.closing: Lord grant us courage to take up our cross daily and follow you.
02-14.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Followers of Jesus) Jesus said to them all, " For those who want to save their life will lose it, and those who lose their life for my sake will save it. What does it profit them if they gain the whole world, but lose or forfeit themselves?" LK(9:24-25) Lord grant us courage to take up our cross daily and follow you.

02-14.title: Kingdom of Heaven
02-14.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, "I tell you, unless your righteousness surpasses that of the Scribes and Pharisees, you will not enter the kingdom of heaven."
02-14.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
02-14.fullText: 6th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Kingdom of Heaven) Jesus said to his disciples, "I tell you, unless your righteousness surpasses that of the Scribes and Pharisees, you will not enter the kingdom of heaven." MT(5:20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-23.title: Summary of Jesus' Teaching
04-23.verse: Jesus said, " I do not judge anyone who hears my words and does not keep them, for I came not to judge the world, but to save the world."
04-23.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
04-23.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Summary of Jesus' Teaching ) Jesus said, " I do not judge anyone who hears my words and does not keep them, for I came not to judge the world, but to save the world."JH(12:47) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-23.title: Jesus Appears to the Disciples
04-23.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "Thus it is written that the Messiah would suffer and rise from the dead on the third day and that repentance, for the forgiveness of sins, would be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem."
04-23.fullText: Octave of Easter Gospel Msg ( Jesus Appears to the Disciples ) Then Jesus said to them, "Thus it is written that the Messiah would suffer and rise from the dead on the third day and that repentance, for the forgiveness of sins, would be preached in his name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem." LK(24:46-47) Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!!

04-25.title: Jesus the Way to the Father
04-25.verse: Jesus said, " In my Father's house there are many dwelling places. If it were not so, would I have told you that I go to prepare a place for you?
04-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
04-25.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus the Way to the Father) Jesus said, " In my Father's house there are many dwelling places. If it were not so, would I have told you that I go to prepare a place for you? JH(14:2) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-25.title: Jesus Shows Himself to the Disciples
04-25.verse: Later, as the eleven were at table, he appeared to them and rebuked them for their unbelief and hardness of heart because they had not believed those who saw him after he had been raised. He said to them, "Go into the whole world and proclaim the gospel to every creature."
04-25.fullText: Octave of Easter Gospel Msg ( Jesus Shows Himself to the Disciples) Later, as the eleven were at table, he appeared to them and rebuked them for their unbelief and hardness of heart because they had not believed those who saw him after he had been raised. He said to them, "Go into the whole world and proclaim the gospel to every creature." MK(16:14-15) Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!

05-19.title: Mary Mother Of the Church
05-19.verse: Jesus said, " Seeing his mother and the disciple he loved standing near her, Jesus said to his mother, ‘Woman, this is your son.’ Then to the disciple he said, ‘This is your mother.’ And from that moment the disciple made a place for her in his home."
05-19.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
05-19.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Mary Mother Of the Church) Jesus said, " Seeing his mother and the disciple he loved standing near her, Jesus said to his mother, ‘Woman, this is your son.’ Then to the disciple he said, ‘This is your mother.’ And from that moment the disciple made a place for her in his home." JH(19:26-27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-04.title: Question about Resurrection
06-04.verse: Jesus said to them, "As for the dead being raised, have you not read in the Book of Moses, in the passage about the bush, how God told him, 'I am the God of Abraham, God of Isaac, and God of Jacob'? He is not God of the dead but of the living. You are greatly misled."
06-04.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-04.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Question about Resurrection ) Jesus said to them, "As for the dead being raised, have you not read in the Book of Moses, in the passage about the bush, how God told him, 'I am the God of Abraham, God of Isaac, and God of Jacob'? He is not God of the dead but of the living. You are greatly misled." MK(12:26-27) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-04.title: Jesus prays to the Father
06-04.verse: Jesus said, " Father, they are your gift to me. I wish that where I am they also may be with me, that they may see my glory that you gave me because you loved me before the foundation of the world."
06-04.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-04.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus prays to the Father) Jesus said, " Father, they are your gift to me. I wish that where I am they also may be with me, that they may see my glory that you gave me because you loved me before the foundation of the world." JH(17:24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-06.liturgicalLabel: Solemnity of The Mst Sacred Heart of Jesus
06-06.labelKey: solemnity of the mst sacred heart of jesus
06-06.title: Jesus fulfilled the Scripture
06-06.verse: Solemnity of The Mst Sacred Heart of Jesus  ( Jesus fulfilled the Scripture ) " One of the soldier pierced his lance into his side, and immediately blood and water flowed out. For this happened so that the scripture passage might be fulfilled: "Not a bone of is will be broken." And again another passage says: "They will look upon him whom they have pierced."
06-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH(11:34,36-37) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-06.title: Testimony of Jesus
06-06.verse: Jesus said to him, " If it is my will that he remain until I come, What is that to you? You follow me!"
06-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
06-06.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg ( Testimony of Jesus) Jesus said to him, " If it is my will that he remain until I come, What is that to you? You follow me!" JH(21:22) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-28.liturgicalLabel: Solemnity Feast of St.Peter and St.Paul
06-28.labelKey: solemnity feast of stpeter and stpaul
06-28.title: Peter's Declaration of Jesus
06-28.verse: Solemnity Feast of St.Peter and St.Paul ( Peter's Declaration of Jesus) Simon Peter answered, "You are the Messiah, the Son of the living God." Jesus said, " And I tell you, you are Peter, and on this rock I will build my church, and the gates of Hades will not prevail against it."
06-28.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-28.verse: Simon Peter answered, "You are the Messiah, the Son of the living God." Jesus said, " And I tell you, you are Peter, and on this rock I will build my church, and the gates of Hades will not prevail against it."

07-03.title: Jesus Heals a Paralytic
07-03.verse: Jesus said, " But so that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins" --he then said to the paralytic--"Stand up, take your bed and go to your home. "
07-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-03.title: Jesus Calls Matthew the Tax Collector
07-03.verse: Jesus heard this and said, "Those who are well do not need a physician, but the sick do. Go and learn the meaning of the words, 'I desire mercy, not sacrifice.' I did not come to call the righteous but sinners."
07-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-17.title: Jesus Makes Our Burdens Light
07-17.verse: Jesus said, " Come to me, all you that are weary and are carrying heavy burdens, and I will give you rest."
07-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
07-17.fullText: Today's Gospel Msg (Jesus Makes Our Burdens Light) Jesus said, " Come to me, all you that are weary and are carrying heavy burdens, and I will give you rest." MT(10:28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-17.title: Jesus The Lord of the Sabbath
07-17.verse: Jesus said, " But if you had known what this means, ' I desire mercy and not sacrifice,' you would not have condemned the guiltless. For the Son of Man is Lord of the Sabbath."
07-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-06.title: The Canaanite Woman's Faith
08-06.verse: She said, " Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters' table." Then Jesus answered her, "Women, great is your faith! Let it be done for you as you wish." And her daughter was healed instantly."
08-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Then Jesus answered her, "Women, great is your faith! Let it be done for you as you wish." And her daughter was healed instantly." MT(15:27-28) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-06.title: Peter's Declaration about Jesus
08-06.verse: Simon Peter answered, " You are the Messaiah, the Son of the living God." And Jesus answered him, "Blessed are you , Simon Son of Jonah! For flesh and blood has not revealed this to you, but my Father in heaven."
08-06.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

And Jesus answered him, "Blessed are you , Simon Son of Jonah! For flesh and blood has not revealed this to you, but my Father in heaven." MT(16:16-17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-29.title: True Greatness
09-29.verse: Jesus said to them, " Whoever welcomes this child in my name welcomes me, and whoever welcomes me welcomes the one who sent me; for the least among all of you is the greatest."
09-29.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-29.title: Samaritan Village Refuses to Receive Jesus
09-29.verse: When his disciples James and John saw it, they said, "Lord, do you want us to command fire to come down from heaven and consume them?" But he turned and rebuked them.
09-29.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-18.title: Sin against the Holy Spirit
10-18.verse: Jesus said, " And everyone who speaks a word against the Son of Man will be forgiven; but whoever blasphemes against the Holy Spirit will not be forgiven."
10-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-18.title: Dishonest Judge and Persistent Widow
10-18.verse: Jesus said, "Pay attention to what the dishonest judge says. Will not God then do justice for his chosen ones who call out to him day and night? Will he be slow to answer them?"
10-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-19.title: Jesus the Servant Master
10-19.verse: Then Jesus said to them, " For the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life a ransomfor many."
10-19.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-19.title: Parable of the of the Rich Fool
10-19.verse: Jesus said to them, " Take care! Be on your guard against all kinds of greed; for one's life does not consist in the abundance of possessions."
10-19.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-17.title: The New Commandment
05-17.verse: Jesus said, " I give you a new commandment: love one another; you must love one another just as I have loved you."
05-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-24.title: Promise of the Holy Spirit
05-24.verse: Jesus said, " I have said these things to you while still with you; but the Advocate, the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in my name, will teach you everything and remind you of all I have said to you."
05-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

JH(14:25-26) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

05-24.title: Words of Jesus
05-24.verse: Jesus answered and said to him, "Whoever loves me will keep my word, and my Father will love him, and we will come to him and make our dwelling with him."
05-24.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-16.title: Love for Enemies
06-16.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you, so that you may be children of your Father in heaven; for he makes his Sun rise on the evil and on good, and sends rain on the righteous and on the unrighteous."
06-16.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MT(5:44-45) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

06-17.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
06-17.verse: Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."
06-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God!

MT(6:3,6,17-18) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God!

06-21.title: Feeding Five Thousand
06-21.verse: Jesus then took the five loaves and the two fish, raised his eyes to heaven, and said the blessing over them; then he broke them and handed them to his disciples to distribute among the crowd."
06-21.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

LK(9:16) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-05.title: The Mission of The Seventy
07-05.verse: Jesus said to them, " The harvest is plentiful, but the labourers are few; therefore ask the Lord of the harvest to send out laborers into his harvest. Go on your way. See, I am sending you out like lambs into the midst of wolves."
07-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-07.verse: Jesus then said to his disciples, " The harvest is plentiful, but the labourers are few; therefore ask the Lord of the harvest to send out laborers into the harvest. "
07-07.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-09.verse: Jesus said, " Cure the sick, raise the dead, cleanse the lepers, cast out demons. You received without payment, give without payment."
07-09.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-14.title: Woe to Unrepentant Cities
07-14.verse: Jesus said, " Woe to you, Cho-ra-zin! Woe to you, Beth-sa' i-da! For if the deeds of power done in you had been done in Tyre and Sidon, they would have repented long ago in sackcloth and ashes."
07-14.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-19.verse: But the Lord answered her, " Martha, Martha, you are worried and distracted by many things; there is need of only one thing. Mary has chosen the better part, which will not be taken away from her."
07-19.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

07-23.title: Purpose of the Parable
07-23.verse: Jesus said, " To you it has been given to know the secrets of the kingdom of heaven, but to them it has not been given. But blessed are your eyes, for they see, and your ears, for the hear. Truly I tell you, many prophets and righteous people longed to see what you see, but did not see it, and to hear what you hear, but did not hear it."
07-23.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-16.title: Jesus the cause of Division
08-16.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Do you think that I have come to establish peace on the earth? No, I tell you, but rather division. From now on a household of five will be divided, three against two and two against three."
08-16.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-21.title: The Greatest Commandment
08-21.verse: Jesus said, " 'You shall love your God with all your heart, and with all your soul, and with all your mind.' This is the greatest and first commandment. And the second is like it: 'You shall love your neighbour as yourself.' "
08-21.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

08-25.verse: Jesus said, " Woe to you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! For you clean the outside of the cup and of the plate, but inside they are full of greed and self-indulgence."
08-25.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-03.title: Jesus Calls the First Disciples
09-03.verse: Then Jesus said to Simon, " Do not be afraid, from now on you will be catching people." When they had brought their boats to shore, they left everything and followed him.
09-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

09-17.title: Sinful Woman Forgiven
09-17.verse: Jesus said, " Therefore, I tell you, her sins, which were many, have been forgiven; hence, she has shown great love. But the one to whom little is forgiven, loves little." Then he said to her, "Your sins are forgiven. Your faith has saved you; go in peace. "
09-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

" LK(7:47-48, 50) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-03.title: Jesus Rejoices
10-03.verse: The seventy-two came back rejoicing, saying, "Lord, even the demons submit to us when we use your name!" And he said to them, "I watched Satan fall like lightning from heaven."
10-03.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-04.verse: 27th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg (Disciples request Lord Increase our Faith) Jesus said to them, " If you had faith the size of a mustard seed, you could say to this mulberry tree, 'Be uprooted and planted in the sea,' and it would obey you." LK (17:6) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-10.verse: Jesus replied, "Blessed rather are those who hear the word of God and obey it."
10-10.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-13.title: Jesus at Denounces Pharisees and Lawyers
10-13.verse: Then the Lord said to him, " Now you Pharisees clean the outside of the cup and of the dish, but inside you are full of greed and wickedness."
10-13.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-27.title: Jesus Chooses the Twelve Apostles
10-27.verse: Now during those days he went out to the mountain to pray; and he spent the night in prayer to God. And when day came, he called his disciples and chose twelve of them, whom he also named apostles.
10-27.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

10-30.title: Jesus Heals a Man with Dropsy on Sabbath
10-30.verse: Then Jesus said to them, "If one of you has a child or an ox that has fallen into a well, will you not immediately pull it out on a sabbath day?"
10-30.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-18.title: Angel Appeared to Zechariah
12-18.verse: But the angel said to him, "Do not be afraid, Zechariah, because your prayer has been heard. Your wife Elizabeth will bear you a son, and you shall name him John."
12-18.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

12-22.title: Birth of John the Baptist
12-22.verse: He asked for a tablet and wrote, "John is his name," and all were amazed. Immediately his mouth was opened, his tongue freed, and he began to speak, praising God."
12-22.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-08.title: Jesus Cleanses  a Man with  Leprosy
01-08.verse: Jesus stretched out his hand, touched him, and said, " Yes I do wish. Be made clean." And the leprosy left him immediately.
01-08.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-16.title: Jesus  Calls Levi
01-16.verse: Today's Gospel Msg ( Jesus  Calls Levi) Jesus heard this and said to them, "Those who are well do not need a physician, but the sick do. I did not come to call the righteous but sinners."  Mk(2:17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

01-17.title: John's Testimony
01-17.verse: John the Baptist saw Jesus coming toward him and said, "Behold, the Lamb of God, who takes away the sin of the world."
01-17.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

02-05.title: Death of John the Baptist
02-05.verse: King Herod heard about Jesus, for his fame had become wide spread, and people were saying, "John the Baptist has been raised from the dead; That is why mighty powers are at work in him." Others were saying, "He is Elijah"; still others, "He is a prophet like any of the prophets." But when Herod learned of it, he said, "It is John whom I beheaded. He has been raised up.""
02-05.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Others were saying, "He is Elijah"; still others, "He is a prophet like any of the prophets." But when Herod learned of it, he said, "It is John whom I beheaded. He has been raised up."" 02-09.title: Tradition of the Elders
02-09.verse: Jesus said to them, " Isaiah prophesied rightly about you hypocrites, as it is written: 'This people honors me with their lips, but their hearts are far from me; In vain do they worship me, teaching as human precepts as doctrines.' You disregard God's commandment but cling to human tradition."
02-09.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

You disregard God's commandment but cling to human tradition."  MK(7:6-8) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

04-14.title: Love of God- Eternal Life
04-14.verse: " For God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life.”
04-14.fullText: 2nd Week of Easter Wednesday's Gospel Msg  ( Love of God- Eternal Life ) " For God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life.” JH(3:16) Jesus died for our sins.

A.title: The Walk to Emmaus
A.verse: And it happened that, while he was with them at table, he took bread, said the blessing, broke it, and gave it to them. Then they said to each other, "Were not our hearts burning (within us) while he spoke to us on the way and opened the scriptures to us?""
A.closing: Indeed Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!!

Then they said to each other, "Were not our hearts burning (within us) while he spoke to us on the way and opened the scriptures to us?"" LK(24:30-33) Indeed Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!!

B.title: Escape to Egypt
B.verse: When the Magi had departed, behold, the angel of the Lord appeared to Joseph in a dream and said, "Rise, take the child and his mother, flee to Egypt, and stay there until I tell you. Herod is going to search for the child to destroy him."
B.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Herod is going to search for the child to destroy him." MT(2:13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

C.title: John Testifies
C.verse: John said, " 'And the Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us, and we saw his glory, the glory as of the Father's only Son, full of grace and truth. John testified to him and cried out, saying, "This was he of whom I said, 'The one who is coming after me ranks ahead of me because he existed before me.'"
C.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

default.closing: Indeed Jesus Christ is risen Alleluia!!

default.title: Angel Appeared in a Dream
default.verse: Feast day of St.Joseph (Angel Appeared in a Dream) Angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, " Joseph son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary as your wife, for the child conceived in her is from the Holy Spirit. default.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: Living Water
A.verse: Jesus said to her, " Everyone who drinks of this water will be thirsty again, but those who drink of the water that I will give them will never be thirsty. The water that I will give them will become in them a spring of water gushing up to eternal life. "
A.closing: Lord Jesus give us your living waters.

B.title: Jesus Cleanses the Temple
B.verse: His disciples remembered the words of scripture, "Zeal for your house will consume me." At this the Jews answered and said to him, "What sign can you show us for doing this?" Jesus answered and said to them, "Destroy this temple and in three days I will raise it up."
B.closing: Jesus cleanse us with your love.

At this the Jews answered and said to him, "What sign can you show us for doing this?" Jesus answered and said to them, "Destroy this temple and in three days I will raise it up." JH(2:17-19) Jesus cleanse us with your love.

C.title: Parable of the Fig Tree
C.verse: He said to him in reply, "Sir, let it alone for one more year, until I dig around it and put manure on it. If it bears fruit next year, well and good; but if not, you can cut it down."
C.closing: Lord we pray asking for your forgiveness.

B.title: Love of God- Eternal Life
B.verse: Jesus said, " For God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life."
B.closing: Lord, increase our faith!
B.fullText: 4th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg  ( Love of God- Eternal Life ) Jesus said, " For God so loved the world that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone who believes in him may not perish but may have eternal life." JH(3:16) Lord, increase our faith!

C.title: Parable of the Prodigal Son
C.verse: l will arise and go to my father, and I will say to him, " Father, I have sinned against heaven and before you; I am no longer worthy to be called your son; treat me as one of your hired servants.” Father said, "My son, but now we must celebrate your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found."
C.closing: Lord help us realise and repent!

LK(15:18-19,32) Lord help us realise and repent!

A.title: Jesus is Condemned To Death
A.verse: Jesus said to him, "You have said so. But I tell you, From now on you will see the Son of Man seated at the right hand of Power and coming on the clouds of heaven."
A.closing: Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a Cross. Therefore God has highly exalted him and bestowed on him the name that is above every name.

But I tell you, From now on you will see the Son of Man seated at the right hand of Power and coming on the clouds of heaven." MT(26:64) Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a Cross. Therefore God has highly exalted him and bestowed on him the name that is above every name.

B.title: Jesus is annointed at Bethany
B.verse: Palm Sunday Gospel Msg (Jesus is annointed at Bethany ) Jesus said, "Let her alone. Why do you make trouble for her? She has done a good thing for me. The poor you will always have with you, and whenever you wish you can do good to them, but you will not always have me. She has done what she could. She has anticipated anointing my body for burial. Amen, I say to you, wherever the gospel is proclaimed to the whole world, what she has done will be told in memory of her." MK (14:6-9) Christ became obedient unto death, even death on a cross.

A.title: Jesus is Named
A.verse: Mary Mother of God Solemnity ( Jesus is Named ) Then the shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all they had heard and seen, just as it had been told to them. When eight days were completed for his circumcision, he was named Jesus, the name given to him by the angel before he was conceived in the womb.
A.closing: Happy New year 2021 wishes to each one of you and your families!! May the Almighty bless and keep you'll safe during this year!! From Agnel and Family.

B.title: Jesus Calls Matthew
B.verse: Today's Feast of Matthew the Apostle (Jesus Calls Matthew) As Jesus was walking along, he saw a man called Matthew sitting at the tax both; and he said to him, " Follow me." And he got up and followed him. Jesus said, " Go and learn what this means, 'I desire mercy, not sacrifies.' For I have come to call not the righteous but sinners."
B.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

MT(9:9,13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

C.title: Coming Persecution
C.verse: Today's Feast day of St. Stephen the Apostle ( Coming Persecution) Jesus said, " Brother will betray brother to death, and a father his child, and children will rise against parents and have them put to death, and you will be hated by all because  of my name. But the one who endures to the end will be saved."
C.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: Temptation of Jesus
A.verse: Jesus answered him, "It is written, 'One does not live by bread alone." Jesus answered, " It is written, 'Worship the Lord your God, and serve only him.' " Jesus answered, " It is said, 'Do not put the Lord your God to test.' "
A.closing: Prayer gives us the strength to overcome temptation.
A.fullText: 1st Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Temptation of Jesus ) Jesus answered him, "It is written, 'One does not live by bread alone." Jesus answered, " It is written, 'Worship the Lord your God, and serve only him.' " Jesus answered, " It is said, 'Do not put the Lord your God to test.' "  LK(4:4,8,12) Prayer gives us the strength to overcome temptation.

B.title: Jesus Began Preaching
B.verse: Now after John was arrested, Jesus came to Galilee, proclaiming the good news of God, and saying, "The time is fulfilled, and the kingdom of God has come near; repent, and believe in the good news. "
B.closing: Jesus forgives everyone who repents!

" MK(1:14-15) Jesus forgives everyone who repents!

A.title: Jesus the Resurection and the life- Jesus Raises Lazarus to LifeI
A.verse: 5th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg- ( Jesus the Resurection and the life- Jesus Raises Lazarus to LifeI) Jesus said to Martha, "I am the resurrection and the life; whoever believes in me, even if he dies, will live, and everyone who lives and believes in me, will never die, Do you belive this?" JN (11:25-26) Lord increase our faith.
A.fullText: 5th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg- ( Jesus the Resurection and the life- Jesus Raises Lazarus to LifeI) Jesus said to Martha, "I am the resurrection and the life; whoever believes in me, even if he dies, will live, and everyone who lives and believes in me, will never die, Do you belive this?" JN (11:25-26) Lord increase our faith.

B.title: Eternal Life
B.verse: Jesus said, "Amen, amen, I say to you, unless a grain of wheat falls to the ground and dies, it remains just a grain of wheat; but if it dies, it produces much fruit. Whoever loves his life loses it, and whoever hates his life in this world will preserve it for eternal life."
B.closing: Lord, forgive us as we repent.
B.fullText: 5th Sunday of Lent Gospel Msg ( Eternal Life)  Jesus said, "Amen, amen, I say to you, unless a grain of wheat falls to the ground and dies, it remains just a grain of wheat; but if it dies, it produces much fruit. Whoever loves his life loses it, and whoever hates his life in this world will preserve it for eternal life." JH(12:24-25) Lord, forgive us as we repent.

C.title: Jesus Forgives the Women
C.verse: Then Jesus straightened up and said to her, "Woman, where are they? Has no one condemned you?" She replied, "No one, sir." Then Jesus said, "Neither do I condemn you. Go, (and) from now on do not sin any more."
C.closing: Lord, give us the strength to forgive.

A.title: Jesus Dies on the Cross
A.verse: After this, Jesus knew that everything had now been completed and, so that the scripture should be completely fulfilled, he said, "I am thirsty. After Jesus had taken the wine, he said, 'It is fulfilled'; and bowing his head, he gave up his spirit."
A.closing: Lord, we pray give us the courage to carry our cross, and be your witnesses!

B.closing: Lord, help us be witnesses to the Cross.

A.title: Resurrection of Jesus
A.verse: But he said to them, " Do not be alarmed; you are looking for Jesus of Nazareth, who was crucified. He has been raised; he is not here. Look, there is the place they laid him. But go, tell his disciples and Peter that he is going ahead of you to Galilee, there you will see him, just as he told you."
A.closing: Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!

A.title: Abundance of Life
A.verse: Jesus said, " The thief comes only to steal and kill and destroy. I came that they may have life, and have it abundantly."
A.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

B.title: Jesus the Good Shepherd
B.verse: Jesus said, " I am the good shepherd. I know my own and my own know me, just as the Father knows me and I know the Father. And I lay down my life for the sheep ."
B.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
B.fullText: 4th Sunday of Easter Gospel Msg ( Jesus the Good Shepherd ) Jesus said, " I am the good shepherd. I know my own and my own know me, just as the Father knows me and I know the Father. And I lay down my life for the sheep ." JH(10:14-15) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

C.title: Jesus The Good Shepherd
C.verse: Jesus said, " My sheep hear my voice. I know them, and they follow me. I give them eternal life, and they will never perish."
C.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: Jesus the Way to the Father
A.verse: Jesus said, " I am the Way; the Truth and the Life. No one can come to the Father except through me. Very truly, I tell you, the one who believes in me will also do the works that I do and, in fact, will do greater works than these because I am going to the Father."
A.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Very truly, I tell you, the one who believes in me will also do the works that I do and, in fact, will do greater works than these because I am going to the Father." JH(14:6,12) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

B.title: Abide in Jesus
B.verse: Jesus said to them, " If you remain in me and my words remain in you, ask for whatever you want and it will be done for you."
B.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

B.title: Jesus Calls Us Friends
B.verse: Jesus said, " I do not call you servants any longer, because the servant does not know what the master is doing; but I have called you friends, because I have made know to you everything that I have heard from my Father."

A.title: Jesus Makes Our Burdens Light
A.verse: Jesus said, " Come to me, all you that are weary and are carrying heavy burdens, and I will give you rest. Take my yoke upon you, and learn from me; for I am gentle and humble in heart, and you will find rest for your souls. For my yoke is easy, and my burden is light."
A.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

B.liturgicalLabel: Solemnity Feast of Sacred Heart of Jesus
B.labelKey: solemnity feast of sacred heart of jesus
B.title: Jesus fulfilled the Scripture
B.verse: Solemnity Feast of Sacred Heart of Jesus  ( Jesus fulfilled the Scripture ) " One of the soldier pierced his lance into his side, and immediately blood and water flowed out. For this happened so that the scripture passage might be fulfilled: "Not a bone of is will be broken." And again another passage says: "They will look upon him whom they have pierced."
B.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.liturgicalLabel: Feast of St. Thomas the Appostle of India
A.labelKey: feast of st thomas the appostle of india
A.title: Thomas and Jesus
A.verse: Feast of St. Thomas the Appostle of India- Gospel Msg (Thomas and Jesus) Thomas answered and said to Jesus, "My Lord and my God!" Jesus said to him, "Have you come to believe because you have seen me? Blessed are those who have not seen and yet have come to believed." JN (20:28-29) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

default.title: Parable of the Sower
default.verse: Jesus  said, " But as for what was sown on good soil, this is the one who hears the word and understands  it, who indeed bears fruit and yields, in one case hundredfold, in an sixty and in another thirty ."
default.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: Parable of the Weeds among the Wheat
A.verse: Jesus  said, " Let both of them grow together until the harvest, and at harvest time this time I will tell the reapers collective weeds first and bind them in bundles to be burned, but gather the wheat into my barns."
A.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

default.title: Kingdom of Heaven
default.verse: Jesus said to the disciples, “The Kingdom of heaven is like a net thrown into the sea, which collects fish of every kind. When it is full they haul it ashore and sit down to put what is good into buckets. What is bad they throw away."
default.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.l

A.title: The Canaanite Woman's Faith
A.verse: She said, " Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters' table." Then  Jesus answered her, "Women, great is your faith! Let it be done for you as you wish." And her daughter was healed instantly."
A.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

B.title: Jesus the True Food and Drink

default.title: Peter's Declaration

A.title: Followers of Jesus
A.verse: Jesus said, "For whoever wishes to save his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life for my sake will find it. What profit would there be for one to gain the whole world and forfeit his life? Or what can one give in exchange for his life?
A.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: The greatest commandment

A.title: Nativity Of the Lord
A.verse: But the angel said to them, "Do not be afraid; for see-I am bringing you good news of great joy for all the people: to you is born this day in the city of David a Savior, who is the Messiah, the Lord. This will be a sign for you: you will find a child wrapped in bands of cloth and lying in a manger."
A.closing: May the Lord bless you and your families this Christmas with Love, Joy, Peace & Good Health! Merry Christmas from Agnel and Family 🌲
A.fullText: Christmas Gospel Msg (Nativity Of the Lord ) But the angel said to them, "Do not be afraid; for see-I am bringing you good news of great joy for all the people: to you is born this day in the city of David a Savior, who is the Messiah, the Lord. This will be a sign for you: you will find a child wrapped in bands of cloth and lying in a manger." LK(2:10-12) May the Lord bless you and your families this Christmas with Love, Joy, Peace & Good Health! Merry Christmas from Agnel and Family 🌲

B.closing: May the Lord Bless you this Christmas with Joy, Peace, Good Health and Happiness!! From Asher, Chris, Celine & Agnel.

A.title: Kingdom of God is at Hand
A.verse: Jesus said, " The people who sit in darkness have seen a great light, on those dwelling in a land overshadowed by death light has arisen." From that time on, Jesus began to preach and say, "Repent, for the kingdom of heaven is at hand."
A.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
A.fullText: 3rd Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Kingdom of God is at Hand) Jesus said, " The people who sit in darkness have seen a great light, on those dwelling in a land overshadowed by death light has arisen." From that time on, Jesus began to preach and say, "Repent, for the kingdom of heaven is at hand." MT(4:16-17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

B.title: Jesus calls the First Disciples
B.verse: 3rd Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus calls the First Disciples ) As he passed by the Sea of Galilee, he saw Simon and his brother Andrew casting their nets into the sea; they were fishermen. Jesus said to them, "Come after me, and I will make you fishers of men." Mk(1:16-17) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

C.title: Jesus Reads The Scroll on Sabbath
C.verse: Jesus read, " The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he has anointed me to bring good news to the poor. He has sent me to proclaim release to the captives and recovery of sight to the blind, to let the oppressed go free. To proclaim the year of the Lord's favour."
C.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: The Beatitudes
A.verse: Jesus called his disciples and said to them, "Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven. Blessed are those  who mourn, for they will be comforted. Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God."
A.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

B.title: Man with an Unclean Spirit
B.verse: 4th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Man with an Unclean Spirit ) Just then there was in their synagogue was a man with an unclean spirit, and he cried out, "What have you to do with us, Jesus of Nazareth? Have you come to destroy us? I know who you are, the Holy One of God!" Mk(1:23-24) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: You are the Salt and Light
A.verse: Jesus said, " You are the light of the world. A city built on a hill cannot be hid. In the same way, let your light shine before others, so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father in heaven."
A.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

B.title: Jesus Heals Many at Simon's House
B.verse: Now Simon's mother-in-law was in bed sick with a fever, and at once they told him about her. He went to her, took her by the hand and helped her up. And the fever left her and she began to serve them.
B.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: Kingdom of Heaven
A.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, "I tell you, unless your righteousness surpasses that of the Scribes and Pharisees, you will not enter the kingdom of heaven."
A.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

B.title: Jesus Cleanses a Leper
B.verse: 6th Ordinary Sunday Gospel Msg ( Jesus Cleanses a Leper ) A leper came to him begging him, and kneeling, he said to him, "If you choose, you can make me clean." Moved with pity, Jesus stretched out his hand and touched him, and said to him, "I do choose. Be made clean!"  Mk(1:40-41) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

C.title: Blessings and Woes
C.verse: Jesus looked at his disciples and said, "Blessed are you who are poor, for yours is the kingdom of God. "Blessed are you who are hungry now, for you will be filled. "Blessed are you who weep now,for you will laugh."
C.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: Concerning Almsgiving, Prayer and Fasting
A.verse: Jesus said, " But when you give alms, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing." "But whenever you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father in secret." "But when you fast, put oil on your head and wash your face, so that your fasting may be seen not by others but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you."
A.closing: Let us all pray and repent this lent.

MT(6:3,6,17-18) Let us all pray and repent this lent.

A.title: Dream of Joseph
A.verse: Solemnity Feast of St.Joseph ( Dream of Joseph) Angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, " Joseph son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary as your wife, for the child conceived in her is from the Holy Spirit. She will bear a son, and you are to name him Jesus, for he will save his people from their sins."
A.closing: Lord, increase our faith like St.Joseph.

A.title: Jesus Washes the Disciples Feet
A.verse: Jesus said, " Do you know what I have done? You call me Teacher and Lord--and You are right, for that is what I am. So if I, your Lord and Teacher, have washed your feet, you ought to wash one another's feet. "
A.closing: Help us to become humble Lord.

B.title: Love of Jesus
B.verse: Jesus said to them, " No one has greater love than this, to lay down one's life for one's friends. You are my friends if you do what I command you."

C.verse: Jesus said, " I have said these things to you while still with you; but the Advocate, the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in my name, will teach you everything and remind you of all I have said to you."
C.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

default.title: Jesus Restored A Little Girl to life
default.verse: He took her by the hand and said to her, " Tal' i-tha cum." Which means, "Little girl, get up!" And immediately the girl got up and began to walk about (She was twelve years of age). At this they were overcome with amazement.
default.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: Power of Praying Together
A.verse: Jesus said, " Again, truly I tell you, if two of you agree on earth about anything you ask, it will be done for you by my Father in heaven. For where two or three are gathered in my name, I am among them."
A.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

For where two or three are gathered in my name, I am among them." MT(18:19-20)  Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

B.title: Jesus Cures a Deaf Man
B.verse: He took him aside in private, away from the crowd, and put his fingers into his ears, and he spat and touched his tongue. Then looking up to heaven, he sighed and said to him. "Eph'pha-the," that is, "Be opened."
B.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

B.title: The Rich Man
B.verse: Jesus said, " Children, how hard it is to enter the kingdom of God! It is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for someone who is rich to enter the kingdom of God."
B.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

C.title: Jesus Heals Ten Lepers
C.verse: Jesus said in reply, "Were not ten cleansed? Where are the other nine? Has none but this foreigner returned to give thanks to God?" Then he said to him, "Stand up and go; your faith has saved you."
C.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: The greatest commandment

C.title: Prayer of Repentance
C.verse: Jesus said, " But the tax collector stood off at a distance and would not even raise his eyes to heaven but beat his breast and prayed, 'O God, be merciful to me a sinner.' I tell you, the latter went home justified, not the former; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and the one who humbles himself will be exalted."
C.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: Judgment of the Nations
A.verse: And the king will answer them, " 'For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me something to drink, l was a stranger and you welcomed me, I was naked and you gave me clothing, I was sick and you took care of me, I was in prison and you visited me.' 'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' "
A.closing: Eternal rest grant unto them, O Lord, and let your perpetual light shine upon them. Have mercy on them; Oh, Lord, have mercy on them!🙏🏼🙏🏼🙏🏼

'Truly I tell you, just as you did it to one of the least of these who are members of the family, you did it to me.' " MT(25:36,40) Eternal rest grant unto them, O Lord, and let your perpetual light shine upon them. Have mercy on them; Oh, Lord, have mercy on them!🙏🏼🙏🏼🙏🏼

B.title: Eternal Life
B.verse: Jesus said, " This is indeed the will of my Father, that all who see the Son and believe in him may have eternal life; and I will raise them up on the last day."
B.closing: Eternal Rest Grant unto them, O Lord, And let your perpetual light shine upon them. May they rest in peace. Amen 🙏

A.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

C.title: Coming of the Son of Man
C.verse: "Be sure of this, if the master of the house had known the hour of night when the thief was coming, he would have stayed awake and not let his house be broken into. So too, you also must be prepared, for at an hour you do not expect, the Son of Man will come."

B.title: Immaculate Conception
B.verse: Feast of Annunciation ( Immaculate Conception) Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him 'Jesus'. Mary said, " Behold, I am the handmaid of the Lord. May it be done to me according to your word." Then the angel departed from her.
B.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

C.title: Escape to Egypt
C.verse: When the Magi had departed, behold, the angel of the Lord appeared to Joseph in a dream and said, "Rise, take the child and his mother, flee to Egypt, and stay there until I tell you. Herod is going to search for the child to destroy him."
C.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

Herod is going to search for the child to destroy him." MT(2:13) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: Jesus is Named
A.verse: Solemnity Mary Mother of God  ( Jesus is Named ) Then the shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all they had heard and seen, just as it had been told to them. When eight days were completed for his circumcision, he was named Jesus, the name given to him by the angel before he was conceived in the womb.
A.closing: Happy New Year 2024!! May this year be filled with blessings of good health and happiness!! From Agnel and Family.

A.title: Love for Enemies
A.verse: Jesus said, " But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you, so that you may be children of your Father in heaven; for he makes his Sun rise on the evil and on good, and sends rain on the righteous and on the unrighteous."

C.title: Judging Others
C.verse: Jesus said, " Do not judge, and you will not be judged, do not condemn, and you will not be condemned. Forgive, and you will be forgiven. Give, and there will be gifts for you: a full measure, pressed down, shaken together, and overflowing, will be poured into your lap; because the standard you use will be the standard used for you."
C.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

C.liturgicalLabel: Feast of the Chair of St.Peter
C.labelKey: feast of the chair of stpeter
C.title: Peter The Rock
C.verse: Feast of the Chair of St.Peter ( Peter The Rock ) Jesus said, " And so I say to you, you are Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church, and the gates of the underworld shall not prevail against it. I will give you the keys to the kingdom of heaven. Whatever you bind on earth shall be bound in heaven; and whatever you loose on earth shall be lost in heaven."
C.closing: Lord, help us draw strength from St.Peter.
C.fullText: Feast of the Chair of St.Peter ( Peter The Rock ) Jesus said, " And so I say to you, you are Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church, and the gates of the underworld shall not prevail against it. I will give you the keys to the kingdom of heaven. Whatever you bind on earth shall be bound in heaven; and whatever you loose on earth shall be lost in heaven." MT(16:18-19) Lord, help us draw strength from St.Peter.

C.title: Do not Judge
C.verse: Jesus said, " Why do you see the speck in your neighbour's  eye, but do not notice the log in your own eye? A good person out of the store of goodness in his heart produces good, but an evil person out of a store of evil produces evil"
C.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: Disciples Met Jesus
A.verse: Suddenly Jesus met them and said, "Greetings!" And they came to him, took hold of his feet, and worshipped him. Then Jesus said to them, " Do not be afraid; go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee; there they will see me."
A.closing: Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!!

B.title: Jesus Shows Himself to the Disciples
B.verse: Later, as the eleven were at table, he appeared to them and rebuked them for their unbelief and hardness of heart because they had not believed those who saw him after he had been raised. He said to them, "Go into the whole world and proclaim the gospel to every creature."
B.closing: Jesus Christ is Risen Alleluia!!

B.title: Jesus Restored A Little Girl to life
B.verse: He took her by the hand and said to her, " Tal' i-tha cum." Which means, "Little girl, get up!" And immediately the girl got up and began to walk about (She was twelve years of age). At this they were overcome with amazement.
B.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

C.verse: Father said to him, "My son, you are here with me always; everything I have is yours. But now we must celebrate and rejoice, because your brother was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found. "
C.closing: Let's pray asking God the grace to repent .

C.title: Jesus and Zacchaeus
C.verse: Zac-chae'us stood there and said to the Lord, "Look, half of my possessions, Lord, I will give to the poor; and if I  have defrauded anyone of anything, I will pay back four times as much." Jesus said to him, " Today salvation has come to this house, because he too is a son of Abraham. For the Son of Man has come to seek and to save what was lost."
C.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: Resurrection of Jesus
A.verse: But the Angel said to the women, " Do not be afraid; I know that you are looking for Jesus who was crucified. He is not here; for he has been  raised, as he said. Come, see the place where he lay. Then go quickly and tell his disciples, 'He has been raised from th dead, and indeed he is going ahead of you to Galilee; there you will see him.' This is my message for you."
A.closing: Jesus Christ has Risen Alleluia!!!

C.closing: Divine love of God, flows through the Sacred Heart of Jesus. Happy Feast!!!

A.liturgicalLabel: Feast of Assumption of The Blessed Virgin Mary
A.labelKey: feast of assumption of the blessed virgin mary
A.title: Mary's Song of Praise
A.verse: Feast of Assumption of The Blessed Virgin Mary ( Mary's Song of Praise ) Mary said , " My soul magnifies the Lord, and my spirit rejoices in God my Savior, for he has looked with favor on the lowliness of his servant. Surely from now on all generations will call me blessed."
A.closing: Happy Feast and Happy Independence Day.

Surely from now on all generations will call me blessed." LK(1:46-48) Happy Feast and Happy Independence Day!!

A.title: The Canaanite Woman's Faith
A.verse: She said, " Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters' table." Then  Jesus answered her, "Women, great is your faith! Let it be done for you as you wish." And her daughter was healed instantly."
A.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

C.title: Jesus the cause of Division
C.verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Do you think that I have come to establish peace on the earth? No, I tell you, but rather division. From now on a household of five will be divided, three against two and two against three."
C.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: Cross and Self Denial

B.title: What Defiles a Person
B.verse: Jesus said, " It is what comes out of a person that defiles. For it is from within, from the human heart, that evil intentions come: fornication, theft, murder, adultery, avarice, wickedness, deceit, licentiousness, envy, slander, pride, folly."
B.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.

A.title: Jesus is Presented in the Temple
A.verse: Feast of Presentation of the Lord ( Jesus is Presented in the Temple) When the time came for the purification according to the law of Moses, they brought him up to Jerusalem to present him to the Lord, and they offered a sacrifice according to what is stated in the law of the Lord, "a pair of turtle doves or two young pigeon."
A.closing: Happy Feast!! Stay blessed!

default.title: Immaculate Conception
default.verse: Solemnity Theo Annunciation of the Lord ( Immaculate Conception) Then the angel said to her, "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God. Behold, you will conceive in your womb and bear a son, and you shall name him 'Jesus'. Mary said, " Behold, I am the handmaid of the Lord. May it be done to me according to your word." Then the angel departed from her.

default.title: Kingdom of God

default.title: Jesus Calmed the Sea

default.verse: When they had rowed about three or four miles, they saw Jesus walking on the sea and coming near the boat, and they began to be afraid. But he said to them, "It is I. Do not be afraid."
default.closing: Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
default.fullText: 2nd Week od Easter Saturday’s  Gospel Msg ( Jesus Walks on Water) When they had rowed about three or four miles, they saw Jesus walking on the sea and coming near the boat, and they began to be afraid. But he said to them, "It is I. Do not be afraid." JH(6:19-20) Jesus is Lord, spread the living word of God.
